role.en: Marxist theorist who died in prison in 1937, whose Prison Notebooks became a key anti-fascist intellectual legacy

title.en: Founder of the 'Justice and Liberty' movement

role.zh: 1937年在法国被法西斯特工暗杀的自由社会主义领袖
role.en: Liberal-socialist leader assassinated by Fascist agents in France in 1937

governmentForm.zh: 议会共和制，实行两院制，由总统担任国家元首、总理及内阁向议会负责
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic with a bicameral legislature, headed by a president as chief of state while the prime minister and cabinet were responsible to parliament

socialStructure.zh: 以城市中产阶级、产业工人、农民、小店主与公务员为主体，保留传统精英、金融资本家和殖民行政阶层；殖民帝国内存在明显的公民与臣民等级差异
socialStructure.en: A society centered on the urban middle classes, industrial workers, peasants, shopkeepers, and civil servants, while retaining traditional elites, financiers, and colonial administrators; the colonial empire also preserved stark hierarchies between citizens and subjects

rulingClass.zh: 议会政党领袖、高级文官、军官团、金融与工业资产阶级，以及部分传统地主与殖民精英
rulingClass.en: Parliamentary party leaders, senior civil servants, the officer corps, the financial and industrial bourgeoisie, and elements of the traditional landholding and colonial elites

succession.zh: 总统由参众两院联席组成的国民议会选举产生；政府首脑依议会多数与总统任命形成，非世袭
succession.en: The president was elected by the National Assembly formed by the two chambers meeting jointly; the head of government arose through parliamentary majority and presidential appointment, with no hereditary succession

structure.zh: 中央政府由共和国总统、总理、部长会议、众议院与参议院构成；行政体系高度官僚化，并通过省、区、县与市镇的长官体系向全国延伸，同时管理庞大殖民帝国
structure.en: The central government consisted of the president, prime minister, Council of Ministers, Chamber of Deputies, and Senate; the administrative system was highly bureaucratic and extended across the country through prefects, arrondissements, departments, and communes, while also overseeing a vast colonial empire

function.zh: 负责外交关系、条约、联盟协调、驻外使团与殖民外交事务
function.en: Managed diplomatic relations, treaties, alliance coordination, overseas missions, and colonial external affairs

function.zh: 负责陆军组织、征兵、后备役、装备采购与本土防务
function.en: Oversaw army organization, conscription, reserves, procurement, and metropolitan defense

function.zh: 负责海军舰队、海军航空、海岸防御与海外海上交通保护
function.en: Managed the navy, naval aviation, coastal defense, and the protection of overseas maritime routes

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、国债、海关、货币稳定与国家会计
function.en: Handled the budget, taxation, public debt, customs, monetary stability, and state accounting

function.zh: 负责地方行政、警察、治安、选举监管与省长体系
function.en: Supervised local administration, police, public order, election administration, and the prefectural system

function.zh: 负责法属海外领地与殖民行政、资源调配及殖民军协同
function.en: Administered French overseas territories, colonial governance, resource allocation, and coordination with colonial forces

function.zh: 负责公立教育、课程、大学体系与共和公民教育
function.en: Oversaw public education, curricula, universities, and republican civic instruction

name.en: Ministry of Public Works and Transport

function.zh: 负责铁路、公路、港口、桥梁与国家基础设施建设
function.en: Managed railways, roads, ports, bridges, and national infrastructure construction

localAdmin.zh: 本土行政以省为核心，由中央任命省长统辖，下设区、县与市镇；市长和地方议会在一定范围内行使自治，但中央监督强。殖民地则依总督、总督区长、军政长官与土著辅助酋长体系管理，各地法律地位不一
localAdmin.en: Metropolitan administration was centered on departments under centrally appointed prefects, below which stood arrondissements, cantons, and communes; mayors and local councils exercised limited self-government under strong central oversight. The colonies were governed through governors-general, governors, military administrators, and indigenous auxiliary chiefs, with differing legal statuses across territories

legalSystem.zh: 以拿破仑法典传统为基础的大陆法系，强调成文法、国家行政司法体系与共和国世俗原则；殖民地在适用法国法、特别法与土著习惯法之间存在差别
legalSystem.en: A civil-law system rooted in the Napoleonic codes, emphasizing codified law, administrative justice, and the secular principles of the republic; in the colonies, practice varied between French law, special statutes, and indigenous customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以直接税、营业税、消费税、关税和印花税为主，战争动员下扩大所得税与企业税收基础；殖民地提供关税、原料收益与行政性征收
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on direct taxes, business taxes, excise duties, customs, and stamp taxes, with wartime mobilization expanding the base of income and business taxation; the colonies contributed customs revenue, raw-material income, and administrative levies

religion.zh: 法国本土以罗马天主教文化传统为主，但国家实行严格世俗主义；新教、犹太教与无宗教人口亦有相当规模，殖民地则宗教多元，包括伊斯兰教、佛教、万物有灵信仰与基督教
religion.en: Metropolitan France remained culturally rooted in Roman Catholicism, but the state upheld strict secularism; Protestant, Jewish, and nonreligious populations were also significant, while the colonies were religiously diverse, including Islam, Buddhism, animist traditions, and Christianity

philosophy.zh: 主流思想为共和主义、世俗主义、人权传统与法兰西民族国家观念，同时存在社会主义、工团主义、保守民族主义、天主教社会思想与反法西斯人民阵线遗产
philosophy.en: Mainstream thought combined republicanism, secularism, human-rights universalism, and the idea of the French nation-state, alongside socialism, syndicalism, conservative nationalism, Catholic social thought, and the anti-fascist legacy of the Popular Front

writingSystem.zh: 以拉丁字母书写法语为主，官方行政和教育高度标准化；殖民地并存阿拉伯字母、越南国语字、汉字、各类非洲文字传统及地方口传文化
writingSystem.en: French written in the Latin alphabet was dominant, with highly standardized official and educational usage; in the colonies this coexisted with Arabic script, Vietnamese quốc ngữ, Chinese characters, African writing traditions, and local oral cultures

culturalAchievements.zh: 法国在文学、哲学、电影、绘画、建筑、时尚、音乐与科学方面居世界前列。巴黎仍是国际艺术与知识中心之一，拥有卢浮宫、法兰西学院、巴黎大学体系、现代电影工业以及强大的出版业与报刊文化
culturalAchievements.en: France remained a world leader in literature, philosophy, cinema, painting, architecture, fashion, music, and science. Paris was still one of the great international centers of art and intellect, home to the Louvre, the Académie Française, the University of Paris system, a modern film industry, and a powerful publishing and press culture

languageFamily.zh: 官方语言法语属印欧语系罗曼语族；国内并存布列塔尼语、奥克语、阿尔萨斯德语、科西嘉语、巴斯克语等区域语言，殖民地则使用大量本地语言
languageFamily.en: The official language, French, belongs to the Indo-European Romance family; regional languages such as Breton, Occitan, Alsatian German, Corsican, and Basque also survived, while the colonies used many local languages

gdpDescription.zh: 1939年的法国经济属于发达工业—农业混合经济，在欧洲仍居前列，但相较德国和美国动员速度较慢。其优势在于工业基础、金融体系、农业产出和全球殖民网络，弱点则包括投资不足、政治不稳、劳资冲突余波及战争准备滞后
gdpDescription.en: By 1939 France possessed an advanced mixed industrial-agricultural economy that remained among the leading economies of Europe, though its pace of mobilization lagged behind Germany and the United States. Its strengths lay in industrial capacity, finance, agricultural output, and a global colonial network, while weaknesses included underinvestment, political instability, labor tensions, and delayed war preparation

mainIndustries.zh: 钢铁、煤炭、机械制造、汽车、军火、化工、纺织、食品加工、葡萄酒、造船、航空制造、电力与铁路运输
mainIndustries.en: Steel, coal, machinery, automobiles, armaments, chemicals, textiles, food processing, wine, shipbuilding, aircraft production, electricity, and rail transport

tradeGoods.zh: 出口葡萄酒、纺织品、奢侈品、机械、汽车、化工品和制成品；进口石油、橡胶、棉花、矿石、热带农产品及部分粮食与工业原料，殖民地贸易在整体结构中占重要地位
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wine, textiles, luxury goods, machinery, automobiles, chemicals, and manufactured products; imports included oil, rubber, cotton, ores, tropical produce, and some foodstuffs and industrial raw materials, with colonial trade occupying an important place in the overall structure

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布不均，但法国拥有较高的小额储蓄传统、农村土地所有权和城市中产阶级金融资产。上层社会持有大量工业股权、地产和公债，工人阶级则在物价与工资波动中承压
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was unevenly distributed, but France had a strong tradition of small savings, peasant landownership, and middle-class financial assets. Upper strata held substantial industrial shares, real estate, and public debt, while the working class faced pressure from price and wage fluctuations

economicSystem.zh: 以私有制和市场交换为基础的资本主义经济，但国家在铁路、军工、公共事业、金融监管和战争动员方面干预显著增强；殖民地经济则带有明显帝国控制和资源导向特征
economicSystem.en: A capitalist economy based on private property and market exchange, but with significantly growing state intervention in railways, armaments, public utilities, financial regulation, and wartime mobilization; the colonial economy showed strong imperial control and resource-extractive characteristics

source.en: State enterprises and public property income

source.zh: 印花税、登记税及其他收入
source.en: Stamp duties, registration taxes, and other income

category.zh: 社会福利与退伍军人支出

treasuryDescription.zh: 法国财政状况因重新军备与长期债务而承压，但仍保持较大的税收能力、成熟的公债市场和可观的国家金融信誉。法兰西银行黄金储备在国际上颇具分量，不过战时流动性与资本外逃风险上升
treasuryDescription.en: French public finances were strained by rearmament and long-term debt, yet the state still retained considerable taxing capacity, a mature bond market, and substantial financial credibility. The Bank of France held internationally significant gold reserves, although wartime liquidity pressures and risks of capital flight were increasing

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策在1939年已明显转向战时动员，通过增税、借款、军费扩张和产业定向扶持支持国防；同时努力维持法郎信心与社会稳定，但预算赤字扩大几乎不可避免
fiscalPolicy.en: By 1939 fiscal policy had clearly shifted toward wartime mobilization, using higher taxes, borrowing, expanded military spending, and targeted industrial support to strengthen national defense; the government simultaneously tried to preserve confidence in the franc and social stability, though a widening budget deficit was almost unavoidable

description.zh: 法国最大的军种，依靠征兵制、预备役和要塞防御体系，装备包括步兵、炮兵、骑兵机械化部队、坦克部队与殖民部队。1939年动员迅速扩大，但高层指挥、机动 doctrine 与通信体系存在缺陷
description.en: The largest branch, relying on conscription, reserves, and a fortified defense system, with infantry, artillery, mechanized cavalry, tank units, and colonial troops. Mobilization expanded rapidly in 1939, but high command, mobility doctrine, and communications showed serious weaknesses

description.zh: 法国海军在世界范围内仍具重要地位，拥有战列舰、巡洋舰、驱逐舰、潜艇及海外基地网络，主要任务是保护本土海岸、地中海航线、北大西洋交通与殖民联络
description.en: The French Navy remained one of the significant navies of the world, possessing battleships, cruisers, destroyers, submarines, and an overseas base network; its main tasks were to protect the metropolitan coasts, Mediterranean routes, North Atlantic communications, and colonial links

description.zh: 法国空军在两次大战之间独立建军，但1939年仍处于扩充和换装阶段，拥有战斗机、轰炸机、侦察机和防空力量；飞机设计不乏先进型号，但生产、部署与指挥整合不足
description.en: The Air Force had become an independent service between the wars, but in 1939 it was still in the midst of expansion and re-equipment, operating fighters, bombers, reconnaissance aircraft, and air-defense units; some aircraft designs were advanced, but production, deployment, and command integration were inadequate

description.zh: 由北非军、撒哈拉与西非部队、印度支那驻军及法国外籍军团组成，承担帝国防务、驻防和必要时增援欧洲战场的任务
description.en: Composed of North African forces, Saharan and West African troops, Indochinese garrisons, and the French Foreign Legion, tasked with imperial defense, garrison duty, and reinforcement of European theaters when necessary

commanderInChief.zh: 总统阿尔贝·勒布伦为名义统帅；战时最高陆军统帅为莫里斯·甘末林将军
commanderInChief.en: President Albert Lebrun was the nominal commander-in-chief; the wartime supreme army commander was General Maurice Gamelin

technology.zh: 法国军队拥有现代火炮、坦克、堡垒体系、海军重舰与较发达航空工业，在装备水平上并不落后太多；但联合作战、无线电通信、战术机动与空地协同明显逊于德国
technology.en: The French military possessed modern artillery, tanks, fortification systems, major naval vessels, and a relatively advanced aviation industry, and was not grossly backward in matériel; however, joint operations, radio communications, tactical mobility, and air-ground coordination were clearly inferior to Germany's

threats.zh: 首要威胁为纳粹德国及其在中欧的扩张，其次是意大利在地中海和北非的挑战；同时法国必须顾及西班牙局势外溢、殖民地安全、海上补给线以及远东法属印度支那面临的日本压力
threats.en: The primary threat was Nazi Germany and its expansion in Central Europe, followed by Italy's challenge in the Mediterranean and North Africa; France also had to consider spillover from Spain, colonial security, maritime supply lines, and Japanese pressure on French Indochina in the Far East

description.zh: 高度职业化，战术素养出色
description.en: Highly professional, excellent tactical proficiency

description.zh: 士气高昂，战斗意志坚定
description.en: High morale, firm fighting resolve

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

description.zh: 喀秋莎/Nebelwerfer多管火箭炮
description.en: Katyusha/Nebelwerfer multiple rocket launcher

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

populationDescription.zh: 1939年法国本土人口约四千二百万，增长缓慢且人口老龄化较其他大国更明显，这与一战损失和低出生率有关。若计入殖民帝国统治下人口，则法国实际统治人口远高于本土数字
populationDescription.en: Metropolitan France had about 42 million people in 1939, with slow growth and a more pronounced aging pattern than some other great powers, owing in part to First World War losses and low birth rates. If the colonial empire is included, the population under French rule was far larger than the metropolitan total

description.zh: 法国首都，全球时尚与艺术之都
description.en: France's capital, global fashion and art capital

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大致包括工业与金融资产阶级、专业中产阶级、小资产阶级、工人阶级、农民、国家公务员与军人；在殖民地则还存在法国公民、定居殖民者、受教育本地精英与广大被统治臣民之间的法律与政治等级差别
socialClasses.en: Social strata broadly included the industrial and financial bourgeoisie, professional middle classes, petty bourgeoisie, working class, peasantry, civil servants, and military personnel; in the colonies there were also strong legal and political distinctions between French citizens, settler communities, educated local elites, and the mass of governed subjects

name.zh: 普罗旺斯-阿尔卑斯-蓝色海岸

allies.zh: 主要盟友为英国及英联邦，并与波兰、罗马尼亚等国保持安全合作；对美国抱有战略期待，同时依靠殖民帝国与地中海、东欧和中东伙伴维持全球影响力
allies.en: Its principal ally was Britain and the wider British Commonwealth, and it maintained security relationships with Poland, Romania, and others; France also placed strategic hopes on the United States while using its colonial empire and partnerships in the Mediterranean, Eastern Europe, and the Middle East to sustain global influence

enemies.zh: 纳粹德国是最直接的敌对力量，法西斯意大利构成次要但严重威胁；在全球层面，日本帝国对法国远东利益也日益危险
enemies.en: Nazi Germany was the most immediate hostile power, while Fascist Italy posed a secondary but serious threat; globally, the Japanese Empire was also becoming increasingly dangerous to French interests in the Far East

foreignPolicy.zh: 1939年法国外交政策以遏制德国扩张、履行对波兰等盟约承诺、维持英法协作和保全殖民帝国为核心。其战略长期偏向集体安全、同盟体系与防御姿态，但在慕尼黑之后已逐步转向更明确的军事对抗准备
foreignPolicy.en: In 1939 French foreign policy centered on containing German expansion, honoring treaty commitments to states such as Poland, maintaining Anglo-French cooperation, and preserving the colonial empire. Its strategy had long favored collective security, alliance systems, and a defensive posture, but after Munich it moved toward more explicit preparation for military confrontation

era.zh: 世界大战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 法国在航空工程、汽车制造、坦克设计、重炮、无线电、电气化、化工、医学和电影技术方面具有重要成就；同时拥有马奇诺防线等大规模现代防御工程，以及成熟的铁路与城市基础设施体系
keyInnovations.en: France achieved important advances in aeronautical engineering, automobile manufacturing, tank design, heavy artillery, radio, electrification, chemicals, medicine, and film technology; it also possessed large-scale modern defensive works such as the Maginot Line, along with mature rail and urban infrastructure systems

militaryEngineering.zh: 军事工程有实力但理念过时：马奇诺防线代表最先进的要塞工程技术，但防御理念停留在一战。索玛S-35和B1重型坦克在装甲和火力上不逊于德国坦克，但战术运用分散且通信指挥落后。
militaryEngineering.en: Capable military engineering but outdated doctrine: the Maginot Line represents the most advanced fortress engineering, but its defensive concept is stuck in WWI. Somua S35 and B1 heavy tanks match German tanks in armor and firepower, but tactical deployment is dispersed with poor communications and command.

aviationAndAuto.zh: 航空与汽车工业有基础：雷诺和雪铁龙在汽车制造领域有实力。但航空工业因1936年国有化改革而产能混乱，战斗机产量严重不足。莫拉纳-索尔尼MS.406等战斗机性能落后于梅塞施密特Bf-109。
aviationAndAuto.en: Aviation and auto industry has foundations: Renault and Citroën have automotive manufacturing strength. But aviation industry capacity is disrupted by 1936 nationalization reforms, with severely insufficient fighter production. MS.406 and other fighters underperform the Bf-109.

overallAssessment.zh: 1939年的法国拥有世界级的要塞工程和重型坦克，但军事理念停留在一战思维。工业产能虽可观但动员效率低下。航空工业的国有化改革导致产能混乱。法国科技的悲剧在于硬件不差但软件（战术理念、指挥通信、动员体制）严重落后于德国，这将导致1940年的灾难性败退。
overallAssessment.en: France in 1939 has world-class fortress engineering and heavy tanks, but military doctrine is stuck in WWI thinking. Industrial capacity is substantial but mobilization efficiency is low. Aviation nationalization reforms caused production chaos. France's tech tragedy is that hardware wasn't inferior but software (tactics, command communications, mobilization systems) severely lagged Germany — leading to the catastrophic 1940 defeat.

strengths.zh: 法国拥有雄厚工业基础、世界级海军、庞大殖民帝国、发达金融体系、强大炮兵与防御工事、成熟行政机构，以及与英国协作的战略优势
strengths.en: France possessed a substantial industrial base, a world-class navy, a vast colonial empire, a developed financial system, powerful artillery and fortifications, mature administrative institutions, and the strategic advantage of cooperation with Britain

weaknesses.zh: 其主要弱点在于政治分裂、政府更替频繁、人口增长乏力、军队指挥保守、机械化与空地协同不足，以及对快速机动作战的适应缓慢
weaknesses.en: Its main weaknesses lay in political division, frequent cabinet turnover, weak demographic growth, conservative military command, insufficient mechanization and air-ground coordination, and a slow adaptation to rapid mobile warfare

outlook.zh: 1939年的法国仍是强国，但已处于生死攸关的战略关头。若能与英国形成有效协同并将其工业与帝国资源转化为持久战优势，则有能力长期抗衡轴心国；若继续依赖防御性思维与迟缓指挥，则在即将到来的大战中面临严重风险
outlook.en: In 1939 France was still a great power, but it stood at a decisive strategic crossroads. If it could coordinate effectively with Britain and convert its industrial and imperial resources into advantages in a long war, it had the capacity to resist the Axis over time; if it continued to rely on defensive thinking and slow command methods, it faced grave danger in the coming conflict

description.zh: 法国在1939年仍为欧洲强国，并统治广阔殖民帝国。
description.en: France remained a major European power in 1939 and ruled a vast colonial empire.

leaderTitle.en: President of the Council of Ministers (Prime Minister)

ideology.zh: 激进共和主义、中左务实主义、世俗主义、议会民主、绥靖转向抵抗
ideology.en: Radical republicanism, center-left pragmatism, secularism, parliamentary democracy, appeasement turning to resistance

relationship.zh: 达拉第自1938年4月出任总理以来领导中左联合政府。他是1938年慕尼黑协定的法方签署人，以牺牲捷克斯洛伐克换取「和平」。然而慕尼黑协定的破产使达拉第被迫转向备战路线。1939年9月对德宣战后，达拉第政府面临「奇怪战争」时期的政治僵局——既无法有效动员全面战争，也无法回到和平状态。激进社会党作为第三共和国的传统执政核心力量，此时已面临左右两翼的夹击。
relationship.en: Daladier had led a center-left coalition government since becoming Prime Minister in April 1938. He was the French signatory of the 1938 Munich Agreement, sacrificing Czechoslovakia for 'peace.' However, the collapse of the Munich settlement forced Daladier to pivot toward war preparation. After declaring war on Germany in September 1939, the Daladier government faced a political deadlock during the 'Phoney War'—unable to effectively mobilize for total war or return to peace. The Radical-Socialist Party, the traditional governing force of the Third Republic, was by then under pressure from both left and right.

description.zh: 激进社会党是法兰西第三共和国最具代表性的中间偏左政党，自19世纪末以来多次主导法国政治。尽管名称中包含「社会党」，该党实际上代表中产阶级、小业主和共和世俗主义价值观。达拉第政府在1938年终结了人民阵线时代，转向经济自由化和温和保守路线。慕尼黑协定后，达拉第虽然在国内获得短暂欢迎，但很快面临事实的残酷验证。1939年的法国国防虽然纸面实力强大——拥有欧洲最大的陆军、马其诺防线和庞大殖民帝国——但军事学说僵化、空军落后、政治意志分裂，未能为即将到来的闪电战做好准备。达拉第政府在1940年3月因芬兰冬季战争问题下台。
description.en: The Radical-Socialist Party was the most representative center-left party of the French Third Republic, dominating French politics on multiple occasions since the late 19th century. Despite 'Socialist' in its name, the party actually represented the middle classes, small proprietors, and republican secular values. The Daladier government ended the Popular Front era in 1938, pivoting toward economic liberalization and moderate conservatism. After Munich, Daladier was briefly popular at home but quickly faced brutal verification by events. France's national defense in 1939, though impressive on paper—possessing the largest army in Europe, the Maginot Line, and a vast colonial empire—was hampered by rigid military doctrine, an inferior air force, and divided political will, leaving it unprepared for the coming Blitzkrieg. The Daladier government fell in March 1940 over the Finnish Winter War issue.

title.en: Prime Minister and Minister of National Defence

role.zh: 慕尼黑协定签署者，在绥靖与备战之间艰难平衡
role.en: Signatory of the Munich Agreement, struggling to balance between appeasement and war preparation

role.zh: 强硬绥靖派，主张尽一切可能避免战争
role.en: Staunch appeaser who advocated avoiding war at almost any cost

title.en: Chief of the General Staff of National Defence

role.zh: 法军最高指挥官，固守防御战略，将在1940年闪电战中被证明失败
role.en: Supreme French military commander, committed to defensive strategy, to be proven disastrously wrong in the 1940 Blitzkrieg

leaderTitle.en: General Secretary of the PCF

ideology.zh: 马克思列宁主义、反法西斯主义（因苏德条约而陷入混乱）、工人阶级解放、国际主义
ideology.en: Marxism-Leninism, anti-fascism (thrown into confusion by the Nazi-Soviet Pact), working-class emancipation, internationalism

headquarters.zh: 巴黎（1939年9月后被取缔转入地下）
headquarters.en: Paris (banned and driven underground after September 1939)

relationship.zh: 法共在1930年代曾是人民阵线的核心组成部分，拥有强大的工人阶级和知识分子基础。然而1939年8月苏德互不侵犯条约的签署使法共陷入极度尴尬——此前一直高举反法西斯旗帜的共产党被迫为斯大林与希特勒的合作辩护。对德宣战后，达拉第政府于1939年9月26日正式取缔法共，解散其议会党团，大量党员被逮捕。多列士本人奉莫斯科之命逃往苏联，法共被迫转入地下活动。
relationship.en: In the 1930s the PCF had been a core component of the Popular Front, with a strong base among workers and intellectuals. However, the signing of the Nazi-Soviet Pact in August 1939 placed the PCF in an extremely awkward position—the party that had been raising the anti-fascist banner was forced to justify Stalin's accommodation with Hitler. After the declaration of war on Germany, the Daladier government formally banned the PCF on September 26, 1939, dissolved its parliamentary group, and arrested many members. Thorez himself fled to the Soviet Union on Moscow's orders, and the PCF was forced underground.

description.zh: 法国共产党是两战之间法国政治中最有组织力和动员能力的左翼政党之一。1936年人民阵线时期，法共虽未入阁但从外部支持莱昂·布鲁姆的社会党政府，帮助实现了带薪假期、40小时工作周等重大社会改革。法共在工厂委员会、工会和知识界拥有深厚根基——让-保罗·萨特、路易·阿拉贡等著名知识分子与党关系密切。然而苏德条约的冲击是毁灭性的，大量党员和同路人深感背叛。被取缔后的法共在极端困难的条件下维持地下组织，这一经验将在德国占领法国后转化为抵抗运动的核心力量。
description.en: The PCF was one of the most organizationally powerful and mobilization-capable left-wing parties in interwar French politics. During the 1936 Popular Front period, the PCF supported Léon Blum's Socialist government from outside the cabinet, helping achieve major social reforms including paid holidays and the 40-hour workweek. The PCF had deep roots in factory committees, trade unions, and intellectual circles—prominent intellectuals like Jean-Paul Sartre and Louis Aragon were closely connected to the party. However, the impact of the Nazi-Soviet Pact was devastating, and many members and fellow travelers felt profoundly betrayed. After being banned, the PCF maintained its underground organization under extremely difficult conditions, an experience that would transform into the core force of the resistance movement after the German occupation of France.

role.zh: 法共最高领导人，苏德条约后奉命逃往莫斯科
role.en: Supreme leader of the PCF, fled to Moscow on orders after the Nazi-Soviet Pact

title.en: Deputy General Secretary of the PCF

role.zh: 多列士流亡后留在法国领导地下党组织
role.en: Remained in France to lead the underground party organization after Thorez's exile

role.zh: 法共资深领导人和党报负责人，法国左翼的标志性人物
role.en: Senior PCF leader and party newspaper head, an iconic figure of the French left

leaderTitle.en: Leader of Action Française

ideology.zh: 保皇主义、反共和主义、天主教传统主义、反犹主义、反议会民主、极端民族主义
ideology.en: Monarchism, anti-republicanism, Catholic traditionalism, antisemitism, anti-parliamentary democracy, extreme nationalism

relationship.zh: 法国极右翼联盟在1930年代经历了高潮与镇压的循环。1934年2月6日的骚乱几乎演变为准法西斯政变，促使左翼形成人民阵线。1936年人民阵线政府正式解散了主要极右翼联盟，但其成员和意识形态并未消失，而是以新的组织形式——如法兰西社会党（PSF）和法兰西人民党（PPF）——继续活动。到1939年，极右翼虽然在议会中势力有限，但在军官团、天主教保守派和部分工业资本家中拥有相当影响力。其反共、反犹和亲法西斯倾向为日后维希政权的建立提供了意识形态基础。
relationship.en: The French far-right leagues underwent cycles of resurgence and suppression in the 1930s. The February 6, 1934 riots nearly became a quasi-fascist coup, prompting the left to form the Popular Front. The Popular Front government formally dissolved the major far-right leagues in 1936, but their members and ideology did not disappear, continuing under new organizational forms such as the French Social Party (PSF) and the French People's Party (PPF). By 1939, while the far right had limited parliamentary representation, it wielded considerable influence among the officer corps, Catholic conservatives, and some industrialists. Its anti-communist, antisemitic, and pro-fascist tendencies provided the ideological foundation for the later establishment of the Vichy regime.

description.zh: 法国极右翼运动的历史可追溯至德雷福斯事件时期。夏尔·莫拉斯创建的法兰西行动是其思想源头——主张恢复波旁王朝、反对共和制度、奉行极端天主教传统主义和反犹主义。1930年代，在全球经济危机和法西斯浪潮影响下，法国出现了多个准法西斯组织：火十字团（后改组为法兰西社会党）、法兰西人民党、法兰西团结等。这些组织虽然在意识形态上并不完全一致——有的亲纳粹，有的更接近意大利法西斯，有的坚持法国传统保守主义——但共同反对议会民主、仇视共产主义和犹太人。1939年的法国极右翼在正式政治舞台上被边缘化，但其社会基础——尤其是在战败后——将迅速膨胀，为贝当元帅和维希法国的建立提供群众支持和意识形态资源。
description.en: The French far-right movement traced its history back to the Dreyfus Affair era. Charles Maurras's Action Française was its intellectual fountainhead—advocating restoration of the Bourbon monarchy, opposing the republican system, and promoting extreme Catholic traditionalism and antisemitism. In the 1930s, under the influence of the global economic crisis and the fascist wave, France saw the emergence of multiple quasi-fascist organizations: the Croix-de-Feu (later reorganized as the French Social Party), the French People's Party, Francisme, and others. Though these organizations were not entirely ideologically consistent—some were pro-Nazi, some closer to Italian Fascism, others adhering to traditional French conservatism—they shared opposition to parliamentary democracy and hostility toward communism and Jews. The French far right was marginalized on the formal political stage in 1939, but its social base—especially after military defeat—would rapidly expand, providing mass support and ideological resources for Marshal Pétain and the establishment of Vichy France.

role.zh: 法国极右翼思想的教父级人物，保皇主义和反犹主义的主要鼓吹者
role.en: Intellectual godfather of the French far right, chief advocate of monarchism and antisemitism

title.en: President of the French Social Party

role.zh: 前火十字团领袖，拥有法国最大的右翼群众运动
role.en: Former leader of the Croix-de-Feu, commanded France's largest right-wing mass movement

title.en: Leader of the French People's Party

role.zh: 前共产党人转向法西斯主义，亲纳粹极右翼的代表人物
role.en: Former communist turned fascist, representative figure of the pro-Nazi extreme right

governmentForm.zh: 极权一党制法西斯国家，以元首个人独裁为核心，名义上保留国家机构，实则由纳粹党、国家官僚体系与党卫队权力网络交错统治
governmentForm.en: A totalitarian one-party fascist state centered on the personal dictatorship of the Führer, formally retaining state institutions but in practice ruled through an overlapping power structure of the Nazi Party, state bureaucracy, and SS apparatus

socialStructure.zh: 社会被组织为种族等级化、军事化与动员化结构，党政精英、军官团、工业资本与技术官僚居上层；中产、工人和农民被纳入国家控制组织；犹太人、罗姆人、残障者、政治异见者与其他被迫害群体遭系统性排斥与镇压
socialStructure.en: Society was organized into a racialized, militarized, and mobilized hierarchy, with party-state elites, the officer corps, industrial capital, and technocrats at the top; the middle classes, workers, and peasants were incorporated into state-controlled organizations; Jews, Roma, disabled people, political dissidents, and other persecuted groups were systematically excluded and repressed

rulingClass.zh: 纳粹党领导层、帝国官僚高层、国防军高级将领、党卫队与警察首脑，以及与重整军备密切合作的大工业和金融集团
rulingClass.en: The Nazi Party leadership, upper Reich bureaucracy, senior Wehrmacht commanders, SS and police chiefs, and major industrial and financial groups closely tied to rearmament

succession.zh: 无稳定成文继承制度，权力集中于希特勒个人；1939年政权运行依赖元首指定与党内权力斗争，法律与制度服从政治现实
succession.en: There was no stable codified succession system, as power was concentrated in Hitler personally; in 1939 the regime functioned through Führer designation and intra-party power struggles, with law and institutions subordinated to political reality

structure.zh: 国家结构呈多头并行而最终服从元首意志的体制，包括帝国内阁残余、纳粹党机关、四年计划机构、国防军统帅体系、党卫队与秘密警察系统；各机构常因权限重叠而竞争，以“向元首意志工作”推进政策激进化
structure.en: The state structure was polycratic and competitive while ultimately subordinate to the Führer’s will, comprising residual Reich cabinet organs, Nazi Party offices, Four Year Plan agencies, Wehrmacht command structures, and the SS-secret police system; overlapping jurisdictions fostered competition and policy radicalization through 'working toward the Führer'

function.zh: 负责国内行政、地方治理协调、警察体制法理框架与人口登记，但其实际权力部分被党卫队和党务机构侵蚀
function.en: Handled domestic administration, coordination of local governance, the legal framework of policing, and population registration, though much of its practical authority was eroded by the SS and party agencies

function.zh: 管理工业政策、物资配给、对企业监督与战时经济准备，并与四年计划机构协同推进自给自足和军备生产
function.en: Managed industrial policy, material allocation, business supervision, and war-economic preparation, working with the Four Year Plan apparatus to advance autarky and armaments production

function.zh: 负责税收、预算、国债、特别融资工具与吞并地区财政整合
function.en: Oversaw taxation, budgeting, public debt, special financing instruments, and the fiscal integration of annexed territories

function.zh: 执行对外关系、条约谈判、宣传性外交与战前危机管理，但在重要决策上受希特勒、里宾特洛甫及党务渠道主导
function.en: Conducted foreign relations, treaty negotiation, propaganda diplomacy, and prewar crisis management, though major decisions were dominated by Hitler, Ribbentrop, and party channels

function.zh: 统筹陆海空三军总体战略、动员与作战指挥，是战争准备的核心机构之一
function.en: Coordinated grand strategy, mobilization, and operational command of the army, navy, and air force, making it one of the core organs of war preparation

function.zh: 在戈林领导下推动重整军备、原料替代、劳动力调配与经济自给，以备总体战争
function.en: Under Göring’s leadership it drove rearmament, raw-material substitution, labor allocation, and economic self-sufficiency in preparation for total war

name.zh: 党卫队与国家秘密警察体系
name.en: SS and Secret State Police Apparatus

function.zh: 负责政治镇压、情报监控、集中营管理、种族政策执行与对被占领地区的恐怖统治准备
function.en: Handled political repression, intelligence surveillance, concentration camp administration, enforcement of racial policy, and preparation for terror rule in occupied territories

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政名义上由各邦和省份组成，但实际被帝国总督、纳粹党大区长与警察机构牢牢控制；奥地利并入后改组为帝国大区，苏台德地区与其他并入领土也逐步纳入中央化统治
localAdmin.en: Local administration nominally consisted of states and provinces, but in practice was tightly controlled by Reich governors, Nazi Gauleiters, and police institutions; Austria after annexation was reorganized into Reich gaue, and the Sudetenland and other annexed territories were gradually integrated into centralized rule

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系形式上延续大陆法传统和魏玛时期部分机构，但被纳粹化，司法服从政治目标；特别法庭、人民法院、保护性拘押和种族法令严重破坏法治，纽伦堡法成为国家种族迫害的核心法律基础
legalSystem.en: The legal system formally retained the continental civil-law tradition and some Weimar-era institutions, but it was Nazified and subordinated to political aims; special courts, the People’s Court, protective custody, and racial decrees gravely undermined the rule of law, while the Nuremberg Laws became a central legal basis for racial persecution

taxationSystem.zh: 税制由所得税、工资税、营业税、关税、消费税和企业税构成，并辅以强制性公债认购、金融管制与隐性赤字融资；战前财政依靠税收、借款与非常规票据共同支撑军备扩张
taxationSystem.en: The tax system consisted of income tax, wage withholding, turnover taxes, customs duties, excises, and corporate taxation, supplemented by compulsory bond subscriptions, financial controls, and hidden deficit financing; prewar finances relied on a mix of taxation, borrowing, and unconventional paper instruments to sustain rearmament

religion.zh: 居民多数仍名义上属于新教或天主教，但国家意识形态试图压制独立宗教权威，以元首崇拜、种族主义和民族共同体观念取代传统信仰的公共地位；少数新异教和“积极基督教”宣传被政权利用
religion.en: Most inhabitants remained nominally Protestant or Catholic, but state ideology sought to suppress independent religious authority and replace the public role of traditional faith with Führer worship, racism, and the idea of the national community; limited neo-pagan and 'Positive Christianity' propaganda was also exploited by the regime

philosophy.zh: 官方思想并非连贯哲学体系，而是由极端民族主义、社会达尔文主义、反犹主义、种族决定论、反自由主义、反马克思主义和领袖原则拼合而成
philosophy.en: Official thought was not a coherent philosophical system but a composite of extreme nationalism, social Darwinism, antisemitism, racial determinism, anti-liberalism, anti-Marxism, and the Führer principle

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母德文书写体系，正式印刷中仍广泛见到哥特体和德意志黑体传统字体，但罗马体也同时使用
writingSystem.en: The German language was written in the Latin alphabet, with Fraktur and other blackletter traditions still widely seen in official printing, though Roman type was also in use

culturalAchievements.zh: 1939年的文化生产高度受审查和宣传支配。政权在建筑、电影、广播、群众庆典与奥运遗产展示上投入巨大，试图塑造宏大、纪律化和现代化的国家形象；同时系统打压现代主义、前卫艺术和“堕落艺术”，迫使大量知识分子与艺术家流亡
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural production in 1939 was heavily shaped by censorship and propaganda. The regime invested heavily in architecture, film, radio, mass pageantry, and the display of Olympic-era prestige to project an image of grandeur, discipline, and modernity; at the same time it systematically suppressed modernism, avant-garde art, and so-called 'degenerate art,' driving many intellectuals and artists into exile

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族西日耳曼支，以德语为主
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic family, West Germanic branch, with German as the dominant language

gdpDescription.zh: 德国是欧洲最强大的工业经济体之一，已基本摆脱大萧条时期失业危机，并通过国家主导重整军备、公共工程和资本管制实现高增长。但经济结构失衡，严重依赖军工订单、进口原料、外汇管制和债务型融资，和平时期可持续性有限
gdpDescription.en: Germany was one of Europe’s most powerful industrial economies and had largely overcome Depression-era mass unemployment through state-directed rearmament, public works, and capital controls. However, its economy was structurally imbalanced, heavily dependent on military orders, imported raw materials, exchange controls, and debt-based financing, making peacetime sustainability limited

mainIndustries.zh: 钢铁、煤炭、化工、机械制造、军火、汽车、航空、造船、电机、铁路设备、合成燃料与合成橡胶
mainIndustries.en: Steel, coal, chemicals, machinery, armaments, automobiles, aviation, shipbuilding, electrical engineering, railway equipment, synthetic fuel, and synthetic rubber

tradeGoods.zh: 出口机械、化工品、精密设备、金属制品与工业制成品；进口石油、铁矿、铜、橡胶、粮食、棉花及其他战略原料，并通过东南欧清算贸易体系获取农产品和矿产
tradeGoods.en: It exported machinery, chemicals, precision equipment, metal goods, and industrial manufactures; it imported oil, iron ore, copper, rubber, grain, cotton, and other strategic raw materials, while using a clearing-trade network in southeastern Europe to obtain agricultural goods and minerals

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布不均。城市中产与技术工人因就业扩张和工资稳定获得一定改善，但消费品供应受限制，住房短缺持续。农业家庭与小商人受到价格、配给与债务压力影响，而遭迫害群体则被通过没收、排斥和“雅利安化”剥夺财产
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was unevenly distributed. Urban middle-class households and skilled workers saw some improvement through expanding employment and wage stability, but consumer goods remained constrained and housing shortages persisted. Farming families and small shopkeepers faced price, rationing, and debt pressures, while persecuted groups were dispossessed through confiscation, exclusion, and 'Aryanization'

economicSystem.zh: 国家指挥下的资本主义与战时动员经济雏形并存。私有企业大体保留，但投资、价格、进口、外汇、劳工配置与产量越来越受政府、军方和四年计划机构控制
economicSystem.en: A state-directed capitalist system coexisted with an emerging war-mobilization economy. Private enterprise largely remained in place, but investment, prices, imports, foreign exchange, labor allocation, and output were increasingly controlled by the government, military, and Four Year Plan authorities

source.zh: 国有企业、邮政与铁路收益
source.en: State enterprises, postal, and rail revenues

source.zh: 非常规融资与其他收入

category.zh: 公共工程、交通与工业投资
category.en: Public works, transport, and industrial investment

treasuryDescription.zh: 帝国现金与可动用储备并不宽裕，财政稳健性被重整军备严重削弱。官方账目之外存在大量短期债务、票据融资和被占及并入地区资源掠取预期，因此表面财政能力高于真实稳健程度
treasuryDescription.en: The Reich’s cash and readily usable reserves were not abundant, and fiscal soundness had been severely weakened by rearmament. Outside formal budget accounts there existed large short-term debts, bill financing, and expectations of resource extraction from occupied and annexed territories, making apparent fiscal capacity stronger than real sustainability

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以赤字驱动的重整军备、资本管制、税收汲取和政治性资源再分配为核心；国家优先保障战争准备，而非长期民生消费平衡
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on deficit-driven rearmament, capital controls, tax extraction, and politically directed resource redistribution; the state prioritized war preparation over long-term civilian consumption balance

description.zh: 陆军是规模最大的军种，依赖机械化部队、快速机动战术、炮兵与大规模征兵体制。1939年在入侵波兰时承担主攻任务
description.en: The army was the largest branch, relying on mechanized formations, rapid-maneuver tactics, artillery, and a mass conscription system. In 1939 it carried the main burden of the invasion of Poland

description.zh: 空军拥有较强的战术航空力量，包括战斗机、俯冲轰炸机和中型轰炸机，用于制空、近距支援和破坏敌方动员
description.en: The air force possessed strong tactical aviation, including fighters, dive bombers, and medium bombers, used for air superiority, close support, and disruption of enemy mobilization

description.zh: 海军规模相对较小，重点为潜艇战、近海作战与有限水面舰队建设，无法与英国皇家海军正面对抗
description.en: The navy was comparatively small, focused on submarine warfare, coastal operations, and a limited surface fleet, and could not match the Royal Navy in direct confrontation

name.zh: 武装党卫队与准军事编制

description.zh: 包括武装党卫队扩编中的作战部队、一般党卫队辅助组织及后方安全力量，兼具军事与政治镇压功能
description.en: These included the expanding Waffen-SS combat formations, Allgemeine SS auxiliaries, and rear-area security forces, combining military and political-repressive functions

commanderInChief.zh: 阿道夫·希特勒
commanderInChief.en: Adolf Hitler

technology.zh: 德国军队在1939年拥有世界先进水平的作战通信、装甲战术、战术航空协同和火炮工业，但并未实现全军充分机械化，仍大量依靠马匹运输；海军远洋能力不足，战略轰炸力量也不如潜在对手的长期总力战配置
technology.en: In 1939 the German military possessed world-class operational communications, armored tactics, tactical air-ground coordination, and artillery production, but the armed forces were far from fully mechanized and still relied heavily on horse transport; the navy lacked blue-water strength, and strategic bombing capacity also fell short of what long-war opponents could field

threats.zh: 主要外部威胁包括英国、法国及其全球资源体系，东部的波兰与苏联潜在冲突，以及长期看美国工业力量的介入可能；内部则存在后勤瓶颈、原料短缺和多线作战风险
threats.en: Primary external threats included Britain, France, and their global resource systems, potential conflict with Poland and the Soviet Union in the east, and in the longer term the possible intervention of American industrial power; internally, the regime faced logistical bottlenecks, raw-material shortages, and the danger of multi-front war

description.zh: 世界一流训练体系，联合作战能力强
description.en: World-class training system, strong combined-arms capability

description.zh: 士气旺盛，精锐部队自豪感强
description.en: Strong morale, elite units with great pride

description.zh: 斯图卡/SBD俯冲轰炸机，精确打击地面目标
description.en: Stuka/SBD dive bomber for precise ground target strikes

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 世界首种弹道导弹，射程320公里
description.en: World's first ballistic missile with 320km range

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: 喷火/零式/Bf109战斗机，争夺制空权
description.en: Spitfire/Zero/Bf109 fighter for air superiority

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 1939年人口约为7900万，包括德意志旧疆、奥地利并入后人口以及当年并吞地区的一部分。人口总体受城市化、工业化与军事动员影响显著，青年男性大量进入军队和国家劳役体系
populationDescription.en: The population in 1939 was about 79 million, including the old German core, the annexed Austrian population, and part of the population of territories absorbed that year. Society was strongly shaped by urbanization, industrialization, and military mobilization, with large numbers of young men entering the armed forces and state labor institutions

description.zh: 德国首都，欧洲文化与政治中心
description.en: Germany's capital, European cultural and political center

description.zh: 音乐之都与国际组织中心
description.en: City of music and international organizations

description.zh: 德国南部科技与经济中心
description.en: South German tech and economic center

socialClasses.zh: 主要包括党政精英、传统贵族与军官层、大工业家和金融家、专业中产、城市工人、农民、小业主，以及被剥夺权利和隔离迫害的犹太人等群体。官方宣传强调“民族共同体”，但真实社会充满阶层差异、政治监控和种族排斥
socialClasses.en: Major strata included party-state elites, the traditional aristocratic and officer layers, large industrialists and financiers, professional middle classes, urban workers, peasants, small proprietors, and groups such as Jews who were deprived of rights and subjected to segregation and persecution. Official propaganda emphasized a 'people’s community,' but actual society was marked by class differences, political surveillance, and racial exclusion

name.zh: 石勒苏益格-荷尔斯泰因

allies.zh: 主要盟友为法西斯意大利；与日本帝国通过反共产国际协定保持战略接近；与匈牙利、斯洛伐克等中东欧亲德政权关系密切，并通过经济和政治压力影响罗马尼亚、保加利亚等国
allies.en: Its principal ally was Fascist Italy; it maintained strategic alignment with the Japanese Empire through the Anti-Comintern framework; and it had close relations with pro-German regimes in Central and Eastern Europe such as Hungary and Slovakia, while influencing states like Romania and Bulgaria through economic and political pressure

enemies.zh: 1939年在入侵波兰后，德国已与波兰作战，并迅速与英国和法国进入战争状态；从意识形态与战略层面看，苏联既是暂时交易对象也是潜在宿敌
enemies.en: After invading Poland in 1939, Germany was at war with Poland and rapidly entered a state of war with Britain and France; on the ideological and strategic level, the Soviet Union was both a temporary transactional partner and a potential mortal enemy

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以推翻凡尔赛体系、扩张德意志势力范围、夺取“生存空间”、吞并或支配德语及东欧地区、并通过战争重塑欧洲秩序为目标。1939年的关键表现是德苏互不侵犯条约与对波兰的入侵
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to overturn the Versailles order, expand German hegemony, seize 'living space,' annex or dominate German-speaking and Eastern European regions, and remake Europe through war. Its decisive 1939 expression was the Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact and the invasion of Poland

era.zh: 世界大战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术优势包括先进化工、合成燃料与合成橡胶、现代高速公路体系、无线电通信、战术空地协同、装甲兵运用、精密机械与光学工业，以及高水平的工业工程组织能力
keyInnovations.en: Key technological strengths included advanced chemistry, synthetic fuel and rubber, a modern autobahn system, radio communications, tactical air-ground coordination, armored warfare application, precision machinery and optics, and highly developed industrial engineering capacity

militaryEngineering.zh: 军事工程全球前沿：闪击战理论与装甲集群战术革新现代战争形态。虎式坦克、Me-262喷气式战斗机（研发中）、V-2弹道导弹（研发中）代表尖端军事技术。但战略轰炸能力不如英美，核武器研发（海森堡项目）进展远落后于美国曼哈顿计划。
militaryEngineering.en: Frontier military engineering: Blitzkrieg theory and armored group tactics revolutionize modern warfare. Tiger tanks, Me-262 jet fighters (in development), V-2 ballistic missiles (in development) represent cutting-edge military tech. But strategic bombing capability lags behind Britain/US; nuclear weapons R&D (Heisenberg project) far behind the US Manhattan Project.

chemicalsAndIndustrial.zh: 化工与合成材料全球领先：IG法本（I.G. Farben）是全球最大化工企业，合成橡胶（丁纳橡胶）和合成燃料技术缓解了资源封锁压力。克虏伯钢铁和蒂森集团构成强大的重工业基础。哈伯-博施法固氮技术在农业和军事上均至关重要。
chemicalsAndIndustrial.en: Global leader in chemicals and synthetic materials: IG Farben is the world's largest chemical company; synthetic rubber (Buna) and synthetic fuel technologies alleviate resource blockade pressures. Krupp and Thyssen form a powerful heavy industrial base. Haber-Bosch nitrogen fixation is critical for both agriculture and military.

opticsAndPrecision.zh: 光学与精密仪器世界顶级：蔡司光学瞄准镜、恩尼格玛密码机、高精度机床制造体现德国精密工程传统。但密码技术将被英国图灵团队破解。
opticsAndPrecision.en: World-class optics and precision instruments: Zeiss optical sights, Enigma cipher machines, and high-precision machine tools embody the German precision engineering tradition. But Enigma will be broken by Turing's team at Bletchley Park.

overallAssessment.zh: 1939年的德国拥有全球最先进的军事工程和化工技术，闪击战理论将在战争初期取得惊人胜利。但战略资源（石油、稀有金属）严重不足，合成替代品难以完全弥补。核武器研发方向错误将成为致命短板。德国科技虽然精锐但缺乏持久战所需的资源工业深度。
overallAssessment.en: Germany in 1939 possesses the world's most advanced military engineering and chemical technology; Blitzkrieg will achieve stunning early victories. But critical strategic resource shortages (oil, rare metals) cannot be fully compensated by synthetics. Misdirected nuclear research will prove a fatal weakness. German tech is elite but lacks the resource-industrial depth needed for a protracted war.

strengths.zh: 德国在1939年的主要优势是高度工业化、军事准备充分、统治集团决策集中、宣传动员能力强，以及在欧洲大陆拥有显著的陆军与空军打击力
strengths.en: Germany’s main strengths in 1939 were its high level of industrialization, extensive military preparation, concentrated decision-making in the ruling bloc, powerful propaganda mobilization, and formidable army and air power on the European continent

weaknesses.zh: 其根本弱点在于资源不足、海权薄弱、财政失衡、经济依赖掠夺性扩张、行政体系内斗严重，以及极端种族意识形态导致的战略误判与暴政成本。若陷入长期多线战争，结构性劣势将迅速显现
weaknesses.en: Its fundamental weaknesses lay in resource scarcity, weak sea power, fiscal imbalance, dependence on predatory expansion, severe bureaucratic rivalry, and strategic distortions and costs produced by its extreme racial ideology. If drawn into a prolonged multi-front war, these structural liabilities would rapidly become evident

outlook.zh: 就1939年末而言，德国短期内具备发动并赢得区域性闪击战的能力，但其对欧洲全面霸权的追求极可能引发消耗战，并把英国帝国、苏联乃至美国等更大力量卷入冲突，前景危险而不稳定
outlook.en: As of late 1939, Germany possessed the capacity to launch and win short regional blitz campaigns, but its pursuit of continental hegemony was highly likely to trigger a war of attrition and draw in larger powers such as the British Empire, the Soviet Union, and eventually the United States, making its outlook dangerous and unstable

description.zh: 纳粹统治下的德国于1939年入侵波兰，点燃欧洲大战。
description.en: Under Nazi rule, Germany invaded Poland in 1939 and ignited the European war.

name.zh: 国家社会主义德意志工人党

leaderTitle.en: Führer and Reich Chancellor

ideology.zh: 国家社会主义、种族优越论、生存空间扩张、极端反犹主义、反布尔什维克主义、领袖原则
ideology.en: National Socialism, racial supremacy, Lebensraum expansion, extreme antisemitism, anti-Bolshevism, Führerprinzip

headquarters.zh: 柏林帝国总理府与慕尼黑棕色大楼
headquarters.en: Reich Chancellery, Berlin and Brown House, Munich

relationship.zh: 纳粹党自1933年希特勒被任命为帝国总理以来即为德国唯一合法政党。1934年兴登堡总统去世后，希特勒合并总统与总理职权为「元首」，实现了对国家的完全个人独裁。到1939年，纳粹党已全面渗透德国社会的每一个层面——从政府部门、军队到教育、文化、经济和日常生活。党卫队（SS）已从党的保安组织发展为平行于国家的庞大权力帝国。希特勒的个人意志即是国家政策的最终来源。
relationship.en: The NSDAP had been Germany's sole legal party since Hitler was appointed Reich Chancellor in 1933. After President Hindenburg's death in 1934, Hitler merged the offices of President and Chancellor into 'Führer,' achieving complete personal dictatorship. By 1939 the Nazi Party had thoroughly penetrated every layer of German society—from government ministries and the military to education, culture, the economy, and daily life. The SS had grown from the party's security organization into a vast parallel power empire. Hitler's personal will was the ultimate source of state policy.

description.zh: 纳粹党于1920年成立，1933年通过合法选举与政治操纵上台，随即摧毁魏玛共和国的所有民主制度。希特勒政权的核心意识形态建立在种族优越论、反犹主义和生存空间理论之上。1935年的纽伦堡法案剥夺犹太人的公民权利；1938年「水晶之夜」标志着有组织暴力迫害的升级。在外交上，纳粹德国系统性地撕毁《凡尔赛条约》——1936年进军莱茵兰、1938年吞并奥地利和苏台德地区、1939年3月吞并捷克斯洛伐克全境。1939年9月1日入侵波兰，正式引发第二次世界大战。纳粹政权的多头并治体系——党机关、国家官僚、SS帝国、军队——在竞争中服从元首意志，形成了独特的「向元首意志工作」的权力运作模式。
description.en: The NSDAP was founded in 1920 and came to power in 1933 through legal elections and political manipulation, then immediately destroyed all democratic institutions of the Weimar Republic. The core ideology of Hitler's regime was built on racial supremacy, antisemitism, and the theory of Lebensraum. The 1935 Nuremberg Laws stripped Jews of civil rights; the 1938 Kristallnacht marked an escalation of organized violent persecution. Diplomatically, Nazi Germany systematically tore up the Treaty of Versailles—remilitarizing the Rhineland in 1936, annexing Austria and the Sudetenland in 1938, and absorbing the rest of Czechoslovakia in March 1939. The invasion of Poland on September 1, 1939 formally triggered World War II. The polycratic system of Nazi rule—party apparatus, state bureaucracy, SS empire, military—competed while serving the Führer's will, creating the distinctive power dynamic of 'working towards the Führer.'

role.zh: 纳粹德国的绝对独裁者，一切政策的最终决定者和战争的发动者
role.en: Absolute dictator of Nazi Germany, final decision-maker on all policy and instigator of the war

title.zh: 帝国航空部长、四年计划全权代表、帝国元帅
title.en: Reich Minister of Aviation, Plenipotentiary of the Four Year Plan, Reichsmarschall

role.zh: 希特勒指定的接班人，掌控空军和经济动员的权力核心人物
role.en: Hitler's designated successor, power center controlling the air force and economic mobilization

title.zh: 帝国党卫队全国领袖兼德国警察总监
title.en: Reichsführer-SS and Chief of German Police

role.zh: 党卫队和整个警察镇压体系的最高领导人，大屠杀的主要组织者
role.en: Supreme leader of the SS and the entire police-repression apparatus, primary organizer of the Holocaust

title.zh: 帝国人民启蒙与宣传部长
title.en: Reich Minister of Public Enlightenment and Propaganda

role.zh: 纳粹宣传机器的总设计师，控制所有媒体和公共话语
role.en: Chief architect of the Nazi propaganda machine, controlling all media and public discourse

leaderTitle.zh: 国防军最高统帅部参谋长
leaderTitle.en: Chief of the High Command of the Armed Forces (OKW)

ideology.zh: 职业军事主义、普鲁士军事传统、服从与效忠元首、对纳粹意识形态的程度不一的接受
ideology.en: Professional militarism, Prussian military tradition, obedience and loyalty to the Führer, varying degrees of acceptance of Nazi ideology

headquarters.zh: 柏林本德勒街国防军最高统帅部

relationship.zh: 国防军高级将领与纳粹政权之间存在复杂的共生与紧张关系。军方从重整军备和领土扩张中获益巨大，大多数将领支持希特勒恢复德国「大国地位」的目标。然而部分高级军官对纳粹的激进种族政策和冒险战略持保留态度。1938年陆军总司令弗里奇被清洗后，希特勒进一步加强了对军队的个人控制。凯特尔作为OKW参谋长以绝对服从著称（被讽为「点头驴」），而陆军总司令布劳希奇虽有异议但缺乏反抗的勇气。国防军在侵波战役中表现出色，但其与纳粹政权的合作也使其成为战争罪行的共谋者。
relationship.en: The relationship between senior Wehrmacht officers and the Nazi regime was one of complex symbiosis and tension. The military benefited enormously from rearmament and territorial expansion, and most generals supported Hitler's goal of restoring Germany's 'great power status.' However, some senior officers had reservations about the regime's radical racial policies and risky strategy. After the purge of Army Commander-in-Chief Fritsch in 1938, Hitler further tightened personal control over the military. Keitel as OKW Chief was renowned for absolute obedience (mockingly called 'the nodding donkey'), while Army Commander-in-Chief Brauchitsch harbored dissent but lacked the courage to resist. The Wehrmacht performed brilliantly in the invasion of Poland, but its cooperation with the Nazi regime also made it complicit in war crimes.

description.zh: 国防军（Wehrmacht）于1935年由希特勒重建，取代魏玛共和国时期的国防军（Reichswehr）。到1939年，德国拥有欧洲最现代化和最具战斗力的武装力量——陆军发展了闪电战战术，空军（尤其是斯图卡俯冲轰炸机编队）成为战术空中支援的典范，海军虽然规模不及英国但潜艇部队正在快速扩建。国防军最高统帅部（OKW）于1938年成立，名义上统一协调三军，实际上成为希特勒绕过传统陆军总参谋部直接指挥的工具。1939年9月的波兰战役仅用五周即取得决定性胜利，震惊世界。然而国防军内部并非铁板一块——部分军官对战争前景深感忧虑，一些人已开始秘密策划反对希特勒的阴谋。
description.en: The Wehrmacht was rebuilt by Hitler in 1935, replacing the Weimar-era Reichswehr. By 1939 Germany possessed Europe's most modern and combat-effective armed forces—the army had developed Blitzkrieg tactics, the air force (especially Stuka dive bomber formations) exemplified tactical air support, and while the navy was smaller than Britain's, the U-boat fleet was rapidly expanding. The OKW was established in 1938, nominally to coordinate all three services but in practice serving as Hitler's tool to bypass the traditional Army General Staff. The September 1939 Polish campaign achieved decisive victory in just five weeks, shocking the world. Yet the Wehrmacht was not monolithic—some officers were deeply concerned about the war's prospects, and a few had already begun secretly plotting against Hitler.

role.zh: 希特勒的军事幕僚长，以绝对服从著称，后因战争罪被处决
role.en: Hitler's military chief of staff, known for absolute obedience, later executed for war crimes

role.zh: 名义上的陆军最高指挥官，对希特勒的冒险战略有所保留但未能有效抵制
role.en: Nominal supreme commander of the army, harbored reservations about Hitler's risky strategy but failed to resist effectively

title.en: Chief of the Army General Staff

role.zh: 陆军作战规划的核心人物，曾一度考虑参与反希特勒密谋
role.en: Core figure in army operational planning, briefly considered participating in the anti-Hitler conspiracy

leaderTitle.en: Deputy Chief of the Abwehr (Military Intelligence)

ideology.zh: 反纳粹极权、恢复法治国家、基督教人道主义、保守爱国主义与社会民主价值的复杂交汇
ideology.en: Anti-Nazi totalitarianism, restoration of the rule of law, Christian humanism, a complex convergence of conservative patriotism and social democratic values

headquarters.zh: 无固定总部（军事情报局、教会网络、社交圈子中的分散节点）
headquarters.en: No fixed headquarters (dispersed nodes within the Abwehr, church networks, and social circles)

relationship.zh: 反纳粹抵抗运动在1939年是极为分散、脆弱而危险的存在。其参与者来自不同社会阶层和意识形态背景——保守派军官、外交官、教会人士、社会民主党人和知识分子。奥斯特作为军事情报局副局长利用职务便利建立了联络网络，甚至在1938年慕尼黑危机期间策划了未遂的推翻希特勒计划。然而盖世太保的严密监控使任何有组织的反抗极为困难。大多数德国人在1939年仍支持或默认纳粹政权，抵抗者极少且彼此孤立。
relationship.en: The anti-Nazi resistance in 1939 was an extremely dispersed, fragile, and dangerous phenomenon. Its participants came from different social strata and ideological backgrounds—conservative officers, diplomats, clergy, Social Democrats, and intellectuals. Oster, as Deputy Chief of the Abwehr, used his position to build a contact network and even plotted an abortive coup against Hitler during the 1938 Munich crisis. However, the Gestapo's tight surveillance made any organized resistance extremely difficult. Most Germans in 1939 still supported or acquiesced in the Nazi regime, and resisters were few and isolated from each other.

description.zh: 德国反纳粹抵抗运动的构成极为复杂多样。军方反对派以军事情报局局长卡纳里斯和副局长奥斯特为中心，利用情报部门的特殊地位掩护反纳粹活动。1938年苏台德危机期间，包括哈尔德在内的一些高级军官曾密谋在希特勒下令进攻捷克时发动政变，但慕尼黑协定的签署使计划流产。教会方面，新教牧师迪特里希·朋霍费尔等人公开反对纳粹的教会控制和种族政策。「红色乐队」等共产党地下组织从事间谍活动。大学生中也存在零星反抗的萌芽——日后的白玫瑰运动此时尚未成形。1939年11月，木匠格奥尔格·埃尔塞在慕尼黑啤酒馆制造爆炸，险些炸死希特勒，展现了个人行动者的勇气。尽管1939年的抵抗运动力量微弱，但其组织经验和人际网络为日后的7月20日密谋奠定了基础。
description.en: The composition of the German anti-Nazi resistance was extremely complex and diverse. The military opposition centered on Abwehr chief Canaris and his deputy Oster, who used the intelligence service's special position to provide cover for anti-Nazi activities. During the 1938 Sudeten crisis, some senior officers including Halder plotted a coup if Hitler ordered an attack on Czechoslovakia, but the Munich Agreement aborted the plan. In the churches, Protestant pastor Dietrich Bonhoeffer and others openly opposed Nazi church control and racial policies. Communist underground groups like the 'Red Orchestra' conducted espionage. Scattered seeds of resistance existed among university students—the later White Rose movement had not yet taken shape. In November 1939, carpenter Georg Elser planted a bomb in the Munich beer hall that narrowly missed killing Hitler, demonstrating the courage of individual actors. Although the resistance in 1939 was weak, its organizational experience and personal networks laid the groundwork for the later July 20 plot.

role.zh: 反纳粹军事密谋的核心组织者，向盟国泄露德军入侵计划
role.en: Core organizer of anti-Nazi military conspiracy, leaked German invasion plans to the Allies

role.zh: 暗中庇护反纳粹人士，利用情报机构掩护抵抗活动
role.en: Secretly sheltered anti-Nazi figures, using the intelligence apparatus to cover resistance activities

role.zh: 认信教会运动的核心人物，公开反对纳粹种族政策，后参与反希特勒密谋
role.en: Central figure in the Confessing Church movement, openly opposed Nazi racial policies, later joined the anti-Hitler conspiracy

role.zh: 1939年11月独自策划并实施慕尼黑啤酒馆爆炸，险些炸死希特勒
role.en: Single-handedly planned and executed the November 1939 Munich beer hall bombing that nearly killed Hitler

governmentForm.zh: 威权主义社团共和国，在1933年宪法下由总统、总理安东尼奥·德·奥利维拉·萨拉查及执政党国民联盟主导
governmentForm.en: Authoritarian corporatist republic under the 1933 Constitution, dominated by the President, Prime Minister António de Oliveira Salazar, and the ruling National Union

socialStructure.zh: 社会以天主教保守价值、农村地主与城市中产阶层为支柱，工人和雇主被纳入国家主导的社团体系，殖民帝国臣民处于从属地位
socialStructure.en: Society rested on Catholic conservative values, rural landowners, and the urban middle class, while workers and employers were organized into state-directed corporatist bodies and colonial subjects remained subordinate

rulingClass.zh: 总统、总理萨拉查、国民联盟高层、军官团、行政官僚、天主教等级制和大地主金融精英
rulingClass.en: The President, Prime Minister Salazar, senior National Union figures, the officer corps, administrative bureaucrats, the Catholic hierarchy, and landed-financial elites

succession.zh: 总统由有限竞争的选举产生，但实际政权延续主要依赖萨拉查对官僚、军队与执政体制的控制，而非王朝继承
succession.en: The presidency was filled by tightly controlled elections, but real continuity of rule depended on Salazar's control of the bureaucracy, military, and regime institutions rather than dynastic inheritance

structure.zh: 中央集权政府以总统为国家元首、总理为实际施政核心；国民议会权力有限，社团院提供咨询；地方由省长、市政当局与殖民总督执行命令
structure.en: A centralized state with the President as head of state and the Prime Minister as the real executive center; the National Assembly had limited powers, the Corporative Chamber served in an advisory role, and provinces, municipalities, and colonial governors executed policy

function.zh: 管理预算、税收、国债、关税与货币稳定，是萨拉查政权的核心部门
function.en: Managed the budget, taxation, public debt, tariffs, and monetary stability, and was the core ministry of the Salazar regime

function.zh: 负责国内行政、地方政府监督、治安与政治监控协调
function.en: Handled domestic administration, oversight of local government, public order, and coordination of political surveillance

function.zh: 管理陆军、征兵、军官体系与本土防务计划
function.en: Administered the army, conscription, officer structures, and homeland defense planning

function.zh: 负责海军、殖民海上交通线与沿海防御
function.en: Oversaw the navy, colonial sea lanes, and coastal defense

function.zh: 管理非洲与亚洲殖民地的行政、经济开发与驻防安排
function.en: Managed the administration, economic development, and garrison arrangements of African and Asian colonies

function.zh: 处理对英同盟、对西班牙关系、中立政策与殖民外交事务
function.en: Handled the British alliance, relations with Spain, neutrality policy, and colonial diplomacy

localAdmin.zh: 本土分为区与市镇，由中央任命的文官和警察体系严格监督；海外帝国由安哥拉、莫桑比克、几内亚、佛得角、圣多美和普林西比、果阿、澳门与帝汶等殖民总督和行政长官统治
localAdmin.en: Metropolitan Portugal was divided into districts and municipalities under close supervision by centrally aligned civil officials and police, while the overseas empire was ruled through governors and administrators in Angola, Mozambique, Guinea, Cape Verde, São Tomé and Príncipe, Goa, Macau, and Timor

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以大陆法传统和1933年宪法为基础，形式上保留法院体系，但政治案件受审查、秘密警察监控和特别法令影响，公民自由受到严格限制
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on civil-law tradition and the 1933 Constitution; courts formally remained in place, but political cases were shaped by censorship, secret police surveillance, and special decrees, with civil liberties tightly restricted

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、消费税、营业与所得税、殖民收入及国有垄断收益为主，财政政策强调平衡预算与保守支出
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on customs duties, excise taxes, business and income taxes, colonial revenues, and state-monopoly receipts, with fiscal policy emphasizing balanced budgets and conservative spending

religion.zh: 罗马天主教占主导地位，教会在教育、社会伦理和政权合法性中具有重要作用，虽在共和国框架下并非正式国教
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was dominant, and the Church played a major role in education, social morality, and regime legitimacy, though it was not formally the state religion within the republican framework

philosophy.zh: 官方思想强调天主教保守主义、民族主义、秩序、反自由主义、反共产主义和社团主义，反对群众民主与阶级斗争
philosophy.en: Official ideology stressed Catholic conservatism, nationalism, order, anti-liberalism, anti-communism, and corporatism, rejecting mass democracy and class struggle

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写葡萄牙语；官方文书与教育体系高度标准化
writingSystem.en: Portuguese was written in the Latin alphabet, with a highly standardized official and educational written form

culturalAchievements.zh: 1930年代葡萄牙在文学、法多音乐、历史叙事、殖民宣传和纪念性建筑上持续发展；政权通过展览、审查和学校教育塑造国家主义文化
culturalAchievements.en: In the 1930s Portugal continued to develop in literature, fado music, historical narrative, colonial propaganda, and monumental architecture; the regime shaped nationalist culture through exhibitions, censorship, and schooling

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族，以葡萄牙语为官方语言；殖民地同时存在多种非洲和亚洲语言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch, with Portuguese as the official language; many African and Asian languages also existed in the colonies

gdpDescription.zh: 葡萄牙经济在欧洲属中低收入水平，农业比重仍高，工业化有限但财政稳定；本土经济与殖民贸易、海运和港口服务密切相连
gdpDescription.en: Portugal's economy was lower-middle income by European standards, still heavily agrarian and only modestly industrialized, but fiscally stable; the metropolitan economy was closely linked to colonial trade, shipping, and port services

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、渔业、葡萄酒、软木、橄榄油、纺织、罐头、船运、殖民贸易、轻工业与矿业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, fishing, wine, cork, olive oil, textiles, canning, shipping, colonial trade, light industry, and mining

tradeGoods.zh: 软木、葡萄酒、沙丁鱼罐头、橄榄油、纺织品、钨矿、殖民农产品、进口煤炭、机械和制成品
tradeGoods.en: Cork, wine, canned sardines, olive oil, textiles, tungsten ore, colonial agricultural products, and imported coal, machinery, and manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布不均，农村小农和佃农收入有限，城市中产与地主阶层拥有较多资产；储蓄偏保守，黄金和地产具有象征性价值
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was unevenly distributed, with small farmers and tenants holding limited resources while urban middle classes and landowners possessed more assets; savings habits were conservative, and gold and land carried symbolic value

economicSystem.zh: 国家监管下的保守社团经济，强调预算平衡、有限工业保护、对外贸易控制和殖民资源利用，同时允许私有财产与私人企业存在
economicSystem.en: A conservative corporatist economy under state regulation, emphasizing balanced budgets, selective industrial protection, trade controls, and colonial resource use while retaining private property and private enterprise

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库在欧洲战前环境中相对稳健，得益于萨拉查长期强调紧缩、平衡预算与信用恢复，但经济规模有限，难以支持大规模战争动员
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was relatively sound in the prewar European environment thanks to Salazar's long emphasis on austerity, balanced budgets, and restored credit, though the economy was too small to sustain large-scale war mobilization

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策极端谨慎，以平衡预算、抑制通胀、维护货币信用和限制社会福利扩张为核心
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was highly cautious, centered on balanced budgets, inflation restraint, maintenance of currency credibility, and limits on welfare expansion

description.zh: 以步兵为主，装备多为一战后和两战间时期武器，负责本土防御、边境警戒及殖民地驻防增援
description.en: Primarily infantry-based, equipped largely with post-World War I and interwar weapons, responsible for homeland defense, frontier security, and reinforcement of colonial garrisons

description.zh: 规模有限，承担海岸防御、护航、殖民交通线保护和港口控制任务，主力为小型巡洋舰、驱逐舰与辅助舰艇
description.en: Limited in size, tasked with coastal defense, escort duty, protection of colonial sea routes, and port control, relying on small cruisers, destroyers, and auxiliary vessels

description.zh: 1939年仍处于独立空军形成前阶段，规模较小，主要执行侦察、联络、训练和有限防空任务
description.en: In 1939 still before the creation of an independent air force, it remained small and mainly performed reconnaissance, liaison, training, and limited air-defense tasks

name.zh: 国民共和卫队与准军事部队
name.en: National Republican Guard and paramilitary forces

description.zh: 承担国内治安、交通节点守卫、政治秩序维护与战时内部安全任务
description.en: Responsible for internal security, guarding transport nodes, maintaining political order, and wartime domestic security

commanderInChief.zh: 奥斯卡尔·卡尔莫纳总统（名义统帅）；实际军事政策受安东尼奥·德·奥利维拉·萨拉查政府主导
commanderInChief.en: President Óscar Carmona (nominal commander-in-chief); actual military policy was directed by the government of António de Oliveira Salazar

technology.zh: 军备技术总体落后于德国、英国和法国，仍以步枪、机枪、轻炮和少量老式舰机为主，但在通信、海岸防御和殖民后勤上保持基本能力
technology.en: Military technology was generally behind that of Germany, Britain, and France, relying on rifles, machine guns, light artillery, and small numbers of aging ships and aircraft, though it retained basic competence in communications, coastal defense, and colonial logistics

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自伊比利亚半岛局势变化、海上交通线受大战波及、殖民地安全和列强对大西洋与非洲据点的战略竞争；西班牙内战刚结束，也促使里斯本维持高度警惕
threats.en: Main threats came from shifts in the Iberian balance, wartime disruption of sea lanes, colonial security, and great-power rivalry over Atlantic and African positions; the recent end of the Spanish Civil War also kept Lisbon highly cautious

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: T-34/谢尔曼/四号坦克，装甲战核心
description.en: T-34/Sherman/Panzer IV medium tank, core of armored warfare

description.zh: 斯图卡/SBD俯冲轰炸机，精确打击地面目标
description.en: Stuka/SBD dive bomber for precise ground target strikes

populationDescription.zh: 人口约760万，绝大多数居住在葡萄牙本土，社会仍以农村人口为主；殖民帝国人口规模远大于本土，但不计入此处核心国家人口
populationDescription.en: The population was about 7.6 million, with the overwhelming majority living in metropolitan Portugal; society remained predominantly rural, while the colonial empire contained a much larger subject population not counted here in the core national total

description.zh: 大航海时代起点
description.en: Starting point of the Age of Discovery

socialClasses.zh: 上层由地主、金融家、高级官僚、军官与教会人士组成；中层包括公务员、商人、专业人士和小业主；下层主要是农民、农业雇工、渔民和城市工人。殖民体系中的土著臣民和混合社群在法律与经济机会方面明显不平等
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of landowners, financiers, senior bureaucrats, officers, and clergy; the middle strata included civil servants, merchants, professionals, and small proprietors; the lower strata were mainly peasants, agricultural laborers, fishermen, and urban workers. Indigenous colonial subjects and mixed communities within the empire faced marked legal and economic inequality

allies.zh: 葡萄牙维持与英国的传统联盟关系，并在意识形态上同情佛朗哥西班牙，但1939年以中立为正式立场
allies.en: Portugal maintained its traditional alliance with Britain and was ideologically sympathetic to Francoist Spain, but in 1939 its formal position was neutrality

enemies.zh: 1939年没有正式宣战对象；政权将共产主义运动、激进共和派与可能威胁殖民地的外部列强视为主要潜在敌手
enemies.en: In 1939 Portugal had no formal wartime enemy; the regime viewed communist movements, radical republicans, and outside powers that might threaten the colonies as principal potential adversaries

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以保全本土与殖民帝国、维持英葡同盟、避免卷入欧洲大战、巩固伊比利亚反共和合作并争取国际承认其海外领地为核心
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving the metropole and colonial empire, maintaining the Anglo-Portuguese alliance, avoiding entanglement in the European war, consolidating anti-republican Iberian cooperation, and securing international recognition of its overseas possessions

era.zh: 世界大战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 拥有铁路、电报、电话、广播、现代港口设施、基础汽车运输、有限航空和军工维修能力；但重工业、机械制造和先进军工体系相对薄弱
keyInnovations.en: Portugal possessed railways, telegraphy, telephony, radio, modern port facilities, basic motor transport, limited aviation, and military maintenance capacity; however, heavy industry, machine production, and advanced armaments manufacturing were comparatively weak

strengths.zh: 财政纪律强，国内政局相对稳定，海上位置重要，拥有大西洋岛屿和殖民帝国，能够在列强竞争间维持有限回旋空间
strengths.en: It had strong fiscal discipline, relative domestic stability, a valuable maritime position, Atlantic islands and a colonial empire, and some room to maneuver among the great powers

weaknesses.zh: 经济规模小，工业基础薄弱，军备落后，社会贫困与文盲率较高，政治自由受压制，殖民体系长期成本高且存在国际压力
weaknesses.en: Its economy was small, industrial foundations weak, armaments outdated, poverty and illiteracy remained high, political freedom was suppressed, and the colonial system carried long-term costs and international pressure

outlook.zh: 短期内政权在中立、财政保守和警察控制下前景稳定；若欧洲大战扩大，葡萄牙将面临航运中断、殖民防务压力及在英德之间艰难平衡的挑战
outlook.en: In the short term the regime appeared stable under neutrality, fiscal conservatism, and police control; if the European war expanded, Portugal would face shipping disruption, colonial defense pressures, and the challenge of balancing uneasily between Britain and Germany

description.zh: 葡萄牙在萨拉查威权体制下维持中立并保有殖民帝国。
description.en: Portugal remained neutral under Salazar's authoritarian system while retaining a colonial empire.

dynasty.zh: 两次大战之间的共和政权

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，1935年四月宪法下带有强烈威权色彩的半独裁体制
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic under the April Constitution of 1935, with strong authoritarian features

socialStructure.zh: 社会由地主与旧贵族残余、国家官僚、军官团、城市中产阶级、工人阶级和占人口多数的农民组成，同时包含规模庞大的乌克兰人、犹太人、白俄罗斯人、德国人和立陶宛人等少数民族社群。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of remnants of landed elites and old nobility, state bureaucrats, the officer corps, the urban middle class, industrial workers, and a peasant majority, alongside large minority communities including Ukrainians, Jews, Belarusians, Germans, and Lithuanians.

rulingClass.zh: 以“萨纳齐亚”集团为核心的总统府、高级军官、国家官僚和亲政府技术官僚
rulingClass.en: The ruling class centered on the Sanation camp, the presidency, senior military officers, state bureaucrats, and pro-government technocrats

succession.zh: 总统依宪法程序继任，但1939年战时崩溃导致政府流亡并以非常状态延续法统
succession.en: Presidential succession followed constitutional procedure, but the 1939 wartime collapse forced the government into exile and continuity was maintained under emergency conditions

structure.zh: 中央政府以总统、部长会议、两院议会和受执政集团控制的行政体系为骨架；地方上设省、县和市镇，由总督、省长和地方行政机关执行国家命令。
structure.en: The central government was structured around the president, the Council of Ministers, a bicameral parliament, and an administrative apparatus controlled by the ruling camp; locally it was organized into voivodeships, counties, and municipalities under governors and local administrative offices.

function.zh: 负责对德、对苏以及对英法关系，管理驻外使团并协调战前联盟与保证安排。
function.en: Handled relations with Germany, the Soviet Union, and Britain and France, managed foreign missions, and coordinated prewar alliance and guarantee arrangements.

function.zh: 管理陆军动员、军需、训练和军区行政，是国家防御体制的核心部门。
function.en: Managed army mobilization, supply, training, and military district administration, forming the core of the national defense system.

function.zh: 负责警察、地方行政监督、公共秩序、人口登记与边境安全的民政协调。
function.en: Oversaw police, supervision of local administration, public order, civil registration, and civilian coordination of border security.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、国家债务、关税和货币稳定政策。
function.en: Handled the budget, taxation, public debt, customs, and monetary stabilization policy.

function.zh: 监管工业发展、矿业、国家投资项目和对外贸易政策，特别是中央工业区建设。
function.en: Supervised industrial development, mining, state investment projects, and foreign trade policy, especially the Central Industrial Region program.

function.zh: 管理铁路、邮政、电报、公路和航空运输基础设施。
function.en: Managed railways, post, telegraph, roads, and transport aviation infrastructure.

name.en: Ministry of Agriculture and Agrarian Reform

function.zh: 负责农业政策、土地改革、农村生产和粮食供给管理。
function.en: Oversaw agricultural policy, land reform, rural production, and food supply administration.

function.zh: 管理法院系统、检察机构、监狱和法典实施。
function.en: Administered the court system, prosecution services, prisons, and enforcement of legal codes.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政分为16个省，下辖县和市镇；省长由中央任命，地方自治存在但受国家强力监督，东部边疆地区的行政与治安控制尤为严格。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into 16 voivodeships, below them counties and municipalities; governors were appointed by the center, and local self-government existed but was tightly supervised, especially in the eastern borderlands.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合大陆法传统与统一后的波兰国家法典，刑法和民法在两次大战间逐步整合；政治案件中行政权与警察权影响显著。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined continental civil law traditions with the unified legislation of the restored Polish state; criminal and civil law were gradually integrated during the interwar years, though executive and police influence was significant in political cases.

taxationSystem.zh: 国家财政依靠直接税、营业税、消费税、关税、国有企业收入和垄断收益，农村税负较重，战前动员使特别征收和借款压力上升。
taxationSystem.en: State finances relied on direct taxes, turnover taxes, excises, customs duties, state enterprise income, and monopoly revenues; the rural population bore a heavy burden, and prewar mobilization increased extraordinary levies and borrowing pressure.

religion.zh: 以罗马天主教为主导宗教，同时有东正教、犹太教、希腊天主教、新教和少数伊斯兰社群；天主教在国家认同和公共生活中具有核心地位。
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the dominant religion, alongside Orthodox Christianity, Judaism, Greek Catholicism, Protestantism, and small Muslim communities; Catholicism held a central place in national identity and public life.

philosophy.zh: 政治思想融合天主教民族主义、国家主义、毕苏斯基派国家理性、保守主义与有限的自由议会传统；知识界亦受实证主义和现代主义影响。
philosophy.en: Political thought blended Catholic nationalism, statism, Piłsudskiite reason of state, conservatism, and a limited parliamentary tradition; intellectual circles were also influenced by positivism and modernism.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写波兰语，少数民族社群也使用希伯来字母、意第绪文正字法、乌克兰和白俄罗斯的西里尔字母以及德语拉丁字母。
writingSystem.en: Polish was written in the Latin alphabet, while minority communities also used Hebrew script, Yiddish orthography, Cyrillic for Ukrainian and Belarusian, and German Latin script.

culturalAchievements.zh: 两次大战之间的波兰在文学、戏剧、海报艺术、电影、数学、逻辑学和作曲领域成就突出；华沙和利沃夫学派在数学与逻辑学上具有国际声誉，国家也推动现代主义建筑与教育扩展。
culturalAchievements.en: Interwar Poland achieved distinction in literature, theater, poster art, film, mathematics, logic, and composition; the Warsaw and Lwów schools enjoyed international prestige in mathematics and logic, while the state promoted modernist architecture and educational expansion.

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言波兰语属印欧语系斯拉夫语族西斯拉夫支，境内并存乌克兰语、白俄罗斯语、意第绪语、德语、立陶宛语等。
languageFamily.en: The principal language, Polish, belonged to the West Slavic branch of the Indo-European family; Ukrainian, Belarusian, Yiddish, German, Lithuanian, and others were also spoken within the state.

gdpDescription.zh: 波兰经济处于中等工业化水平，整体仍以农业为主，但国家在1930年代后期通过中央工业区计划加速军工、钢铁、化工和基础设施建设。地区差异显著：西部和中部较发达，东部“边疆地区”明显较贫困。
gdpDescription.en: The Polish economy stood at a middling level of industrialization, remaining predominantly agrarian overall, but the state accelerated armaments, steel, chemical, and infrastructure development through the Central Industrial Region program in the late 1930s. Regional disparities were strong: the west and center were more developed, while the eastern borderlands were notably poorer.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、煤炭开采、钢铁、纺织、铁路设备、军火生产、木材加工、食品加工、化工和港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, coal mining, steel, textiles, railway equipment, armaments production, timber processing, food processing, chemicals, and port trade

tradeGoods.zh: 煤炭、木材、粮食、肉类、糖、纺织品、锌、石油制品和工业半成品；进口机器、军备材料、工业设备、橡胶及部分殖民地原料
tradeGoods.en: Coal, timber, grain, meat, sugar, textiles, zinc, petroleum products, and semi-finished industrial goods; imports included machinery, armaments materials, industrial equipment, rubber, and selected colonial raw materials

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富高度不均，城市中产与地主拥有较多不动产和储蓄，广大农户普遍土地细碎、现金不足并负有债务；犹太和德裔城市商业阶层在部分城镇经济中占重要地位。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: urban middle classes and landowners held more property and savings, while many peasant households had fragmented plots, little cash, and debt burdens; Jewish and ethnic German urban commercial strata played important roles in parts of the town economy.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制，国家在金融、铁路、军工、基础设施和战略工业中的角色不断扩大，同时保留私人农业、工商业和外贸活动。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economic system in which the state played an expanding role in finance, railways, armaments, infrastructure, and strategic industry while private agriculture, commerce, and foreign trade remained significant.

treasuryDescription.zh: 战前波兰持有相当规模的黄金与外汇储备，并在1939年9月战败前后尽力将黄金外运以维持流亡政府信用；但国内财政因战争动员和国土沦陷而迅速失效。
treasuryDescription.en: On the eve of war Poland held substantial gold and foreign exchange reserves and sought to evacuate its gold in September 1939 to sustain the credit of the government-in-exile; however, domestic public finance ceased to function rapidly under wartime mobilization and occupation.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策在1930年代后期转向赤字可控、以国防和工业化优先的干预路线，依赖税收、垄断收入和借款支持动员与中央工业区建设。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy in the late 1930s shifted toward a controlled-deficit, interventionist line prioritizing defense and industrialization, supported by taxation, monopoly income, and borrowing for mobilization and the Central Industrial Region.

description.zh: 波兰武装力量主力，包括步兵师、骑兵旅、炮兵、工兵和边防部队；动员后兵力庞大，但装备、通信和机械化程度落后于德军。
description.en: The main component of the Polish armed forces, including infantry divisions, cavalry brigades, artillery, engineers, and border troops; once mobilized it was numerically large, but lagged behind the German army in equipment, communications, and mechanization.

description.zh: 拥有战斗机、轰炸机和侦察机部队，飞行员训练质量较高，但机型整体陈旧、数量有限，开战初期即遭严重消耗。
description.en: Fielded fighter, bomber, and reconnaissance formations with well-trained pilots, but aircraft types were generally obsolete and limited in number, suffering heavy attrition early in the campaign.

description.zh: 规模较小，主要驻扎波罗的海沿岸，拥有驱逐舰、潜艇、布雷舰和岸防力量；面对德国海军和制空权劣势，其作用有限，部分舰艇于战前执行“北京计划”转赴英国。
description.en: Small in scale and based on the Baltic coast, with destroyers, submarines, minelayers, and coastal defense forces; facing German naval superiority and loss of air cover, its role was limited, and some ships departed for Britain under the Peking Plan before hostilities.

description.zh: 包括边防军团、宪兵、国家警察配属单位和地方防卫力量，用于边境警戒、治安与后方支援。
description.en: Included Border Protection Corps units, gendarmerie, police-attached formations, and local defense elements used for frontier security, order, and rear-area support.

commanderInChief.zh: 爱德华·雷兹-希米格维元帅
commanderInChief.en: Marshal Edward Rydz-Śmigły

technology.zh: 军队技术处于一战后向机械化过渡阶段，拥有现代步枪、火炮和少量装甲车辆，但无线电、坦克数量、战斗机性能、防空与机动后勤均落后于德国，面对苏联两线进攻更难支撑。
technology.en: Military technology was in a transitional post-First World War stage, with modern rifles, artillery, and limited armored vehicles, but radios, tank numbers, fighter performance, anti-aircraft capability, and mobile logistics all lagged behind Germany, and the Soviet attack on a second front made resistance even harder.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自纳粹德国的全面入侵和苏联的东线进攻；次要威胁包括空袭、装甲突破、边境少数民族紧张以及盟友无法迅速提供直接陆上援助。
threats.en: The principal threats came from full-scale invasion by Nazi Germany and the Soviet offensive from the east; secondary threats included air attack, armored breakthroughs, borderland ethnic tensions, and the inability of allies to provide rapid direct land assistance.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气尚可，常规水平
description.en: Adequate morale, average cohesion

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

populationDescription.zh: 1939年波兰人口约3500万，是一个多民族国家。约三分之二至七成为波兰族，另有大量乌克兰人、犹太人、白俄罗斯人和德国人，以及较小的立陶宛、捷克、俄罗斯、亚美尼亚与鞑靼社群。
populationDescription.en: In 1939 Poland had about 35 million inhabitants and was a multiethnic state. Roughly two-thirds to seven-tenths were ethnic Poles, with large Ukrainian, Jewish, Belarusian, and German populations as well as smaller Lithuanian, Czech, Russian, Armenian, and Tatar communities.

description.zh: 波兰首都，中东欧经济中心
description.en: Polish capital, Central-Eastern European economic center

description.zh: 波兰古都
description.en: Ancient capital of Poland

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层以农民为最大群体，其次是城市工人、小商人、知识分子、国家公务员、地主和企业主。军官团和公务员在国家生活中地位突出，少数民族在商业、手工业和边疆农村人口中占有重要比例。
socialClasses.en: Social classes were dominated by peasants, followed by urban workers, petty traders, professionals, state employees, landowners, and industrial proprietors. The officer corps and civil service were especially prominent in public life, while minorities were strongly represented in commerce, crafts, and borderland rural populations.

allies.zh: 主要盟友为法国和英国；与罗马尼亚保持合作关系，并依靠西方的安全保证，但1939年9月未能获得及时有效的军事救援。
