After the February 26 Incident of 1936 (a rebellion by Kōdōha young officers), the Tōseiha used the opportunity to thoroughly purge their rivals and establish absolute dominance within the Army. The passage of the National Mobilization Law in 1938 marked the triumph of the Tōseiha line—the national economy and society were comprehensively placed on a war footing. By 1939, the China war was in its third year; the Tōseiha-dominated war machine had conquered vast territory tactically but could not force China's surrender, and the strategic deadlock was becoming increasingly apparent. Tojo, as a representative hardliner in the Army, was pushing for a more aggressive southern advance strategy.

role.zh: 统制派核心人物，激进扩张主义者，1941年将出任首相
role.en: Core Tōseiha figure and radical expansionist, would become Prime Minister in 1941

title.en: Chief of the Army General Staff

role.zh: 陆军最高作战指挥官，对华战争的主要推动者
role.en: Supreme operational commander of the Army and primary driver of the China war

role.zh: 九一八事变的策划者之一，1939年任陆军大臣推进军部政策
role.en: One of the planners of the Manchurian Incident, served as War Minister in 1939 advancing military policy

leaderTitle.en: Former Prime Minister, President of the Privy Council

ideology.zh: 天皇制维护、有限扩张主义、外交解决争端优先、避免与英美全面冲突
ideology.en: Imperial system preservation, limited expansionism, diplomatic resolution of disputes, avoidance of full-scale conflict with Britain and America

relationship.zh: 宫廷温和派并非一个正式组织，而是围绕天皇宫廷的一个松散的政治倾向群体，包括元老重臣、部分枢密顾问官、宫内省官员和外务省外交官。他们对军部的激进扩张路线持谨慎态度，担心与英美苏的全面战争将导致帝国毁灭。近卫文麿在1937-1939年的第一次内阁期间虽然未能阻止对华战争全面升级，但其人脉和政治影响力使他成为军部以外最重要的政治人物。天皇本人虽名义上超然于政治之上，但通过内大臣、侍从武官长等宫廷渠道对重大决策施加影响。
relationship.en: The Imperial Court Moderates were not a formal organization but a loose political tendency group around the Imperial Court, including elder statesmen (jūshin), some Privy Councillors, Imperial Household Ministry officials, and Foreign Ministry diplomats. They took a cautious attitude toward the military's aggressive expansion, fearing that full-scale war with Britain, America, and the Soviet Union would lead to the empire's destruction. Konoe, during his first cabinet in 1937–1939, failed to prevent the full escalation of the China war, but his connections and political influence made him the most important political figure outside the military. The Emperor himself, though nominally above politics, exerted influence on major decisions through Court channels such as the Lord Keeper of the Privy Seal and the Chief Aide-de-Camp.

description.zh: 宫廷温和派的历史根基可追溯至明治维新以来的元老政治传统。在明治和大正时代，元老（如伊藤博文、山县有朋、西园寺公望等）对首相人选和国策方向拥有决定性影响力。然而到1939年，最后一位元老西园寺公望年事已高（90岁），其影响力大为衰减。近卫文麿作为五摄家之首的后裔，在贵族出身和政治才能上均具独特地位。他在1937年6月至1939年1月的首相任期内发起了「东亚新秩序」声明，试图在扩张与外交之间寻找平衡，但最终被军部的既成事实所绑架。1939年的宫廷温和派面临的根本困境是：他们虽然意识到无限制扩张的危险，但既缺乏制度性权力来约束军部，也不愿从根本上挑战军国主义体制本身。
description.en: The historical roots of the Imperial Court Moderates traced back to the genrō political tradition since the Meiji Restoration. In the Meiji and Taishō eras, the genrō (elder statesmen such as Itō Hirobumi, Yamagata Aritomo, and Saionji Kinmochi) held decisive influence over the selection of prime ministers and national policy direction. However, by 1939 the last surviving genrō Saionji was advanced in age (90 years old), and his influence had greatly diminished. Konoe, as a descendant of the leading sekke (regent houses), held a unique position in both aristocratic lineage and political talent. During his premiership from June 1937 to January 1939, he issued the 'New Order in East Asia' declaration, attempting to balance expansion with diplomacy, but was ultimately held hostage by the military's fait accompli. The fundamental dilemma facing the Court moderates in 1939 was that while they recognized the dangers of unlimited expansion, they lacked both the institutional power to constrain the military and the willingness to fundamentally challenge the militarist system itself.

role.zh: 贵族出身的政治家，在军部与宫廷之间斡旋，1940-1941年将再度出任首相
role.en: Aristocratic politician mediating between the military and Court, would serve as PM again in 1940–1941

title.en: Minister of Education (later Lord Keeper of the Privy Seal)

role.zh: 近卫的亲信，天皇身边的关键政治顾问
role.en: Konoe's confidant and key political adviser close to the Emperor

role.zh: 年迈但仍对首相人选保留建议权的最后元老，自由主义国际协调路线的象征
role.en: Aged but still retaining advisory rights on PM selection, symbol of liberal international coordination

leader.zh: 无公开领导人（主要领袖已被免职或监禁）
leader.en: No open leader (principal leaders had been dismissed or imprisoned)

leaderTitle.en: None (purged from power)

ideology.zh: 天皇亲政、直接行动主义、农本主义、反财阀反官僚、精神至上的军事思想
ideology.en: Direct imperial rule, direct actionism, agrarianism, anti-zaibatsu and anti-bureaucracy, spirit-first military thought

headquarters.zh: 无固定总部（分散于军内外）
headquarters.en: No fixed headquarters (dispersed within and outside the military)

relationship.zh: 皇道派在1936年二二六事件失败后作为有组织的军内派系已被彻底摧毁。其精神领袖荒木贞夫被解除军职，真崎甚三郎被军法审判（虽获无罪释放但政治影响力尽失），二二六事件中的叛乱军官被处决。然而皇道派所代表的意识形态——天皇亲政的理想、对财阀和政客的敌意、以精神力量弥补物质不足的军事浪漫主义——仍在中下层军官和右翼民间团体中保持影响。这些观念在1939年虽无法直接影响政策，但塑造了日本军队文化中强调精神胜于物质的危险倾向。
relationship.en: The Kōdōha as an organized military faction was thoroughly destroyed after the failure of the February 26 Incident in 1936. Its spiritual leader Araki Sadao was removed from military positions, Mazaki Jinzaburō was court-martialed (acquitted but politically destroyed), and the rebel officers of the February 26 Incident were executed. However, the ideology the Kōdōha represented—the ideal of direct imperial rule, hostility toward zaibatsu and politicians, and the military romanticism of overcoming material deficiencies through spiritual power—retained influence among junior and mid-level officers and right-wing civilian groups. Though unable to directly influence policy in 1939, these ideas shaped the dangerous tendency within Japanese military culture to emphasize spirit over material capability.

description.zh: 皇道派是1930年代初日本陆军中与统制派对立的激进派系。其核心主张是实现「昭和维新」——通过军事政变推翻政党政治和财阀支配，建立以天皇亲政为核心的国家社会主义体制。皇道派将领荒木贞夫和真崎甚三郎在1930年代初一度占据陆军要职，培养了大批信奉「直接行动」的少壮军官。1936年2月26日，约1400名少壮军官和士兵发动叛乱，占领东京市中心多处政府机构，杀害前首相高桥是清、教育总监渡边锭太郎等重臣。天皇亲自下令镇压，叛乱在三天后失败。此后统制派借机全面清洗皇道派势力。到1939年，皇道派作为组织已不复存在，但其「精神至上」的军事思想——坚信日本军人的大和魂可以克服一切物质劣势——深刻影响了日后太平洋战争中日军的疯狂作战方式。
description.en: The Kōdōha was the radical faction within the Japanese Army that opposed the Tōseiha in the early 1930s. Its core vision was to achieve a 'Shōwa Restoration'—overthrowing party politics and zaibatsu dominance through military coup to establish a national socialist system centered on direct imperial rule. Kōdōha generals Araki Sadao and Mazaki Jinzaburō held key Army positions in the early 1930s and cultivated a large cohort of young officers who believed in 'direct action.' On February 26, 1936, approximately 1,400 young officers and soldiers launched a rebellion, occupying multiple government buildings in central Tokyo and killing former Prime Minister Takahashi Korekiyo and Inspector General of Military Education Watanabe Jōtarō, among other senior officials. The Emperor personally ordered suppression, and the rebellion collapsed after three days. The Tōseiha then used the opportunity for a comprehensive purge of Kōdōha elements. By 1939, the Kōdōha no longer existed as an organization, but its 'spirit-first' military thought—the conviction that the Yamato spirit of Japanese soldiers could overcome all material disadvantages—profoundly influenced the desperate combat methods employed by Japanese forces throughout the Pacific War.

title.zh: 前陆军大臣、前文部大臣
title.en: Former Minister of War, former Minister of Education

role.zh: 皇道派的精神领袖，「皇道」理念的主要鼓吹者，二二六事件后被解除一切军职
role.en: Spiritual leader of the Kōdōha and chief proponent of the 'Imperial Way' concept, removed from all military posts after the February 26 Incident

title.en: Former Inspector General of Military Education

role.zh: 皇道派核心将领，被军法审判后虽获无罪但政治生涯终结
role.en: Core Kōdōha general, acquitted at court-martial but his political career was finished

role.zh: 皇道派少壮军官的思想导师，《日本改造法案大纲》作者，二二六事件后被处决
role.en: Intellectual mentor to Kōdōha young officers, author of 'An Outline Plan for the Reorganization of Japan,' executed after the February 26 Incident

ruler.zh: 热图利奥·瓦加斯及各国总统
ruler.en: Getulio Vargas and the various presidents

capital.zh: 里约热内卢、布宜诺斯艾利斯及其他首都
capital.en: Rio de Janeiro, Buenos Aires, and other capitals

governmentForm.zh: 由多个主权共和国组成的地区性国家体系，政体从宪政民主、寡头共和到威权总统制不等；1939年巴西处于“新国家”独裁体制，阿根廷、智利、乌拉圭、哥伦比亚等则保留不同程度的宪政框架
governmentForm.en: A regional state system composed of multiple sovereign republics, ranging from constitutional democracies and oligarchic republics to authoritarian presidential regimes; in 1939 Brazil was under the Estado Novo dictatorship, while Argentina, Chile, Uruguay, and Colombia retained varying constitutional frameworks

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构总体呈现地主与工商精英、城市中产阶级、军官团、工人、农民和土著及非裔边缘群体并存的格局，各国差异显著，沿海与内陆、城市与乡村之间的不平衡尤为突出
socialStructure.en: The overall social structure combined landed and commercial elites, urban middle classes, officer corps, workers, peasants, and marginalized indigenous and Afro-descendant communities, with large national differences and especially sharp imbalances between coast and interior and between city and countryside

rulingClass.zh: 地主寡头、出口商、金融与工业资产阶级、高级军官、职业官僚及各国执政党联盟
rulingClass.en: Landed oligarchs, export merchants, financial and industrial bourgeoisies, senior military officers, professional bureaucrats, and governing party coalitions in each republic

succession.zh: 依各国宪法、选举、议会安排或政变与临时执政机制决定；总体上为非世袭的共和制权力更替
succession.en: Determined by each country's constitution, elections, legislative arrangements, or coups and provisional mechanisms; overall succession was non-hereditary and republican

structure.zh: 南美并非单一中央政府，而是由巴西、阿根廷、智利、秘鲁、玻利维亚、巴拉圭、乌拉圭、哥伦比亚、委内瑞拉和厄瓜多尔等共和国分别建立总统制国家机构；行政权通常由总统与内阁掌握，立法权由国会或议会行使，司法系统形式上独立但受政治与军方影响程度不一
structure.en: South America was not a single centralized government but a collection of republics—Brazil, Argentina, Chile, Peru, Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, Colombia, Venezuela, and Ecuador—each with its own presidential state apparatus; executive power was usually held by the president and cabinet, legislative power by congresses or assemblies, and the judiciary was formally independent but variably influenced by politics and the military

function.zh: 管理省份、治安、地方官僚、人口登记与国内政治控制，尤其在威权体制下负责警察监控与社会秩序
function.en: Managed provinces, internal security, local bureaucracy, civil registration, and domestic political control, especially police surveillance and social order under authoritarian regimes

function.zh: 征收关税、消费税和直接税，编制预算，管理国债、外汇和海关收入
function.en: Collected tariffs, excise duties, and direct taxes, prepared budgets, and managed public debt, foreign exchange, and customs revenue

function.zh: 处理对美洲国家、欧洲列强和新兴战争阵营的外交关系，维护贸易与中立政策
function.en: Handled relations with other American states, European powers, and emerging wartime blocs, while preserving trade and neutrality policies

function.zh: 管理陆军、海军及部分国家的新兴空军组织，负责边防、军工采购和动员准备
function.en: Administered the army, navy, and in some states emerging air arms, overseeing border defense, procurement, and mobilization planning

function.zh: 负责铁路、公路、港口、河运、邮政、电报和基础设施建设，是国家整合与出口经济的关键部门
function.en: Oversaw railways, roads, ports, river transport, postal and telegraph services, and infrastructure building, making it crucial to state integration and export economies

function.zh: 管理学校、大学、公共卫生、疾病防治与国家文化政策，城市地区覆盖较好，农村地区不足明显
function.en: Managed schools, universities, public health, disease control, and state cultural policy, with stronger urban than rural coverage

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依各国制度分为州、省、省辖区、部门和市镇等层级。巴西以州为主，阿根廷以省为主，安第斯国家多设省与县级单位，实际控制力在偏远山区、热带边疆和草原地区往往有限，地方强人与军政长官影响显著
localAdmin.en: Local administration varied by country through states, provinces, departments, and municipalities. Brazil was organized around states, Argentina around provinces, and many Andean republics through provinces and districts; effective control was often limited in remote highlands, tropical frontiers, and grassland interiors, where local bosses and military governors remained influential

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法系为基础，深受法国、西班牙、葡萄牙和本地宪政传统影响。各国有成文宪法、民法典、刑法典和商法，但司法独立程度不一；戒严、紧急状态、政治审查和军事法庭在威权国家中更常见
legalSystem.en: The legal systems were based on civil law and strongly influenced by French, Spanish, Portuguese, and local constitutional traditions. The republics maintained written constitutions, civil codes, penal codes, and commercial law, but judicial independence varied; martial law, emergency decrees, political censorship, and military tribunals were more common in authoritarian states

taxationSystem.zh: 财政主要依赖关税、出口税、进口税、消费税、印花税、铁路和港口收入，以及逐步扩大的所得税与企业税。出口导向国家对海关依赖尤重，因此对世界市场价格波动高度敏感
taxationSystem.en: Public finance relied chiefly on tariffs, export and import duties, excise taxes, stamp duties, railway and port revenues, and gradually expanding income and corporate taxes. Export-oriented states depended heavily on customs, making them highly sensitive to fluctuations in world market prices

religion.zh: 罗马天主教为绝对主导宗教，并与国家礼仪、教育和社会生活紧密相连；同时存在新教少数群体、犹太社群、自由思想者，以及土著与非洲传统信仰的持续影响
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the overwhelmingly dominant religion and remained closely tied to state ceremony, education, and social life; there were also Protestant minorities, Jewish communities, secular freethinkers, and continuing indigenous and African traditional influences

philosophy.zh: 思想界受实证主义、自由主义、民族主义、社团主义、天主教社会思想、社会主义与反帝国主义思潮共同影响。20世纪30年代经济危机后，国家主义、工业化和社会改良的观念明显增强
philosophy.en: Intellectual life was shaped by positivism, liberalism, nationalism, corporatism, Catholic social thought, socialism, and anti-imperialist currents. After the crises of the 1930s, ideas favoring statism, industrialization, and social reform became much stronger

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母；葡萄牙语主导巴西，西班牙语主导其余主要共和国，此外仍有克丘亚语、艾马拉语、瓜拉尼语及其他土著语言在地方社会中广泛存在
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was universally used; Portuguese dominated Brazil and Spanish the other principal republics, while Quechua, Aymara, Guarani, and other indigenous languages remained widely spoken in local societies

culturalAchievements.zh: 南美在1939年前后已形成活跃而多样的现代文化。巴西的桑巴、现代主义文学与国家主义建筑思潮兴盛；阿根廷的探戈、出版业、戏剧和电影具有区域影响；智利、乌拉圭和哥伦比亚在诗歌、新闻与大学文化方面表现突出；安第斯国家则在印第赫尼斯莫、民族考古与民俗研究方面取得显著成果
culturalAchievements.en: By 1939 South America had developed a vibrant and diverse modern culture. Brazil saw flourishing samba, modernist literature, and nationalist architectural currents; Argentina exerted regional influence through tango, publishing, theater, and film; Chile, Uruguay, and Colombia were strong in poetry, journalism, and university culture; and the Andean states made notable advances in indigenismo, national archaeology, and folkloric studies

languageFamily.zh: 主要属于罗曼语族的伊比利亚分支，并并存多种美洲原住民语言家族，如克丘亚语系、艾马拉语系、图皮-瓜拉尼语系和奇布查相关语言
languageFamily.en: The main public languages belonged to the Iberian branches of the Romance family, coexisting with several indigenous language families such as Quechuan, Aymaran, Tupian-Guaranian, and Chibchan-related languages

gdpDescription.zh: 1939年的南美经济总量可观，但高度分化。阿根廷和乌拉圭的人均收入在地区内较高，巴西拥有最大的人口与市场规模，智利依赖矿业，秘鲁、玻利维亚、巴拉圭、厄瓜多尔和哥伦比亚则以出口型初级产品经济为主。大萧条后，各国普遍转向更强的国家干预、进口替代工业化与汇率管理
gdpDescription.en: South America's aggregate economy in 1939 was substantial but highly uneven. Argentina and Uruguay ranked high regionally in per-capita income, Brazil possessed the largest population and market, Chile depended heavily on mining, and Peru, Bolivia, Paraguay, Ecuador, and Colombia were still primarily export-oriented primary-product economies. After the Great Depression, most states shifted toward stronger intervention, import-substitution industrialization, and exchange control

mainIndustries.zh: 咖啡、牛肉与冷藏肉、谷物、小麦、玉米、羊毛、硝石、铜、锡、石油、香蕉、可可、糖、皮革、纺织、食品加工、铁路运输、港口装卸、初级钢铁与轻工业制造
mainIndustries.en: Coffee, beef and chilled meat, grain, wheat, maize, wool, nitrates, copper, tin, petroleum, bananas, cocoa, sugar, leather, textiles, food processing, railway transport, port handling, basic steel, and light manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口咖啡、肉类、谷物、羊毛、皮革、铜、锡、石油、香蕉、可可、糖和硝石；主要进口工业机械、车辆、化工品、药品、纺织品、高级金属制品和军用装备
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included coffee, meat, grain, wool, hides, copper, tin, petroleum, bananas, cocoa, sugar, and nitrates; major imports included industrial machinery, vehicles, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, textiles, advanced metal goods, and military equipment

unitName.zh: 巴西雷斯、阿根廷比索、智利比索及其他
unitName.en: Brazilian reis, Argentine peso, Chilean peso, and others

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡。大牧场主、咖啡种植园主、出口商和城市资产阶级掌握大量土地与资本，而广大农村人口、季节工和土著社群财产有限。城市中产阶级在阿根廷、乌拉圭、智利和巴西东南部相对壮大
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was distributed very unequally. Ranchers, coffee planters, export merchants, and urban bourgeois groups controlled large shares of land and capital, while much of the rural population, seasonal laborers, and indigenous communities possessed little property. Urban middle classes were relatively stronger in Argentina, Uruguay, Chile, and southeastern Brazil

economicSystem.zh: 以资本主义市场经济为主，但在大萧条后明显向关税保护、国家调控、汇率管制、国营或半国营基础产业和进口替代工业化转型；各国仍深受英国、美国和欧洲金融及贸易网络影响
economicSystem.en: The region operated mainly as a capitalist market economy, but after the Great Depression it moved decisively toward tariff protection, state regulation, exchange controls, state or semi-state basic industries, and import-substitution industrialization; all republics remained strongly influenced by British, American, and European financial and trading networks

source.zh: 所得税、企业税与财产税
国营铁路、港口与公用事业收入
source.en: State rail, port, and utility revenues
Export duties, stamp taxes, and others

category.zh: 农业扶持、工业补贴与其他
category.en: Agricultural support, industrial subsidies, and other

treasuryDescription.zh: 各共和国财政状况不一。阿根廷和委内瑞拉在出口与外汇储备方面较有优势，巴西具备较大税基和行政能力，但也面临工业化与军备开支压力；安第斯和内陆小国财力更弱，预算平衡依赖出口周期、外债重组与汇率控制
treasuryDescription.en: Fiscal conditions varied across the republics. Argentina and Venezuela were comparatively stronger in export earnings and foreign exchange reserves, while Brazil had a broader tax base and stronger administrative capacity but also faced heavy industrial and military spending pressures; the Andean and inland smaller states were fiscally weaker and depended on export cycles, debt restructuring, and exchange controls

fiscalPolicy.zh: 总体财政政策趋于务实与干预主义：通过关税保护本国产业，扩大基础设施投资，管理外汇与进口许可证，并在必要时容忍温和赤字以维持就业、政治稳定和军备现代化
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally pragmatic and interventionist: protecting domestic industry through tariffs, expanding infrastructure investment, managing foreign exchange and import licensing, and tolerating moderate deficits when necessary to preserve employment, political stability, and military modernization

unit.zh: 巴西雷斯、阿根廷比索、智利比索及其他
unit.en: Brazilian reis, Argentine peso, Chilean peso, and others

description.zh: 陆军是绝对核心力量，由巴西、阿根廷、智利、秘鲁、哥伦比亚等国的常备部队、地方驻军、边防部队和动员后备役组成，主要任务为边境防御、国内治安和政权稳定
description.en: The army was the dominant force, composed of standing units, provincial garrisons, frontier troops, and mobilizable reserves from Brazil, Argentina, Chile, Peru, Colombia, and others, tasked mainly with border defense, internal security, and regime stability

description.zh: 海军规模较小但在阿根廷、巴西和智利传统上较受重视，承担海岸防御、护航、河口控制和展示国威的作用，装备包括老式战列舰、巡洋舰、驱逐舰、炮舰和辅助舰艇
description.en: The navy was smaller but traditionally significant in Argentina, Brazil, and Chile, serving coastal defense, escort, estuary control, and prestige functions, with equipment including aging battleships, cruisers, destroyers, gunboats, and auxiliaries

description.zh: 空中力量仍处发展阶段，由独立空军或陆海军航空兵构成，主要用于侦察、联络、轻轰炸、边境巡逻和训练，装备多为欧洲或美国进口机型
description.en: Air power was still in a developmental phase, organized either as independent air forces or as army and navy air arms, used mainly for reconnaissance, liaison, light bombing, frontier patrol, and training, with aircraft largely imported from Europe or the United States

name.zh: 国家警备、宪兵与准军事部队
name.en: National Guards, Gendarmerie, and Paramilitary Forces

description.zh: 包括宪兵、边防警备、州级警察军、国家警卫队和准军事治安力量，在镇压叛乱、保卫边疆和执行政治秩序方面极其重要
description.en: These included gendarmerie, frontier guards, militarized state police, national guards, and paramilitary security forces that were highly important for suppressing revolt, protecting frontiers, and enforcing political order

commanderInChief.zh: 各共和国总统兼任武装力量最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: The presidents of the republics served as commanders-in-chief of their armed forces

technology.zh: 军备总体处于20世纪30年代水平，拥有毛瑟系步枪、机枪、山炮、野战炮、少量装甲车与轻型坦克、老式巡洋舰与驱逐舰，以及双翼机和部分现代单翼机。工业基础不足导致弹药、飞机、舰艇和重装备高度依赖进口
technology.en: Military technology was generally at a 1930s level, featuring Mauser-type rifles, machine guns, mountain and field artillery, small numbers of armored cars and light tanks, aging cruisers and destroyers, and biplanes with some newer monoplanes. Limited industrial capacity meant high dependence on imports for ammunition, aircraft, warships, and heavy equipment

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非欧洲式全面战争，而是边界争端余波、国内政变风险、社会动员与意识形态冲突，以及大国海上封锁和贸易中断。秘鲁与厄瓜多尔、玻利维亚与巴拉圭等旧有边界问题仍具潜在危险，巴西、阿根廷和智利则相互警惕并关注大西洋与南太平洋海上力量变化
threats.en: The principal threats were not European-style total war but the aftereffects of border disputes, domestic coup risks, social mobilization and ideological conflict, and great-power blockades or trade disruption. Old frontier issues such as Peru-Ecuador and Bolivia-Paraguay still carried danger, while Brazil, Argentina, and Chile watched one another and monitored changes in Atlantic and South Pacific naval power

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气尚可，常规水平
description.en: Adequate morale, average cohesion

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 1939年南美十个主要共和国总人口约1.1亿，其中巴西约占最大份额，阿根廷和哥伦比亚次之，智利、秘鲁和委内瑞拉处于中等规模，玻利维亚、巴拉圭、乌拉圭和厄瓜多尔人口较少。人口分布极不均衡，集中于东南巴西、拉普拉塔流域、安第斯高地和加勒比沿岸城市
populationDescription.en: The combined population of the ten principal South American republics in 1939 was about 110 million, with Brazil holding the largest share and Argentina and Colombia following behind; Chile, Peru, and Venezuela were medium-sized, while Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, and Ecuador were smaller. Population distribution was highly uneven, concentrated in southeastern Brazil, the La Plata basin, the Andean highlands, and Caribbean coastal cities

description.zh: 阿根廷首都，南美文化名城
description.en: Argentine capital, South American cultural city

description.zh: 巴西文化之都与旅游胜地
description.en: Brazil's cultural capital and tourist destination

description.zh: 智利首都与经济中心
description.en: Chilean capital and economic center

description.zh: 秘鲁首都，南美历史名城
description.en: Peruvian capital, South American historic city

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大致包括：大地产主与出口寡头；城市金融、商业和工业资产阶级；扩大的白领与专业中产阶级；军官团与国家官僚；工厂工人、码头工人、矿工和铁路工人；租佃农、农民、牧工与种植园劳工；以及大量土著共同体、非裔劳工和边疆定居者。族群与阶级地位高度重叠，但各国混血化程度和社会流动空间不同
socialClasses.en: The principal social classes included large landowners and export oligarchs; urban financial, commercial, and industrial bourgeois groups; an expanding white-collar and professional middle class; the officer corps and state bureaucracy; factory workers, dockworkers, miners, and railway laborers; tenant farmers, peasants, herders, and plantation laborers; and large indigenous communities, Afro-descended laborers, and frontier settlers. Ethnicity and class often overlapped, though the extent of mestizaje and social mobility varied by country

allies.zh: 南美各国彼此之间并无统一盟国体系，但普遍与美国、英国保持重要经贸和外交联系，并在泛美体系下维持合作；阿根廷在对外关系上更强调自主与中立，巴西则逐渐加强同美国的战略接触
allies.en: The South American republics did not share a single allied system, but most maintained important trade and diplomatic ties with the United States and Britain and cooperated within the Pan-American framework; Argentina emphasized autonomy and neutrality more strongly, while Brazil was gradually deepening strategic contact with the United States

enemies.zh: 1939年没有统一的正式共同敌国。欧洲轴心国与同盟国都在该地区寻求影响力；各共和国更实际的对手往往是本国境内反对派、邻国边界争端对象或可能破坏贸易航线的外部海军强国
enemies.en: There was no unified formal common enemy in 1939. Both the European Axis and Allied powers sought influence in the region; in practice, each republic's opponents were more often domestic opposition groups, neighboring states involved in boundary disputes, or outside naval powers capable of disrupting trade routes

foreignPolicy.zh: 总体外交以中立、贸易保护、主权维护和地区平衡为核心。南美国家普遍不愿卷入欧洲战争，但密切关注海运安全、原料出口、军购渠道和大国宣传战。泛美会议、双边仲裁和边界谈判是维持地区秩序的重要工具
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on neutrality, trade protection, defense of sovereignty, and regional balance. The South American states generally wished to avoid direct involvement in the European war, but they closely watched shipping security, raw-material exports, access to arms purchases, and great-power propaganda competition. Pan-American conferences, bilateral arbitration, and frontier negotiations were important tools for maintaining regional order

era.zh: 世界大战时代晚期工业化阶段
era.en: World War Era, late industrializing stage

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路与港口网络、电报电话、无线电广播、冷藏肉类运输、矿业机械化、石油开采、城市电气化、民用航空、基础钢铁与军工扩张、国家统计与人口登记体系、公共卫生现代化，以及以进口替代为导向的纺织、食品、化工和轻机械制造
keyInnovations.en: Key innovations included railway and port networks, telegraphy and telephony, radio broadcasting, refrigerated meat transport, mechanized mining, petroleum extraction, urban electrification, civil aviation, basic steel and munitions expansion, state statistical and civil-registration systems, public-health modernization, and import-substituting textile, food, chemical, and light engineering industries

strengths.zh: 资源极为丰富，拥有咖啡、粮食、畜牧、矿产与石油出口基础；人口规模和城市化水平在拉丁美洲领先；若干国家具备较成熟的铁路、港口、教育和金融体系；地理远离欧亚主战场，使其在1939年初期享有相对安全的战略缓冲
strengths.en: The region was extremely rich in resources, with strong export bases in coffee, grain, livestock, minerals, and petroleum; its population scale and urbanization were advanced by Latin American standards; several republics possessed relatively mature railway, port, educational, and financial systems; and geographic distance from the main Eurasian battlefields gave South America an important strategic buffer in 1939

weaknesses.zh: 政治碎片化严重，各国利益并不一致；经济依赖初级产品出口，易受世界市场与海运波动冲击；土地分配不均、社会冲突和军方干政普遍存在；工业基础仍不足以支撑大规模自主军备与重工业发展
weaknesses.en: Political fragmentation was severe, with no full unity of interests among the republics; economies depended heavily on primary-product exports and were vulnerable to world-market and shipping shocks; unequal land distribution, social conflict, and military intervention in politics were widespread; and industrial bases remained insufficient for large-scale autonomous armament and heavy industrial growth

outlook.zh: 1939年的前景总体稳定但充满转型压力。随着欧洲战争扩大，南美将因原料需求、海上封锁、金融调整和外交拉拢而被更深地卷入全球格局。最有可能的发展路径是继续强化国家权力、推进进口替代工业化、扩大军政体系，并在中立与对美合作之间寻找平衡
outlook.en: The outlook in 1939 was broadly stable but full of pressures for transformation. As the European war expanded, South America would become more deeply drawn into global dynamics through raw-material demand, maritime blockade, financial adjustment, and diplomatic courtship. The most likely path was continued strengthening of state power, expansion of import-substitution industrialization, growth of military-administrative institutions, and a search for balance between neutrality and cooperation with the United States

description.zh: 南美洲由多个主权共和国构成，政治体制从民主到威权不等。
description.en: South America consisted of multiple sovereign republics ranging from democratic to authoritarian systems.

governmentForm.zh: 君主制帝国名义下受日本严密控制的傀儡国家，实行高度集权官僚统治
governmentForm.en: A nominal imperial monarchy under strict Japanese control, functioning as a highly centralized bureaucratic puppet state

socialStructure.zh: 社会以官僚、警察与军政机构为核心，上层由满洲国官员、日本顾问、关东军与日本移民集团主导，下层为占多数的中国农民、城市工人、商人以及少数满族、朝鲜族、蒙古族与俄侨群体
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on bureaucratic, police, and military-administrative institutions, with upper strata dominated by Manchukuoan officials, Japanese advisers, the Kwantung Army, and Japanese settler interests, while the lower strata consisted mainly of Chinese peasants, urban workers, merchants, and minority Manchu, Korean, Mongol, and White Russian communities

rulingClass.zh: 关东军高级军官、日本殖民官僚、南满洲铁道系 technocrats，以及受扶植的满洲国皇室与官僚精英
rulingClass.en: Senior Kwantung Army officers, Japanese colonial bureaucrats, South Manchuria Railway technocrats, and the patronized Manchukuoan imperial and bureaucratic elite

succession.zh: 名义上为爱新觉罗皇室世袭继承，但实际国家存续与权力安排取决于日本当局与关东军意志
succession.en: Nominally hereditary succession within the Aisin-Gioro imperial house, though the state's continuity and real power arrangements depended on Japanese authorities and the Kwantung Army

structure.zh: 中央设皇帝、国务院及各部，表面上仿近代君主立宪与行政国家体制，实际上由日本顾问网络、关东军司令部和治安机关层层监督决策
structure.en: The central government consisted of the Emperor, a State Council, and ministries, outwardly modeled on a modern monarchical administrative state, but in practice decision-making was supervised at every level by Japanese advisers, the Kwantung Army headquarters, and security organs

function.zh: 统筹中央行政、法令执行与各部协调，为名义上的最高行政机关
function.en: Coordinated central administration, implementation of decrees, and inter-ministerial affairs as the nominal highest executive body

function.zh: 管理地方行政、户籍、基层治理与社会控制
function.en: Managed local administration, household registration, grassroots governance, and social control

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、债务、关税与金融监管
function.en: Handled budgeting, taxation, debt, customs, and financial regulation

function.zh: 推进矿业、重工业、国策工厂与资源开发
function.en: Promoted mining, heavy industry, state-priority factories, and resource development

function.zh: 管理铁路、公路、邮政、电信与运输体系
function.en: Oversaw railways, roads, postal services, telecommunications, and transport systems

function.zh: 主管法院、检察与法律条文，但司法独立极其有限
function.en: Oversaw courts, prosecution, and legal codes, though judicial independence was extremely limited

function.zh: 负责警察、特务、反游击与政治监控
function.en: Handled policing, intelligence, anti-guerrilla operations, and political surveillance

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政划分为省、市、县与旗等单位，地方首长多由中央任命并受日本顾问、宪兵与警察系统监督；边境与农村地区常并行军政与保甲式控制
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into provinces, municipalities, counties, and banners, with local heads usually appointed by the center and supervised by Japanese advisers, military police, and police organs; frontier and rural areas often combined civil administration with militarized and baojia-style control

legalSystem.zh: 法律制度表面上采成文法与近代法院体系，结合清末、中国近代法制与日本法影响，但政治案件、治安案件和土地征用常受行政与军方凌驾，法治色彩有限
legalSystem.en: The legal system formally used written law and modern courts, drawing on late Qing, modern Chinese, and Japanese legal influences, but political cases, security matters, and land seizures were often overridden by administrative and military power, leaving rule of law limited

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以土地税、营业税、消费税、关税、专卖收入和国营企业上缴利润为主，农村地区税负与摊派偏重，并通过金融机构和合作组织间接汲取资源
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied on land tax, business taxes, excise taxes, customs, monopoly revenues, and profits remitted by state enterprises, with heavy rural burdens and levies, while resources were also extracted indirectly through financial institutions and cooperative organizations

religion.zh: 官方宣扬儒教伦理、国家神道象征与皇帝崇拜并存，民间则有佛教、道教、民间信仰、萨满传统与少量基督教；宗教活动受严密监视并服务于统治宣传
religion.en: Official ideology promoted a combination of Confucian ethics, symbolic State Shinto, and emperor veneration, while popular life included Buddhism, Daoism, folk religion, shamanic traditions, and small Christian communities; religious activity was closely monitored and made to serve state propaganda

philosophy.zh: 核心思想为“王道乐土”“五族协和”等官方意识形态，宣称建立多民族和谐秩序，实则为日本帝国在东北殖民统治的合法化叙事
philosophy.en: The core ideology was the official doctrine of the 'Kingly Way Paradise' and 'Harmony of the Five Races,' claiming to build a harmonious multiethnic order, but in reality serving as a legitimizing narrative for Japanese imperial colonial rule in Northeast China

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用汉字与现代中文书写，政府文书常并用中文与日文；满文具有礼仪和象征意义但实际行政使用有限，蒙古文与朝鲜文在特定社群中存在
writingSystem.en: Chinese characters and modern written Chinese were primarily used, with many government documents issued in both Chinese and Japanese; Manchu retained ceremonial and symbolic significance but had limited practical administrative use, while Mongolian and Korean were present in specific communities

culturalAchievements.zh: 在铁路城市规划、官办宣传电影、殖民建筑、工业展览和国策教育方面有所建设，长春—新京形成带有日本现代主义色彩的行政都市景观，但文化成就多服务于殖民治理与政治宣传
culturalAchievements.en: There were notable developments in railway urban planning, state propaganda films, colonial architecture, industrial exhibitions, and policy-driven education, with Changchun-Xinjing developing an administrative cityscape marked by Japanese modernism, though most cultural achievements served colonial governance and political propaganda

languageFamily.zh: 主体人口使用汉藏语系汉语方言，统治与驻留群体广泛使用日语；另有通古斯语族满语残存、阿尔泰诸语中的蒙古语与朝鲜语，以及俄语侨民社群
languageFamily.en: Most of the population spoke Sinitic varieties of the Sino-Tibetan family, while Japanese was widely used by ruling and resident groups; there were also remnants of Tungusic Manchu, as well as Mongolian and Korean, and Russian among émigré communities

gdpDescription.zh: 满洲国是东亚战时最重要的殖民工业与资源基地之一，经济总量在中国地区内较高，依托煤铁、铁路、化工、军需和大豆贸易形成重工业导向结构，但增长高度依赖日本资本、强制动员和军事需求
gdpDescription.en: Manchukuo was one of East Asia's most important wartime colonial industrial and resource bases, with a relatively high economic output for a Chinese region, built on coal, iron, railways, chemicals, armaments, and soybean trade, though growth depended heavily on Japanese capital, coercive mobilization, and military demand

mainIndustries.zh: 煤炭开采、钢铁冶炼、铁路运输、机械制造、化学工业、军需生产、木材加工、粮食与大豆加工、电力生产
mainIndustries.en: Coal mining, iron and steel smelting, railway transport, machinery manufacturing, chemical industry, armaments production, timber processing, grain and soybean processing, and electric power generation

tradeGoods.zh: 大豆、豆饼、煤、铁矿石、钢材、木材、皮毛、粮食、化工品与部分机械制品；同时大量输入日本制工业设备、军需材料与消费品
tradeGoods.en: Soybeans, soybean cake, coal, iron ore, steel products, timber, furs, grain, chemicals, and some machinery; it also imported large quantities of Japanese industrial equipment, military supplies, and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 城乡差距极大。城市中的日本居民、企业职员和部分技术人员生活水平明显较高，而广大中国农村家庭财富有限，常负债并受地租、税负和物资征调压力影响
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Urban Japanese residents, company employees, and some technical workers enjoyed visibly higher living standards, while most Chinese rural households had limited wealth and were often burdened by debt, rent, taxes, and requisitions

economicSystem.zh: 国家指导型殖民经济，结合官办企业、特许财阀、日满合办公司与受控市场机制，资源配置优先服从日本帝国的战争与工业战略
economicSystem.en: A state-directed colonial economy combining state enterprises, privileged zaibatsu interests, Japan-Manchukuo joint companies, and controlled market mechanisms, with resource allocation subordinated to Japanese imperial war and industrial strategy

source.en: Business taxes, excise taxes, and miscellaneous taxes
Monopoly revenues and state enterprise income

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库表面上保持运转，但高度依赖日本贷款、发行信用和政策性金融支持；财政稳定性受战争扩张与殖民开发开支持续压迫
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury remained operational on the surface, but it depended heavily on Japanese loans, credit issuance, and policy finance; fiscal stability was under constant pressure from war expansion and colonial development spending

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以扩张性开发与治安优先为核心，通过举债、国营企业收益、货币与信贷工具支持工业化和军事后勤，实际独立性很弱
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on expansionary development and security priorities, using borrowing, state-enterprise income, and monetary and credit tools to support industrialization and military logistics, with very weak real autonomy

description.zh: 主要由步兵、骑兵、宪兵辅助部队与地方守备单位组成，训练、装备和指挥普遍受日本顾问与关东军控制，作战能力不均，主要承担治安与反游击任务
description.en: Consisted mainly of infantry, cavalry, gendarmerie support units, and local garrison formations, with training, equipment, and command widely controlled by Japanese advisers and the Kwantung Army; combat effectiveness was uneven and its main role was security and anti-guerrilla warfare

description.zh: 包括警察、边境警备、特务和地方治安部队，是统治乡村、搜捕抗日力量和维持社会控制的重要工具
description.en: Included police, border guards, intelligence personnel, and local security forces, forming a key instrument for controlling the countryside, hunting anti-Japanese resistance, and maintaining social control

description.zh: 拥有规模有限的航空、通信、工兵与后勤力量，技术与核心装备主要依赖日本，独立作战能力有限
description.en: Maintained limited aviation, communications, engineering, and logistical forces, with technology and core equipment mainly dependent on Japan and only limited independent combat capability

commanderInChief.zh: 爱新觉罗·溥仪（名义统帅）／日本关东军司令部（实际最高军事控制者）
commanderInChief.en: Aisin-Gioro Puyi (nominal commander-in-chief) / Kwantung Army Headquarters (actual supreme military authority)

technology.zh: 军备以20世纪30年代日式步枪、机枪、轻炮、装甲车、骑兵装备、铁路运输和有限航空支援为主，机械化程度不足，通信与后勤依赖日本体系
technology.en: Armament was based on 1930s Japanese-style rifles, machine guns, light artillery, armored cars, cavalry equipment, railway transport, and limited air support, with insufficient mechanization and communications and logistics dependent on Japanese systems

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自苏联远东军事压力、外蒙古边境局势、中国抗日联军与中共游击队活动，以及华北和内蒙古方向持续战事；内部忠诚度不足同样构成严重隐患
threats.en: Main threats came from Soviet military pressure in the Far East, border tensions with Mongolia, activities of Chinese anti-Japanese united forces and Communist guerrillas, and continuing war in North China and Inner Mongolia; insufficient internal loyalty was also a major danger

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

populationDescription.zh: 人口约三千四百万，以汉族中国人为绝对多数，另有满族、蒙古族、朝鲜族、日本移民、回族及俄侨等群体。人口分布集中于南满铁路沿线、辽河平原和主要工业城市周边
populationDescription.en: The population was about 34 million, with Han Chinese forming the overwhelming majority, alongside Manchus, Mongols, Koreans, Japanese settlers, Hui, and Russian émigrés. Population was concentrated along the South Manchurian Railway corridor, the Liao River plain, and around major industrial cities

socialClasses.zh: 上层为日本军政人员、殖民企业管理者、满洲国高官与合作精英；中层为城市职员、教师、小商人、技术工人与部分地主；下层为广大农民、佃户、矿工、工厂工人和受监控少数族群社区
socialClasses.en: Upper strata consisted of Japanese military-administrative personnel, colonial enterprise managers, senior Manchukuoan officials, and collaborationist elites; the middle strata included urban clerks, teachers, small merchants, technical workers, and some landlords; lower strata were made up of peasants, tenants, miners, factory workers, and closely monitored minority communities

allies.zh: 日本帝国为唯一决定性盟友与保护者；在外交上受轴心体系承认有限，并与蒙疆等日本扶植政权保持形式联系
allies.en: The Japanese Empire was its only decisive ally and protector; diplomatically it received limited recognition within the Axis orbit and maintained formal ties with other Japanese-backed regimes

enemies.zh: 中华民国、东北抗日武装、苏联、蒙古人民共和国及一切反日力量均被视为敌对对象；西方多数国家也不承认其合法性
enemies.en: The Republic of China, anti-Japanese forces in the Northeast, the Soviet Union, the Mongolian People's Republic, and all anti-Japanese elements were treated as enemies; most Western states also refused to recognize its legitimacy

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策并无真正独立性，基本追随日本对华战争、对苏防御和东亚大陆扩张战略，重点在争取有限国际承认、维护边境安全并为日本提供政治与经济缓冲地带
foreignPolicy.en: Its foreign policy lacked real independence and essentially followed Japanese strategy in the war in China, defense against the Soviet Union, and continental expansion in East Asia, focusing on securing limited international recognition, maintaining border security, and serving as a political and economic buffer for Japan

era.zh: 世界大战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 大规模铁路调度、煤铁联合开发、现代钢铁厂、电力网络、化学肥料与合成工业、城市规划、军需生产组织与殖民警务通信系统
keyInnovations.en: Large-scale railway coordination, integrated coal and iron development, modern steelworks, electrical grids, chemical fertilizer and synthetic industry, urban planning, organized armaments production, and colonial police communications systems

strengths.zh: 资源极其丰富，铁路和工业基础在中国东北地区领先，背后有日本资本、技术与军力支撑，重工业与后勤能力对区域战争具有重要价值
strengths.en: It possessed exceptionally rich resources, leading railway and industrial infrastructure in Northeast China, and backing from Japanese capital, technology, and military power, giving its heavy industry and logistics major value for regional warfare

weaknesses.zh: 政权合法性极弱，社会认同不足，对日依附严重，农村控制成本高，抗日活动持续，财政与军事自主性有限，内部官僚体系腐败低效
weaknesses.en: The regime had extremely weak legitimacy, limited social acceptance, severe dependence on Japan, high costs of rural control, persistent anti-Japanese resistance, limited fiscal and military autonomy, and a corrupt and inefficient internal bureaucracy

outlook.zh: 1939年的满洲国在表面上处于工业扩张与秩序强化阶段，但其命运完全系于日本帝国的战争前景；若日本受挫，满洲国缺乏独立生存能力
outlook.en: In 1939, Manchukuo appeared to be in a phase of industrial expansion and tightened order, but its fate was entirely tied to Japan's wartime prospects; if Japan faltered, Manchukuo lacked the capacity to survive independently

description.zh: 满洲国是日本在中国东北建立的傀儡帝国。
description.en: Manchukuo was a puppet empire established by Japan in northeastern China.

rulerTitle.zh: 国民政府主席兼军事委员会委员长
rulerTitle.en: Chairman of the National Government and Chairman of the Military Affairs Commission

governmentForm.zh: 战时一党主导的训政共和国，名义上实行五院制中央政府
governmentForm.en: A wartime one-party-dominated tutelary republic, nominally organized as a central government under the Five-Yuan system

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构以广大农民为主体，城市中存在工商资产阶级、工人、学生与专业人士；国家权力集中于党政军精英、地方实力派、官僚和军官集团，战时难民与失业人口激增。
socialStructure.en: Society was overwhelmingly agrarian, with a large peasantry alongside urban merchants, industrialists, workers, students, and professionals; state power was concentrated in party-state-military elites, regional powerholders, bureaucrats, and officer groups, while wartime refugees and the unemployed rose sharply.

rulingClass.zh: 中国国民党核心领导层、中央官僚、军事委员会高级将领、金融官僚以及与政府合作的地方军政精英
rulingClass.en: The core Kuomintang leadership, central bureaucrats, senior Military Affairs Commission generals, financial officials, and cooperating provincial military-political elites

succession.zh: 非世袭，由国民党党内权力结构、中央政治程序与军事实力决定领导继承
succession.en: Non-hereditary; leadership succession depended on Kuomintang internal power structures, central political procedures, and military strength

structure.zh: 中央政府名义上依孙中山五权宪法思想设行政、立法、司法、考试、监察五院；但1939年处于全面抗战时期，国家决策高度集中于国民政府、国防最高机构与军事委员会，蒋介石通过党、军、政三线掌握实际统治权。
structure.en: The central government was nominally arranged under Sun Yat-sen’s Five-Power constitutional theory with Executive, Legislative, Judicial, Examination, and Control Yuans; however, in 1939 during full-scale war, decision-making was highly concentrated in the National Government, supreme defense organs, and the Military Affairs Commission, with Chiang Kai-shek exercising effective control through party, military, and state channels.

function.zh: 统筹中央行政事务，协调财政、交通、经济、教育、内政与战时资源动员
function.en: Coordinated central administration, including finance, transport, economic affairs, education, internal administration, and wartime resource mobilization

function.zh: 负责全国军事战略、部队调度、军政管理、兵员补充与对日抗战指挥
function.en: Oversaw national military strategy, troop deployments, military administration, manpower replacement, and command of the war against Japan

function.zh: 征税、发行公债、管理法币、编列预算并筹措战时财政
function.en: Handled taxation, bond issuance, management of the fabi currency, budgeting, and wartime fiscal financing

function.zh: 管理邮政、电信、铁路、公路和部分航运通信体系，保障后方联络
function.en: Managed postal, telegraph, railway, highway, and some shipping communications systems to sustain rear-area connectivity

function.zh: 负责地方行政、户籍、警政、保甲与社会秩序管理
function.en: Supervised local administration, household registration, policing, the baojia system, and maintenance of social order

name.zh: 中央银行及金融监管体系
name.en: Central Bank and Financial Regulatory System

function.zh: 维持货币发行、金融调度、外汇支付和战时信贷安排
function.en: Maintained currency issuance, financial coordination, foreign exchange payments, and wartime credit arrangements

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政采取省、县两级为主并辅以专区体系；但战时大量地区沦陷或成为游击区，中央对后方省份控制较强，对前线和边区则依赖军政合署、地方保安部队与省主席体系。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was based mainly on provinces and counties, supplemented by special districts; but wartime conditions left many areas occupied or contested, so the center exercised stronger control in rear provinces while relying in frontline and frontier zones on combined civil-military offices, local security forces, and provincial chairmen.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以南京国民政府时期颁布的现代成文法、民刑法典和特别战时法规为基础，形式上接近大陆法系；但实际执行受战区环境、军法、地方势力和行政命令强烈影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal system rested on modern codified civil and criminal law and special wartime regulations promulgated during the Nanjing National Government period, formally resembling a civil-law system; in practice, enforcement was heavily shaped by warzone conditions, military law, regional power structures, and administrative decrees.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制包括田赋、盐税、关税、统税、消费税、印花税及公债摊派等；由于沿海和主要关税口岸多被日军控制，中央财政更依赖内地税收、货币发行、借款与非常征收。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system included land tax, salt tax, customs duties, transit and excise taxes, stamp taxes, and compulsory bond subscriptions; because much of the coast and major customs ports were under Japanese control, the central government relied increasingly on inland taxation, currency issuance, borrowing, and extraordinary wartime levies.

religion.zh: 社会宗教生活以儒家礼俗、佛教、道教、民间信仰并存，另有相当规模的伊斯兰教与基督教群体；国民政府提倡以国家主义和新生活运动整合社会道德。
religion.en: Religious life combined Confucian ritual culture, Buddhism, Daoism, and popular religion, alongside significant Muslim and Christian communities; the Nationalist government promoted nationalism and the New Life Movement as instruments of moral integration.

philosophy.zh: 官方思想以孙中山三民主义为中心，并结合国家主义、反共主义、儒家伦理和战时动员观念；知识界同时存在自由主义、马克思主义及实用主义影响。
philosophy.en: Official ideology centered on Sun Yat-sen’s Three Principles of the People, combined with nationalism, anti-communism, Confucian ethics, and wartime mobilization ideas; the intellectual sphere also contained liberal, Marxist, and pragmatic influences.

writingSystem.zh: 以汉字为通用书写系统，政府推广白话文、国语和现代教育中的标准化书面表达
writingSystem.en: Chinese characters served as the common writing system, while the government promoted vernacular writing, the national language, and standardized modern written expression in education

culturalAchievements.zh: 抗战时期的文化成就包括战时新闻出版、救亡文学、爱国歌曲、木刻版画、话剧、电影宣传以及高校和科研机构西迁后的延续办学；尽管遭受轰炸与流亡，文化界仍维持了强烈的民族动员与现代化表达。
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural achievements of the war period included wartime journalism and publishing, resistance literature, patriotic songs, woodcut art, spoken drama, propaganda cinema, and the continued work of universities and research institutions relocated inland; despite bombing and displacement, cultural life sustained strong national mobilization and modernist expression.

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言属于汉藏语系汉语族，国家层面推广国语，同时存在粤语、吴语、湘语、闽语、客家话及众多少数民族语言
languageFamily.en: The principal language belonged to the Sinitic branch of the Sino-Tibetan family; the state promoted Guoyu, while Cantonese, Wu, Xiang, Min, Hakka, and numerous minority languages remained widely used

gdpDescription.zh: 1939年中国经济总量仍极大，但人均水平偏低，且因沿海工业区、商业中心和关税口岸的大面积沦陷而遭受重创。经济活动重心转向西南后方，以农业、手工业、内迁工业和战时运输线维系国家生存。
gdpDescription.en: In 1939 China still possessed a very large aggregate economy, but per-capita output was low, and the loss of coastal industrial zones, commercial centers, and customs ports inflicted severe damage. Economic activity shifted toward the southwestern rear, where agriculture, handicrafts, relocated industry, and wartime transport corridors sustained national survival.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、纺织、粮食加工、盐业、矿业、兵工、轻工业、内迁机械制造、交通运输与手工业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, textiles, food processing, salt production, mining, armaments, light industry, relocated machine manufacturing, transportation, and handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 出口主要包括桐油、猪鬃、茶叶、丝绸、皮革、矿产品和部分农产品；进口则以军火、机械、车辆、石油制品、药品、化工品和工业原料为主
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included tung oil, hog bristles, tea, silk, leather, minerals, and some agricultural products; imports consisted mainly of arms, machinery, vehicles, petroleum products, medicines, chemicals, and industrial raw materials

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富高度不均，绝大多数农户拥有少量土地或为佃农，现金储蓄有限；城市中产与商业家庭因通货膨胀和战乱而普遍缩水，西南后方出现新的投机与官商积累。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: most rural households held little land or were tenants with limited cash savings; urban middle-class and commercial families saw their assets eroded by inflation and war, while new speculative and state-connected fortunes emerged in the southwestern rear.

economicSystem.zh: 战时混合经济，兼具私有农业和商业、国家金融管制、资源统制、兵工优先以及对战略行业的强力行政干预
economicSystem.en: A wartime mixed economy combining private agriculture and commerce with state financial controls, resource regulation, armaments priority, and strong administrative intervention in strategic sectors

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库名义结存有限，流动性长期紧张；政府实际依赖持续发钞、内外借款、财政透支和战略物资交换来维持抗战。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury’s nominal balance was limited and liquidity remained chronically strained; in practice the government depended on continued note issuance, domestic and foreign borrowing, fiscal overdrafts, and exchanges of strategic goods to sustain the war effort.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以抗战优先为绝对原则，容忍赤字与货币扩张，通过公债、税收增征、金融管制和有限外援补足军费，但也加剧通货膨胀和市场扭曲。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy placed wartime resistance above all else, tolerating deficits and monetary expansion; military costs were covered through bonds, increased taxation, financial controls, and limited foreign assistance, but this also worsened inflation and market distortions.

description.zh: 陆军是绝对主力，由中央军、地方军、战区部队和补充兵体系构成，装备水平差异极大，依赖步兵、大量轻武器、少量炮兵和极有限机械化力量。
description.en: The army was the overwhelming main force, composed of central forces, provincial armies, theater formations, and replacement systems; equipment quality varied enormously, relying on infantry, large numbers of light weapons, limited artillery, and very little mechanization.

description.zh: 空军规模有限，经过1937至1938年的重创后主要承担要地防空、有限侦察和联络任务，并依赖苏联援助飞机及顾问支持。
description.en: The air force was limited in size; after severe losses in 1937–1938 it mainly undertook point air defense, limited reconnaissance, and liaison work, relying heavily on Soviet-supplied aircraft and advisory support.

description.zh: 海军在抗战初期即遭重大损失，1939年仅保有少量江防、巡逻和后勤力量，主要用于内河航道和后方运输保障。
description.en: The navy suffered major losses early in the war; by 1939 only small river-defense, patrol, and logistical elements remained, used mainly for inland waterways and rear transport support.

description.zh: 包括保安团、宪兵及地方警备力量，负责治安、交通线守备、征兵协助和后方稳定。
description.en: Included security regiments, gendarmerie, and local guard forces responsible for public order, line-of-communications security, conscription assistance, and rear-area stability.

commanderInChief.zh: 蒋介石
commanderInChief.en: Chiang Kai-shek

technology.zh: 军事技术整体处于20世纪前期水平，步兵武器来源复杂，炮兵、装甲、无线电和航空能力不足；少数德式训练师和中央嫡系部队素质较高，但全国编制、补给和现代协同作战能力薄弱。
technology.en: Military technology was broadly at an early-20th-century level, with mixed-source infantry weapons and inadequate artillery, armor, radio, and aviation capabilities; a few German-trained divisions and elite central units were better prepared, but nationwide organization, logistics, and modern combined-arms capacity were weak.

threats.zh: 首要威胁为日本帝国全面侵华及其扶植的伪满洲国和华中伪政权；次要威胁包括沿海封锁、战略轰炸、内部交通破坏、共产党根据地扩张以及地方军政离心。
threats.en: The primary threat was the Japanese Empire’s full-scale invasion and its sponsored regimes in Manchukuo and occupied central China; secondary threats included coastal blockade, strategic bombing, disruption of internal communications, expansion of Communist base areas, and centrifugal tendencies among regional military authorities.

description.zh: 中央军嫡系部队经德式训练，素质较高；地方部队训练水平参差不齐
description.en: Central elite forces received German-style training with higher quality; provincial forces had uneven training levels

description.zh: 抗战初期军民抗日意志坚定，但长期消耗战后部分部队士气有所下降
description.en: Strong determination to resist Japan in early war phase, though some units' morale declined after prolonged war of attrition

description.zh: 仿毛瑟Kar98k的国造制式步枪，中央军主要装备，精准可靠
description.en: Chinese-made standard rifle based on Mauser Kar98k, primary weapon of central forces, accurate and reliable

description.zh: 汉阳兵工厂仿制的老式步枪，地方部队大量使用
description.en: Older rifle produced at Hanyang Arsenal, widely used by provincial forces

description.zh: 捷克斯洛伐克ZB-26轻机枪及国产仿制型，国军最重要的班组支援武器
description.en: Czech ZB-26 light machine gun and Chinese copies, the most important squad support weapon of the Chinese army

description.zh: 瑞典博福斯山炮，国军炮兵主力装备之一，适合山地作战
description.en: Swedish Bofors mountain gun, one of the main artillery pieces of the Chinese army, suitable for mountain warfare

description.zh: 苏联援助的主力战斗机，1939年中国空军的骨干机型
description.en: Soviet-supplied main fighter aircraft, backbone of the Chinese Air Force in 1939

description.zh: 少量德国一号坦克及维克斯轻型坦克，国军极有限的装甲力量
description.en: Small number of German Panzer I and Vickers light tanks, the very limited armored force of the Chinese army

populationDescription.zh: 人口总量约4.5亿，仍为世界上人口最多的国家之一。人口分布高度集中于华北平原、长江流域、华南丘陵及四川盆地，但大量人口处于战区、沦陷区或难民流动状态。
populationDescription.en: With about 450 million people, China remained one of the most populous countries in the world. Population was heavily concentrated in the North China Plain, the Yangtze basin, the hills of South China, and the Sichuan Basin, but vast numbers were living in war zones, occupied areas, or refugee movement.

description.zh: 西南经济中心，天府之国
description.en: Southwest economic center, Land of Abundance

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括地主、富农、中农、贫农与佃农，另有城市工人、商人、金融资本家、公务员、教师、学生、军人和知识分子；战时还形成庞大的难民群体、临时工与后方依附于军政体系的新中间阶层。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included landlords, rich peasants, middle peasants, poor peasants, and tenants, along with urban workers, merchants, financiers, civil servants, teachers, students, soldiers, and intellectuals; wartime also created a vast refugee population, casual laborers, and a new middle stratum tied to the rear-area military-state apparatus.

allies.zh: 主要国际支持来自苏联、美国、英国及其他同情抗日事业的国家；正式军事同盟尚不如1941年后稳固，但中国已是国际反侵略阵线的重要成员。
allies.en: Principal international support came from the Soviet Union, the United States, Britain, and other states sympathetic to resistance against Japan; formal alliance structures were not yet as firm as after 1941, but China was already an important member of the international anti-aggression front.

enemies.zh: 主要敌人为日本帝国、伪满洲国及日军扶植的各类占领区傀儡政权；与中国共产党虽维持第二次国共合作名义，但双方互不信任且存在持续摩擦。
enemies.en: The chief enemies were the Japanese Empire, Manchukuo, and the various occupation-zone puppet regimes sponsored by Japan; although the Second United Front with the Chinese Communists formally continued, mutual distrust and ongoing frictions persisted.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策核心是争取国际承认、获得贷款与军援、维持对日长期抗战，并以重庆政府作为中国唯一合法中央政府的地位对抗日本分化策略；同时谨慎平衡与苏联、英美及周边殖民政权的关系。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on securing international recognition, obtaining loans and military aid, sustaining long-term resistance to Japan, and defending Chongqing’s position as China’s sole legitimate central government against Japanese divide-and-rule tactics; it also carefully balanced relations with the Soviet Union, Britain, the United States, and neighboring colonial regimes.

era.zh: 世界大战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术能力包括铁路与公路战时重组、内迁兵工生产、无线电通信、基础航空维护、现代印刷传播及大后方高校科研延续；但总体工业科研基础薄弱，对外来设备、技术人员和援助依赖明显。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological capacities included wartime reorganization of rail and road transport, relocated armaments production, radio communications, basic aircraft maintenance, modern printing and mass communication, and the continued work of inland universities and research institutions; however, the overall industrial and scientific base remained weak and depended heavily on imported equipment, foreign expertise, and aid.

strengths.zh: 拥有庞大人口、广阔纵深、持续的国际合法性、强烈的民族抗战意志以及西南后方的生存空间；即使工业基础薄弱，仍能通过动员人力和战略退却维持持久战。
strengths.en: Its strengths included enormous population, vast strategic depth, continuing international legitimacy, strong national resistance sentiment, and the survival space of the southwestern rear; even with a weak industrial base, it could sustain a protracted war through manpower mobilization and strategic retreat.

weaknesses.zh: 国家财政脆弱、通货膨胀加剧、军队装备落后且派系化严重，沿海与工业中心失陷削弱税源和生产，中央对部分地方和基层社会控制有限，政治腐败与行政低效亦损害战时动员。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses were fragile public finances, worsening inflation, outdated and factionalized armed forces, and the loss of coasts and industrial centers that undermined revenue and production; central control over some regions and local society remained limited, while corruption and administrative inefficiency weakened wartime mobilization.

outlook.zh: 1939年的中华民国处于极端艰苦但尚具韧性的阶段。短期内难以收复失地，但只要后方交通线、国际援助和国内基本政治整合得以维持，便有较大可能继续拖住日本并等待国际战争形势转变。
outlook.en: In 1939 the Republic of China stood in an extremely difficult yet still resilient position. It was unlikely to recover lost territories in the short term, but if rear-area communications, international assistance, and minimum domestic political cohesion could be maintained, it had a substantial chance of continuing to tie down Japan and await a shift in the wider international war.

description.zh: 1939年的中华民国是国际承认的中国合法政府，以重庆为战时首都，领导全面抗日战争。国民政府控制中国大后方广袤领土，拥有正规军约450万人，是中国战场的主要军事力量。
description.en: The Republic of China in 1939 was the internationally recognized legitimate government of China, with Chongqing as its wartime capital, leading the full-scale War of Resistance against Japan. The National Government controlled vast rear-area territories with approximately 4.5 million regular troops, constituting the principal military force on the China theater.

name.zh: 陕甘宁边区与中共根据地
name.en: Shaan-Gan-Ning Border Region and Communist Base Areas

leaderTitle.zh: 中共中央领导核心主席
leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the CCP Central Leadership

ideology.zh: 马克思列宁主义、新民主主义
ideology.en: Marxism-Leninism, New Democracy

controlledArea.zh: 陕甘宁边区（延安为中心）、晋察冀、晋冀鲁豫、晋绥等华北敌后抗日根据地，合计面积约100万平方公里
controlledArea.en: Shaan-Gan-Ning Border Region (centered on Yan'an), Jin-Cha-Ji, Jin-Ji-Lu-Yu, Jin-Sui and other anti-Japanese base areas in North China, totaling approximately 1 million sq km

description.zh: 八路军（约15万）、新四军（约1.2万）、地方民兵及自卫队（约22万）。以游击战与运动战为主，轻武器装备为主，重武器严重不足。
description.en: Eighth Route Army (~150,000), New Fourth Army (~12,000), local militia and self-defense forces (~220,000). Primarily guerrilla and mobile warfare, light infantry weapons, severe shortage of heavy weapons.

relationship.zh: 名义上在国共第二次合作的抗日民族统一战线框架下服从国民政府领导，八路军和新四军被编入国民革命军序列。实际上中共保持独立的党政军体系，拒绝国民党的直接指挥，双方摩擦不断，1939年已出现多次武装冲突。
relationship.en: Nominally under the Second United Front framework, the CCP forces were incorporated into the National Revolutionary Army. In reality, the CCP maintained an independent party-state-military system, resisted direct Nationalist command, and by 1939 frequent armed clashes had already occurred between the two sides.

description.zh: 中国共产党于1921年成立，1927年国共分裂后长期武装对抗国民政府。1937年全面抗战爆发后，国共达成第二次合作，红军改编为八路军和新四军。至1939年，中共以延安为中心建立了陕甘宁边区，并在华北敌后广泛开辟抗日根据地，实行减租减息、基层民主等新民主主义政策，迅速扩大了党的影响力和军事力量。
description.en: Founded in 1921, the CCP engaged in armed resistance against the Nationalist government after the 1927 split. Following the outbreak of full-scale war with Japan in 1937, the KMT-CCP Second United Front was formed and Red Army forces were reorganized as the Eighth Route Army and New Fourth Army. By 1939, the CCP had established the Shaan-Gan-Ning Border Region centered on Yan'an and opened extensive anti-Japanese base areas behind enemy lines in North China, implementing New Democracy policies including rent and interest reduction and grassroots democracy, rapidly expanding party influence and military power.

role.zh: 党的最高领导人，全面主导战略方针与意识形态
role.en: Supreme party leader, directing strategy and ideology

role.zh: 全军最高军事指挥官
role.en: Supreme military commander of all forces

title.zh: 中共中央副主席、国统区代表
title.en: CCP Central Vice Chairman, Representative in Nationalist areas

role.zh: 统一战线与对外联络总负责人
role.en: Chief of United Front and external liaison

title.en: Deputy Commander of Eighth Route Army

role.zh: 华北前线实际指挥
role.en: De facto commander of North China front

role.zh: 华中工作与党务组织
role.en: Central China operations and party organization

leader.zh: 阎锡山、龙云、刘湘(已故)等
leader.en: Yan Xishan, Long Yun, Liu Xiang (deceased), etc.

leaderTitle.en: Provincial Military Governors

ideology.zh: 地方主义，名义服从中央但保持军政独立
ideology.en: Regionalism, nominally loyal to central government but maintaining military-political autonomy

controlledArea.zh: 山西（阎锡山）、云南（龙云）、四川（刘氏集团残余）、广西（李宗仁/白崇禧新桂系）、西北马家军等
controlledArea.en: Shanxi (Yan Xishan), Yunnan (Long Yun), Sichuan (remnant Liu clique), Guangxi (Li Zongren/Bai Chongxi New Guangxi clique), Northwest Ma clique, etc.

description.zh: 各省军阀部队合计约150万人，装备水平参差不齐，编制名义上归入国民革命军但实际由各省长官指挥
description.en: Combined warlord troops approximately 1.5 million, with varying equipment levels, nominally under the National Revolutionary Army but effectively commanded by provincial leaders

relationship.zh: 抗战期间各地方实力派在国难当头的背景下基本服从蒋介石的军事指挥，参加正面战场作战，但在人事、财政、地盘等问题上仍保持高度自主性。蒋介石利用抗战削弱地方势力的策略也引发了部分军阀的不满。
relationship.en: During the war, regional strongmen generally accepted Chiang Kai-shek's military command given the national crisis, participating in frontal battles, but maintained high autonomy over personnel, finance, and territory. Chiang's strategy of using the war to weaken regional powers also caused resentment.

description.zh: 民国时期长期存在的地方军事割据势力。抗战爆发后虽名义统一于中央指挥之下，但各省军阀仍保持独立的军队、财政和行政体系。
description.en: Long-standing regional military powers from the Republican era. Though nominally unified under central command after the war began, provincial warlords maintained independent armies, finances, and administrative systems.

role.zh: 山西王，控制山西军政三十余年
role.en: Ruler of Shanxi for over 30 years

role.zh: 新桂系领袖，台儿庄战役指挥官
role.en: Leader of New Guangxi clique, commander at Battle of Taierzhuang

role.zh: 云南王，控制滇军
role.en: Ruler of Yunnan, controlling Yunnan Army

name.zh: 汪精卫政权（日占区傀儡政府）

leaderTitle.zh: 「中华民国国民政府」主席（1940年正式成立）
leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the 'National Government of ROC' (formally established 1940)

ideology.zh: 和平运动、亲日合作、大亚洲主义
ideology.en: Peace Movement, pro-Japanese collaboration, Pan-Asianism

headquarters.zh: 上海（筹建期）→ 南京（1940年后）

controlledArea.zh: 日本占领下的华东、华中、华南部分地区（名义上），实际由日军控制。包括南京、上海、武汉、广州等沦陷区
controlledArea.en: Nominally parts of East, Central, and South China under Japanese occupation, actually controlled by the Japanese military. Including Nanjing, Shanghai, Wuhan, Guangzhou and other occupied areas

description.zh: 主要由原国民政府投敌部队和各地伪军组成，装备由日方提供，战斗力低下，主要用于维持占领区治安
description.en: Mainly composed of defected former Nationalist troops and local collaborationist armies, equipped by Japan, with low combat effectiveness, primarily used for maintaining order in occupied areas

relationship.zh: 叛国傀儡政权。1938年汪精卫脱离重庆国民政府投日，1940年在南京成立伪「国民政府」。重庆国民政府视其为叛徒政权，日本利用其作为统治占领区的工具。
relationship.en: A treasonous puppet regime. In 1938, Wang Jingwei defected from the Chongqing government to Japan, establishing a puppet 'National Government' in Nanjing in 1940. The Chongqing government regarded it as a traitor regime; Japan used it as a tool for ruling occupied territories.

description.zh: 1938年12月汪精卫发表「艳电」公开响应日本「近卫声明」，脱离重庆国民政府。1939年正在上海等地筹建亲日政权，1940年3月在南京正式成立伪中华民国国民政府。实质上是日本帝国主义控制中国占领区的傀儡工具。
description.en: In December 1938, Wang Jingwei published his 'Yan Telegram' publicly responding to Japan's 'Konoe Statement', defecting from the Chongqing government. In 1939 he was organizing a pro-Japanese regime in Shanghai and elsewhere, formally establishing a puppet ROC National Government in Nanjing in March 1940. It was essentially a puppet instrument of Japanese imperialism for controlling occupied China.

role.zh: 名义最高领导人
role.en: Nominal supreme leader

role.zh: 核心策划者，财政与情报负责人
role.en: Core planner, head of finance and intelligence

role.zh: 政权二号人物
role.en: Second-in-command of the regime

leaderTitle.zh: 中央组织部部长（陈立夫）、中央党部实际控制者
leaderTitle.en: Director of Central Organization Department (Chen Lifu), de facto controllers of central party apparatus

ideology.zh: 三民主义、反共主义、力行哲学、党治国家
ideology.en: Three Principles of the People, anti-communism, philosophy of practice, party-state

controlledArea.zh: 控制国民党中央党务系统、中央组织部、中统局、党务调查处及地方党部网络
controlledArea.en: Controlled the KMT central party apparatus, Central Organization Department, Bureau of Investigation and Statistics (BIS/Zhongtong), Party Affairs Investigation Office, and local party branch networks

relationship.zh: CC系是蒋介石在党务系统中的核心支柱，二陈兄弟自1920年代起追随蒋介石。CC系掌控国民党组织、宣传和特务（中统局）系统，在党内人事、思想控制和反共工作中具有巨大影响力。但与黄埔系、政学系之间存在争权竞争。
relationship.en: The CC Clique was Chiang Kai-shek's core pillar in the party apparatus; the Chen brothers had followed Chiang since the 1920s. The CC Clique controlled the KMT's organization, propaganda, and intelligence (BIS/Zhongtong) systems, wielding enormous influence over party personnel, ideological control, and anti-communist operations. However, it competed for power with the Whampoa and Political Study cliques.

description.zh: CC系因「中央俱乐部」（Central Club）得名，由陈果夫、陈立夫兄弟领导，是国民党党务系统中最强大的派系。CC系控制中央组织部和中统局（中央调查统计局），负责党务人事任命、意识形态管控和政治情报工作。1939年CC系在抗战期间持续强化对后方省份党部的控制，同时通过中统特务系统监控共产党活动和反政府异见。CC系在文化教育领域也有广泛渗透，主导国民精神总动员运动。
description.en: Named after the 'Central Club', the CC Clique was led by the Chen Guofu and Chen Lifu brothers and was the most powerful faction in the KMT's party apparatus. The CC Clique controlled the Central Organization Department and the Bureau of Investigation and Statistics (BIS/Zhongtong), managing party personnel appointments, ideological control, and political intelligence. In 1939, the CC Clique continued to strengthen its hold on rear-area provincial party organizations while using the BIS intelligence network to monitor Communist activities and anti-government dissent. The CC Clique also had extensive influence in culture and education, leading the National Spiritual Mobilization Movement.

title.zh: 国民党中央执行委员会常委
title.en: Standing Member of KMT Central Executive Committee

role.zh: CC系实际创建者，虽因肺病退居二线但仍掌控派系布局
role.en: Actual founder of the CC Clique; though sidelined by tuberculosis, still controlled factional networks

role.zh: CC系日常运作核心，主管党务人事与中统系统
role.en: Core operator of the CC Clique, overseeing party personnel and the BIS system

role.zh: 中统特务机关首脑，负责政治侦查和反共情报
role.en: Head of the BIS intelligence agency, responsible for political investigation and anti-communist intelligence

leaderTitle.zh: 军事委员会调查统计局副局长（实际主持）
leaderTitle.en: Deputy Director of Military Bureau of Investigation and Statistics (de facto head)

ideology.zh: 军事效忠蒋介石、反共、特务政治、国家安全至上
ideology.en: Military loyalty to Chiang Kai-shek, anti-communism, secret police politics, national security supremacy

headquarters.en: Chongqing (Military Bureau of Investigation and Statistics headquarters)

controlledArea.zh: 军统局在全国各地及敌后设有庞大的情报网络和行动队，控制军事情报、反间谍、暗杀、游击战指导等
controlledArea.en: The Military BIS maintained vast intelligence networks and action teams throughout the country and behind enemy lines, controlling military intelligence, counter-espionage, assassinations, and guerrilla warfare direction

description.zh: 军统局拥有约5万名特工和武装人员，包括情报人员、行动队、敌后游击指挥员和忠义救国军等武装力量
description.en: The Military BIS had approximately 50,000 agents and armed personnel, including intelligence operatives, action teams, behind-enemy-lines guerrilla commanders, and the Loyal and Righteous National Salvation Army

relationship.zh: 黄埔系以黄埔军校出身的军事将领和戴笠领导的军统局为核心，是蒋介石在军事和情报领域最依赖的力量。戴笠对蒋介石绝对忠诚，军统局直接向蒋介石汇报。黄埔系与CC系在情报系统上形成军统与中统的竞争格局。
relationship.en: The Whampoa Clique centered on military generals from Whampoa Military Academy and Dai Li's Military BIS, forming Chiang Kai-shek's most trusted force in military and intelligence domains. Dai Li was absolutely loyal to Chiang, and the Military BIS reported directly to him. The Whampoa Clique and CC Clique competed through the rivalry between the Military BIS and the Bureau of Investigation.

description.zh: 黄埔系因黄埔军校而得名，1924年孙中山在广州创办黄埔军校，蒋介石任校长。黄埔军校培养了大批忠于蒋介石的军事骨干。1939年黄埔系在军事和情报领域的核心是戴笠领导的军统局（军事委员会调查统计局），该机构拥有遍布全国和敌后的庞大特务网络，执行军事情报搜集、反间谍、暗杀汉奸、敌后破坏、游击战组织等任务。军统局还控制忠义救国军等敌后武装力量，是抗战期间国民政府特务政治的核心机关。
description.en: The Whampoa Clique was named after the Whampoa Military Academy, founded by Sun Yat-sen in Guangzhou in 1924 with Chiang Kai-shek as commandant. The academy trained a large cadre of military officers loyal to Chiang. In 1939, the core of the Whampoa Clique in military and intelligence affairs was Dai Li's Military Bureau of Investigation and Statistics (Juntong), which maintained a vast intelligence network throughout the country and behind enemy lines, carrying out military intelligence collection, counter-espionage, assassination of collaborators, sabotage behind enemy lines, and organization of guerrilla warfare. The Military BIS also controlled armed forces such as the Loyal and Righteous National Salvation Army, serving as the core organ of Nationalist wartime secret police operations.

role.zh: 军统局实际负责人，蒋介石最信赖的情报首脑
role.en: De facto head of Military BIS, Chiang Kai-shek's most trusted intelligence chief

title.en: Chief of General Staff, Military Affairs Commission

role.zh: 黄埔系高级将领，军事决策核心成员
role.en: Senior Whampoa general, core member of military decision-making

role.zh: 蒋介石嫡系将领，号称「小委员长」
role.en: Chiang's most trusted general, nicknamed 'Little Generalissimo'

title.zh: 第三十四集团军总司令

role.zh: 黄埔一期毕业，负责西北防线和监视中共
role.en: Whampoa first class graduate, responsible for northwest defense line and monitoring CCP

leaderTitle.en: Administrative officials and policy advisors

ideology.zh: 实用主义、技术官僚治国、中央集权行政现代化
ideology.en: Pragmatism, technocratic governance, centralized administrative modernization

controlledArea.zh: 影响力集中于行政院、外交部、财政部等中央行政机关和部分省级政府
controlledArea.en: Influence concentrated in the Executive Yuan, Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Ministry of Finance and other central administrative organs, and some provincial governments

relationship.zh: 政学系是蒋介石倚重的行政技术官僚集团，以实务能力和政策建议服务于蒋介石的统治需要。政学系成员多出身留学或行政经历，不像CC系和黄埔系那样拥有组织性的特务或军事力量，而是以行政能力和外交手腕见长。
relationship.en: The Political Study Clique served as Chiang Kai-shek's trusted technocratic administrative group, serving his governance needs with practical competence and policy advice. Members typically had overseas study or administrative backgrounds; unlike the CC and Whampoa cliques, they lacked organized intelligence or military forces, excelling instead in administrative ability and diplomatic skills.

description.zh: 政学系起源于1916年国会中的政学会，后发展为国民党内以行政实务和外交事务见长的官僚派系。核心人物包括杨永泰（1936年被暗杀）、张群、吴鼎昌、熊式辉等人。1939年政学系在行政院、外交部和部分省政府中占据重要位置，是蒋介石处理日常行政和对外关系的重要班底。与CC系和黄埔系不同，政学系不搞特务政治，而是以政策能力和行政经验取得蒋介石信任。
description.en: The Political Study Clique originated from the Political Study Association in the 1916 parliament, later evolving into a bureaucratic faction within the KMT known for administrative competence and diplomatic affairs. Key figures included Yang Yongtai (assassinated 1936), Zhang Qun, Wu Dingchang, and Xiong Shihui. In 1939, the Political Study Clique held important positions in the Executive Yuan, Ministry of Foreign Affairs, and some provincial governments, serving as Chiang Kai-shek's key team for handling routine administration and foreign relations. Unlike the CC and Whampoa cliques, the Political Study Clique did not engage in secret police politics but earned Chiang's trust through policy ability and administrative experience.

title.zh: 外交事务顾问、曾任外交部长
title.en: Foreign affairs advisor, former Minister of Foreign Affairs

role.zh: 政学系核心人物，负责对日外交和国际关系事务
role.en: Core Political Study Clique figure, handling Japan-related diplomacy and international affairs

role.zh: 政学系重要成员，金融和行政专家
role.en: Important Political Study Clique member, finance and administration expert

role.zh: 省级行政干才，政学系地方代表
role.en: Provincial administrative talent, Political Study Clique's local representative

name.en: Three Principles of the People Youth Corps

leader.zh: 蒋介石（团长）、陈诚（副团长）

leaderTitle.en: Director of the Three Principles Youth Corps

ideology.zh: 三民主义、民族复兴、青年动员、抗战救国
ideology.en: Three Principles of the People, national revival, youth mobilization, resistance and national salvation

controlledArea.zh: 在后方各省高校、城市和机关中建立支团部和分团部网络，吸收青年知识分子和学生
controlledArea.en: Established branch networks in rear-area provincial universities, cities, and institutions, recruiting young intellectuals and students

relationship.zh: 三青团于1938年在武汉成立，由蒋介石亲任团长，旨在创建一个超越国民党内各派系的青年组织，直接服从蒋介石领导。三青团与CC系控制的国民党党务系统形成竞争，蒋介石试图以三青团培养新一代忠于自己的干部力量。
relationship.en: The Youth Corps was established in Wuhan in 1938, with Chiang Kai-shek personally serving as director, aiming to create a youth organization that transcended KMT factions and reported directly to Chiang. The Youth Corps competed with the CC Clique-controlled party apparatus, as Chiang sought to cultivate a new generation of cadres loyal to himself.

description.zh: 三民主义青年团（简称三青团）于1938年7月在武昌成立，是蒋介石为应对抗战需要和整合国民党内部派系而创建的青年政治组织。三青团以「团结青年、训练青年、指导青年」为宗旨，在全国后方高校和城市中广泛设立组织。1939年三青团正处于快速扩张期，成员已达30余万人。三青团不仅是青年动员工具，也是蒋介石绕过CC系等老派系、直接培植新生力量的政治手段。三青团内部有康泽等人主持的组织训练系统。
description.en: The Three Principles of the People Youth Corps (abbreviated San Qing Tuan) was established in Wuchang in July 1938, a youth political organization created by Chiang Kai-shek to meet wartime needs and integrate KMT internal factions. With the mission of 'uniting, training, and guiding youth', the Youth Corps established organizations extensively in rear-area universities and cities nationwide. In 1939, the Youth Corps was in a phase of rapid expansion, with membership exceeding 300,000. The Youth Corps was not only a youth mobilization tool but also a political instrument for Chiang to cultivate new loyalists bypassing old factions like the CC Clique. The organization and training system within the Youth Corps was led by figures such as Kang Ze.

title.zh: 三青团中央团部组织处处长
title.en: Director of Organization, Central Youth Corps Headquarters

role.zh: 三青团实际组织者，蓝衣社核心成员
role.en: De facto organizer of the Youth Corps, core Blue Shirts member

title.zh: 江西省三青团干部训练班主持人
title.en: Director of Jiangxi Youth Corps Cadre Training

role.zh: 蒋介石之子，正通过三青团积累政治资本
role.en: Chiang Kai-shek's son, building political capital through the Youth Corps

leader.en: Zhang Lan, Shen Junru, Huang Yanpei, etc.

leaderTitle.zh: 各党派领袖与社会名流
leaderTitle.en: Party leaders and social notables

ideology.zh: 民主宪政、社会改良、抗日救国、反对一党专政
ideology.en: Democratic constitutionalism, social reform, anti-Japanese resistance, opposition to one-party rule

controlledArea.zh: 无直接控制领土，影响力通过国民参政会、新闻媒体和社会舆论发挥
controlledArea.en: No directly controlled territory; influence exerted through the People's Political Council, press, and public opinion

relationship.zh: 中间党派包括中国青年党、国家社会党（后改民主社会党）、第三党（中国农工民主党前身）、职教派（黄炎培）以及无党派民主人士。这些力量在国民参政会中有一定席位，呼吁实行宪政、结束训政。它们既不满国民党一党专政，也不完全认同共产党路线，试图在国共之间寻找第三条道路。蒋介石对中间派既拉拢又限制。
relationship.en: Minor parties included the China Youth Party, National Social Party (later Democratic Socialist Party), Third Party (precursor to China Peasants and Workers Democratic Party), Vocational Education Group (Huang Yanpei), and non-partisan democrats. These forces had some seats in the People's Political Council, calling for constitutional government and an end to political tutelage. They were dissatisfied with KMT one-party rule but did not fully embrace the Communist line, seeking a third way between the KMT and CCP. Chiang Kai-shek alternately courted and restricted the middle parties.

description.zh: 1939年重庆汇聚了大批民主党派人士和社会名流。国民参政会（1938年成立）为中间力量提供了有限的政治参与平台。中国青年党的曾琦、左舜生，国社党的张君劢，救国会的沈钧儒、邹韬奋，以及张澜、黄炎培、梁漱溟等无党派名流，都在重庆积极活动。这些中间力量虽然缺乏军事实力和基层组织，但在舆论、文化和政治协商领域具有一定影响力，成为抗战时期中国政治光谱的重要组成部分。1941年他们将联合成立中国民主政团同盟。
description.en: In 1939, Chongqing gathered numerous democratic party figures and social notables. The People's Political Council (established 1938) provided a limited platform for political participation by middle forces. Key figures included Zeng Qi and Zuo Shunsheng of the China Youth Party, Zhang Junmai of the National Social Party, Shen Junru and Zou Taofen of the National Salvation Association, and non-partisan luminaries like Zhang Lan, Huang Yanpei, and Liang Shuming, all active in Chongqing. Though lacking military power and grassroots organization, these middle forces had notable influence in public opinion, culture, and political consultation, forming an important part of China's wartime political spectrum. In 1941 they would unite to form the China Democratic League.

title.en: People's Political Council member, social notable

role.zh: 中间力量精神领袖，后任民盟主席
role.en: Spiritual leader of middle forces, later Chairman of China Democratic League

title.zh: 国民参政员、救国会领袖
title.en: People's Political Council member, National Salvation Association leader

role.zh: 「七君子」之一，著名爱国民主人士
role.en: One of the 'Seven Gentlemen', renowned patriotic democrat

title.zh: 中华职业教育社创办人
title.en: Founder of China Vocational Education Society

role.zh: 职教派代表，社会活动家
role.en: Representative of the Vocational Education Group, social activist

title.zh: 国民参政员、乡村建设运动领袖
title.en: People's Political Council member, rural reconstruction movement leader

role.zh: 新儒家思想家，国共调解人之一
role.en: Neo-Confucian thinker, one of the KMT-CCP mediators

rulerTitle.zh: 部长会议主席兼内务部长
rulerTitle.en: Prime Minister and Minister of Internal Affairs

governmentForm.zh: 在蒙古人民革命党领导下、受苏联强烈影响的社会主义人民共和国
governmentForm.en: Socialist people's republic under the leadership of the Mongolian People's Revolutionary Party and under strong Soviet influence

socialStructure.zh: 社会以牧民为主体，国家机关干部、军官、城市工人和合作社成员逐渐扩大；旧贵族与喇嘛阶层在1930年代清洗后已被大幅削弱。
socialStructure.en: Society was predominantly pastoral, with a growing stratum of state officials, officers, urban workers, and cooperative members; the old nobility and Buddhist clergy had been drastically weakened by the purges of the 1930s.

rulingClass.zh: 蒙古人民革命党高层、国家安全机构干部、军队指挥层以及受苏联训练的行政精英
rulingClass.en: The senior leadership of the Mongolian People's Revolutionary Party, state security officials, military commanders, and Soviet-trained administrative elites

succession.zh: 国家领导权并非世袭，而由党内权力斗争、党代表大会、中央委员会决定及苏联支持共同塑造
succession.en: State leadership was non-hereditary and shaped by intra-party struggle, party congresses, Central Committee decisions, and Soviet backing

structure.zh: 国家形式上由大呼拉尔及其主席团、部长会议和司法机关组成，实际权力集中于蒙古人民革命党中央及乔巴山控制的政府与安全机构。
structure.en: Formally the state consisted of the Great Khural and its Presidium, the Council of Ministers, and judicial organs, but real power was concentrated in the Central Committee of the Mongolian People's Revolutionary Party and in the government and security organs controlled by Choibalsan.

function.zh: 统筹国家行政、经济计划、财政、交通、教育与地方执行
function.en: Coordinated state administration, economic planning, finance, transport, education, and local implementation

function.zh: 负责治安、情报、边境监控、政治镇压与反间谍工作
function.en: Handled policing, intelligence, border surveillance, political repression, and counterintelligence

function.zh: 管理军队编制、动员、训练、边防与对苏军事协同
function.en: Managed army organization, mobilization, training, border defense, and military coordination with the Soviet Union

function.zh: 征收税收、编制预算、管理国家贸易收入与财政结算
