The urban wage-earning class remained small but had some influence in ports such as Dakar.

unit.zh: 法属西非法郎/月（普通城市非洲劳动者粗估）
unit.en: French West African francs per month (rough estimate for ordinary urban African laborers)
French West African francs per year

economicSystem.zh: 法国主导下的联邦殖民经济，以关税同盟、出口作物、港口转运和铁路整合为主要特征。
economicSystem.en: A French-led federal colonial economy characterized by a customs union, export crops, port transshipment, and railway integration.

unit.en: French West African francs per year
French West African francs per year
French West African francs per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 联邦财政具有一定储备和税基，但高度依赖贸易与农业出口，并受法国本土政局与帝国预算安排影响。
treasuryDescription.en: The federation maintained some reserves and a workable tax base, but remained highly dependent on trade and agricultural exports and on budgetary arrangements set by metropolitan France.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调联邦统筹、贸易征税和基础设施投资，以维持帝国交通与出口网络。社会支出有所增加，但整体仍服务于殖民整合而非普遍福利。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized federal coordination, trade taxation, and infrastructure investment to sustain imperial transport and export networks. Social spending rose somewhat, but the system still primarily served colonial integration rather than universal welfare.

name.zh: 塞内加尔步兵团及殖民步兵

description.zh: 由法军指挥的西非殖民步兵，是联邦主要军事实力来源。
description.en: West African colonial infantry under French command, forming the federation's main military strength.

name.zh: 骑骆驼与撒哈拉机动部队

description.zh: 负责撒哈拉与萨赫勒边远地带巡逻、通讯与治安。
description.en: Tasked with patrol, communications, and security in remote Saharan and Sahelian regions.

name.zh: 宪兵、港口警备与辅助炮兵
name.en: Gendarmerie, Port Guards, and Auxiliary Artillery

description.zh: 负责城市治安、要港防务和有限火力支援。
description.en: Handled urban security, key port defense, and limited fire support.

commanderInChief.zh: 法属西非总督在文职上居首，军事由驻达喀尔法军高级将领统辖
commanderInChief.en: The Governor-General stood at the top in civil authority, while military command was exercised by senior French officers stationed in Dakar

technology.zh: 装备包括标准法军轻武器、机枪、野炮、装甲车、无线电和铁路机动体系，海军与空军支援主要依赖法国本土及帝国部署。
technology.en: Equipment included standard French small arms, machine guns, field artillery, armored cars, radios, and rail mobility systems, while naval and air support depended mainly on metropolitan and imperial French deployments.

unit.en: French West African francs per year

threats.zh: 威胁主要来自战时海上封锁、撒哈拉边境不稳、局部反殖活动及法国本土沦陷后可能出现的政治分裂。
threats.en: Threats stemmed mainly from wartime maritime blockade, instability on Saharan frontiers, localized anti-colonial activity, and possible political division if metropolitan France collapsed.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一千五百万，穆斯林人口占多数，但地区间宗教、语言与生活方式差异极大。人口主体仍居于乡村，沿海、铁路和行政城市则形成多语言、多宗教的殖民都会社会。
populationDescription.en: The population was about fifteen million, with Muslims forming a majority, though regional differences in religion, language, and way of life were substantial. Most people still lived in rural areas, while coastal, railway, and administrative cities developed into multilingual and multi-religious colonial urban societies.

socialClasses.zh: 法国官员与商人、伊斯兰教团与传统酋长、城市法语教育精英、工人和码头劳动者、广大农民牧民与商旅群体。
socialClasses.en: French officials and merchants, Islamic brotherhoods and traditional chiefs, urban French-educated elites, workers and dock laborers, and broad populations of peasants, pastoralists, and traders.

allies.zh: 法国宗主国及其帝国体系内的其他殖民地；在地区层面与英国西非殖民地保持有限合作与竞争并存关系。
allies.en: Its metropolitan ruler France and other colonies within the French Empire; regionally it maintained a mix of limited cooperation and competition with British West African colonies.

enemies.zh: 无独立正式敌国，但在战争背景下潜在敌对者包括轴心国海空力量及反殖民运动。
enemies.en: It had no independent formal enemy state, though in wartime potential adversaries included Axis naval-air forces and anti-colonial movements.

foreignPolicy.zh: 法属西非的对外政策完全服从巴黎，重点是维护帝国航线、保障达喀尔战略地位并维持西非腹地秩序。
foreignPolicy.en: French West Africa's external policy was wholly subordinate to Paris and focused on protecting imperial sea lanes, securing Dakar's strategic role, and maintaining order in the West African interior.

era.zh: 20世纪30年代晚期法国殖民联邦现代化阶段
era.en: Late 1930s phase of French colonial federal modernization

keyInnovations.zh: 达喀尔港扩建、铁路干线联通、无线电和邮电网络、花生加工与港口冷链设施、殖民行政统计体系。
keyInnovations.en: Expansion of Dakar port, trunk railway connections, radio and postal-telegraph networks, groundnut processing and port cold-chain facilities, and colonial administrative statistical systems.

strengths.zh: 地域广阔、人口众多、达喀尔港战略价值高，联邦交通与军事组织相对完善。
strengths.en: It possessed vast territory, a large population, the high strategic value of Dakar, and relatively developed federal transport and military organization.

weaknesses.zh: 经济以初级产品为主，地区差异显著，行政成本高，殖民合法性脆弱。
weaknesses.en: The economy depended on primary products, regional disparities were strong, administrative costs were high, and colonial legitimacy was fragile.

outlook.zh: 在1939年仍是法国帝国在非洲最重要的支柱之一，但欧洲战局将迅速改变其政治归属与统治稳定性。
outlook.en: In 1939 it remained one of the most important pillars of the French Empire in Africa, but the European war would soon transform its political alignment and governing stability.

description.zh: 1939年的法属西非是一个以达喀尔为核心、由法国联邦式统治并依赖出口农业与战略港口的广大殖民体系。
description.en: In 1939, French West Africa was a vast French-ruled colonial federation centered on Dakar and dependent on export agriculture and strategic ports.

dynasty.zh: 法兰西第三共和国殖民统治
dynasty.en: Colonial Rule of the French Third Republic

governmentForm.zh: 由法国任命总督统辖的联邦式殖民行政区，下辖加蓬、中刚果、乌班吉-沙里与乍得。
governmentForm.en: A federated colonial administrative territory governed by a French-appointed Governor-General, overseeing Gabon, Middle Congo, Ubangi-Shari, and Chad.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构呈明显殖民等级化，法国官员、商人和少量受法式教育的非洲精英居于上层。广大农村人口主要从事自给农业、采集与强制或半强制劳役，地方酋长在殖民体制下被纳入基层治理。城市中出现规模有限的文书、士兵、工人与教会教育群体。
socialStructure.en: Society was sharply stratified along colonial lines, with French officials, merchants, and a small group of French-educated African elites at the top. Most of the rural population engaged in subsistence farming, gathering, and forced or semi-forced labor, while local chiefs were incorporated into colonial governance at the grassroots level. Urban centers contained small groups of clerks, soldiers, laborers, and mission-educated communities.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要是驻布拉柴维尔的法国殖民官僚、军官与特许公司利益集团。部分地方酋长与教会精英作为中介协助殖民统治。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of French colonial bureaucrats, military officers, and concessionary company interests based in Brazzaville. Some local chiefs and church-educated elites acted as intermediaries within the colonial order.

succession.zh: 最高权力并非世袭，而由巴黎殖民部任命总督并可随时调动。各属地行政长官同样由法国政府任命。
succession.en: Supreme authority was not hereditary but assigned by the Ministry of Colonies in Paris, which appointed and could reassign the Governor-General. Territorial administrators were likewise appointed by the French government.

structure.zh: 法属赤道非洲实行总督府集中统辖与属地下放并行的殖民体制。布拉柴维尔为联邦首府，总督统领财政、治安、劳役与基础设施政策，各属地由副总督或总督代表执行。地方层面依赖区长、行政专员与被承认的传统首领共同管理。
structure.en: French Equatorial Africa operated under a colonial system combining centralized federal oversight with territorial administration. Brazzaville served as the federal capital, where the Governor-General directed fiscal, policing, labor, and infrastructure policy, while lieutenant governors or territorial heads implemented policy locally. At the local level, command relied on district officers, administrative commissioners, and recognized traditional chiefs.

function.zh: 统筹联邦行政、公文、属地协调与政策执行。
function.en: Coordinated federal administration, correspondence, territorial liaison, and policy execution.

function.zh: 征收人头税、关税、特许费并管理预算。
function.en: Collected head taxes, customs duties, concession fees, and managed the budget.

function.zh: 监督地方酋长体系、人口登记、劳工征发与治安事务。
function.en: Supervised chiefly administration, population registration, labor recruitment, and internal order.

function.zh: 负责道路、河运设施、医疗站和基础公共工程。
function.en: Handled roads, river transport facilities, medical posts, and basic public works.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通过区、分区与村社层级展开，殖民行政官员依赖酋长征税、征工与维持秩序。偏远地区行政控制薄弱，常以巡回方式治理。
localAdmin.en: Local administration functioned through districts, sub-districts, and village hierarchies, with colonial officers relying on chiefs to collect taxes, recruit labor, and maintain order. In remote areas, control remained thin and often depended on itinerant supervision.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以法国殖民法令为核心，欧洲人适用法国法，非洲居民多受“土著法典”式特别规制。习惯法在婚姻、继承和村社纠纷中仍有限存在。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was centered on French colonial decrees: Europeans were governed by French law, while most Africans were subject to special indigenous regulations. Customary law persisted in limited form for marriage, inheritance, and village disputes.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自人头税、关税、贸易税与特许经营收益。税收常与劳役征发相结合，对农村人口负担较重。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came chiefly from head taxes, customs duties, trade taxes, and concessionary income. Taxation was often tied to labor obligations and weighed heavily on rural populations.

culturalAchievements.zh: 传教学校、教会印刷与法语行政教育推动了有限的识字扩张。布拉柴维尔等城市形成早期殖民城市文化与非洲辅助精英阶层。
culturalAchievements.en: Mission schools, church printing, and French administrative education encouraged limited literacy growth. Cities such as Brazzaville saw the emergence of early colonial urban culture and a small African auxiliary elite.

languageFamily.zh: 官方语言属印欧语系罗曼语族法语；地方语言多属班图语系、乌班吉语支及撒哈拉语系。
languageFamily.en: The official language was French of the Indo-European Romance family; local languages belonged mainly to the Bantu, Ubangian, and Saharan groups.

philosophy.zh: 法国殖民“同化—联合”理念与中非地方宗教、基督教传教文化并存。
philosophy.en: French colonial assimilation-association ideology coexisted with Central African indigenous beliefs and missionary Christianity.

writingSystem.zh: 官方主要使用法文字母书写，地方语言多为口传传统，部分经传教士转写为拉丁字母。
writingSystem.en: French in the Latin alphabet dominated official usage, while local languages remained largely oral, with some rendered into Latin script by missionaries.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济规模较小且高度依赖殖民输出，生产力集中于原料采集、出口作物与河运贸易。人均产出偏低，反映出强制劳动、基础设施不足和市场整合有限。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was modest in size and heavily dependent on colonial exports, with production centered on raw material extraction, export crops, and riverine trade. Per capita output was low, reflecting forced labor, weak infrastructure, and limited market integration.

mainIndustries.zh: 林业、橡胶与野生采集、棉花、畜牧、河运、殖民行政服务
mainIndustries.en: Forestry, rubber and wild product collection, cotton, livestock, river transport, colonial administrative services

tradeGoods.zh: 木材、棉花、橡胶、象牙、皮张、牲畜、进口纺织品与金属制品
tradeGoods.en: Timber, cotton, rubber, ivory, hides, livestock, and imported textiles and metal goods

name.zh: 法国法郎与殖民法郎体系
name.en: French Franc and Colonial Franc System

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭财富以土地使用权、牲畜、工具和亲族网络体现，现金持有量很低。城市雇工和文书群体开始形成有限货币储蓄。
householdWealth.en: Most household wealth was embodied in land-use rights, livestock, tools, and kinship networks, with very low cash holdings. Urban workers and clerks began to accumulate modest monetary savings.

unit.zh: 法属殖民法郎/人/年（估计现金收入）
unit.en: colonial francs per person per year (estimated cash income)

economicSystem.zh: 以殖民国家管制、特许企业与村社生产并存的采掘型经济。
economicSystem.en: An extractive economy combining colonial state regulation, concessionary enterprise, and village production.

treasuryDescription.zh: 库藏规模有限，需依赖巴黎拨款、借支或专项殖民基金平衡波动。财政抗风险能力较弱。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were limited, requiring support from Paris, advances, or special colonial funds to smooth fluctuations. Fiscal resilience was weak.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持行政控制和出口基础设施为主，优先保障税收征集与低成本统治。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized administrative control and export infrastructure, focusing on tax collection and low-cost rule.

description.zh: 以非洲士兵和法国军官构成，负责驻防、巡逻与镇压叛乱。
description.en: Composed of African troops under French officers, responsible for garrison duty, patrols, and suppression of unrest.

description.zh: 执行治安、边境巡逻和行政协助任务。
description.en: Handled policing, frontier patrols, and administrative support tasks.

description.zh: 依托刚果河及支流进行运输、补给和有限武装巡逻。
description.en: Used the Congo River and tributaries for transport, supply, and limited armed patrol operations.

commanderInChief.zh: 法属赤道非洲总督兼法国殖民军事当局
commanderInChief.en: Governor-General of French Equatorial Africa under the French colonial military authority

technology.zh: 装备以轻武器、机枪、少量火炮、无线电和河运船只为主，机械化水平低，空中力量依赖法国本土与邻近殖民地支持。
technology.en: Equipment centered on small arms, machine guns, limited artillery, radio communications, and river craft; mechanization was low, and air power depended on metropolitan France and nearby colonies.

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括边境渗透、地方抗税与抗役、交通线脆弱，以及欧洲大战背景下轴心国在非洲的潜在扩张。
threats.en: Main threats included border infiltration, local resistance to taxation and labor demands, vulnerable transport lines, and the potential wartime expansion of Axis power in Africa.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布极不均衡，多数聚居于河谷、森林边缘和较适宜农耕地区。欧洲人口很少，城市化水平低，但布拉柴维尔等中心呈增长趋势。
populationDescription.en: Population distribution was highly uneven, with most people concentrated in river valleys, forest margins, and areas suitable for cultivation. The European population was very small, and urbanization was low, though centers like Brazzaville were growing.

socialClasses.zh: 法国殖民官员与商人、教会及受教育非洲精英、城市工人和士兵、农村农民与劳役人口、地方酋长与部族共同体。
socialClasses.en: French colonial officials and merchants, church and educated African elites, urban workers and soldiers, rural peasants and labor populations, and local chiefs with tribal communities.

allies.zh: 法国帝国体系、法属西非、英属中非邻地；名义上与英国保持协作。
allies.en: The French imperial system, French West Africa, and neighboring British territories; nominally cooperative with Britain.

enemies.zh: 无正式本地国家级敌国，但面临意属东非与战争扩散的潜在威胁。
enemies.en: No formal local state enemy, but exposed to the potential threat of Italian East Africa and wider wartime escalation.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由法国本土决定，地方政策重点在边境稳定、贸易通道安全与维持法国在中非的战略存在。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was determined by metropolitan France, while local priorities focused on border stability, trade-route security, and maintaining France’s strategic presence in Central Africa.

era.zh: 二十世纪前期殖民交通与通信时代
era.en: Early 20th-century colonial transport and communications era

keyInnovations.zh: 无线电电报、蒸汽与机动河船、基础公路、港口与铁路节点、传教医疗网络。
keyInnovations.en: Radio telegraphy, steam and motorized river craft, basic roads, port and rail nodes, and missionary medical networks.

strengths.zh: 地域广阔、资源潜力丰富、刚果河水运重要，且布拉柴维尔是法国在中部非洲的关键政治节点。
strengths.en: It possessed vast territory, significant resource potential, important Congo River transport, and Brazzaville as a key French political hub in Central Africa.

weaknesses.zh: 基础设施不足、财政脆弱、行政覆盖有限，且经济高度依赖强制性殖民提取。
weaknesses.en: It suffered from poor infrastructure, fragile finances, limited administrative reach, and an economy heavily dependent on coercive colonial extraction.

outlook.zh: 若欧洲战争扩大，该地将因战略位置而更受重视，但内部发展仍将受制于殖民需求而非本地福祉。
outlook.en: If the European war widened, the territory would gain strategic importance, but internal development would remain constrained by colonial needs rather than local welfare.

description.zh: 1939年的法属赤道非洲是由布拉柴维尔统辖、以资源输出和殖民行政为核心的法国中非联邦殖民地。
description.en: In 1939, French Equatorial Africa was a French Central African federal colony ruled from Brazzaville and centered on resource export and colonial administration.

dynasty.en: Colonial Rule of the British Empire

governmentForm.zh: 由英国总督领导、辅以立法局和行政局的殖民地政府，并通过间接统治管理传统酋邦地区。
governmentForm.en: A colonial government headed by a British Governor, assisted by legislative and executive councils, while traditional chiefdoms were administered through indirect rule.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由殖民官僚、欧洲商人、受英语教育的非洲中产与专业人士、传统酋长阶层、可可农民、矿工和城市工人构成。南部沿海与阿散蒂地区经济联系更紧密，北方保护地相对贫困。城市中民族主义知识分子和报刊舆论逐渐壮大。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of colonial officials, European merchants, English-educated African middle-class and professionals, traditional chiefs, cocoa farmers, miners, and urban workers. The southern coast and Ashanti were more deeply integrated into the economy, while the Northern Territories remained poorer. In the towns, nationalist intellectuals and newspaper opinion were steadily growing.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由英国总督、殖民文官、欧洲商业公司代表和被承认的传统酋长共同组成。阿散蒂及各地酋长在地方治理和土地事务中仍具重要影响力。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class comprised the British Governor, colonial civil servants, representatives of European commercial firms, and recognized traditional chiefs. Ashanti and other local chiefs retained important influence in local administration and land affairs.

succession.zh: 殖民最高权力由伦敦殖民部任命总督。传统政治共同体内部则依各民族习惯法继承酋长与王位。
succession.en: Supreme colonial authority rested in a Governor appointed by the Colonial Office in London. Within traditional polities, chiefs and stools were inherited according to customary law.

structure.zh: 黄金海岸实行殖民地、阿散蒂与北方领地三部分并治的行政结构，由阿克拉总督统筹。中央设行政局与立法局，地方则通过省长、地区专员和酋长会议实施间接统治。行政能力在沿海与矿区较强，在北部边远地带较弱。
structure.en: The Gold Coast was administered as a combined structure of Colony, Ashanti, and Northern Territories under the Governor in Accra. The center operated through Executive and Legislative Councils, while provincial commissioners, district officers, and chiefly councils carried out indirect rule locally. Administrative capacity was stronger in the coast and mining areas than in the more remote north.

function.zh: 协调总督政务、公文、议会事务与跨部门执行。
function.en: Coordinated gubernatorial business, records, legislative matters, and interdepartmental execution.

function.zh: 管理关税、出口税、预算、殖民会计与港口收入。
function.en: Managed customs duties, export taxes, budgets, colonial accounts, and port revenues.

name.en: Native Affairs and Local Government Department

function.zh: 监督酋长体制、地方议会、土地事务与间接统治。
function.en: Supervised chiefship institutions, local councils, land matters, and indirect rule.

function.zh: 负责道路、铁路、港口、供水和政府建筑。
function.en: Responsible for roads, railways, ports, water supply, and government buildings.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理依赖传统酋长、地方议会和英国地区专员共同运作。酋长负责征收部分地税、调解纠纷并协助落实殖民政策。
localAdmin.en: Local administration depended on the joint operation of traditional chiefs, local councils, and British district commissioners. Chiefs collected certain local dues, mediated disputes, and helped implement colonial policy.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合英国殖民法、成文条例与习惯法法院。商事、刑事和殖民行政案件多由英式法院处理，土地与家族事务常适用习惯法。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined British colonial law, statutory ordinances, and customary courts. Commercial, criminal, and administrative matters were usually handled in British-style courts, while land and family matters often followed customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政主要依赖进出口关税、可可与矿产相关税费、执照费和少量直接税。贸易繁荣使其财政较多数非洲殖民地更稳健。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue relied mainly on import-export customs, cocoa- and mining-related duties, license fees, and limited direct taxation. Trade prosperity made its finances more stable than those of many African colonies.

culturalAchievements.zh: 黄金海岸拥有英属西非较活跃的报刊、教会学校和城市公共社团。阿克拉、海岸角与库马西出现了早期民族主义政治讨论和现代公共文化空间。
culturalAchievements.en: The Gold Coast possessed one of the livelier newspaper, mission school, and civic association cultures in British West Africa. Accra, Cape Coast, and Kumasi nurtured early nationalist debate and modern public cultural spaces.

languageFamily.zh: 官方语言英语属印欧语系日耳曼语族；地方语言主要属尼日尔-刚果语系，包括阿坎、加-当梅和埃维诸语。
languageFamily.en: The official language, English, belonged to the Indo-European Germanic family; local languages were mainly of the Niger-Congo family, including Akan, Ga-Dangme, and Ewe.

philosophy.zh: 英国殖民宪政观念、基督教教育、阿坎与其他西非传统政治伦理并存。
philosophy.en: British colonial constitutional ideas, Christian education, and Akan and other West African traditional political ethics coexisted.

writingSystem.zh: 官方和教育领域主要使用英语拉丁字母；特威语、加语、埃维语等亦以拉丁字母书写并用于传教和报刊。
writingSystem.en: English in the Latin alphabet dominated official and educational use; Twi, Ga, Ewe, and others were also written in Latin script for missions and print culture.

gdpDescription.zh: 黄金海岸是西非经济较发达的殖民地之一，可可出口尤为重要，并辅以金矿、木材和港口贸易。外向型增长明显，但经济仍易受世界市场价格波动影响。
gdpDescription.en: The Gold Coast was one of the more economically developed colonies in West Africa, with cocoa exports especially important, supported by gold mining, timber, and port trade. Its outward-oriented growth was substantial, but the economy remained vulnerable to fluctuations in world prices.

mainIndustries.zh: 可可种植、金矿开采、锰与铝土矿、木材、铁路港口运输、农产品贸易
mainIndustries.en: Cocoa cultivation, gold mining, manganese and bauxite, timber, rail and port transport, agricultural trade

tradeGoods.zh: 可可豆、黄金、木材、锰矿、铝土矿、棕榈制品、进口纺织品、机械和消费品
tradeGoods.en: Cocoa beans, gold, timber, manganese ore, bauxite, palm products, and imported textiles, machinery, and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 南部可可农户和部分酋长家族积累了相当土地与现金财富，而矿工、城市工人和北方农户财富较低。家庭资产通常包括可可园、房产、牲畜和贸易存货。
householdWealth.en: Southern cocoa farmers and some chiefly families accumulated substantial land and cash wealth, while miners, urban laborers, and northern cultivators were less affluent. Household assets often included cocoa farms, houses, livestock, and trade stocks.

unit.en: West African pounds per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以殖民出口经济为核心、由非洲小农商品生产与欧洲资本采矿贸易共同驱动的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed colonial export economy driven jointly by African smallholder commodity production and European capital in mining and trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 受益于可可和矿业税收，殖民地库藏相对充实，在英属西非中财政条件较好。尽管如此，仍受国际商品价格周期影响。
treasuryDescription.en: Benefiting from cocoa and mining revenues, the colony's treasury was comparatively healthy by British West African standards. Even so, it remained exposed to global commodity price cycles.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调出口促进、交通建设与谨慎平衡预算，同时维持殖民行政与治安开支。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized export promotion, transport construction, and cautious budget balance while sustaining colonial administration and security spending.

name.zh: 西非边防军驻黄金海岸部队
name.en: Gold Coast Units of the Royal West African Frontier Force

description.zh: 正规殖民步兵与支援单位，承担驻防、训练和战时海外派遣任务。
description.en: Regular colonial infantry and support units used for garrison duty, training, and wartime overseas deployment.

description.zh: 负责治安、港口安全、情报监控与劳工秩序维持。
description.en: Responsible for policing, port security, intelligence monitoring, and maintaining labor order.

description.zh: 负责道路、通信、补给与军用运输保障。
description.en: Handled roads, communications, supplies, and military transport support.

commanderInChief.zh: 黄金海岸总督兼英军西非殖民当局
commanderInChief.en: Governor of the Gold Coast under the British West African colonial military authority

technology.zh: 装备以栓动步枪、机枪、少量野战炮、卡车、铁路运输和无线电通信为主，海空支援依赖英国帝国体系。
technology.en: Equipment relied on bolt-action rifles, machine guns, limited field artillery, trucks, rail transport, and radio communications, with naval and air support supplied by the wider British imperial system.

threats.zh: 主要风险来自全球战争对港口和航运的冲击、殖民地内部劳工和民族主义不满，以及西非海岸防务压力。
threats.en: Main risks came from global war pressure on ports and shipping, internal labor and nationalist discontent, and coastal defense concerns in West Africa.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中在南部森林带、可可种植区和沿海城市，北部人口较分散。城市化虽仍有限，但阿克拉和库马西已发展为重要行政与商业中心。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated mainly in the southern forest belt, cocoa zones, and coastal towns, while the north was more sparsely settled. Urbanization remained limited, but Accra and Kumasi had already become major administrative and commercial centers.

socialClasses.zh: 殖民官员与欧洲商人、受教育非洲专业人士与职员、传统酋长和地主、可可小农、矿工与港口工人、北方农牧民。
socialClasses.en: Colonial officials and European merchants, educated African professionals and clerks, traditional chiefs and landholders, cocoa smallholders, miners and port workers, and northern farmers and pastoralists.

allies.zh: 英国、英属西非诸地、法国与其他协约传统伙伴。
allies.en: Britain, other British West African territories, France, and other traditional Allied partners.

enemies.zh: 无直接邻近敌国，但在世界大战框架下与轴心国敌对。
enemies.en: It had no immediate neighboring enemy state, but was hostile to the Axis powers within the wider world war context.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦决定，地方重点在保障可可和矿产出口、维护海上交通线，并确保西非后方稳定。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was determined in London, while local priorities were to secure cocoa and mineral exports, protect maritime routes, and preserve stability in the West African rear.

era.zh: 殖民出口经济与铁路港口现代化时代
era.en: Colonial export economy and railway-port modernization era

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路干线、深水港、机械化金矿、可可商品网络、电话电报与城市供水电力设施。
keyInnovations.en: Rail trunk lines, deep-water ports, mechanized gold mines, cocoa commodity networks, telephone and telegraph systems, and urban water and power utilities.

strengths.zh: 可可经济强劲、税源充足、港口铁路较完善，且具备较高教育水平和成熟的地方商业网络。
strengths.en: Its strengths were a strong cocoa economy, solid tax base, comparatively developed ports and railways, and relatively high educational attainment with established commercial networks.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖少数出口品，对世界市场敏感；政治上民族主义增长也在削弱殖民合法性。
weaknesses.en: The economy was overly dependent on a few export commodities and was highly sensitive to world markets; politically, rising nationalism also undermined colonial legitimacy.

outlook.zh: 战时需求将短期提升其战略和经济地位，但长期看，受教育阶层与酋长政治互动将推动更强烈的自治诉求。
outlook.en: Wartime demand would likely raise its strategic and economic importance in the short term, but over the longer run the interaction of educated elites and chiefly politics would drive stronger demands for self-government.

description.zh: 1939年的黄金海岸是英属西非最富庶且政治活力较高的殖民地之一，以可可、矿业和港口贸易闻名。
description.en: In 1939, the Gold Coast was one of the wealthiest and most politically dynamic colonies in British West Africa, known for cocoa, mining, and port commerce.

dynasty.en: Protectorate Rule of the British Empire

governmentForm.zh: 由英国总督代表统辖的保护国政体，以港口行政和部族间接统治为主。
governmentForm.en: A protectorate polity ruled by a British governor or commissioner, centered on port administration and indirect control through clans.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以索马里氏族与分支氏族结构为核心，游牧牧民占绝大多数。沿海城镇有商人、宗教人士、少量公务员和港口劳工，英国行政人员人数极少。宗教领袖和氏族长老在社会调解与政治协商中居重要地位。
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on Somali clan and sub-clan structures, with nomadic pastoralists forming the large majority. Coastal towns contained merchants, religious figures, a small number of officials, and port laborers, while British administrative personnel were very few. Religious leaders and clan elders played major roles in mediation and political negotiation.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由英国保护国官员、沿海贸易精英和被承认的氏族长老共同构成。英国实际控制重点集中于柏培拉及主要交通节点。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of British protectorate officials, coastal trading elites, and recognized clan elders. Effective British control was concentrated mainly in Berbera and key communications points.

succession.zh: 殖民最高权力由英国任命官员掌握，不存在本地统一王位继承。氏族内部领袖地位通常依血缘、协商、声望与习惯法形成。
succession.en: Supreme authority lay with British-appointed officials, and there was no unified local throne of succession. Within clans, leadership generally emerged through lineage, consensus, prestige, and customary law.

structure.zh: 英属索马里兰是一个行政规模很小的保护国，核心权力集中在柏培拉总署。殖民政府依靠少量地区官员、警察和对氏族首领的补贴维持秩序。内陆广大区域仍以习惯协商和氏族平衡为实际治理基础。
structure.en: British Somaliland was a very small protectorate administration with core authority concentrated in Berbera. The colonial government maintained order through a handful of district officers, police, and subsidies to clan leaders. Across much of the interior, practical governance still rested on customary negotiation and clan balance.

function.zh: 处理总署政务、公文、对外联络与预算控制。
function.en: Handled central administration, records, external liaison, and budget control.

function.zh: 管理氏族关系、边境巡查、补贴发放与争端调解。
function.en: Managed clan relations, frontier inspection, subsidy disbursement, and dispute mediation.

function.zh: 征收关税并管理柏培拉港贸易与牲畜出口。
function.en: Collected customs duties and managed Berbera port trade and livestock exports.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政极为轻简，英国官员通常通过氏族长老、阿訇和商人网络治理。内陆许多事务由习惯法庭式协商解决，而非正式官僚程序。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was extremely light, with British officers commonly governing through clan elders, religious figures, and merchant networks. Many inland matters were settled by customary negotiation rather than formal bureaucracy.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合英国保护国条例、伊斯兰教法与索马里习惯法。商贸和港口事务较多受殖民规章约束，婚姻、赔偿和氏族争端多按习惯与教法处理。
legalSystem.en: The legal system mixed British protectorate ordinances, Islamic law, and Somali customary law. Trade and port matters were more regulated by colonial rules, while marriage, compensation, and clan disputes were often handled through custom and sharia.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自海关、牲畜出口税、港口收费和少量执照费。由于游牧经济特性，直接税征收能力有限。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came chiefly from customs, livestock export duties, port fees, and modest licensing charges. Because of the pastoral economy, the capacity to collect direct taxes was limited.

culturalAchievements.zh: 宗教学校和诗歌传统在社会中极具影响力，口头诗歌是政治表达与历史记忆的重要形式。沿海商埠维系着阿拉伯半岛与红海世界的文化联系。
culturalAchievements.en: Religious schools and poetic tradition were highly influential, with oral poetry serving as a major vehicle of political expression and historical memory. Coastal ports maintained cultural ties with Arabia and the Red Sea world.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属印欧语系日耳曼语族，阿拉伯语属闪含语系闪语族，索马里语属库希特语支。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic family, Arabic to the Semitic branch of Afro-Asiatic, and Somali to the Cushitic branch.

philosophy.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教法传统与索马里氏族习惯法并行，重视血缘、荣誉和协商。
philosophy.en: Sunni Islamic legal tradition operated alongside Somali clan customary law, emphasizing lineage, honor, and negotiation.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用英语拉丁字母和阿拉伯文行政、宗教书写；索马里语在1939年尚未统一官方书写标准，多以阿拉伯字母或口述为主。
writingSystem.en: Official usage involved English in Latin script and Arabic for religious and some administrative writing; in 1939 Somali had not yet been standardized in an official script and was often rendered in Arabic script or transmitted orally.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济规模很小，以游牧畜牧业、柏培拉港转口贸易和对阿拉伯半岛牲畜输出为核心。受干旱、疫病和地区冲突影响，产出波动较大。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was very small, centered on pastoral livestock production, Berbera port transit trade, and livestock exports to Arabia. Output fluctuated considerably due to drought, animal disease, and regional conflict.

mainIndustries.zh: 游牧畜牧业、牲畜出口、港口贸易、皮张加工、盐和小规模服务业
mainIndustries.en: Pastoral livestock raising, livestock export, port trade, hide processing, salt, and small-scale services

tradeGoods.zh: 羊、山羊、骆驼、皮张、酥油、乳畜产品、进口谷物、布匹、糖和日用品
tradeGoods.en: Sheep, goats, camels, hides, ghee, dairy products, and imported grain, cloth, sugar, and household goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富主要体现在骆驼、羊群、氏族保护关系和贸易信用，而非固定地产。沿海商人拥有较多现金和进口货存。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was held mainly in camels, flocks, clan protection ties, and trade credit rather than fixed property. Coastal merchants possessed more cash and imported stocks.

unit.en: East African shillings per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以游牧市场交换和港口关税为核心、受殖民保护国轻度监管的畜产贸易经济。
economicSystem.en: A livestock-trading economy based on pastoral market exchange and port customs, under light protectorate regulation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 保护国库藏很薄弱，财政长期依赖港口税与英国补贴，难以承担大规模基础设施建设。
treasuryDescription.en: The protectorate treasury was very thin, relying heavily on port duties and British subsidy and unable to support large-scale infrastructure projects.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向极简统治和成本控制，以维持港口、巡逻与氏族关系稳定为先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy favored minimalist rule and cost control, prioritizing the port, patrols, and stable clan relations.

description.zh: 适应荒漠环境的机动部队，用于边境巡逻、侦察和快速反应。
description.en: Mobile troops adapted to desert conditions, used for frontier patrol, reconnaissance, and rapid response.

description.zh: 负责柏培拉和主要据点治安、港口守备与内部秩序。
description.en: Responsible for security in Berbera and major posts, port defense, and internal order.

description.zh: 承担补给、运输、信号和海岸设施支援任务。
description.en: Handled supply, transport, signaling, and support for coastal facilities.

commanderInChief.zh: 英属索马里兰总督兼英国驻地军事当局
commanderInChief.en: Governor of British Somaliland under the local British military authority

technology.zh: 武装以轻武器、机枪、少量卡车、骆驼运输和无线电为主，缺乏重炮与常备空军，战时依赖亚丁和英军海空支援。
technology.en: Armament centered on light weapons, machine guns, a few trucks, camel transport, and radio, lacking heavy artillery and a permanent air force; in war it depended on Aden and British naval-air support.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自意属东非的军事压力、边境袭扰、干旱导致的社会紧张，以及保护国防御纵深不足。
threats.en: The main threats were military pressure from Italian East Africa, frontier raiding, drought-related social stress, and the protectorate’s lack of defensive depth.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

populationDescription.zh: 人口高度分散，多数为季节性迁徙的游牧牧民，定居城镇人口较少。柏培拉是最重要的港口和行政中心，其余聚落多为区域贸易或宗教节点。
populationDescription.en: The population was highly dispersed, with most people being seasonally mobile pastoralists and only a small settled urban population. Berbera was the main port and administrative center, while other settlements served as regional trade or religious nodes.

socialClasses.zh: 氏族长老与宗教人士、沿海商人、英国官员与雇员、骆驼与羊群牧民、港口工人与小手工业者。
socialClasses.en: Clan elders and religious figures, coastal merchants, British officials and employees, camel and sheep pastoralists, and port workers with small artisans.

allies.zh: 英国帝国、亚丁、英属东非与埃及方向的英军体系。
allies.en: The British Empire, Aden, British East African territories, and the British military system linked through Egypt.

enemies.zh: 意属东非是最直接的地区性敌对力量。
enemies.en: Italian East Africa was the most immediate regional hostile power.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦与亚丁当局主导，地方重点是保卫红海航道侧翼、监控边界并维持对阿拉伯贸易联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was led by London and Aden authorities, while local priorities were guarding the flank of the Red Sea route, monitoring the frontier, and maintaining trade links with Arabia.

era.zh: 轻型殖民边防与港口通信时代
era.en: Light colonial frontier and port communications era

keyInnovations.zh: 无线电站、港口仓储、骆驼机动巡逻、有限汽车运输和海岸补给体系。
keyInnovations.en: Radio stations, port warehousing, camel-mobile patrols, limited motor transport, and coastal supply systems.

strengths.zh: 地理位置靠近红海航道，氏族社会具高度机动性，牲畜贸易与阿拉伯市场联系紧密。
strengths.en: Its strengths were proximity to the Red Sea route, the high mobility of clan society, and close livestock trade ties with Arabian markets.

weaknesses.zh: 财政和行政规模极小，基础设施薄弱，内陆控制有限，且面对意大利军事压力时防御脆弱。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses were a very small fiscal and administrative base, weak infrastructure, limited inland control, and vulnerability under Italian military pressure.

outlook.zh: 随着欧洲战争向东非蔓延，英属索马里兰将迅速从边缘保护国转变为高风险前线地区。
outlook.en: As the European war spread into East Africa, British Somaliland was likely to shift quickly from a peripheral protectorate into a high-risk frontline zone.

description.zh: 1939年的英属索马里兰是一个以柏培拉港和游牧畜牧经济为核心、由英国实施轻度间接统治的红海沿岸保护国。
description.en: In 1939, British Somaliland was a Red Sea protectorate centered on Berbera port and a pastoral livestock economy, governed through light British indirect rule.

dynasty.zh: 意大利王国殖民统治时期
dynasty.en: Colonial period under the Kingdom of Italy

governmentForm.zh: 由意大利王国任命总督统治的殖民地行政体制，并入意属东非总督区框架之下。
governmentForm.en: A colonial administrative regime ruled by an Italian-appointed governor within the framework of Italian East Africa.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构呈明显殖民分层，意大利移民、殖民官员与军官居于上层，本地提格雷尼亚、提格雷、贝贾及其他族群多处于被统治地位。城市中出现少量受殖民教育影响的本地雇员与工匠阶层，但农村人口仍占绝大多数。宗教上基督教与伊斯兰教并存，地区与族群差异显著。
socialStructure.en: Society was sharply stratified along colonial lines, with Italian settlers, officials, and officers at the top, while local Tigrinya, Tigre, Beja, and other communities remained subordinate. In towns, a small class of locally employed clerks and artisans emerged under colonial education, but the overwhelming majority remained rural. Christianity and Islam coexisted, with strong regional and ethnic variation.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由意大利殖民官僚、军官、技术人员和定居者构成。本地传统首领在基层治理中被有限吸纳，但权力受殖民当局严格控制。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of Italian colonial bureaucrats, military officers, technicians, and settlers. Local traditional chiefs were incorporated in a limited way into lower-level administration, but their power was tightly controlled by colonial authorities.

succession.zh: 最高权力并非世袭，而由罗马政府任命总督并随殖民政策调整而更替。地方辅助首领多依传统惯例承继，但需得到殖民政府承认。
succession.en: Supreme authority was not hereditary but vested in a governor appointed and replaced by the government in Rome according to colonial policy. Local auxiliary chiefs often followed customary succession, subject to colonial recognition.

structure.zh: 1939年的厄立特里亚已纳入意属东非体系，但仍保有较完整的殖民行政层级，由总督及其下属文武机构管理。行政权高度集中，省区、区和地方酋长体系共同承担治安、税收和劳役动员。重要城市如阿斯马拉直接受殖民官员控制。
structure.en: By 1939 Eritrea had been incorporated into Italian East Africa but retained a fairly complete colonial hierarchy under a governor and subordinate civil-military offices. Administrative power was highly centralized, with provinces, districts, and local chiefs used for policing, taxation, and labor mobilization. Key cities such as Asmara were directly managed by colonial officials.

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、公文、警务协调与政治监督。
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, official correspondence, police liaison, and political oversight.

function.zh: 负责关税、地税、人头税、预算与殖民地财务核算。
function.en: Handled customs, land tax, poll taxes, budgeting, and colonial fiscal accounting.

function.zh: 负责道路、铁路、供水、电力与意大利移民定居规划。
function.en: Managed roads, railways, water supply, electricity, and planning for Italian settler colonies.

name.zh: 土著事务与地方行政局
name.en: Native Affairs and Local Administration Department

function.zh: 管理部族地区、地方首领、劳工征调与习惯法事务。
function.en: Managed tribal areas, local chiefs, labor mobilization, and customary-law affairs.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由意大利区长与被承认的本地酋长、宗教领袖共同运作。殖民政府依赖间接统治处理乡村事务，但在战略地带保持直接控制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration functioned through Italian district officers together with recognized local chiefs and religious leaders. The colonial regime relied on indirect rule in rural areas while maintaining direct control in strategic zones.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系采取双轨制，意大利人多适用意大利殖民法，本地居民则在刑事与行政领域受殖民法约束，在婚姻、继承等部分私法问题上保留习惯法与宗教法。司法不平等十分明显。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was dualistic: Italians were largely subject to Italian colonial law, while local inhabitants were bound by colonial criminal and administrative law but retained customary and religious law in some family and inheritance matters. Judicial inequality was pronounced.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、地税、人头税和商业执照费为主，并辅以劳役性负担。财政结构高度依赖殖民贸易与行政征收，而非本地代议性预算。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on customs duties, land taxes, poll taxes, and commercial license fees, supplemented by labor obligations. The fiscal structure depended heavily on colonial trade and administrative extraction rather than local representative budgeting.

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿斯马拉在20世纪30年代形成具有现代主义与装饰艺术风格的殖民城市景观，成为意大利东非最重要的规划城市之一。本地宗教音乐、口述传统和手工艺在乡村社会中仍具强大生命力。
culturalAchievements.en: Asmara developed a striking colonial urban landscape in the 1930s marked by modernist and Art Deco forms, making it one of the most important planned cities in Italian East Africa. Local religious music, oral tradition, and handicrafts remained vibrant in rural society.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系：闪米特语支（提格雷尼亚语、提格雷语、阿拉伯语）与库施特语支；殖民行政语言为印欧语系罗曼语族的意大利语。
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic languages predominated: Semitic branches (Tigrinya, Tigre, Arabic) and Cushitic languages; the colonial administrative language was Italian, an Indo-European Romance language.

philosophy.zh: 本地文化兼具埃塞俄比亚高地基督教传统、伊斯兰学术网络与部族习俗；殖民当局则推动法西斯帝国意识形态与意大利化。
philosophy.en: Local culture combined Ethiopian highland Christian traditions, Islamic scholarly networks, and tribal custom, while the colonial state promoted Fascist imperial ideology and Italianization.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用吉兹字母书写提格雷尼亚语与宗教文本，阿拉伯字母用于伊斯兰社群，行政上广泛使用拉丁字母的意大利语。
writingSystem.en: Ge'ez script was used for Tigrinya and religious texts, Arabic script in Muslim communities, and Italian in Latin script for administration.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济规模在非洲殖民地中属中小水平，但因阿斯马拉工业和交通建设而高于许多邻近边地。经济高度依附意大利帝国体系，军需与殖民基础设施投资占较大比重。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was modest by African colonial standards, though Asmara's industry and transport infrastructure made it stronger than many neighboring frontier territories. It was heavily dependent on the Italian imperial system, with military needs and colonial infrastructure absorbing a substantial share.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧、食品加工、建筑、铁路与公路运输、轻工业、殖民地服务业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, livestock, food processing, construction, rail and road transport, light industry, colonial services

tradeGoods.zh: 皮革、牲畜、盐、小麦、高粱、咖啡转口品、工业制成品、建材
tradeGoods.en: Hides, livestock, salt, wheat, sorghum, re-exported coffee, manufactured goods, construction materials

name.zh: 意大利里拉与东非里拉
name.en: Italian lira and East African lira

householdWealth.zh: 城乡差距明显，意大利定居者与殖民雇员拥有较高消费能力，而多数本地家庭财富以土地使用权、牲畜和家族网络形式存在。现金流通集中于城市与交通走廊。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: Italian settlers and colonial employees enjoyed relatively high consumption, while most local families held wealth in land use rights, livestock, and kin networks. Cash circulation was concentrated in towns and transport corridors.

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导的殖民经济，结合法西斯统制、定居殖民开发与本地农业征收。
economicSystem.en: A state-directed colonial economy combining Fascist regulation, settler development, and extraction from local agriculture.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地金库规模有限，主要用于维持短期行政与军政周转，重大工程与军事开支仍依赖罗马拨款。
treasuryDescription.en: The colonial treasury was limited and mainly covered short-term civil and military administration, while major works and military expenses still depended on appropriations from Rome.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以平衡殖民治安、基础设施建设和帝国军事需求为核心，倾向通过关税、垄断收入与中央补贴填补赤字。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on balancing colonial order, infrastructure building, and imperial military needs, with deficits covered through customs, monopoly income, and metropolitan subsidies.

description.zh: 由意大利正规军、殖民地步兵和本地辅助部队组成，负责边防、守备和镇压任务。
description.en: Composed of Italian regulars, colonial infantry, and local auxiliary troops for frontier defense, garrison duty, and internal repression.

description.zh: 负责城市治安、情报监控与交通节点警备。
description.en: Handled urban security, intelligence surveillance, and protection of transport nodes.

description.zh: 维持道路、仓储、通信与筑城设施，支撑东非战区行动。
description.en: Maintained roads, depots, communications, and fortifications in support of operations in East Africa.

commanderInChief.zh: 意属东非总督兼总司令体系下的厄立特里亚驻军指挥官
commanderInChief.en: The Eritrean garrison commander under the Viceroy and Commander-in-Chief of Italian East Africa

technology.zh: 装备以步枪、机枪、火炮、装甲汽车、无线电与少量战区航空支援为主，整体在非洲殖民地中属较高水平，但受补给与工业基础限制。
technology.en: Equipment centered on rifles, machine guns, artillery, armored cars, radio, and limited theater air support; by African colonial standards it was relatively advanced but constrained by supply and industrial limits.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自红海与苏丹方向的英军压力、与埃塞俄比亚反殖民抵抗相连的边境不稳，以及大战爆发后海上补给线可能被切断。
threats.en: Main threats came from British pressure via the Red Sea and Sudan, border instability linked to Ethiopian anti-colonial resistance, and the risk that wartime sea lines of supply would be cut.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 喷火/零式/Bf109战斗机，争夺制空权
description.en: Spitfire/Zero/Bf109 fighter for air superiority

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

description.zh: 斯图卡/SBD俯冲轰炸机，精确打击地面目标
description.en: Stuka/SBD dive bomber for precise ground target strikes

populationDescription.zh: 人口约60万，主体为提格雷尼亚人与提格雷人，另有贝贾、萨霍、阿法尔、比林等族群。意大利定居者人数虽小，却在城市、工业和行政中拥有 disproportionate influence。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 600,000, mainly Tigrinya and Tigre peoples, with Beja, Saho, Afar, Bilen, and others also present. Italian settlers were few in absolute number but had disproportionate influence in urban, industrial, and administrative life.

socialClasses.zh: 意大利殖民官员与定居者、本地宗教与部族精英、城市工人和雇员、农村农民与牧民。
socialClasses.en: Italian colonial officials and settlers, local religious and tribal elites, urban workers and employees, and rural peasants and pastoralists.

allies.zh: 名义上隶属意大利王国，并与德意轴心阵营协调；在东非区域内同意属索马里兰和意属埃塞俄比亚行政一体化。
allies.en: Nominally aligned with the Kingdom of Italy and the Axis camp, and regionally integrated with Italian Somaliland and Italian Ethiopia.

enemies.zh: 主要潜在敌人为英国及其苏丹、埃及和红海力量，以及支持埃塞俄比亚抵抗的反意网络。
enemies.en: Its principal potential enemies were Britain and its forces in Sudan, Egypt, and the Red Sea, as well as anti-Italian networks supporting Ethiopian resistance.

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交，完全服务于意大利帝国在红海与东非的战略扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: It had no independent foreign policy and served entirely the strategic expansion of the Italian Empire in the Red Sea and East Africa.

era.zh: 二十世纪三十年代后期殖民现代化时期

keyInnovations.zh: 公路与铁路联运、城市电力与供水系统、无线电通信、现代主义城市规划、殖民军用机场网络。
keyInnovations.en: Integrated road-rail transport, urban electricity and water systems, radio communications, modernist urban planning, and a colonial military airfield network.

strengths.zh: 阿斯马拉的基础设施与工业能力较强，交通和驻军体系完善，红海港口具有战略价值。
strengths.en: Asmara possessed relatively strong infrastructure and industrial capacity, transport and garrison systems were well developed, and Red Sea ports held strategic value.

weaknesses.zh: 经济自给能力有限，严重依赖意大利补给与财政支持；本地社会对殖民统治认同薄弱，战时极易受封锁影响。
weaknesses.en: Economic self-sufficiency was limited, with heavy dependence on Italian supply and fiscal support; local legitimacy was weak, and the territory was highly vulnerable to wartime blockade.

outlook.zh: 若欧洲大战扩大到东非，厄立特里亚虽能凭借地形与工事短期坚守，但长期前景取决于海上补给与意大利本土战局。
outlook.en: If the European war expanded into East Africa, Eritrea could likely hold out for a time thanks to terrain and fortifications, but its long-term prospects depended on sea supply and developments in metropolitan Italy.

description.zh: 1939年的厄立特里亚是意大利在红海沿岸经营最久、基础设施最完备的殖民领地之一。
description.en: In 1939 Eritrea was one of Italy's longest-held and most infrastructurally developed colonial possessions on the Red Sea.

dynasty.zh: 意大利王国殖民统治时期
dynasty.en: Colonial period under the Kingdom of Italy

governmentForm.zh: 由意大利总督统辖的殖民地行政体制，并纳入意属东非的法西斯帝国治理框架。
governmentForm.en: A colonial administration ruled by an Italian governor and incorporated into the Fascist imperial framework of Italian East Africa.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以索马里部族与宗族网络为基础，游牧牧民、绿洲与河谷农民、港口商人并存。意大利殖民统治在城市和种植区建立明显等级秩序，少量阿拉伯、印度和意大利商人控制较大商业资本。殖民政府通过酋长、长老和宗教人士间接管理广大乡村。
socialStructure.en: Society rested on Somali clan and lineage networks, with nomadic pastoralists, oasis and riverine farmers, and port merchants coexisting. Italian rule established a clear hierarchy in towns and plantation zones, where small Arab, Indian, and Italian merchant groups controlled much commercial capital. The colonial state governed much of the countryside indirectly through chiefs, elders, and religious figures.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层以意大利殖民官员、军官、警察和种植园经营者为主。本地酋长与长老在征税、征工和纠纷调解方面保有辅助地位，但不具真正主权。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class was dominated by Italian colonial officials, officers, police, and plantation operators. Local chiefs and elders retained auxiliary roles in tax collection, labor recruitment, and dispute mediation, but they possessed no real sovereignty.

succession.zh: 总督由意大利政府任命，无世袭性质。地方首领通常依宗族惯例继承或推举，但需经殖民当局确认。
succession.en: The governor was appointed by the Italian government and the office was non-hereditary. Local leaders were usually selected or succeeded according to clan custom, subject to colonial confirmation.

structure.zh: 行政结构以总督府为核心，下设财政、治安、公共工程与土著事务部门，并通过地区专员控制摩加迪沙、梅尔卡、布拉瓦和内陆河谷。法西斯时期行政更强调农业开发、治安控制和军事交通建设。相较厄立特里亚，地方治理更依赖部族中介与间接统治。
structure.en: The administrative structure centered on the governor's office, with departments for finance, security, public works, and native affairs, extending control through regional commissioners over Mogadishu, Merca, Brava, and the interior river valleys. In the Fascist period the administration emphasized agricultural development, security control, and military transport. Compared with Eritrea, local governance relied more heavily on tribal intermediaries and indirect rule.

function.zh: 负责总体行政、政治监控、公文与区域协调。
function.en: Handled general administration, political surveillance, official correspondence, and regional coordination.

function.zh: 管理关税、地税、市场税、预算与贸易监管。
function.en: Managed customs, land taxes, market levies, budgeting, and trade regulation.

name.zh: 公共工程与农业殖垦局
name.en: Public Works and Agricultural Settlement Department

function.zh: 负责灌溉、道路、港口设施及香蕉等出口作物种植区开发。
function.en: Oversaw irrigation, roads, port facilities, and development of export crop zones such as bananas.

function.zh: 管理地方酋长、部族关系、治安、劳工征调和情报。
function.en: Managed local chiefs, clan relations, security, labor recruitment, and intelligence.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政在河谷农业区和沿海城市较为直接，在游牧区则主要通过长老和酋长实施间接管理。殖民国家依赖警察据点、税站和交通线维持控制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was more direct in riverine agricultural zones and coastal towns, while pastoral areas were governed mainly through elders and chiefs. The colonial state maintained control through police posts, tax stations, and transport lines.

legalSystem.zh: 法律制度混合意大利殖民法、行政命令与经认可的伊斯兰法和习惯法。涉及地租、劳工和刑事秩序时，殖民法院拥有优先权。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Italian colonial law, administrative decrees, and recognized Islamic and customary law. In matters of land rent, labor, and criminal order, colonial courts held precedence.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自关税、市场税、地税、牲畜税和商业许可费，出口农业区还承担更强的行政征收。财政汲取既依靠贸易口岸，也依靠对农村劳力和产出的控制。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation came chiefly from customs, market taxes, land taxes, livestock taxes, and business licenses, with export agriculture zones subject to heavier administrative extraction. Fiscal extraction relied both on trade ports and on control over rural labor and output.

culturalAchievements.zh: 沿海城镇保留了与阿拉伯海世界相连的伊斯兰建筑、经学院与商贸文化。索马里口头诗歌、家谱记忆和吟诵传统在政治动员与社会认同中极为重要。
culturalAchievements.en: Coastal towns preserved Islamic architecture, Quranic schools, and mercantile culture linked to the wider Arabian Sea world. Somali oral poetry, genealogical memory, and recitation traditions were central to political mobilization and social identity.

languageFamily.zh: 主要为亚非语系库施特语支的索马里语，宗教和贸易领域使用闪米特语支阿拉伯语，行政上使用意大利语。
languageFamily.en: The principal language was Somali of the Afro-Asiatic Cushitic branch, with Arabic used in religion and trade and Italian in administration.

philosophy.zh: 主导思想传统为逊尼派伊斯兰教、索马里诗歌文化与宗族伦理，同时受到殖民学校和意大利宣传的有限影响。
philosophy.en: The dominant intellectual traditions were Sunni Islam, Somali poetic culture, and clan ethics, with limited influence from colonial schools and Italian propaganda.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母用于宗教与商贸书写，意大利语使用拉丁字母；索马里语当时尚未形成统一官方正字法，多依口述传统传播。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script was used for religious and commercial writing, while Italian used the Latin alphabet; Somali had not yet acquired a unified official orthography and remained largely oral.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以牧业、河谷农业和沿海贸易为基础，规模不大但对出口作物依赖较强。意大利在朱巴河和谢贝利河流域推动香蕉、棉花和糖业开发，使殖民经济更具单一化特征。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on pastoralism, riverine agriculture, and coastal trade; it was not large but was increasingly dependent on export crops. Italian development in the Jubba and Shebelle valleys promoted bananas, cotton, and sugar, making the colonial economy more monocultural.

mainIndustries.zh: 牧业、香蕉种植、棉花、制糖、港口贸易、皮革加工、运输
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, banana cultivation, cotton, sugar production, port trade, leather processing, transport

tradeGoods.zh: 香蕉、牲畜、皮张、芝麻、棉花、糖、椰制品、进口纺织品与日用品
tradeGoods.en: Bananas, livestock, hides, sesame, cotton, sugar, coconut products, imported textiles and consumer goods

name.zh: 意大利里拉与东非里拉
name.en: Italian lira and East African lira

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭财富以牲畜、宗族关系和季节性贸易收益体现，现金收入有限。河谷种植区与摩加迪沙周边出现依赖工资和市场的家庭，但经济脆弱性较高。
householdWealth.en: For most households, wealth was embodied in livestock, clan connections, and seasonal trade rather than cash. In the river valleys and around Mogadishu, wage- and market-dependent households emerged, but they remained economically vulnerable.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民出口导向经济，结合种植园开发、港口贸易与对游牧和农业社群的行政控制。
economicSystem.en: A colonial export-oriented economy combining plantation development, port trade, and administrative control over pastoral and agricultural communities.

treasuryDescription.zh: 地方金库存量不高，主要覆盖工资、警务和港口运转；重大经济项目多由帝国补贴或特设机构推动。
treasuryDescription.en: Local treasury holdings were modest and mainly covered salaries, policing, and port operations; major economic projects were often financed by imperial subsidies or special agencies.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重在维持治安、支持出口农业和港口运输，并通过外来补贴弥补结构性赤字。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on maintaining order, supporting export agriculture and port transport, and covering structural deficits through external subsidies.

name.zh: 殖民陆军与本地辅助兵

description.zh: 用于海岸守备、内陆巡逻、边境控制和支援东非战区行动。
description.en: Used for coastal defense, inland patrols, frontier control, and support for operations across East Africa.

description.zh: 负责城市治安、部族地区监控和反叛乱任务。
description.en: Handled urban security, monitoring of clan areas, and counterinsurgency missions.

description.zh: 负责港口、补给站、无线电与道路运输维护。
description.en: Maintained ports, depots, radio stations, and road transport.

commanderInChief.zh: 意属东非总司令体系下的意属索马里兰驻军司令
commanderInChief.en: The commander of Italian Somaliland forces under the Italian East Africa high command

technology.zh: 技术水平以步兵轻武器、卡车运输、无线电通信、少量炮兵与空中侦察支援为主，在非洲之角属中等偏上。
technology.en: Its technological level rested on infantry small arms, truck transport, radio communications, limited artillery, and aerial reconnaissance support, placing it in the upper middle range for the Horn of Africa.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自英属索马里兰、肯尼亚和亚丁方向的英军，以及游牧地带的不稳定和战时海上封锁。
threats.en: The main threats came from British forces in British Somaliland, Kenya, and Aden, as well as instability in pastoral zones and wartime maritime blockade.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: T-34/谢尔曼/四号坦克，装甲战核心
description.en: T-34/Sherman/Panzer IV medium tank, core of armored warfare

populationDescription.zh: 人口约100万，以索马里人为主体，另有沿海阿拉伯裔、班图农业人口、少量印度商人与意大利殖民者。人口分布极不均衡，内陆游牧地区密度低，河谷与海岸较为集中。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 1,000,000, predominantly Somali, with coastal Arab communities, Bantu agricultural populations, a small number of Indian merchants, and Italian colonists. Settlement was highly uneven, with sparse pastoral interiors and denser populations in river valleys and along the coast.

socialClasses.zh: 意大利官员与种植园主、沿海商人、本地宗族与宗教精英、城市工人与小贩、农民与游牧牧民。
socialClasses.en: Italian officials and plantation owners, coastal merchants, local clan and religious elites, urban workers and petty traders, and farmers and nomadic pastoralists.

allies.zh: 作为意大利帝国一部分，与德意轴心及意属东非其他地区保持一致。
allies.en: As part of the Italian Empire, it aligned with the Axis and with other territories of Italian East Africa.

enemies.zh: 主要潜在敌人为英国及其在英属索马里兰、肯尼亚和亚丁的殖民力量。
enemies.en: Its principal potential enemy was Britain and its colonial forces in British Somaliland, Kenya, and Aden.

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交，以支撑意大利在印度洋西部和非洲之角的战略部署为目标。
foreignPolicy.en: It possessed no independent foreign policy and existed to support Italian strategy in the western Indian Ocean and the Horn of Africa.

era.zh: 二十世纪三十年代殖民开发与军政整合时期
era.en: 1930s era of colonial development and military-administrative integration

keyInnovations.zh: 河谷灌溉农业、港口扩建、卡车公路运输、无线电据点、香蕉出口冷链与装运体系。
keyInnovations.en: River-valley irrigation agriculture, port expansion, truck-based road transport, radio outposts, and shipping systems for banana export.

strengths.zh: 沿海港口与河谷农业具备一定出口价值，摩加迪沙为东非重要殖民据点之一，便于军事机动。
strengths.en: Its coastal ports and river-valley agriculture had export value, and Mogadishu served as an important colonial base in East Africa, facilitating military mobility.

weaknesses.zh: 经济结构单一，对外贸和帝国运输依赖强；内陆控制能力有限，地方忠诚更多依附宗族而非殖民国家。
weaknesses.en: Its economy was narrow and highly dependent on external trade and imperial transport; control over the interior was limited, and local loyalty adhered more to clan networks than to the colonial state.

outlook.zh: 在大战条件下，意属索马里兰可作为短期进攻跳板，但若失去海上补给和区域制空权，将难以长期维持。
outlook.en: Under wartime conditions Italian Somaliland could serve as a short-term offensive springboard, but without sea supply and regional air superiority it would be difficult to sustain.

description.zh: 1939年的意属索马里兰是一个以港口贸易、河谷种植业和部族间接统治为特征的意大利殖民地。
description.en: In 1939 Italian Somaliland was an Italian colony defined by port trade, riverine plantation agriculture, and indirect rule through clan structures.

dynasty.zh: 法兰西第三共和国殖民统治时期
dynasty.en: Colonial period under the French Third Republic

governmentForm.zh: 由法国总督领导的殖民地行政体制，隶属于法兰西帝国并实行中央集权式殖民统治。
governmentForm.en: A colonial administration headed by a French governor and integrated into the French Empire under centralized rule.

socialStructure.zh: 马达加斯加社会兼具传统梅里纳高地政治遗产与多族群地方结构，殖民时期又叠加法国官僚与经济等级。高地地区的受教育阶层、沿海地方精英、商人、农民和劳工构成主要社会层次。基督教、传统祖灵信仰与部分伊斯兰社群并存。
socialStructure.en: Madagascan society combined the older Merina highland political legacy with diverse regional ethnic structures, overlaid in the colonial era by French bureaucratic and economic hierarchy. Educated highland groups, coastal elites, merchants, peasants, and laborers formed the main social strata. Christianity, traditional ancestor-centered beliefs, and smaller Muslim communities coexisted.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由法国总督府官员、驻军军官、殖民企业代表和受法国教育的少数本地协作者组成。原有贵族与地方显贵仍具社会影响，但政治主导权掌握在法国人手中。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted chiefly of the governor's officials, military officers, colonial business representatives, and a small number of French-educated local collaborators. Older aristocratic and regional notables still held social influence, but political dominance remained in French hands.

succession.zh: 殖民地最高权力由巴黎任命总督，无本地世袭王朝。地方层面的传统地位有时沿家族延续，但必须服从法国行政认可。
succession.en: Supreme colonial authority was vested in a governor appointed from Paris, with no local hereditary dynasty. Traditional local statuses sometimes continued within families, but only under French administrative recognition.

structure.zh: 1939年的马达加斯加由总督府集中管理，下设财政、内政、公共工程、卫生教育等机构，并划分若干省区与区县。殖民国家在高地和主要港口实行较强直接统治，在偏远地区则结合地方首领与行政长官。法国行政同时承担税收、劳工征发、治安和经济开发职能。
structure.en: In 1939 Madagascar was governed centrally by the governor's office, with departments for finance, interior affairs, public works, health, and education, and divided into provinces and districts. The colonial state exercised stronger direct rule in the highlands and major ports, while combining local chiefs with administrative officers in remoter areas. French administration simultaneously managed taxation, labor requisition, policing, and economic development.

function.zh: 负责总体行政、地方监督、治安协调与政治事务。
function.en: Handled general administration, local supervision, security coordination, and political affairs.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、关税、国有收入与审计。
function.en: Managed budgets, taxation, customs, public revenues, and auditing.

function.zh: 负责道路、铁路、港口、邮政、电报与城市设施建设。
function.en: Oversaw roads, railways, ports, postal services, telegraphs, and urban infrastructure.

name.zh: 卫生教育与土著事务厅
name.en: Health, Education, and Native Affairs Department

function.zh: 负责学校、医院、公共卫生、劳工管理与本地社会政策。
function.en: Managed schools, hospitals, public health, labor oversight, and native social policy.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由法国行政长官、区长和村级首领组成，辅以受控制的本地显贵。高地地区官僚渗透较深，而边远森林和南部地区对地方中介依赖更高。
localAdmin.en: Local administration consisted of French administrators, district officers, and village chiefs, assisted by controlled local notables. Bureaucratic penetration was deeper in the highlands, while forested and southern regions relied more on local intermediaries.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以法国殖民法和行政命令为主，本地习惯法在婚姻、继承和部分土地事务中有限保留。殖民臣民与法国公民在司法权利上并不平等。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based primarily on French colonial law and administrative decrees, with limited retention of customary law in marriage, inheritance, and some land matters. Colonial subjects and French citizens did not enjoy equal judicial rights.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制包括人头税、土地税、关税、消费税和强制劳役的替代性负担。财政征收与劳工动员是法国殖民统治维系公共工程和出口经济的重要手段。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system included head taxes, land taxes, customs, excise duties, and substitute burdens related to forced labor. Fiscal extraction and labor mobilization were key instruments by which French rule sustained public works and the export economy.

culturalAchievements.zh: 首都塔那那利佛延续了高地王国建筑与法国殖民城市布局并存的特色。印刷出版、教会教育、马达加斯加语文学和音乐传统在20世纪前半叶持续发展。
culturalAchievements.en: The capital Antananarivo preserved a distinctive coexistence of highland kingdom architecture and French colonial urban planning. Printing, mission education, Malagasy literature, and musical traditions continued to develop in the first half of the twentieth century.

languageFamily.zh: 马达加斯加语属南岛语系马来-波利尼西亚语族，行政语言法语属印欧语系罗曼语族。
languageFamily.en: Malagasy belongs to the Austronesian Malayo-Polynesian family, while the administrative language French belongs to the Indo-European Romance family.

philosophy.zh: 文化思想融合马达加斯加祖灵观念、基督教教会教育、地方王权记忆与法国共和殖民意识形态。
philosophy.en: Cultural thought blended Malagasy ancestor-centered beliefs, Christian mission education, memories of local kingship, and French republican-colonial ideology.

writingSystem.zh: 马达加斯加语采用拉丁字母书写，法语为行政与高等教育语言；部分阿拉伯字母传统在沿海穆斯林社群中仍有残留。
writingSystem.en: Malagasy was written in the Latin alphabet, while French served as the language of administration and higher education; remnants of Arabic-script traditions persisted in some coastal Muslim communities.

gdpDescription.zh: 马达加斯加经济在法国非洲殖民地中规模较大，以农业为主并辅以矿产、港口和少量加工业。出口导向明显，受国际市场与法国本土需求波动影响较大。
gdpDescription.en: Madagascar had one of the larger economies among French African colonies, centered on agriculture with support from mining, ports, and limited processing industries. It was strongly export-oriented and sensitive to fluctuations in international markets and metropolitan French demand.

mainIndustries.zh: 稻作农业、咖啡、香草、丁香、石墨与云母开采、林业、港口运输、食品加工
mainIndustries.en: Rice agriculture, coffee, vanilla, cloves, graphite and mica mining, forestry, port transport, food processing

tradeGoods.zh: 香草、咖啡、丁香、石墨、云母、牛只、稻米、木材、进口纺织品与机械制品
tradeGoods.en: Vanilla, coffee, cloves, graphite, mica, cattle, rice, timber, imported textiles and machinery

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭财富以稻田、牛只、家族土地权和地方互助网络形式存在，现金储蓄有限。高地受教育阶层、商人和殖民企业雇员拥有更高货币化收入。
householdWealth.en: Most household wealth took the form of rice land, cattle, family land rights, and local support networks, with limited cash savings. Educated highland groups, merchants, and employees of colonial enterprises enjoyed higher monetized incomes.

economicSystem.zh: 法国殖民统制下的混合出口经济，以小农生产、殖民企业、税收征收和港口贸易并行为特征。
economicSystem.en: A mixed export economy under French colonial regulation, characterized by smallholder production, colonial enterprises, fiscal extraction, and port trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政状况相对稳健，拥有一定现金结余和周转能力，但总体仍受法国帝国贸易与海运网络约束。
treasuryDescription.en: The colony's finances were relatively sound, with a degree of cash balance and operating flexibility, though they remained constrained by imperial French trade and shipping networks.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调关税、直接税与出口基础设施建设之间的平衡，目标是在维持秩序的同时扩大殖民经济收益。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized balancing customs, direct taxation, and export infrastructure in order to maintain order while expanding colonial economic returns.

description.zh: 由法国正规军、马达加斯加本地兵与守备单位构成，负责岛内驻防与海岸防御。
description.en: Consisted of French regulars, Malagasy troops, and garrison units responsible for internal stationing and coastal defense.

description.zh: 负责内地治安、情报和行政支持，兼有镇压骚乱任务。
description.en: Handled interior security, intelligence, and administrative support, and could suppress unrest.

name.zh: 海岸炮兵与海军支援分队
name.en: Coastal Artillery and Naval Support Detachments

description.zh: 负责主要港口、海湾和补给设施防护，并与法国海军协同。
description.en: Protected major ports, bays, and supply facilities and coordinated with the French Navy.

commanderInChief.zh: 法国总督兼驻马达加斯加高级军政当局
commanderInChief.en: The French governor and senior military-colonial authority in Madagascar

technology.zh: 技术水平包括铁路、公路、无线电、电报、港口设施、现代步兵武器和有限海岸炮兵，在法属殖民地中属较高水平，但重装备有限。
technology.en: Technological capacity included railways, roads, radio, telegraphy, port facilities, modern infantry weapons, and limited coastal artillery; this placed it relatively high among French colonies, though heavy equipment remained limited.

threats.zh: 主要威胁是全球战争背景下的海上封锁、印度洋航线争夺以及一旦法国本土失势后殖民忠诚与防务指挥可能出现分裂。
threats.en: The main threats were maritime blockade in the context of global war, contest over Indian Ocean sea lanes, and the possibility of fractured colonial loyalty and defense command if metropolitan France were defeated.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

populationDescription.zh: 人口约400万，以马达加斯加各族群为主体，其中高地梅里纳人与贝齐米萨拉卡、贝齐寮、萨卡拉瓦等沿海和地方族群并存。人口以农村为主，首都和港口城市是行政、教育和商业中心。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 4,000,000, overwhelmingly Malagasy, including highland Merina alongside coastal and regional groups such as the Betsimisaraka, Betsileo, and Sakalava. The population was mainly rural, with the capital and port cities serving as administrative, educational, and commercial centers.

name.zh: 塔那那利佛港外商区与近郊聚落

socialClasses.zh: 法国官员与侨民、本地受教育精英与旧贵族、商人、城市雇员与工人、广大农村农民和契约劳工。
socialClasses.en: French officials and settlers, local educated elites and old aristocracy, merchants, urban employees and workers, and the broad mass of rural peasants and contract laborers.

allies.zh: 1939年名义上隶属于法国及其盟友体系，战略上与英国在印度洋航线安全上有潜在协作基础。
allies.en: In 1939 it belonged nominally to France and its allied system, with a potential basis for strategic cooperation with Britain over Indian Ocean sea-lane security.

enemies.zh: 直接敌对对象尚未在岛内形成，但在大战升级情况下，轴心国海军与支持破坏海运的力量构成潜在威胁。
enemies.en: No immediate island-based enemy had yet emerged, but in an expanded war Axis naval forces and agents threatening maritime communications posed potential danger.

foreignPolicy.zh: 无独立外交，其对外地位完全取决于法国帝国在欧洲与印度洋的总体战略。
foreignPolicy.en: It had no independent foreign policy, and its external posture was wholly determined by the broader strategy of the French Empire in Europe and the Indian Ocean.

era.zh: 二十世纪三十年代晚期法属殖民交通与出口经济整合时期
era.en: Late 1930s period of French colonial transport and export-economy integration

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路与港口网络、道路扩建、电报无线电系统、出口作物加工、殖民公共卫生体系。
keyInnovations.en: Rail and port networks, road expansion, telegraph and radio systems, export-crop processing, and a colonial public health system.

strengths.zh: 岛屿规模大、资源多样、农业潜力强，且具备较完整的港口与行政体系，在印度洋具有重要战略位置。
strengths.en: The island was large, resource-diverse, and agriculturally productive, with a relatively complete port and administrative system and major strategic importance in the Indian Ocean.

weaknesses.zh: 经济仍以初级产品出口为主，农村贫困普遍，殖民合法性不足；防务依赖外海交通，难以独立抵御海空压力。
weaknesses.en: The economy still relied mainly on primary exports, rural poverty was widespread, and colonial legitimacy was weak; defense depended on overseas communications and could not independently resist sustained naval-air pressure.

outlook.zh: 若法国本土局势恶化，马达加斯加可能从相对稳定的殖民地转变为印度洋战略争夺的关键据点。
outlook.en: If conditions in metropolitan France deteriorated, Madagascar could shift from a relatively stable colony into a key strategic prize in the contest for the Indian Ocean.

description.zh: 1939年的法属马达加斯加是法国在印度洋最重要的殖民岛屿之一，兼具出口农业、战略港口和多族群社会特征。
description.en: In 1939 French Madagascar was one of France's most important Indian Ocean colonies, combining export agriculture, strategic ports, and a multiethnic society.

dynasty.zh: 葡萄牙第三共和国殖民统治时期

governmentForm.zh: 由葡萄牙任命总督统治的殖民地行政体制，重大政策受里斯本殖民部直接控制。
governmentForm.en: A colonial administrative system ruled by a Portuguese-appointed governor, with major policy directed by the Colonial Ministry in Lisbon.

socialStructure.zh: 社会呈明显殖民等级结构，欧洲殖民官员与定居者居于上层，少数“同化人”处于中间，大多数非洲本地居民处于受管制的劳工与农村社群之中。城市沿海地区商业化较强，内陆广大地区仍以村社农业和强制劳动征发为主。
socialStructure.en: Society had a pronounced colonial hierarchy, with European officials and settlers at the top, a small class of assimilados in the middle, and the vast majority of African inhabitants subject to regulated labor and rural communal life. Coastal cities were relatively commercialized, while the interior remained dominated by village agriculture and coerced labor recruitment.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由葡萄牙总督、殖民官僚、军警指挥官、大种植园主和特许公司利益集团构成。地方酋长在间接统治框架下被纳入基层治理。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of the Portuguese governor, colonial bureaucrats, military and police commanders, large plantation owners, and concessionary company interests. Local chiefs were incorporated into lower-level governance under indirect rule.

succession.zh: 总督并非世袭，而由葡萄牙政府任命与调任。地方权力承继在部分土著社群中仍依传统酋长继承，但须受殖民当局承认。
succession.en: The governor was not hereditary but appointed and transferred by the Portuguese government. Local authority in some indigenous communities still followed traditional chiefly succession, subject to colonial recognition.

structure.zh: 莫桑比克在1939年为葡萄牙海外殖民地，由总督驻洛伦索马克斯统一管理。行政上分区、县与基层土著管辖单位并行，铁路、港口、税务和劳工事务均高度集中在殖民政府手中。
structure.en: In 1939 Mozambique was a Portuguese overseas colony administered centrally by a governor in Lourenço Marques. Administratively it combined districts, counties, and subordinate native jurisdictions, while railways, ports, taxation, and labor affairs were tightly controlled by the colonial state.

function.zh: 统筹行政命令、地方治理、治安监督与殖民政策执行。
function.en: Coordinated administrative orders, local governance, public order oversight, and execution of colonial policy.

function.zh: 负责税收、海关、预算编制、港口收费与特许经营收入管理。
function.en: Handled taxation, customs, budget preparation, port fees, and concession revenues.

function.zh: 管理铁路、道路、港口、邮电及城市基础设施。
function.en: Managed railways, roads, ports, postal and telegraph services, and urban infrastructure.

function.zh: 监督土著行政、劳工征募、契约劳动与农村控制体系。
function.en: Supervised native administration, labor recruitment, contract labor, and the rural control system.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以区长和殖民行政官为核心，并借助受承认的酋长执行征税、劳工动员和治安。若干地区仍受特许公司影响，国家与公司权力交织。
localAdmin.en: Local administration centered on district administrators and colonial officers, assisted by recognized chiefs in taxation, labor mobilization, and order. In some areas concessionary companies still influenced governance, creating overlap between state and corporate authority.

legalSystem.zh: 正式法制以葡萄牙殖民法为基础，欧洲人和“同化人”较多适用成文法。本地居民在婚姻、习俗和村社事务上部分沿用习惯法，但最终解释权归殖民官府。
legalSystem.en: The formal legal system was based on Portuguese colonial law, applied more fully to Europeans and assimilados. Indigenous inhabitants retained limited customary law in marriage, custom, and village matters, but ultimate authority rested with colonial officials.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制包括人头税、关税、消费税、铁路与港口收费以及特许收入。人头税和强制劳动制度相互配合，是殖民财政与劳工供给的重要工具。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system included hut or head taxes, customs duties, excise taxes, railway and port fees, and concession income. The head tax worked alongside forced labor mechanisms and was a key instrument of both colonial finance and labor supply.

culturalAchievements.zh: 沿海城市形成了葡萄牙—非洲混合的建筑、音乐和天主教节庆文化。港口城市的学校、报刊与教会网络推动了有限的城市文化发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Coastal cities developed mixed Portuguese-African forms in architecture, music, and Catholic festival culture. Schools, newspapers, and church networks in port towns supported a limited but notable urban cultural sphere.

languageFamily.zh: 官方语言属印欧语系罗曼语族葡萄牙语；本地语言以班图语群为主。
languageFamily.en: The official language was Portuguese of the Indo-European Romance family; local languages were predominantly Bantu.

philosophy.zh: 以葡萄牙天主教殖民意识形态、国家主义与“文明化使命”论述为主，同时广大非洲社群延续本地宗教观念与族群传统。
philosophy.en: The dominant official outlook was Portuguese Catholic colonial ideology, nationalism, and a rhetoric of civilizing mission, while most African communities continued local belief systems and ethnic traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用葡萄牙语拉丁字母书写；地方社会广泛使用口传传统，部分地区亦见阿拉伯文斯瓦希里书写影响。
writingSystem.en: Official writing used Portuguese in the Latin alphabet; local society relied heavily on oral traditions, and some areas also showed Arabic-script Swahili influence.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以低生产率农业、港口转运、铁路服务和殖民性原料出口为主。南部地区因与南非、罗得西亚的交通联系而商业化程度较高。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was dominated by low-productivity agriculture, port transit, railway services, and colonial raw-material exports. The south was relatively more commercialized due to transport links with South Africa and Rhodesia.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、棉花与腰果种植、港口运输、铁路服务、采矿辅助业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, cotton and cashew cultivation, port transport, railway services, and mining support activities

tradeGoods.zh: 棉花、腰果、糖、椰干、木材、港口转口服务
tradeGoods.en: Cotton, cashews, sugar, copra, timber, and port transit services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分化极大，欧洲定居者和商人掌握土地、商铺与信用资源，绝大多数非洲家庭仅拥有简陋农具、牲畜和村社住房。货币化财富集中于沿海与交通线周边。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: European settlers and merchants controlled land, shops, and credit, while most African households owned only simple tools, livestock, and village dwellings. Monetized wealth was concentrated in coastal and transport-corridor areas.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民地管制型经济，国家、特许公司与种植园资本共同主导资源配置，劳工市场受行政强制深刻影响。
economicSystem.en: A regulated colonial economy in which the state, concessionary companies, and plantation capital jointly directed resource allocation, while the labor market was heavily shaped by administrative coercion.

unit.zh: 百万莫桑比克埃斯库多
百万莫桑比克埃斯库多
百万莫桑比克埃斯库多
百万莫桑比克埃斯库多
百万莫桑比克埃斯库多

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地金库规模有限，流动性依赖关税与港口收入，财政稳定性又受里斯本政策和外贸波动制约。
treasuryDescription.en: The colonial treasury was limited in size, with liquidity dependent on customs and port income, while fiscal stability was constrained by Lisbon's policies and trade fluctuations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调收支平衡、基础设施服务殖民贸易、并以低社会开支维持行政与治安机器。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized balanced budgets, infrastructure serving colonial commerce, and low social spending to sustain the administrative and security apparatus.

description.zh: 以本地征募士兵与葡萄牙军官组成，负责驻防、边境巡逻与内部治安。
description.en: Composed of locally recruited soldiers under Portuguese officers, responsible for garrison duty, border patrols, and internal security.

description.zh: 承担城市警备、税务协助、劳工控制与镇压骚乱任务。
description.en: Handled urban security, assistance in tax enforcement, labor control, and suppression of unrest.

description.zh: 负责港口警戒、海岸巡查和有限海上联络。
description.en: Responsible for port security, coastal patrol, and limited maritime liaison.

commanderInChief.zh: 葡属莫桑比克总督兼殖民地武装最高长官
commanderInChief.en: Governor of Portuguese Mozambique as supreme colonial armed authority

technology.zh: 装备以步枪、机枪、少量火炮、卡车和无线电为主，整体为二线殖民地水准，重武器和机械化能力有限。
technology.en: Equipment centered on rifles, machine guns, small artillery, trucks, and radio, representing a secondary colonial standard with limited heavy weapons and mechanization.

unit.zh: 百万莫桑比克埃斯库多

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自边境走私、局部劳工逃亡、农村不满和战时海上交通风险，而非大规模常规战争。
threats.en: Principal threats came from border smuggling, localized labor flight, rural discontent, and wartime maritime risks rather than large-scale conventional war.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

populationDescription.zh: 人口以非洲班图族群为绝对多数，欧洲人和南亚裔、混血社群数量较少。人口密度南北差异明显，沿海港市与交通节点更为集中。
populationDescription.en: The population was overwhelmingly African and Bantu-speaking, with small European, South Asian, and mixed-race communities. Population density varied greatly, with stronger concentration in coastal ports and transport nodes.

socialClasses.zh: 欧洲官员与商人、少数同化人、中间城市劳动者与文书阶层、广大农村农民和被征募劳工。
socialClasses.en: European officials and merchants, a small assimilado stratum, an intermediate urban laboring and clerical group, and a vast rural peasantry and recruited labor force.

allies.zh: 宗主国葡萄牙；在贸易与交通上与南非、南罗得西亚保持务实联系。
allies.en: Its metropole Portugal; pragmatically linked in trade and transport with South Africa and Southern Rhodesia.

enemies.zh: 无明确本地国家级敌国，但对区域走私网络、潜在反殖民活动与战时海上威胁保持警惕。
enemies.en: No clear local state enemy, but authorities were wary of regional smuggling networks, possible anti-colonial activity, and wartime maritime threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 其对外政策完全从属于葡萄牙，重点在维护殖民边界、保障港口转运与保持在南部非洲的经济通道。
foreignPolicy.en: Its external policy was wholly subordinate to Portugal, prioritizing colonial borders, port transit, and economic corridors in southern Africa.

era.zh: 20世纪前期殖民基础设施时代

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路联运、港口装卸机械、无线电通讯、基础热带医学与殖民城市供水系统。
keyInnovations.en: Rail-based transit networks, mechanized port handling, radio communications, basic tropical medicine, and colonial urban water systems.

strengths.zh: 拥有重要港口和通往内陆的铁路通道，地理位置利于区域转运；殖民行政与治安体系较为稳固。
strengths.en: It possessed important ports and rail corridors into the interior, giving it strong regional transit value; the colonial administrative and security apparatus was relatively firm.

weaknesses.zh: 经济高度依赖低附加值出口和强制劳工，社会不平等严重，教育与卫生覆盖薄弱，内陆开发不足。
