era.zh: 殖民工业化与矿业开发时代
era.en: Colonial industrialization and mining development era

keyInnovations.zh: 磷酸盐工业化开采、铁路网络、比塞大海军基地、现代灌溉系统和港口设施。
keyInnovations.en: Industrialized phosphate mining, railway network, Bizerte naval base, modern irrigation systems, and port facilities.

strengths.zh: 丰富的磷酸盐资源、多元化农业、地中海战略位置、相对完善的基础设施。
strengths.en: Rich phosphate resources, diversified agriculture, strategic Mediterranean location, and relatively developed infrastructure.

weaknesses.zh: 殖民统治下的民族矛盾加深、土地问题严重、对法依赖性高、意大利军事威胁。
weaknesses.en: Deepening ethnic tensions under colonial rule, severe land issues, high dependence on France, and the Italian military threat.

outlook.zh: 突尼斯将成为二战北非战役的关键战场，战后民族独立运动将不可逆转地壮大。
outlook.en: Tunisia would become a key battleground in the North African campaign of WWII, and post-war national independence movements would strengthen irreversibly.

description.zh: 1939年的突尼斯是法国保护国，名义上由侯赛因王朝贝伊统治，实际权力掌握在法国驻扎总理大臣手中。经济以农业和磷酸盐开采为支柱。
description.en: In 1939, Tunisia was a French protectorate nominally ruled by the Husainid Bey, with real power held by the French Resident-General. The economy was based on agriculture and phosphate mining.

governmentForm.zh: 法国海外省（département），名义上是法国本土不可分割的一部分，由总督统辖。法国定居者享有完全公民权，穆斯林多数人口被排斥在政治权利之外。
governmentForm.en: A French overseas département, nominally an integral part of metropolitan France, governed by a Governor-General. French settlers enjoyed full citizenship, while the Muslim majority was largely excluded from political rights.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由法国定居者（黑脚，约100万）、阿拉伯-柏柏尔穆斯林多数民众（约600万）和犹太社区构成。定居者控制政治权力和经济资源，穆斯林人口在政治和经济上受严重歧视。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of French settlers (pieds-noirs, about 1 million), an Arab-Berber Muslim majority (about 6 million), and a Jewish community. Settlers controlled political power and economic resources, while the Muslim population faced severe political and economic discrimination.

rulingClass.zh: 法国总督与殖民行政机构、黑脚定居者政治精英、大地主和工商业资本家。
rulingClass.en: The French Governor-General and colonial administration, pied-noir settler political elites, large landowners, and industrial-commercial capitalists.

succession.zh: 总督由法国政府任命。阿尔及利亚被视为法国本土延伸，不存在独立的主权继承机制。
succession.en: The Governor-General was appointed by the French government. Algeria was considered an extension of metropolitan France, with no independent sovereignty or succession mechanism.

structure.zh: 阿尔及利亚分为三个省（département：阿尔及尔、奥兰、君士坦丁），行政上隶属法国内政部。总督统筹行政，设有阿尔及利亚代表团（财政议会），定居者在其中占主导。南部撒哈拉地区实行军事管辖。
structure.en: Algeria was divided into three départements (Algiers, Oran, Constantine), administratively under the French Interior Ministry. The Governor-General coordinated administration with an Algerian Delegations assembly (fiscal parliament), dominated by settlers. The southern Saharan territories were under military administration.

function.zh: 统筹全部行政事务，协调三省管理和军事区事务。
function.en: Coordinated all administrative affairs, managed the three départements, and the military territories.

name.en: General Directorate of Finance and Taxation

function.zh: 管理关税、税收、预算和公共财务。
function.en: Managed customs, taxation, budgets, and public finances.

name.en: Directorate of Interior and Native Affairs

function.zh: 管理穆斯林人口事务、地方行政和公共秩序。
function.en: Managed Muslim population affairs, local administration, and public order.

name.en: Directorate of Public Works and Transport

function.zh: 负责铁路、公路、港口和城市基础设施建设。
function.en: Responsible for railways, roads, ports, and urban infrastructure.

localAdmin.zh: 三省下设郡（arrondissement）和市镇（commune），分为享有完全自治权的定居者市镇和权力受限的混合市镇。穆斯林在本地行政中代表性极低。
localAdmin.en: Below the three départements were arrondissements and communes, divided into full-franchise settler communes and mixed communes with limited powers. Muslim representation in local government was extremely low.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以法国法律为主，穆斯林个人事务适用伊斯兰法。穆斯林受特别法规（code de l'indigénat）约束至1944年。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was primarily French law, with Islamic law for Muslim personal affairs. Muslims were subject to the code de l'indigénat until 1944.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收体系以法国税制为基础，包括关税、土地税、营业税和所得税。穆斯林人口承担额外的特别税。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system was based on the French model, including customs, land taxes, business taxes, and income taxes. The Muslim population bore additional special taxes.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为主（穆斯林人口），天主教（法国定居者）和犹太教并存
religion.en: Islam (Muslim population) predominated, with Catholicism (French settlers) and Judaism also present

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿尔及尔大学（法语教学）、伊斯兰宗教学校体系、阿尔及利亚阿拉伯文学和新闻业、法语殖民文化建设。
culturalAchievements.en: The University of Algiers (French-language instruction), Islamic religious school system, Algerian Arabic literature and journalism, and French colonial cultural institutions.

languageFamily.zh: 法语属印欧语系罗曼语族；阿拉伯语属亚非语系闪语族；柏柏尔语（卡比尔语等）属亚非语系柏柏尔语族。
languageFamily.en: French belongs to the Indo-European Romance family; Arabic to the Afro-Asiatic Semitic family; Berber (Kabyle, etc.) to the Afro-Asiatic Berber family.

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰改革主义（阿卜杜勒·哈米德·本·巴迪斯领导的乌里玛协会）、法国共和主义思想和早期民族主义运动并行。
philosophy.en: Islamic reformism (the Association of Algerian Muslim Ulama led by Abdelhamid Ben Badis), French republican thought, and early nationalist movements coexisted.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用法语拉丁字母；阿拉伯语以阿拉伯字母书写；柏柏尔语多以口述为主。
writingSystem.en: French in Latin script was official; Arabic was written in Arabic script; Berber was mainly oral.

gdpDescription.zh: 北非最大殖民经济体，以葡萄酒酿造、谷物种植、磷酸盐和铁矿石开采为支柱。经济严重依赖对法贸易，定居者部门与穆斯林部门之间存在巨大发展鸿沟。
gdpDescription.en: The largest colonial economy in North Africa, based on wine production, grain cultivation, phosphate and iron ore mining. The economy was heavily dependent on trade with France, with a vast development gap between the settler and Muslim sectors.

mainIndustries.zh: 葡萄酒酿造、谷物种植、磷酸盐开采、铁矿开采、柑橘种植、烟草加工
mainIndustries.en: Wine production, grain cultivation, phosphate mining, iron ore mining, citrus growing, and tobacco processing

tradeGoods.zh: 葡萄酒、谷物、磷酸盐、铁矿石、柑橘、橄榄油、进口制造品和机械
tradeGoods.en: Wine, grain, phosphates, iron ore, citrus, olive oil, and imported manufactures and machinery

householdWealth.zh: 财富高度集中在定居者手中：黑脚拥有最优质的沿海农地、城市房产和工商业资本。穆斯林农民多为小自耕农或无地佃农。
householdWealth.en: Wealth was highly concentrated among settlers: pieds-noirs owned the best coastal farmland, urban property, and commercial capital. Muslim farmers were mostly smallholders or landless sharecroppers.

economicSystem.zh: 以对法出口为核心的殖民经济，定居者部门高度融入法国经济，穆斯林部门以自给农业和传统手工业为主。
economicSystem.en: A colonial economy centered on exports to France, with the settler sector highly integrated into the French economy and the Muslim sector based on subsistence agriculture and traditional handicrafts.

source.zh: 矿业特许权与国有资产收入
source.en: Mining Royalties and State Property Revenue

treasuryDescription.zh: 阿尔及利亚财政规模在法属非洲中最大，财政自给能力较强但仍依赖法国拨款和关税保护。
treasuryDescription.en: Algeria had the largest fiscal scale in French Africa, with relatively strong financial self-sufficiency but still dependent on French allocations and tariff protection.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以服务定居者经济和法国战略利益为优先，对穆斯林人口的公共服务投入严重不足。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized the settler economy and French strategic interests, with severely insufficient public service spending on the Muslim population.

name.zh: 阿尔及利亚殖民步兵（蒂拉耶尔与祖阿夫）

description.zh: 由阿尔及利亚穆斯林士兵和法国军官组成的殖民步兵部队，是法军重要兵源。
description.en: Colonial infantry composed of Algerian Muslim soldiers and French officers, a major source of French military manpower.

name.zh: 法国驻阿尔及利亚驻军

description.zh: 驻扎在阿尔及利亚的法国本土部队和非洲军团部队。
description.en: French metropolitan troops and Armée d'Afrique units garrisoned in Algeria.

name.zh: 撒哈拉驼骑部队与宪兵

description.zh: 负责撒哈拉南部领土巡逻、边防和内部治安。
description.en: Responsible for patrolling the southern Saharan territories, border defense, and internal security.

commanderInChief.zh: 法国第十九军区司令
commanderInChief.en: Commander of the French 19th Military Region

technology.zh: 装备完善，包括步兵武器、火炮、坦克、装甲车和空军力量。阿尔及利亚是法国非洲军的核心基地。
technology.en: Well-equipped with infantry weapons, artillery, tanks, armored vehicles, and air force assets. Algeria was the core base of the French Armée d'Afrique.

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括意大利从利比亚方向的军事压力、西班牙摩洛哥的不确定性、以及内部民族主义运动带来的长期政治挑战。
threats.en: Main threats included Italian military pressure from Libya, uncertainty in Spanish Morocco, and long-term political challenges from internal nationalist movements.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 喷火/零式/Bf109战斗机，争夺制空权
description.en: Spitfire/Zero/Bf109 fighter for air superiority

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 人口以阿拉伯-柏柏尔穆斯林为绝对多数（约600万），法国定居者（黑脚）约100万，犹太人约12万。人口增长率高，城市化进程加速。
populationDescription.en: The population was overwhelmingly Arab-Berber Muslim (about 6 million), with about 1 million French settlers (pieds-noirs) and approximately 120,000 Jews. Population growth was high and urbanization accelerating.

socialClasses.zh: 黑脚定居者（大地主、工商精英和中产阶级）、穆斯林大家族和宗教领袖、城市工人和手工业者、农村小农和无地佃农、犹太商人。
socialClasses.en: Pied-noir settlers (large landowners, industrial-commercial elites, and middle class), Muslim notable families and religious leaders, urban workers and artisans, rural smallholders and landless sharecroppers, and Jewish merchants.

allies.zh: 法国（阿尔及利亚被视为法国本土的延伸）。
allies.en: France (Algeria was considered an extension of metropolitan France).

enemies.zh: 意大利是主要潜在敌国，轴心国整体构成威胁。
enemies.en: Italy was the main potential enemy, with the Axis powers posing a broader threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 作为法国省份，外交完全由巴黎主导。阿尔及利亚是法国地中海和北非战略的核心。
foreignPolicy.en: As a French département, foreign policy was entirely directed from Paris. Algeria was central to French Mediterranean and North African strategy.

era.zh: 殖民工业化与军事化时代

keyInnovations.zh: 完善的铁路网络、现代港口设施、军事航空基地、矿业工业化开采技术和农业灌溉系统。
keyInnovations.en: Well-developed railway network, modern port facilities, military airfields, industrialized mining technology, and agricultural irrigation systems.

strengths.zh: 丰富的矿产资源、完善的基础设施、法国军事力量的核心基地、多元化农业。
strengths.en: Rich mineral resources, well-developed infrastructure, core base of French military power, and diversified agriculture.

weaknesses.zh: 殖民统治下定居者与穆斯林之间的深刻裂痕、严重的社会不平等、穆斯林政治参与被排斥。
weaknesses.en: Deep divisions between settlers and Muslims under colonial rule, severe social inequality, and the exclusion of Muslims from political participation.

outlook.zh: 阿尔及利亚将在战争中成为法国非洲军的动员中心和盟军北非登陆的关键目标，战后殖民矛盾将急剧激化。
outlook.en: Algeria would serve as a mobilization center for the French Armée d'Afrique and a key Allied objective in North Africa, with colonial tensions sharply intensifying after the war.

description.zh: 1939年的法属阿尔及利亚是法国最大的海外省，拥有约720万人口，经济以葡萄酒和矿产出口为支柱，是法国非洲军事力量的核心基地。
description.en: In 1939, French Algeria was France's largest overseas département, with about 7.2 million people, an economy based on wine and mineral exports, and the core base of French African military power.

dynasty.zh: 意大利法西斯殖民统治

governmentForm.zh: 意大利殖民地，由法西斯总督直接管理。1939年初利比亚被宣布为意大利第四岸（本土延伸），意大利定居者享有完整公民权。
governmentForm.en: An Italian colony directly administered by a Fascist Governor-General. In early 1939 Libya was declared Italy's Fourth Shore (metropolitan extension), with Italian settlers enjoying full citizenship.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由意大利定居者（约11万）、阿拉伯-柏柏尔穆斯林多数（约80万）和少量犹太社区构成。法西斯政权大力推动意大利农业殖民。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Italian settlers (about 110,000), an Arab-Berber Muslim majority (about 800,000), and a small Jewish community. The Fascist regime aggressively promoted Italian agricultural colonization.

rulingClass.zh: 意大利法西斯总督与军政官员、意大利定居者精英、法西斯党地方组织。
rulingClass.en: The Italian Fascist Governor-General and military-political officials, Italian settler elites, and local Fascist Party organizations.

succession.zh: 总督由罗马的墨索里尼政府任命，不存在本地主权继承机制。
succession.en: The Governor-General was appointed by Mussolini's government in Rome, with no local sovereignty or succession mechanism.

structure.zh: 利比亚分为的黎波里塔尼亚、昔兰尼加和费赞三个省份，由驻的黎波里的总督统辖。1939年成为意大利'第四岸'后行政上更紧密地与罗马挂钩。意大利定居者享有市政自治权。
structure.en: Libya was divided into three provinces: Tripolitania, Cyrenaica, and Fezzan, governed by the Governor-General in Tripoli. After becoming Italy's 'Fourth Shore' in 1939, administration was more closely linked to Rome. Italian settlers enjoyed municipal self-governance.

function.zh: 统筹行政、安全和殖民定居政策。
function.en: Coordinated administration, security, and colonial settlement policy.

name.zh: 殖民定居与公共工程署
name.en: Colonial Settlement and Public Works Department

function.zh: 管理意大利定居者安置、农业开垦和基础设施建设。
function.en: Managed Italian settler placement, agricultural reclamation, and infrastructure construction.

function.zh: 管理驻军事务、军事基础设施和费赞军事管辖区。
function.en: Managed garrison affairs, military infrastructure, and the Fezzan military zone.

localAdmin.zh: 意大利定居城镇设有市政委员会，阿拉伯农村地区由意大利区长和部落领袖共同管理。南部费赞地区实行军事管辖。
localAdmin.en: Italian settler towns had municipal councils, Arab rural areas were jointly managed by Italian district officials and tribal leaders. The southern Fezzan region was under military administration.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以意大利法律为主，穆斯林个人事务适用伊斯兰法。意大利定居者适用意大利法律。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was primarily Italian law, with Islamic law for Muslim personal affairs. Italian settlers were subject to Italian law.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、土地税和营业税为主。意大利对定居者农业提供大量补贴。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from customs, land taxes, and business taxes. Italy heavily subsidized settler agriculture.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为主（利比亚穆斯林），天主教（意大利定居者）和犹太教并存
religion.en: Islam (Libyan Muslims) predominated, with Catholicism (Italian settlers) and Judaism also present

culturalAchievements.zh: 的黎波里城市建筑融合意大利法西斯风格和阿拉伯传统；赛努西教团在昔兰尼加保持宗教和社会影响力；意大利兴建了大量公共建筑和基础设施。
culturalAchievements.en: Tripoli's architecture blended Italian Fascist and Arab styles; the Senussi order maintained religious and social influence in Cyrenaica; Italy constructed extensive public buildings and infrastructure.

languageFamily.zh: 意大利语属印欧语系罗曼语族；阿拉伯语属亚非语系闪语族；柏柏尔语属亚非语系柏柏尔语族。
languageFamily.en: Italian belongs to the Indo-European Romance family; Arabic to the Afro-Asiatic Semitic family; Berber to the Afro-Asiatic Berber family.

philosophy.zh: 意大利法西斯殖民意识形态与马利基派伊斯兰传统并存，赛努西宗教运动保持对本地社会的影响。
philosophy.en: Italian Fascist colonial ideology coexisted with Maliki Islamic tradition, while the Senussi religious movement maintained influence over local society.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用意大利语拉丁字母；阿拉伯语以阿拉伯字母书写。
writingSystem.en: Italian in Latin script was official; Arabic was written in Arabic script.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济依赖意大利政府大规模补贴支持的定居者农业、沿海贸易和军事支出。石油尚未发现，自然资源贫乏。
gdpDescription.en: The economy depended on heavily subsidized Italian settler agriculture, coastal trade, and military spending. Oil had not yet been discovered, and natural resources were scarce.

mainIndustries.zh: 定居者农业（橄榄、柑橘、谷物）、游牧畜牧业、渔业、意大利军事基础设施建设
mainIndustries.en: Settler agriculture (olives, citrus, grain), nomadic pastoralism, fishing, and Italian military infrastructure construction

tradeGoods.zh: 橄榄油、柑橘、皮张、esparto草、进口制造品和食品
tradeGoods.en: Olive oil, citrus, hides, esparto grass, and imported manufactures and foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 意大利定居者获得国家分配的农地和补贴，阿拉伯牧民和小农生活水平低。大片传统牧场被征收给定居者。
householdWealth.en: Italian settlers received state-allocated farmland and subsidies, while Arab pastoralists and smallholders had low living standards. Large tracts of traditional pastureland were confiscated for settlers.

economicSystem.zh: 以意大利国家补贴为支撑的殖民定居经济，法西斯政权将利比亚视为意大利过剩人口的安置地。
economicSystem.en: A subsidized colonial settler economy supported by the Italian state; the Fascist regime treated Libya as a destination for Italy's surplus population.

treasuryDescription.zh: 利比亚财政严重依赖意大利本土补贴，军事开支占主导，自身收入远不足以覆盖支出。
treasuryDescription.en: Libya's finances were heavily dependent on Italian metropolitan subsidies, with military spending dominant and local revenue far insufficient to cover expenditure.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以军事建设和意大利定居者安置为优先，经济上依附于罗马。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized military construction and Italian settler placement, economically dependent on Rome.

description.zh: 包括意大利本土师和利比亚殖民步兵（阿斯卡里），是意大利非洲军事力量的核心。
description.en: Included Italian metropolitan divisions and Libyan colonial infantry (Askari), forming the core of Italian African military power.

name.zh: 意大利空军利比亚分队

description.zh: 驻利比亚的意大利空军部队，配备战斗机和轰炸机。
description.en: Italian air force units stationed in Libya, equipped with fighters and bombers.

description.zh: 负责地中海南岸海军基地和沿海防御。
description.en: Responsible for naval bases and coastal defense along the southern Mediterranean.

commanderInChief.zh: 利比亚总督伊塔洛·巴尔博（元帅）
commanderInChief.en: Governor-General Italo Balbo (Air Marshal)

technology.zh: 装备包括坦克、装甲车、火炮、战斗机、轰炸机和海军舰艇。巴尔博积极扩充利比亚军事基础设施。
technology.en: Equipment included tanks, armored vehicles, artillery, fighter planes, bombers, and naval vessels. Balbo actively expanded Libya's military infrastructure.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自英国在埃及的驻军和英法在北非的军事力量。利比亚是意大利在非洲扩张的前沿基地。
threats.en: Main threats came from British forces in Egypt and Anglo-French military power in North Africa. Libya was Italy's forward base for expansion in Africa.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 喷火/零式/Bf109战斗机，争夺制空权
description.en: Spitfire/Zero/Bf109 fighter for air superiority

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 人口以阿拉伯-柏柏尔穆斯林为多数（约80万），意大利定居者约11万。法西斯政权在1938-39年大规模推动'二万移民计划'向利比亚安置意大利农民。
populationDescription.en: The population was predominantly Arab-Berber Muslim (about 800,000), with about 110,000 Italian settlers. The Fascist regime aggressively pushed the 'Twenty Thousand Settlers' program in 1938-39 to relocate Italian farmers to Libya.

socialClasses.zh: 意大利法西斯官员与军人、意大利定居者（农民和城市居民）、阿拉伯城市商人和手工业者、游牧和半游牧牧民、犹太商人。
socialClasses.en: Italian Fascist officials and military, Italian settlers (farmers and urban residents), Arab urban merchants and artisans, nomadic and semi-nomadic pastoralists, and Jewish merchants.

allies.zh: 意大利法西斯帝国、轴心国（德国）。
allies.en: The Italian Fascist Empire and Axis powers (Germany).

enemies.zh: 英国和法国是主要潜在敌国。
enemies.en: Britain and France were the main potential enemies.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由罗马主导。利比亚是意大利地中海帝国战略的核心，面向英属埃及和法属北非。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was directed from Rome. Libya was central to Italy's Mediterranean imperial strategy, facing British Egypt and French North Africa.

era.zh: 法西斯殖民军事化时代

keyInnovations.zh: 沿海公路（利托拉尼亚公路）、军事机场、的黎波里港口现代化、定居者灌溉设施和法西斯建筑。
keyInnovations.en: Coastal highway (Litoranea), military airfields, Tripoli port modernization, settler irrigation facilities, and Fascist architecture.

strengths.zh: 意大利大规模军事部署和基础设施投资、地中海战略位置、定居者农业扩展。
strengths.en: Massive Italian military deployment and infrastructure investment, strategic Mediterranean location, and expanding settler agriculture.

weaknesses.zh: 经济完全依赖意大利补贴、本地人口敌意、水资源匮乏、补给线漫长脆弱。
weaknesses.en: Complete economic dependence on Italian subsidies, local population hostility, water scarcity, and long vulnerable supply lines.

outlook.zh: 利比亚将成为二战北非战役的主战场，意大利殖民统治将在战争中崩溃。
outlook.en: Libya would become the main battleground of the North African campaign in WWII, and Italian colonial rule would collapse during the war.

description.zh: 1939年的意属利比亚是意大利法西斯帝国的'第四岸'，由空军元帅伊塔洛·巴尔博担任总督，大力推进意大利农业殖民和军事建设。
description.en: In 1939, Italian Libya was the Fascist Empire's 'Fourth Shore,' governed by Air Marshal Italo Balbo, with aggressive Italian agricultural colonization and military buildup.

ruler.zh: 英国驻扎专员查尔斯·阿丁

governmentForm.zh: 英国高级专员管辖下的保护国，由驻扎专员实行间接统治，保留茨瓦纳部落首领的内部管理权。
governmentForm.en: A protectorate under the British High Commissioner, administered by a Resident Commissioner through indirect rule, preserving internal governance by Tswana chiefs.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以茨瓦纳部落结构为基础，八个主要部落各有自己的首领和领地。英国行政人员极少，传统首领在日常治理中保持重要权力。
socialStructure.en: Society was based on Tswana tribal structures, with eight main tribes each having their own chief and territory. British administrative personnel were very few, and traditional chiefs retained significant power in daily governance.

rulingClass.zh: 英国驻扎专员与少数殖民官员、茨瓦纳部落首领、少数欧洲商人和传教士。
rulingClass.en: The British Resident Commissioner and a small number of colonial officials, Tswana tribal chiefs, and a few European traders and missionaries.

succession.zh: 殖民最高权力由英国高级专员（驻南非）任命驻扎专员掌握；部落首领职位按传统世袭继承。
succession.en: Supreme colonial authority was held by a Resident Commissioner appointed by the British High Commissioner (based in South Africa); tribal chieftaincies followed traditional hereditary succession.

structure.zh: 贝专纳兰保护国由英国高级专员（兼管巴苏陀兰和斯威士兰）负责，日常行政由驻马费京的驻扎专员执行。八个主要部落保留相当大的自治权。行政总部实际设在南非境内的马费京。
structure.en: The Bechuanaland Protectorate was under the British High Commissioner (also responsible for Basutoland and Swaziland), with daily administration by the Resident Commissioner in Mafikeng. Eight main tribes retained considerable autonomy. The administrative headquarters was actually located in Mafikeng, inside South Africa.

function.zh: 处理中央行政、预算和与高级专员署的联络。
function.en: Handled central administration, budgets, and liaison with the High Commissioner's Office.

function.zh: 管理各行政区事务、部落事务协调和税收征缴。
function.en: Managed district affairs, tribal coordination, and tax collection.

function.zh: 负责治安维护和畜牧业疫病防控（牲畜是主要经济资源）。
function.en: Responsible for security and livestock disease control (cattle being the main economic resource).

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理主要由部落首领通过传统会议（kgotla）进行。英国地区专员起监督和协调作用，直接干预较少。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was mainly carried out by tribal chiefs through traditional assemblies (kgotla). British district commissioners served supervisory and coordinating roles with limited direct intervention.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合英国保护国条例和茨瓦纳习惯法。部落法院处理大多数本地案件。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined British protectorate ordinances and Tswana customary law. Tribal courts handled most local cases.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以茅屋税（人头税）和牲畜税为主，收入微薄。许多男性需赴南非矿场务工以缴纳税款。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from hut tax (poll tax) and livestock taxes, yielding meager amounts. Many men had to work in South African mines to pay their taxes.

religion.zh: 基督教（传教士传播）和茨瓦纳传统信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity (spread by missionaries) and Tswana traditional beliefs coexisted

culturalAchievements.zh: 茨瓦纳口头文学和音乐传统、传教士建立的教育体系、kgotla民主协商传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Tswana oral literature and musical traditions, missionary-established educational systems, and the kgotla democratic consultative tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属印欧语系日耳曼语族；茨瓦纳语属尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic family; Tswana belongs to the Niger-Congo Bantu branch.

philosophy.zh: 茨瓦纳传统社会伦理与基督教传教士教育并行，部落首领积极维护传统自治权利以抵制南非吞并。
philosophy.en: Tswana traditional social ethics operated alongside Christian missionary education; tribal chiefs actively defended traditional autonomy rights to resist South African annexation.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用英语拉丁字母；传教士以拉丁字母书写茨瓦纳语。
writingSystem.en: English in Latin script was official; missionaries wrote Tswana in Latin script.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以畜牧业为主，严重依赖向南非输出劳动力和牲畜。干旱频发限制了农业发展。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on pastoralism, heavily dependent on labor and livestock exports to South Africa. Frequent droughts limited agricultural development.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、劳动力输出（南非矿场）、小规模农业
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, labor export (South African mines), and small-scale agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 牛、皮张、少量粮食、劳动力（汇款），进口制造品和食品
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, hides, small quantities of grain, labor (remittances), and imported manufactures and foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富主要体现在牛群数量、土地使用权和在南非矿场工作的汇款收入。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was mainly held in cattle herds, land use rights, and remittances from work in South African mines.

economicSystem.zh: 以畜牧和劳动力输出为核心的依附性经济，深度整合入南非经济体系。
economicSystem.en: A dependent economy based on pastoralism and labor export, deeply integrated into the South African economic system.

source.zh: 关税分成（南非关税同盟）
source.en: Customs Revenue Share (South African Customs Union)

treasuryDescription.zh: 保护国财政极为薄弱，税基狭小，公共服务严重不足。
treasuryDescription.en: The protectorate's finances were extremely weak, with a narrow tax base and severely insufficient public services.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以最低限度维持行政运作为目标，公共投资极少。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed at maintaining minimum administrative operations, with very little public investment.

description.zh: 负责治安维持和边境巡逻的小型警察部队。
description.en: A small police force responsible for maintaining order and border patrols.

description.zh: 由部落首领管理的辅助治安力量。
description.en: Auxiliary security forces managed by tribal chiefs.

commanderInChief.zh: 贝专纳兰驻扎专员兼英国高级专员署
commanderInChief.en: Resident Commissioner of Bechuanaland under the High Commissioner's Office

technology.zh: 装备极为简陋，以步枪和基本通信设备为主。安全依赖英国和南非军事体系。
technology.en: Equipment was extremely basic, mainly rifles and basic communications. Security relied on the British and South African military systems.

threats.zh: 主要安全关切为南非联邦对保护国的吞并企图，以及旱灾引发的社会不稳定。
threats.en: Main security concerns were the Union of South Africa's annexation attempts and social instability caused by droughts.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

populationDescription.zh: 人口以茨瓦纳各部落为主，散居于半干旱的大面积领土上。大量青壮年男性在南非矿场做劳工。
populationDescription.en: The population consisted mainly of Tswana tribes scattered across a vast semi-arid territory. Large numbers of young men worked as laborers in South African mines.

socialClasses.zh: 部落首领与贵族、英国殖民官员、传教士、矿工（在南非）、牧民和农民。
socialClasses.en: Tribal chiefs and nobility, British colonial officials, missionaries, mine workers (in South Africa), pastoralists, and farmers.

allies.zh: 英国帝国。
allies.en: The British Empire.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但南非联邦的吞并企图构成长期政治威胁。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but the Union of South Africa's annexation ambitions posed a long-term political threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦和高级专员署主导，核心关切是抵制南非的吞并要求。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was directed by London and the High Commissioner's Office; the core concern was resisting South Africa's demands for annexation.

era.zh: 前工业畜牧与劳动力输出时代
era.en: Pre-industrial pastoral and labor export era

keyInnovations.zh: 有限铁路（穿越领土通往罗得西亚）、深水井、兽医防疫站和传教士学校。
keyInnovations.en: Limited railway (crossing the territory to Rhodesia), deep wells, veterinary disease control stations, and missionary schools.

strengths.zh: 广阔领土、部落自治传统保存较好、英国保护阻挡了南非吞并。
strengths.en: Vast territory, well-preserved tribal autonomy traditions, and British protection blocking South African annexation.

weaknesses.zh: 经济极度贫困、基础设施几乎不存在、劳动力严重外流、干旱频发。
weaknesses.en: Extreme economic poverty, almost nonexistent infrastructure, severe labor outflow, and frequent droughts.

outlook.zh: 战争期间茨瓦纳人将参与英军服役，保护国地位有助于战后最终走向独立。
outlook.en: During the war Tswana men would serve in the British military, and protectorate status would ultimately facilitate post-war progress toward independence.

description.zh: 1939年的贝专纳兰是英国高级专员保护国，以茨瓦纳部落为社会基础，经济依赖畜牧业和向南非输出劳动力。
description.en: In 1939, Bechuanaland was a British High Commission protectorate with Tswana tribes as its social foundation, economically dependent on pastoralism and labor export to South Africa.

dynasty.zh: 莫舒舒王朝（英国保护统治下）

governmentForm.zh: 英国高级专员管辖下的保护国，最高酋长保留传统权威，英国驻扎专员行使殖民行政权。
governmentForm.en: A protectorate under the British High Commissioner, with the Paramount Chief retaining traditional authority and the British Resident Commissioner exercising colonial administrative power.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以巴苏陀族（索托族）的部落和氏族结构为核心。最高酋长西索领导传统等级体系，下设各区酋长和村长。传教士在教育中影响巨大。
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on the tribal and clan structures of the Basotho (Sotho) people. Paramount Chief Seeiso led a traditional hierarchy with ward chiefs and headmen beneath. Missionaries had enormous influence in education.

rulingClass.zh: 最高酋长与王族、英国驻扎专员与殖民官员、传教士和受教育精英。
rulingClass.en: The Paramount Chief and royalty, the British Resident Commissioner and colonial officials, missionaries, and educated elites.

succession.zh: 最高酋长在莫舒舒王室内世袭继承；殖民行政权由英国任命驻扎专员掌握。
succession.en: The Paramount Chieftainship was hereditary within the Moshoeshoe royal house; colonial administrative power was held by a British-appointed Resident Commissioner.

structure.zh: 巴苏陀兰由英国高级专员（兼管贝专纳兰和斯威士兰）负责，日常行政由驻马塞卢的驻扎专员执行。最高酋长主持全国议会（pitso），在内部事务中保持相当权力。1939年设有巴苏陀兰全国委员会作为咨询机构。
structure.en: Basutoland was under the British High Commissioner (also responsible for Bechuanaland and Swaziland), with daily administration by the Resident Commissioner in Maseru. The Paramount Chief presided over the national assembly (pitso), retaining considerable power in internal affairs. A Basutoland National Council existed as a consultative body by 1939.

function.zh: 处理中央行政、预算和与高级专员署的联络。
function.en: Handled central administration, budgets, and liaison with the High Commissioner's Office.

function.zh: 管理各区事务、协调酋长行政和税收。
function.en: Managed district affairs, coordinated chieftaincy administration, and tax collection.

function.zh: 监管传教士学校系统和有限的公共卫生服务。
function.en: Oversaw the missionary school system and limited public health services.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由酋长按传统等级管理，全国议会为重要决策提供协商平台。英国地区官员起监督作用。
localAdmin.en: Local areas were governed by chiefs according to traditional hierarchy, with the national assembly providing a consultative platform for major decisions. British district officers served a supervisory role.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合英国保护国条例和巴苏陀习惯法。酋长法庭处理多数本地案件。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined British protectorate ordinances and Basotho customary law. Chiefs' courts handled most local cases.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以茅屋税和牲畜税为主。大量男性需赴南非矿场务工以缴纳税款和维持家庭生计。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from hut taxes and livestock levies. Large numbers of men had to work in South African mines to pay taxes and support their families.

religion.zh: 基督教为主（天主教和新教并重），巴苏陀传统信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity predominated (both Catholic and Protestant), with Basotho traditional beliefs also present

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴苏陀兰的识字率在非洲最高之列（得益于传教士教育），索托语文学传统、巴苏陀帽和毛毯等文化符号。
culturalAchievements.en: Basutoland had one of the highest literacy rates in Africa (due to missionary education), along with Sesotho literary traditions and cultural symbols such as the Basotho hat and blanket.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属印欧语系日耳曼语族；索托语属尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic family; Sesotho belongs to the Niger-Congo Bantu branch.

philosophy.zh: 基督教（天主教和新教）传教士教育深刻影响社会，与巴苏陀传统社会伦理和祖先崇拜并存。
philosophy.en: Christian (Catholic and Protestant) missionary education deeply influenced society, coexisting with Basotho traditional social ethics and ancestor veneration.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用英语拉丁字母；索托语由传教士以拉丁字母书写，识字率相对较高。
writingSystem.en: English in Latin script was official; Sesotho was written in Latin script by missionaries, with relatively high literacy rates.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以自给农业和畜牧业为基础，严重依赖向南非输出劳动力。矿工汇款是家庭收入的重要来源。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on subsistence agriculture and pastoralism, heavily dependent on labor export to South Africa. Miners' remittances were a major source of household income.

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业、畜牧业、劳动力输出（南非金矿和钻石矿）
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, pastoralism, and labor export (South African gold and diamond mines)

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、安哥拉羊毛、牲畜、谷物、劳动力（汇款），进口制造品和食品
tradeGoods.en: Wool, mohair, livestock, grain, labor (remittances), and imported manufactures and foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富以牲畜（尤其是牛和安哥拉山羊）、土地使用权和矿工汇款为主。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was held mainly in livestock (especially cattle and Angora goats), land use rights, and miners' remittances.

economicSystem.zh: 以劳动力输出和自给农业为核心的依附性经济，深度整合入南非经济体系。
economicSystem.en: A dependent economy based on labor export and subsistence agriculture, deeply integrated into the South African economic system.

source.zh: 关税分成（南非关税同盟）
source.en: Customs Revenue Share (South African Customs Union)

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政规模极小，教育支出比例相对较高（传教士补贴），但整体公共服务严重不足。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances were very small, with a relatively high proportion spent on education (missionary subsidies), but overall public services were severely insufficient.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持基本行政和教育为优先，公共投资极其有限。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized maintaining basic administration and education, with extremely limited public investment.

description.zh: 负责全境治安和秩序维持的小型警察部队。
description.en: A small police force responsible for territory-wide security and order.

description.zh: 酋长直属的传统随从力量。
description.en: Traditional retainer forces directly under the chiefs.

commanderInChief.zh: 巴苏陀兰驻扎专员兼英国高级专员署
commanderInChief.en: Resident Commissioner of Basutoland under the High Commissioner's Office

technology.zh: 装备极为简陋，以步枪和基本通信设备为主。巴苏陀骑马传统在山地环境中具有优势。
technology.en: Equipment was extremely basic, mainly rifles and basic communications. The Basotho horse-riding tradition was advantageous in mountainous terrain.

threats.zh: 主要安全关切为南非联邦对保护国的吞并企图和土地退化造成的经济困难。
threats.en: Main security concerns were the Union of South Africa's annexation attempts and economic hardship caused by land degradation.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 人口几乎全部为巴苏陀族（索托族），居住在山地高原上。大量青壮年男性（约四分之一劳动力）在南非矿场务工。
populationDescription.en: The population was almost entirely Basotho (Sotho), living on a mountainous plateau. A large proportion of young men (about a quarter of the labor force) worked in South African mines.

socialClasses.zh: 最高酋长与王族、各级酋长、英国殖民官员、传教士与教师、矿工、农民和牧民。
socialClasses.en: Paramount Chief and royalty, chiefs at various levels, British colonial officials, missionaries and teachers, mine workers, farmers, and pastoralists.

allies.zh: 英国帝国。
allies.en: The British Empire.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但南非联邦的吞并企图是最大政治威胁。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but the Union of South Africa's annexation ambitions were the greatest political threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦和高级专员署主导，核心关切是维持保护国地位、抵制南非吞并。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was directed by London and the High Commissioner's Office; the core concern was maintaining protectorate status and resisting South African annexation.

era.zh: 前工业山地农牧与劳动力输出时代
era.en: Pre-industrial mountain agro-pastoral and labor export era

keyInnovations.zh: 传教士学校体系、有限公路、马匹运输和深水井。
keyInnovations.en: Missionary school system, limited roads, horse transport, and deep wells.

strengths.zh: 较高的识字率、统一的民族认同、山地地形提供天然防御、英国保护阻挡南非吞并。
strengths.en: Relatively high literacy rate, unified national identity, mountainous terrain providing natural defense, and British protection blocking South African annexation.

weaknesses.zh: 经济极度贫困且依赖南非、土壤侵蚀严重、劳动力大量外流、基础设施几乎不存在。
weaknesses.en: Extreme economic poverty and dependence on South Africa, severe soil erosion, massive labor outflow, and almost nonexistent infrastructure.

outlook.zh: 战争期间巴苏陀人将参与英军服役。保护国地位将在战后为独立奠定基础。
outlook.en: During the war Basotho would serve in the British military. Protectorate status would lay the foundation for post-war independence.

description.zh: 1939年的巴苏陀兰是英国高级专员保护国，由最高酋长西索领导，经济依赖向南非矿场输出劳动力，教育水平在非洲领先。
description.en: In 1939, Basutoland was a British High Commission protectorate led by Paramount Chief Seeiso, economically dependent on labor export to South African mines, with leading education levels in Africa.

dynasty.zh: 德拉米尼王朝（英国保护统治下）

governmentForm.zh: 英国高级专员管辖下的保护国，国王索布扎二世保留传统权威，英国驻扎专员行使殖民行政权。
governmentForm.en: A protectorate under the British High Commissioner, with King Sobhuza II retaining traditional authority and the British Resident Commissioner exercising colonial administrative power.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以斯威士国王为核心的传统等级体系为基础。王母（恩德洛武卡齐）与国王共治。欧洲定居者占有近三分之二的土地。
socialStructure.en: Society was based on a traditional hierarchical system centered on the Swazi King. The Queen Mother (Ndlovukazi) co-ruled with the King. European settlers held nearly two-thirds of the land.

rulingClass.zh: 国王索布扎二世与王室贵族、英国驻扎专员与殖民官员、欧洲定居者和农场主。
rulingClass.en: King Sobhuza II and royal nobility, the British Resident Commissioner and colonial officials, and European settlers and farmers.

succession.zh: 国王在德拉米尼王室内按传统规则继承，须经王室议会认可；殖民行政权由英国任命驻扎专员掌握。
succession.en: The King succeeded within the Dlamini royal house according to traditional rules approved by the royal council; colonial administrative power was held by a British-appointed Resident Commissioner.

structure.zh: 斯威士兰由英国高级专员（兼管贝专纳兰和巴苏陀兰）负责，日常行政由驻姆巴巴纳的驻扎专员执行。国王索布扎二世主持全国议会（利班德拉）和利科科（传统顾问会议）。土地问题是最大的政治争端。
structure.en: Swaziland was under the British High Commissioner (also responsible for Bechuanaland and Basutoland), with daily administration by the Resident Commissioner in Mbabane. King Sobhuza II presided over the Libandla (national assembly) and Liqoqo (traditional advisory council). Land was the greatest political issue.

function.zh: 处理中央行政、预算和对高级专员署的联络。
function.en: Handled central administration, budgets, and liaison with the High Commissioner's Office.

function.zh: 管理各区事务、协调酋长和欧洲定居者事务。
function.en: Managed district affairs, coordinating chieftaincy and European settler matters.

function.zh: 管理复杂的土地分配（斯威士人区与欧洲定居者区）和锡石开采许可。
function.en: Managed complex land allocation (Swazi areas vs. European settler areas) and tin mining permits.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由酋长按传统治理，欧洲定居者区由殖民当局直接管理。国王通过全国议会和传统顾问会议参与重大决策。
localAdmin.en: Local areas were governed by chiefs according to tradition, while European settler areas were directly managed by colonial authorities. The King participated in major decisions through the national assembly and traditional advisory council.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合英国保护国条例、斯威士习惯法和罗马-荷兰法（受南非影响）。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined British protectorate ordinances, Swazi customary law, and Roman-Dutch law (influenced by South Africa).

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以茅屋税和牲畜税为主。矿业特许权使用费提供少量额外收入。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from hut taxes and livestock levies. Mining royalties provided small additional income.

religion.zh: 基督教和斯威士传统信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity and Swazi traditional beliefs coexisted

culturalAchievements.zh: 因赫瓦拉芦苇节和恩赫拉仪式等传统文化保存完好；国王制度和王室礼仪是民族团结的象征。
culturalAchievements.en: Traditional culture was well-preserved through ceremonies like the Incwala and Umhlanga Reed Dance; the monarchy and royal rituals symbolized national unity.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属印欧语系日耳曼语族；斯威士语属尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic family; siSwati belongs to the Niger-Congo Bantu branch.

philosophy.zh: 斯威士传统君主制度和宗教仪式与基督教传教士教育并行。索布扎二世注重在殖民框架下维护传统制度。
philosophy.en: Swazi traditional monarchy and religious ceremonies operated alongside Christian missionary education. Sobhuza II focused on preserving traditional institutions within the colonial framework.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用英语拉丁字母；传教士以拉丁字母书写斯威士语。
writingSystem.en: English in Latin script was official; missionaries wrote siSwati in Latin script.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以自给农业和畜牧业为基础，欧洲定居者经营大型农场和牧场。锡石开采和劳动力输出（南非矿场）是重要经济活动。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on subsistence agriculture and pastoralism, with European settlers operating large farms and ranches. Tin mining and labor export (South African mines) were important economic activities.

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业、欧洲定居者商业农业、锡矿开采、劳动力输出
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, European settler commercial farming, tin mining, and labor export

tradeGoods.zh: 锡矿石、牲畜、棉花、烟草、劳动力（汇款），进口制造品和食品
tradeGoods.en: Tin ore, livestock, cotton, tobacco, labor (remittances), and imported manufactures and foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 欧洲定居者拥有大量土地和农场资产；斯威士人家庭财富主要体现在牲畜、土地使用权和矿工汇款。
householdWealth.en: European settlers held large land and farm assets; Swazi household wealth was mainly in livestock, land use rights, and miners' remittances.

economicSystem.zh: 双轨经济：欧洲定居者的商业农业与斯威士人的自给农业和劳动力输出并存。
economicSystem.en: A dual economy: European settler commercial agriculture coexisted with Swazi subsistence farming and labor export.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政规模极小，土地问题是最大的政治和经济挑战。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances were extremely small, with the land question being the greatest political and economic challenge.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持最低行政运作为目标，国王致力于从欧洲定居者手中收回土地。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed at maintaining minimum administrative operations; the King was committed to recovering land from European settlers.

description.zh: 负责全境治安和秩序维持的小型警察部队。
description.en: A small police force responsible for territory-wide security and order.

description.zh: 国王直属的传统侍卫力量。
description.en: Traditional guard forces directly under the King.

commanderInChief.zh: 斯威士兰驻扎专员兼英国高级专员署
commanderInChief.en: Resident Commissioner of Swaziland under the High Commissioner's Office

technology.zh: 装备极为简陋，以步枪和基本通信设备为主。
technology.en: Equipment was extremely basic, mainly rifles and basic communications.

threats.zh: 主要安全关切为南非联邦的吞并企图和欧洲定居者土地争端。
threats.en: Main security concerns were the Union of South Africa's annexation attempts and European settler land disputes.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

populationDescription.zh: 人口以斯威士人为主体，另有少量欧洲定居者（约3000人）。欧洲定居者控制近三分之二的土地。大量男性在南非矿场务工。
populationDescription.en: The population was predominantly Swazi, with a small number of European settlers (about 3,000). European settlers controlled nearly two-thirds of the land. Many men worked in South African mines.

socialClasses.zh: 国王与王室贵族、英国殖民官员、欧洲定居者与农场主、传教士与教师、斯威士农民和矿工。
socialClasses.en: King and royal nobility, British colonial officials, European settlers and farmers, missionaries and teachers, Swazi farmers, and mine workers.

allies.zh: 英国帝国。
allies.en: The British Empire.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但南非联邦的吞并企图是最大政治威胁。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but the Union of South Africa's annexation ambitions were the greatest political threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦和高级专员署主导，核心关切是维持保护国地位、抵制南非吞并和解决土地问题。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was directed by London and the High Commissioner's Office; core concerns were maintaining protectorate status, resisting South African annexation, and resolving land issues.

era.zh: 前工业农牧与小规模采矿时代
era.en: Pre-industrial agro-pastoral and small-scale mining era

keyInnovations.zh: 有限公路、锡矿开采设备、传教士学校和少量欧洲定居者引进的农业技术。
keyInnovations.en: Limited roads, tin mining equipment, missionary schools, and agricultural techniques introduced by European settlers.

strengths.zh: 统一的王室制度提供民族凝聚力、传统文化保存完好、锡矿资源。
strengths.en: The unified monarchy provided national cohesion, well-preserved traditional culture, and tin mining resources.

weaknesses.zh: 欧洲定居者控制大部分土地、经济极度贫困且依赖南非、基础设施几乎不存在。
weaknesses.en: European settlers controlled most of the land, extreme economic poverty and dependence on South Africa, and almost nonexistent infrastructure.

outlook.zh: 索布扎二世将继续通过法律和政治手段争取收回土地，保护国地位将为战后最终独立创造条件。
outlook.en: Sobhuza II would continue to pursue land recovery through legal and political means; protectorate status would create conditions for eventual post-war independence.

description.zh: 1939年的斯威士兰是英国高级专员保护国，由国王索布扎二世领导。土地大部分被欧洲定居者控制，经济依赖自给农业和向南非输出劳动力。
description.en: In 1939, Swaziland was a British High Commission protectorate led by King Sobhuza II. Most land was controlled by European settlers, with the economy dependent on subsistence agriculture and labor export to South Africa.

name.zh: 南非联邦托管的西南非洲
name.en: South West Africa under South African Mandate

governmentForm.zh: 国际联盟C级托管地，由南非联邦代管。南非将其视为事实上的第五省，推行种族隔离政策。
governmentForm.en: A League of Nations Class C mandate administered by the Union of South Africa. South Africa treated it as a de facto fifth province, implementing racial segregation policies.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由白人定居者（约3万，主要为德裔和南非裔）、原住民族群（奥万博、赫雷罗、纳马等约28万人）和混血群体构成。种族隔离制度严格实施。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of white settlers (about 30,000, mainly of German and South African origin), indigenous groups (Ovambo, Herero, Nama, etc., about 280,000), and mixed-race communities. Racial segregation was strictly enforced.

rulingClass.zh: 南非任命的行政长官与殖民官僚、白人定居者精英（德裔农场主和南非商人）。
rulingClass.en: The South African-appointed Administrator and colonial bureaucracy, and white settler elites (German-origin farmers and South African businessmen).

succession.zh: 行政长官由南非联邦政府任命。白人定居者设有立法议会（仅限白人投票）。
succession.en: The Administrator was appointed by the Union of South Africa government. White settlers had a legislative assembly (whites-only franchise).

structure.zh: 西南非洲由南非任命的行政长官管理，白人定居者通过立法议会参与殖民政治。原住民被限制在保留地内。南非以C级托管地名义行使近乎主权的控制。
structure.en: South West Africa was managed by a South African-appointed Administrator, with white settlers participating in colonial politics through a legislative assembly. Indigenous peoples were confined to reserves. South Africa exercised near-sovereign control under the Class C mandate.

function.zh: 统筹行政事务、预算和与南非政府的联络。
function.en: Coordinated administrative affairs, budgets, and liaison with the South African government.

function.zh: 管理原住民保留地、劳动力征募和种族隔离政策执行。
function.en: Managed native reserves, labor recruitment, and enforcement of racial segregation policies.

function.zh: 维持治安、执行通行证法和种族隔离法规。
function.en: Maintained order, enforced pass laws and racial segregation regulations.

function.zh: 管理钻石开采特许权、畜牧业和定居者农场。
function.en: Managed diamond mining concessions, pastoralism, and settler farms.

localAdmin.zh: 白人定居区设有地方委员会和市政机构；原住民保留地由南非任命的'原住民专员'管理。赫雷罗和纳马人在1904-08年种族灭绝后人口锐减。
localAdmin.en: White settler areas had local boards and municipal bodies; native reserves were managed by South African-appointed 'native commissioners.' The Herero and Nama populations had drastically declined since the 1904-08 genocide.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以南非罗马-荷兰法为基础，推行种族隔离法规。原住民受通行证法和劳动法限制。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on South African Roman-Dutch law with racial segregation legislation. Indigenous peoples were subject to pass laws and labor regulations.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以钻石开采税、关税和人头税为主。白人定居者缴纳土地税和所得税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from diamond mining taxes, customs, and poll taxes. White settlers paid land and income taxes.

religion.zh: 基督教为主（路德宗、荷兰归正会和天主教），原住民传统信仰并存
religion.en: Christianity predominated (Lutheran, Dutch Reformed, and Catholic), with indigenous traditional beliefs also present

culturalAchievements.zh: 德国殖民建筑遗产（温得和克等城市）、赫雷罗和纳马口头历史传统、奥万博传统文化。
culturalAchievements.en: German colonial architectural heritage (in cities like Windhoek), Herero and Nama oral history traditions, and Ovambo traditional culture.

languageFamily.zh: 英语和南非荷兰语属印欧语系日耳曼语族；德语属日耳曼语族；奥万博语属班图语支；纳马语属科伊桑语系。
languageFamily.en: English and Afrikaans belong to the Indo-European Germanic family; German to the Germanic family; Oshiwambo to the Bantu branch; and Nama to the Khoisan family.

philosophy.zh: 南非种族隔离意识形态主导政治思想，德裔定居者保持德国文化传统，原住民保持传统信仰和社会习俗。
philosophy.en: South African apartheid ideology dominated political thought, German settlers maintained German cultural traditions, and indigenous peoples preserved traditional beliefs and social customs.

writingSystem.zh: 官方使用英语和南非荷兰语拉丁字母；德语广泛使用；传教士以拉丁字母书写原住民语言。
writingSystem.en: English and Afrikaans in Latin script were official; German was widely used; missionaries wrote indigenous languages in Latin script.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以钻石开采（CDM公司垄断）和白人定居者畜牧业为支柱。原住民被限制在保留地内，主要从事自给农业或为白人农场和矿场提供劳动力。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on diamond mining (CDM monopoly) and white settler ranching. Indigenous people were confined to reserves, mainly engaged in subsistence farming or providing labor for white farms and mines.

mainIndustries.zh: 钻石开采、卡拉库尔羊养殖（波斯羔皮）、白人定居者畜牧业、渔业
mainIndustries.en: Diamond mining, Karakul sheep farming (Persian lamb pelts), white settler ranching, and fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 钻石、卡拉库尔羊皮、牲畜、鱼产品、进口制造品和食品
tradeGoods.en: Diamonds, Karakul pelts, livestock, fish products, and imported manufactures and foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 白人定居者拥有大量农场和牧场；原住民在保留地内仅有少量牲畜和土地使用权。财富极度不平等。
householdWealth.en: White settlers owned large farms and ranches; indigenous people had only small livestock holdings and land use rights in reserves. Wealth was extremely unequal.

economicSystem.zh: 以钻石开采和白人定居者农牧业为核心的种族隔离经济，原住民被迫充当廉价劳动力。
economicSystem.en: A segregated economy centered on diamond mining and white settler ranching, with indigenous people forced into cheap labor.

source.zh: 钻石开采税与矿业特许权
source.en: Diamond Mining Taxes and Mining Royalties

category.zh: 教育与卫生（主要服务白人）

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政依赖钻石开采收入，盈余主要用于白人定居者基础设施。原住民公共服务严重不足。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances depended on diamond mining revenue, with surpluses mainly used for white settler infrastructure. Public services for indigenous people were severely insufficient.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以服务白人定居者社区和维持种族隔离制度为优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized serving the white settler community and maintaining the racial segregation system.

description.zh: 南非联邦在西南非洲的驻军和警察力量，负责维持秩序和边境安全。
description.en: Union of South Africa garrison and police forces in South West Africa, responsible for maintaining order and border security.

description.zh: 白人定居者组成的志愿民兵，可在紧急时动员。
description.en: Volunteer militia composed of white settlers, mobilizable in emergencies.

commanderInChief.zh: 南非联邦国防部下辖的西南非洲军事当局
commanderInChief.en: South West Africa military authority under the Union of South Africa Department of Defence

technology.zh: 装备以步枪、轻机枪和卡车运输为主。安全主要依赖南非军事体系。
technology.en: Equipment included mainly rifles, light machine guns, and truck transport. Security primarily relied on the South African military system.

threats.zh: 主要安全关切为原住民反抗运动和边境安全。德裔定居者中的纳粹同情者也引起南非当局关注。
threats.en: Main security concerns were indigenous resistance movements and border security. Nazi sympathizers among German settlers also attracted South African authorities' attention.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 人口以奥万博人（北部）为最大族群，其次为赫雷罗人、纳马人和达马拉人。白人定居者约3万人（德裔和南非裔）。赫雷罗人在1904-08年种族灭绝中损失惨重。
populationDescription.en: The population was led by the Ovambo (in the north) as the largest group, followed by Herero, Nama, and Damara. White settlers numbered about 30,000 (German and South African origin). The Herero had suffered devastating losses in the 1904-08 genocide.

socialClasses.zh: 白人定居者（德裔农场主和南非商人）、南非殖民官员、混血群体、原住民保留地居民（奥万博、赫雷罗、纳马等）和矿业劳工。
socialClasses.en: White settlers (German-origin farmers and South African businessmen), South African colonial officials, mixed-race communities, native reserve inhabitants (Ovambo, Herero, Nama, etc.), and mining laborers.

allies.zh: 南非联邦、英国帝国。
allies.en: The Union of South Africa and the British Empire.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但德裔定居者中的纳粹同情者构成内部安全关切。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but Nazi sympathizers among German settlers constituted an internal security concern.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由比勒陀利亚（南非）主导。南非事实上将西南非洲视为自身领土，拒绝接受国联监督的实质约束。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was directed from Pretoria (South Africa). South Africa effectively treated South West Africa as its own territory, refusing to accept substantive League of Nations oversight.

era.zh: 殖民矿业与定居者农牧时代
era.en: Colonial mining and settler ranching era

keyInnovations.zh: 钻石开采工业化设备、铁路（温得和克至沿海港口）、定居者农场灌溉和德国殖民时期建筑遗产。
keyInnovations.en: Industrialized diamond mining equipment, railways (Windhoek to coastal ports), settler farm irrigation, and German colonial-era architectural heritage.

strengths.zh: 丰富的钻石资源、广阔的牧场、铁路连接沿海港口。
strengths.en: Rich diamond resources, vast rangelands, and railway connections to coastal ports.

weaknesses.zh: 种族隔离制度造成深刻社会裂痕、原住民在种族灭绝后人口锐减、水资源匮乏、经济高度依赖钻石开采。
weaknesses.en: Racial segregation created deep social divisions, indigenous populations drastically reduced by genocide, water scarcity, and heavy economic dependence on diamond mining.

outlook.zh: 战争期间南非将加强对西南非洲的控制并拘留德裔纳粹同情者。战后南非将拒绝归还托管地，引发长达数十年的国际争端。
outlook.en: During the war South Africa would tighten control over South West Africa and intern German Nazi sympathizers. After the war, South Africa would refuse to return the mandate, triggering decades of international dispute.

description.zh: 1939年的西南非洲是国联南非托管地，事实上被南非视为第五省，推行种族隔离政策，经济以钻石开采和白人定居者畜牧业为支柱。
description.en: In 1939, South West Africa was a League of Nations mandate under South Africa, effectively treated as a fifth province, with racial segregation policies and an economy based on diamond mining and white settler ranching.

governmentForm.zh: 英国直辖殖民地
governmentForm.en: British Crown Colony

socialStructure.zh: 三大族群社会：斐济土著（受酋长制度保护）、印度裔甘蔗工人后代、欧裔和华裔少数群体
socialStructure.en: Three-community society: indigenous Fijians (protected by chiefly system), Indo-Fijian descendants of sugar-cane workers, and European and Chinese minorities

rulingClass.zh: 英国殖民官员、斐济大酋长、欧洲种植园主和商人
rulingClass.en: British colonial officials, Fijian high chiefs, European planters and merchants

succession.zh: 总督由伦敦殖民部任命
succession.en: Governor appointed by the Colonial Office in London

structure.zh: 总督领导的殖民行政机构，下设行政和立法委员会，斐济酋长大议会在土著事务上有发言权
structure.en: Colonial administration headed by the Governor with Executive and Legislative Councils; the Great Council of Chiefs had a voice in indigenous affairs

function.zh: 殖民地最高行政机关
function.en: Supreme executive authority of the colony

function.zh: 管理斐济土著社区和土地事务
function.en: Administered indigenous Fijian communities and land affairs

localAdmin.zh: 斐济土著社区由省长和酋长管辖；印度裔社区由殖民行政系统管理
localAdmin.en: Indigenous Fijian communities governed by provincial commissioners and chiefs; Indo-Fijian communities administered by the colonial administrative system

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法与斐济习惯法并行
legalSystem.en: English common law alongside Fijian customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、出口税（主要是蔗糖）、土著人头税
taxationSystem.en: Customs duties, export taxes (mainly on sugar), native poll tax

religion.zh: 斐济土著以卫斯理宗基督教为主；印度裔以印度教和伊斯兰教为主
religion.en: Indigenous Fijians predominantly Methodist Christian; Indo-Fijians mainly Hindu and Muslim

culturalAchievements.zh: 毛利毛利独木舟文化和树皮布传统得以保存，殖民制度保护了酋长体系和土地所有制
culturalAchievements.en: Meke dance and bark-cloth traditions preserved; colonial system protected the chiefly structure and land tenure

languageFamily.zh: 斐济语（南岛语系）、斐济印地语和英语
languageFamily.en: Fijian (Austronesian), Fiji Hindi, and English

philosophy.zh: 斐济传统的社群主义和酋长权威与印度裔的家庭和宗教价值并存
philosophy.en: Fijian traditional communalism and chiefly authority coexisted with Indo-Fijian family and religious values

writingSystem.zh: 英文和拉丁字母书写的斐济语
writingSystem.en: English and Latin-script Fijian

gdpDescription.zh: 以蔗糖出口为经济支柱的殖民地经济，椰干为第二大出口品。印度裔承租人生产大部分蔗糖，殖民糖业公司（CSR）控制加工和出口。
gdpDescription.en: A colonial economy with sugar exports as the backbone; copra as the second major export. Indo-Fijian tenant farmers produced most sugar, while the Colonial Sugar Refining Company (CSR) controlled processing and exports.

mainIndustries.zh: 蔗糖种植和加工、椰干生产、小规模黄金开采、渔业
mainIndustries.en: Sugar cultivation and processing, copra production, small-scale gold mining, fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 出口蔗糖、椰干和少量黄金；进口制造品、机械、纺织品和食品
tradeGoods.en: Exported sugar, copra, and small quantities of gold; imported manufactured goods, machinery, textiles, and foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 斐济土著以土地公有制和自给农业维持生计；印度裔承租农收入较低但有储蓄传统
householdWealth.en: Indigenous Fijians sustained livelihoods through communal land tenure and subsistence farming; Indo-Fijian tenant farmers had low income but savings traditions

unit.en: 1939 international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民种植园经济，CSR公司垄断蔗糖加工出口
economicSystem.en: Colonial plantation economy, with CSR Company monopolizing sugar processing and exports

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政基本自给，蔗糖出口税是主要收入来源。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were largely self-sustaining, with sugar export taxes as the main revenue source.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守的殖民地财政政策，维持收支平衡。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative colonial fiscal policy, maintaining budget balance.

description.zh: 小型殖民地防卫部队，以斐济土著士兵为主。
description.en: Small colonial defence force, mainly comprising indigenous Fijian soldiers.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督哈利·卢克爵士
commanderInChief.en: Governor Sir Harry Luke

technology.zh: 装备步枪和轻武器，依赖英国驻军和皇家海军提供安全保障。
technology.en: Equipped with rifles and light weapons, relying on British garrison and the Royal Navy for security.

threats.zh: 日本帝国在太平洋的扩张是主要安全忧虑。
threats.en: Imperial Japanese expansion in the Pacific was the main security concern.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

populationDescription.zh: 人口约21万，其中斐济土著约10万、印度裔约9万、欧裔和其他约2万。印度裔人口增长迅速。
populationDescription.en: Population about 210,000, with approximately 100,000 indigenous Fijians, 90,000 Indo-Fijians, and 20,000 Europeans and others. The Indo-Fijian population was growing rapidly.

socialClasses.zh: 英国殖民官员和商人、斐济酋长和土地所有者、印度裔蔗农和商人、华裔商人
socialClasses.en: British colonial officials and merchants, Fijian chiefs and landowners, Indo-Fijian sugar farmers and merchants, Chinese traders

allies.zh: 大英帝国为宗主国。
allies.en: The British Empire as metropolitan power.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但日本的太平洋扩张构成潜在威胁。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but Japanese Pacific expansion posed a potential threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦主导。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy directed by London.

era.zh: 殖民种植园经济时代

keyInnovations.zh: 蔗糖加工厂设备、小型港口设施、无线电通信。
keyInnovations.en: Sugar mill equipment, small port facilities, radio communications.

strengths.zh: 稳定的蔗糖出口收入、丰富的农业资源、酋长制度维持社会稳定。
strengths.en: Stable sugar export revenue, rich agricultural resources, chiefly system maintaining social stability.

weaknesses.zh: 经济单一依赖蔗糖、族群分裂加深、印度裔政治权利有限、基础设施薄弱。
weaknesses.en: Single-commodity economic dependence on sugar, deepening ethnic divisions, limited Indo-Fijian political rights, weak infrastructure.

outlook.zh: 二战期间斐济将成为盟军太平洋战场的重要后方基地，斐济士兵将在所罗门群岛作战。战争将促进基础设施建设但也加剧族群矛盾。
outlook.en: During WWII Fiji would become an important Allied rear base in the Pacific; Fijian soldiers would fight in the Solomon Islands. The war would promote infrastructure development but also exacerbate ethnic tensions.

description.zh: 1939年的斐济是英国直辖殖民地，以蔗糖出口为经济支柱，斐济土著和印度裔构成两大主要族群，殖民政府通过酋长制度维持土著社区治理。
description.en: In 1939 Fiji was a British Crown Colony with sugar exports as its economic backbone, indigenous Fijians and Indo-Fijians forming two major ethnic communities, and the colonial government maintaining indigenous community governance through the chiefly system.

name.zh: 巴布亚和新几内亚领地
name.en: Territory of Papua and New Guinea

name.zh: 澳属巴布亚和新几内亚

ruler.zh: 巴布亚副总督休伯特·默里爵士
ruler.en: Lieutenant-Governor of Papua Sir Hubert Murray

dynasty.zh: 温莎王朝（通过澳大利亚联邦）
dynasty.en: House of Windsor (via the Commonwealth of Australia)

governmentForm.zh: 澳大利亚管辖的两个领地（巴布亚领地和新几内亚托管地）
governmentForm.en: Two territories administered by Australia (Territory of Papua and Mandated Territory of New Guinea)

socialStructure.zh: 极度多元的部落社会，超过700个语言群体；少数澳大利亚和欧洲殖民者控制行政和种植园
socialStructure.en: Extremely diverse tribal societies with over 700 language groups; a small number of Australian and European colonists controlled administration and plantations

rulingClass.zh: 澳大利亚殖民行政官员、种植园主和传教士
rulingClass.en: Australian colonial administrators, plantation owners, and missionaries

succession.zh: 行政长官由堪培拉联邦政府任命
succession.en: Administrator appointed by the federal government in Canberra

structure.zh: 巴布亚领地和新几内亚托管地分开管辖，各有行政长官，归澳大利亚联邦外交部管理
structure.en: Territory of Papua and Mandated Territory of New Guinea administered separately, each with its own administrator, under the Australian federal Department of External Affairs

function.zh: 领地最高行政机关
function.en: Supreme executive authority of the territory

function.zh: 深入内陆部落地区进行行政管理和治安维护
function.en: Penetrated inland tribal areas for administration and law enforcement

localAdmin.zh: 沿海地区由区域行政官管辖；内陆大部分地区尚未纳入有效行政控制
localAdmin.en: Coastal areas governed by district officers; most of the interior not yet under effective administrative control

legalSystem.zh: 澳大利亚法律与本土习惯法并行，对原住民适用特别法规
legalSystem.en: Australian law alongside indigenous customary law, with special regulations applied to native peoples

taxationSystem.zh: 人头税（原住民劳役替代）、种植园出口税、进口关税
taxationSystem.en: Head tax (native labor as substitute), plantation export taxes, import customs duties

religion.zh: 传统万物有灵信仰和祖先崇拜为主，沿海地区基督教传教有所进展（天主教和路德宗）
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs and ancestor worship predominant; some Christian missionary progress in coastal areas (Catholic and Lutheran)

culturalAchievements.zh: 极其丰富的部落艺术传统（赛皮克河木雕、阿斯马特部落艺术）、超过700种语言的多样性
culturalAchievements.en: Extremely rich tribal art traditions (Sepik River wood carving, Asmat tribal art), diversity of over 700 languages

languageFamily.zh: 超过700种语言，涵盖南岛语系和巴布亚诸语系；洋泾浜英语（托克皮辛）作为通用语
languageFamily.en: Over 700 languages spanning Austronesian and Papuan language families; Tok Pisin pidgin emerging as a lingua franca

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵世界观、祖先崇拜和复杂的交换仪式（如库拉环）是核心文化特征
philosophy.en: Animist worldview, ancestor worship, and complex exchange ceremonies (such as the Kula ring) were core cultural features

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字系统，传教士开始用拉丁字母记录部分语言
writingSystem.en: No indigenous writing systems; missionaries began recording some languages in Latin script

gdpDescription.zh: 以殖民种植园经济和原住民自给农业为主。椰干和黄金是主要出口品。内陆部落仍处于前货币经济状态。
gdpDescription.en: Dominated by colonial plantation economy and indigenous subsistence agriculture. Copra and gold were the main exports. Inland tribes still in a pre-monetary economic state.

mainIndustries.zh: 椰干种植园、金矿开采、原住民自给农业（芋头、山药、甘薯）
mainIndustries.en: Copra plantations, gold mining, indigenous subsistence agriculture (taro, yam, sweet potato)

tradeGoods.zh: 出口椰干、黄金和少量木材；进口制造品、食品和燃料
tradeGoods.en: Exported copra, gold, and small quantities of timber; imported manufactured goods, food, and fuel

householdWealth.zh: 原住民以贝壳货币、猪只和食用植物园为主要财富；殖民者控制种植园和矿场
householdWealth.en: Indigenous peoples measured wealth in shell currency, pigs, and food gardens; colonists controlled plantations and mines

unit.en: 1939 international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民种植园经济和原住民自给自足经济并存
economicSystem.en: Colonial plantation economy coexisting with indigenous subsistence economy

treasuryDescription.zh: 领地财政依赖澳大利亚联邦补贴和出口税收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Territory finances depended on Australian federal subsidies and export tax revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守的殖民地财政政策，以维持最低限度的行政运作为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative colonial fiscal policy aimed at maintaining minimal administrative operations.

name.zh: 皇家巴布亚和新几内亚警察部队
name.en: Royal Papuan and New Guinean Constabulary

description.zh: 以原住民士兵为主体、澳大利亚军官领导的准军事警察部队。
description.en: A paramilitary police force with indigenous soldiers led by Australian officers.

commanderInChief.zh: 行政长官
commanderInChief.en: Administrator

technology.zh: 装备步枪和轻武器，安全主要依赖澳大利亚军事体系。
technology.en: Equipped with rifles and light weapons; security primarily relied on the Australian military system.

threats.zh: 日本帝国在太平洋的扩张是最大安全威胁；内陆部落冲突和抵抗殖民控制。
threats.en: Imperial Japanese expansion in the Pacific was the greatest security threat; inland tribal conflicts and resistance to colonial control.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 人口约100万，绝大多数为美拉尼西亚和巴布亚原住民，超过700个不同的语言和文化群体。欧洲人和澳大利亚人约5000人。
populationDescription.en: Population about 1 million, the vast majority Melanesian and Papuan indigenous peoples, with over 700 different language and cultural groups. Europeans and Australians numbered about 5,000.

socialClasses.zh: 澳大利亚行政官员和种植园主、传教士、原住民部落首领和村民、种植园劳工
socialClasses.en: Australian administrators and plantation owners, missionaries, indigenous tribal leaders and villagers, plantation laborers

allies.zh: 澳大利亚联邦为管辖国；通过澳大利亚与英联邦联系。
allies.en: Commonwealth of Australia as the administering power; linked to the British Commonwealth through Australia.

enemies.zh: 日本帝国是太平洋地区的潜在威胁。
enemies.en: Imperial Japan as a potential Pacific threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由堪培拉主导，新几内亚托管地名义上受国联托管制度约束。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy directed by Canberra; the New Guinea mandate was nominally subject to League of Nations mandate system.

era.zh: 前工业化殖民地时代

keyInnovations.zh: 沿海地区有限的现代基础设施（小型港口、飞机跑道）；内陆仍处于石器时代技术水平。
keyInnovations.en: Limited modern infrastructure in coastal areas (small ports, airstrips); the interior still at Stone Age technology levels.

strengths.zh: 丰富的自然资源（黄金、椰子、木材）、战略地理位置、极高的文化多样性。
strengths.en: Rich natural resources (gold, coconuts, timber), strategic geographic location, extremely high cultural diversity.

weaknesses.zh: 基础设施极度匮乏、内陆大部分地区未被探索、疟疾等热带疾病严重、行政覆盖极为有限。
weaknesses.en: Extremely poor infrastructure, most of the interior unexplored, severe tropical diseases including malaria, extremely limited administrative coverage.

outlook.zh: 二战将使巴布亚和新几内亚成为太平洋战争最惨烈的战场之一，科科达小径和俾斯麦海战役将成为关键转折点。战争将彻底改变该地区的命运。
outlook.en: WWII would turn Papua and New Guinea into one of the bloodiest Pacific War theaters; the Kokoda Track and Battle of the Bismarck Sea would become crucial turning points. The war would fundamentally alter the region's destiny.

description.zh: 1939年的巴布亚和新几内亚是澳大利亚管辖下的两个领地，绝大部分人口为前货币经济状态的原住民部落，沿海有殖民种植园和金矿开发，即将卷入太平洋战争的风暴。
description.en: In 1939 Papua and New Guinea were two territories under Australian administration, with the vast majority of the population living in pre-monetary indigenous tribal societies, colonial plantations and gold mines along the coast, and about to be swept into the storm of the Pacific War.

governmentForm.zh: 一党主导的总统制共和国，革命遗产深厚。
governmentForm.en: One-party dominated presidential republic with deep revolutionary legacy.

socialStructure.zh: 后革命社会改革中，土地改革和石油国有化正在推行。
socialStructure.en: Post-revolutionary social reforms underway, land reform and oil nationalization in progress.

rulingClass.zh: 革命党精英和军方
rulingClass.en: Revolutionary party elite and military

succession.zh: 总统由全民选举产生，任期有限。
succession.en: The president was elected by popular vote for a limited term.

structure.zh: 总统制，一党制实质。
structure.en: Presidential system, de facto one-party.

function.zh: 负责税收、预算与公共财政管理。
function.en: Managed taxation, budget, and public finance.

function.zh: 负责国内行政、治安与地方事务。
function.en: Handled domestic administration, policing, and local affairs.

function.zh: 负责军队建设与国防。
function.en: Responsible for armed forces and national defense.

function.zh: 负责外交关系与国际条约。
function.en: Managed foreign relations and international treaties.

localAdmin.zh: 联邦州由州长管理。
localAdmin.en: Federal states managed by governors.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system.

taxationSystem.zh: 石油收入、关税和直接税。
taxationSystem.en: Oil revenue, customs, and direct taxes.

culturalAchievements.zh: 墨西哥壁画运动鼎盛，里维拉、奥罗斯科、西凯罗斯享有国际声誉。
culturalAchievements.en: Mexican muralist movement at peak; Rivera, Orozco, Siqueiros gained international fame.

languageFamily.zh: 西班牙语
languageFamily.en: Spanish

philosophy.zh: 革命民族主义和社会改革。
philosophy.en: Revolutionary nationalism and social reform.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以石油、矿业和农业为基础，1938年刚完成石油国有化。
gdpDescription.en: Based on oil, mining, and agriculture; oil nationalization just completed in 1938.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油、矿业、农业、纺织、食品加工
mainIndustries.en: Oil, mining, agriculture, textiles, food processing

tradeGoods.zh: 石油、银、棉花、咖啡
tradeGoods.en: Oil, silver, cotton, coffee

householdWealth.zh: 土地改革中，财富重新分配中。
householdWealth.en: Wealth being redistributed through land reform.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，国有化和私营并存。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy with nationalization and private sector.

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央银行与国库储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank and treasury reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持财政平衡和偿还外债为核心目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to maintain balance and service external debt.

description.zh: 地面作战主力。
description.en: Main ground combat force.

description.zh: 海上防御与巡逻。
description.en: Maritime defense and patrol.

description.zh: 空中防御与支援。
description.en: Air defense and support.

technology.zh: 二战前标准军事装备。
technology.en: Pre-WWII standard military equipment.

threats.zh: 石油国有化引发的外交紧张。
threats.en: Diplomatic tensions from oil nationalization.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中在中央高原和墨西哥城。
populationDescription.en: Population concentrated on central plateau and Mexico City.

description.zh: 拉丁美洲最大都市
description.en: Latin America's largest metropolitan area

socialClasses.zh: 革命党精英、新兴中产、工人、农民（ejidatarios）、原住民。
socialClasses.en: Revolutionary party elite, emerging middle class, workers, peasants (ejidatarios), indigenous peoples.

allies.zh: 美国（虽有紧张）。
allies.en: United States (though with tensions).

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国。
enemies.en: No direct enemies.

foreignPolicy.zh: 不干涉主义和革命民族主义。
foreignPolicy.en: Non-interventionism and revolutionary nationalism.

era.zh: 工业化初期

keyInnovations.zh: 石油工业、铁路网络、农业改革。
keyInnovations.en: Oil industry, railway network, agricultural reform.

strengths.zh: 石油资源、革命统一、社会改革动力。
strengths.en: Oil resources, revolutionary unity, reform momentum.

weaknesses.zh: 工业基础薄弱，贫困率高。
weaknesses.en: Weak industrial base, high poverty.

outlook.zh: 将在二战中保持中立后参战。
outlook.en: Would remain neutral then join WWII.

description.zh: 1939年的墨西哥是卡德纳斯领导下的革命共和国。
description.en: Mexico in 1939 was a revolutionary republic under Cárdenas.

governmentForm.zh: 名义共和国，军方影响力强大。
governmentForm.en: Nominal republic with powerful military influence.
