description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

populationDescription.zh: 高度城市化，蒙得维的亚集中了大量人口。
populationDescription.en: Highly urbanized, Montevideo concentrated much of the population.

socialClasses.zh: 城市中产、工人、牧场主、公务员。
socialClasses.en: Urban middle class, workers, ranchers, civil servants.

allies.zh: 英国和美国。
allies.en: Britain and US.

enemies.zh: 无。
enemies.en: None.

foreignPolicy.zh: 泛美主义和中立。
foreignPolicy.en: Pan-Americanism and neutrality.

era.zh: 部分工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 肉类冷冻技术和港口设施。
keyInnovations.en: Meat refrigeration technology and port facilities.

strengths.zh: 民主传统、福利体系、高教育水平。
strengths.en: Democratic tradition, welfare system, high education.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少、经济单一。
weaknesses.en: Small population, mono-export economy.

outlook.zh: 拉美的"瑞士"。
outlook.en: The "Switzerland of Latin America".

description.zh: 1939年的乌拉圭是拉美最进步的民主共和国之一。
description.en: Uruguay in 1939 was one of the most progressive democratic republics in Latin America.

name.zh: 马耳他英国皇家殖民地

ruler.zh: 查尔斯·博纳姆-卡特（总督）

governmentForm.zh: 英国皇家殖民地，1936年宪法被暂停后由总督直接统治
governmentForm.en: British Crown Colony, under direct gubernatorial rule after the 1936 constitution was suspended

socialStructure.zh: 社会由英国殖民官员和军人、天主教教士、马耳他商业和专业精英、城市工人和手工业者、农民构成。天主教会在社会生活中拥有巨大影响力。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised British colonial officials and military, Catholic clergy, Maltese commercial and professional elites, urban workers and artisans, and farmers. The Catholic Church wielded enormous influence in social life.

rulingClass.zh: 英国总督及殖民行政官僚
rulingClass.en: British governor and colonial administrative bureaucracy

succession.zh: 总督由英国国王任命
succession.en: The governor was appointed by the British Crown

structure.zh: 1936年宪法被暂停后，马耳他由英国总督直接统治。殖民行政管理岛屿事务，英国皇家海军地中海舰队司令部驻扎于此。
structure.en: After the 1936 constitution was suspended, Malta was under direct gubernatorial rule. Colonial administration managed island affairs, with the Royal Navy Mediterranean Fleet headquartered here.

function.zh: 管理殖民地内政、财政和民政事务
function.en: Managed colonial internal affairs, finance, and civil matters

function.zh: 管理马耳他造船厂和海军基地，是岛上最大雇主
function.en: Managed Malta's dockyards and naval base; the island's largest employer

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通过殖民行政区运行。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through colonial administrative districts.

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法与马耳他民法传统并行。
legalSystem.en: British common law and Maltese civil law traditions operated in parallel.

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、消费税和所得税。
taxationSystem.en: Customs, excise, and income taxes.

culturalAchievements.zh: 瓦莱塔城市建筑遗产源自圣约翰骑士团时代，巴洛克教堂和要塞建筑闻名地中海。马耳他语是唯一的闪米特语族欧洲官方语言。
culturalAchievements.en: Valletta's architectural heritage dated from the Knights of St. John era; Baroque churches and fortifications were renowned across the Mediterranean. Maltese was the only Semitic-family official European language.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系－闪米特语族（马耳他语），英语为官方语言
languageFamily.en: Afroasiatic, Semitic (Maltese), with English as official language

philosophy.zh: 天主教信仰与地中海文化传统
philosophy.en: Catholic faith and Mediterranean cultural traditions

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 经济高度依赖英国皇家海军造船厂和驻军消费。农业受限于岛屿面积，需进口大量粮食。随着战争临近，军事支出成为经济主要驱动力。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was highly dependent on the Royal Navy dockyard and garrison spending. Agriculture was constrained by the island's size, requiring substantial food imports. With war approaching, military expenditure became the primary economic driver.

mainIndustries.zh: 海军造船厂、港口服务、石灰石采掘、农业（马铃薯、洋葱）
mainIndustries.en: Naval dockyard, port services, limestone quarrying, agriculture (potatoes, onions)

tradeGoods.zh: 马铃薯、蕾丝、石灰石；进口谷物、燃料、工业品
tradeGoods.en: Potatoes, lace, limestone; imports of grain, fuel, manufactures

householdWealth.zh: 造船厂工人家庭生活稳定但不富裕，农村家庭较为贫困。
householdWealth.en: Dockyard workers' families lived stably but modestly; rural households were poorer.

economicSystem.zh: 高度依赖英国军事基地的殖民经济。
economicSystem.en: A colonial economy heavily dependent on the British military base.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政规模小但基本平衡，英国军事支出是岛屿经济的重要外部支撑。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were small-scale but roughly balanced; British military spending was crucial external support for the island economy.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政高度依赖英国驻军经济效应。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was highly dependent on the economic effects of the British garrison.

description.zh: 英国陆军驻军，配备现代武器和防空设施。
description.en: British Army garrison equipped with modern weapons and anti-aircraft defenses.

description.zh: 马耳他本地招募的英国殖民地军队。
description.en: Locally recruited British colonial forces.

commanderInChief.zh: 英国地中海舰队司令
commanderInChief.en: Commander-in-Chief, Mediterranean Fleet

technology.zh: 作为皇家海军地中海舰队基地，拥有现代海军设施和防空系统。随着战争临近，防御工事正在加强。
technology.en: As the Royal Navy Mediterranean Fleet base, possessed modern naval facilities and air defense systems. With war approaching, defenses were being strengthened.

unit.zh: 百万1939年英镑（由英国承担）

threats.zh: 距意大利西西里仅93公里，面临意大利空军和海军的严重威胁。在即将到来的战争中，马耳他将承受大规模空袭。
threats.en: Only 93 km from Italian Sicily, facing severe threats from Italian air and naval forces. In the coming war, Malta would endure massive aerial bombardment.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

description.zh: 喷火/零式/Bf109战斗机，争夺制空权
description.en: Spitfire/Zero/Bf109 fighter for air superiority

populationDescription.zh: 约27万人，几乎全为马耳他人（天主教徒），另有少量英国军人和官员。
populationDescription.en: About 270,000, nearly all Maltese (Catholic), with a small number of British military and officials.

socialClasses.zh: 英国殖民官员与军人、天主教教士、商业精英、造船厂工人、农民
socialClasses.en: British colonial officials and military, Catholic clergy, commercial elites, dockyard workers, farmers

allies.zh: 作为英国殖民地无独立外交，是大英帝国在地中海的关键军事据点。
allies.en: No independent foreign policy as a British colony; a key British military outpost in the Mediterranean.

enemies.zh: 意大利是最直接的军事威胁。
enemies.en: Italy posed the most direct military threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由英国控制，马耳他是英国地中海战略的核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by Britain; Malta was central to British Mediterranean strategy.

era.zh: 二战前夕的军事现代化阶段
era.en: Military modernization stage on the eve of World War II

keyInnovations.zh: 皇家海军造船厂的现代设施、防空系统、雷达预警（即将部署）、现代通讯设备
keyInnovations.en: Modern Royal Navy dockyard facilities, air defense systems, radar early warning (about to be deployed), modern communications

strengths.zh: 控制地中海中心的战略位置、强大的英国海军基地、坚固的要塞设施。
strengths.en: Strategic position controlling the central Mediterranean, powerful British naval base, and strong fortress installations.

weaknesses.zh: 距意大利极近、高度依赖外部补给、人口密集且岛屿面积狭小。
weaknesses.en: Extremely close to Italy, highly dependent on external supply, with a dense population on a tiny island.

outlook.zh: 在即将到来的二战中，马耳他将遭受长达两年多的激烈围攻，但最终坚守并获得乔治十字勋章。
outlook.en: In the coming Second World War, Malta would endure over two years of intense siege but ultimately hold out and be awarded the George Cross.

description.zh: 1939年的英属马耳他是地中海中心的英国皇家殖民地和海军基地，即将面临二战中最激烈的围攻之一。
description.en: In 1939, British Malta was a Crown Colony and naval base at the heart of the Mediterranean, about to face one of the most intense sieges of World War II.

name.zh: 摩洛哥谢里夫帝国（法国保护国）

governmentForm.zh: 法国保护国体制：摩洛哥苏丹为名义元首，法国驻扎总督（Résident général）掌握实权
governmentForm.en: French protectorate system: the Moroccan Sultan as nominal head of state, with the French Resident-General holding effective power

socialStructure.zh: 法国殖民者和官员占据政治经济上层，苏丹宫廷和传统大家族保留礼仪性权力，城市工商业阶层和伊斯兰学者为中间层，广大农牧民和柏柏尔山地部落为主体。
socialStructure.en: French colonists and officials occupied the political-economic upper tier; the sultan's court and traditional great families retained ceremonial power; urban commercial classes and Islamic scholars formed the middle; and broad farming, herding populations and Berber mountain tribes formed the majority.

rulingClass.zh: 法国驻扎总督府和殖民行政体系
rulingClass.en: The French Residency and colonial administrative system

succession.zh: 苏丹在阿拉维家族内选立，须获法国批准
succession.en: The sultan was selected within the Alaouite family, requiring French approval

structure.zh: 法国驻扎总督掌握实际行政、军事和外交权力。摩洛哥苏丹保留伊斯兰宗教和传统事务的象征性权威。法国通过民事监察员体系管理城市和平原地区，通过军事管理局控制柏柏尔山地。
structure.en: The French Resident-General held effective administrative, military, and diplomatic power. The Moroccan sultan retained symbolic authority over Islamic religious and traditional affairs. France managed urban and plains areas through civil controllers and controlled Berber mountain regions through military offices.

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、经济政策和安全事务
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, economic policy, and security

name.zh: 公共工程与殖民开发局

function.zh: 管理基础设施建设、城市规划和殖民移民定居
function.en: Managed infrastructure construction, urban planning, and colonial settlement

function.zh: 管理摩洛哥本地行政和部落事务
function.en: Managed Moroccan local administration and tribal affairs

function.zh: 处理伊斯兰宗教事务、传统司法和象征性礼仪
function.en: Handled Islamic religious affairs, traditional justice, and ceremonial functions

localAdmin.zh: 城市和平原地区由法国民事监察员和本地帕夏与卡伊德管理；柏柏尔山地由法国军事管理局控制。
localAdmin.en: Urban and plains areas managed by French civil controllers and local pashas and caids; Berber mountain areas controlled by French military offices.

legalSystem.zh: 三重法律体系：法国法律适用于欧洲人，伊斯兰法（马利基学派）适用于穆斯林，柏柏尔习惯法适用于山地部落。
legalSystem.en: Triple legal system: French law for Europeans, Islamic law (Maliki) for Muslims, Berber customary law for mountain tribes.

taxationSystem.zh: 法国殖民税、传统宗教税（什一税等）、贸易关税和出口税。
taxationSystem.en: French colonial taxes, traditional religious taxes (tithes etc.), trade customs, and export duties.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马利基学派），苏丹作为信士之长
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school), with the sultan as Commander of the Faithful

culturalAchievements.zh: 非斯和马拉喀什是伊斯兰文明的古老中心，卡拉维因大学是世界最古老的大学之一。传统手工艺、建筑和音乐传统丰厚。法国殖民时期的现代城市规划（由利奥泰推动）在拉巴特和卡萨布兰卡留下深刻印记。
culturalAchievements.en: Fes and Marrakech were ancient centers of Islamic civilization; al-Qarawiyyin was one of the world's oldest universities. Rich traditional crafts, architecture, and music. French colonial urban planning (driven by Lyautey) left deep marks on Rabat and Casablanca.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系（阿拉伯语摩洛哥方言、柏柏尔语各方言），法语为殖民行政语言
languageFamily.en: Afroasiatic (Moroccan Arabic, various Berber dialects), French as colonial administrative language

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰信仰和摩洛哥民族主义意识正在知识分子中兴起
philosophy.en: Islamic faith, with Moroccan nationalist consciousness rising among intellectuals

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字、法语拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Arabic script, French in Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 经济由法国殖民者主导的现代化农业（葡萄酒、柑橘）和磷酸盐开采驱动，传统农牧业仍是多数摩洛哥人的生计。卡萨布兰卡港是北非最重要的商港之一。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was driven by French colonist-dominated modern agriculture (wine, citrus) and phosphate mining, while traditional farming and herding remained the livelihood of most Moroccans. Casablanca port was one of North Africa's most important commercial harbors.

mainIndustries.zh: 磷酸盐开采、殖民农业（葡萄酒、柑橘、谷物）、传统手工艺、港口服务
mainIndustries.en: Phosphate mining, colonial agriculture (wine, citrus, grain), traditional handicrafts, port services

tradeGoods.zh: 磷酸盐、葡萄酒、柑橘、谷物、皮革、手工艺品
tradeGoods.en: Phosphates, wine, citrus, grain, leather, handicrafts

householdWealth.zh: 法国殖民者拥有最好的农地和现代产业；城市摩洛哥商人中产有所发展；广大农村人口贫困。
householdWealth.en: French colonists held the best farmland and modern industries; an urban Moroccan merchant middle class was developing; the broad rural population remained poor.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民双元经济：现代化法国殖民经济部门与传统摩洛哥农牧经济并行。
economicSystem.en: Colonial dual economy: a modern French colonial sector alongside a traditional Moroccan agrarian sector.

source.zh: 直接税与磷酸盐特许权费
source.en: Direct taxes and phosphate concession fees

treasuryDescription.zh: 保护国财政需要法国财政支持，磷酸盐收入是重要的自有收入来源。
treasuryDescription.en: Protectorate finances required French fiscal support; phosphate revenues were an important indigenous income source.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政服务于法国殖民利益，重视基础设施以促进殖民经济开发。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy served French colonial interests, prioritizing infrastructure to promote colonial economic exploitation.

description.zh: 法国陆军和外籍军团驻摩洛哥部队。
description.en: French Army and Foreign Legion troops stationed in Morocco.

description.zh: 由法国军官指挥的摩洛哥士兵（古米耶部队和正规部队），在两次世界大战中表现出色。
description.en: Moroccan soldiers commanded by French officers (Goumiers and regular troops), distinguished in both world wars.

commanderInChief.zh: 法国驻扎总督（兼军事总指挥）
commanderInChief.en: French Resident-General (also supreme military commander)

technology.zh: 装备法国制式武器，包括现代步枪、火炮和装甲车辆。军事设施和训练水平较高。
technology.en: Equipped with French standard weapons, including modern rifles, artillery, and armored vehicles. Military facilities and training levels were high.

threats.zh: 柏柏尔山地仍有不稳定因素；摩洛哥民族主义运动日益壮大；二战爆发后将面临更复杂的地缘政治局势。
threats.en: Berber mountain areas remained unstable; the Moroccan nationalist movement was growing; the outbreak of WWII would bring more complex geopolitical challenges.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 喷火/零式/Bf109战斗机，争夺制空权
description.en: Spitfire/Zero/Bf109 fighter for air superiority

description.zh: 斯图卡/SBD俯冲轰炸机，精确打击地面目标
description.en: Stuka/SBD dive bomber for precise ground target strikes

populationDescription.zh: 约700万人，包括阿拉伯人和柏柏尔人为主体的摩洛哥本地人口（约670万），以及约30万法国和其他欧洲殖民者。
populationDescription.en: About 7 million, including a native Moroccan population of Arabs and Berbers (about 6.7 million), plus about 300,000 French and other European colonists.

description.zh: 摩洛哥旅游与文化名城
description.en: Moroccan tourism and cultural city

socialClasses.zh: 法国殖民者与官僚、摩洛哥苏丹宫廷与大家族、城市商人与伊斯兰学者、农牧民与柏柏尔部落
socialClasses.en: French colonists and bureaucrats, Moroccan sultan's court and great families, urban merchants and Islamic scholars, farmers and Berber tribes

allies.zh: 作为法国保护国无独立外交，苏丹保留接见外交使节的礼仪性权力。
allies.en: No independent foreign policy as a French protectorate; the sultan retained ceremonial power to receive diplomatic envoys.

enemies.zh: 摩洛哥民族主义运动与殖民当局关系日趋紧张。
enemies.en: Tensions were growing between the Moroccan nationalist movement and colonial authorities.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由法国控制。苏丹穆罕默德五世正暗中支持民族主义运动。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by France. Sultan Mohammed V was covertly supporting the nationalist movement.

era.zh: 殖民现代化时期

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路和公路网络、卡萨布兰卡现代港口、磷酸盐开采技术、现代城市规划、殖民医疗服务
keyInnovations.en: Railway and road networks, Casablanca modern port, phosphate mining technology, modern urban planning, colonial medical services

strengths.zh: 丰富的磷酸盐资源、卡萨布兰卡的战略港口位置、深厚的伊斯兰文化传统、摩洛哥士兵的优秀军事素质。
strengths.en: Rich phosphate resources, Casablanca's strategic port location, deep Islamic cultural traditions, and excellent military qualities of Moroccan soldiers.

weaknesses.zh: 殖民双元经济导致严重不平等、大多数摩洛哥人缺乏现代教育、柏柏尔山地尚未完全平定。
weaknesses.en: The colonial dual economy created severe inequality; most Moroccans lacked modern education; Berber mountain areas were not fully pacified.

outlook.zh: 二战将深刻改变摩洛哥的政治格局——1943年卡萨布兰卡会议在此召开，战后民族主义运动将加速推动独立。
outlook.en: WWII would profoundly reshape Morocco's political landscape — the 1943 Casablanca Conference was held here, and post-war nationalism would accelerate the drive for independence.

description.zh: 1939年的法属摩洛哥保护国是北非最大的法国殖民地，以磷酸盐和卡萨布兰卡港为经济支柱，苏丹穆罕默德五世正逐步成为民族主义运动的精神象征。
description.en: In 1939, the French Protectorate of Morocco was France's largest North African colony, with phosphates and Casablanca port as economic pillars, and Sultan Mohammed V gradually becoming a spiritual symbol of the nationalist movement.

dynasty.zh: 赫林卡斯洛伐克人民党政权

governmentForm.zh: 一党制天主教法西斯共和国，德国保护国
governmentForm.en: One-party Catholic fascist republic, German protectorate

socialStructure.zh: 社会以斯洛伐克农民为主体，天主教教士阶层影响深远，少数族裔（匈牙利人、德裔、犹太人）占重要比例。赫林卡卫队推行法西斯化政策。
socialStructure.en: Society was predominantly Slovak peasantry with deep Catholic clerical influence; minorities (Hungarians, Germans, Jews) formed significant segments. The Hlinka Guard pushed fascist policies.

rulingClass.zh: 赫林卡斯洛伐克人民党领导层、天主教高级教士、亲德官僚
rulingClass.en: Hlinka's Slovak People's Party leadership, senior Catholic clergy, pro-German bureaucrats

succession.zh: 名义上的选举制，实际上由蒂索在德国支持下集权控制
succession.en: Nominally electoral, in practice concentrated under Tiso with German backing

structure.zh: 1939年3月14日独立后建立的一党制国家，名义上为共和国，实际为纳粹德国的卫星国。蒂索担任总统，图卡担任总理。议会为橡皮图章机构。
structure.en: One-party state established after independence on 14 March 1939, nominally a republic but effectively a satellite of Nazi Germany. Tiso served as president, Tuka as prime minister. The parliament was a rubber-stamp body.

function.zh: 行政管理中枢，协调各部运作
function.en: Central administrative hub coordinating ministerial operations

function.zh: 管理内部安全、警察和赫林卡卫队事务
function.en: Managed internal security, police, and Hlinka Guard affairs

function.zh: 管理斯洛伐克军队
function.en: Administered the Slovak armed forces

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为六个行政区（župy），由中央任命的区长管理。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into six administrative regions (župy), managed by centrally appointed governors.

legalSystem.zh: 基于前捷克斯洛伐克法律体系，逐步引入反犹太和法西斯立法。
legalSystem.en: Based on the former Czechoslovak legal system, gradually introducing anti-Jewish and fascist legislation.

taxationSystem.zh: 沿用捷克斯洛伐克税制，包括所得税、营业税和关税。
taxationSystem.en: Continued the Czechoslovak tax system including income, business, and customs duties.

culturalAchievements.zh: 斯洛伐克民族文化在19世纪民族觉醒中形成，拥有丰富的民间音乐和木建筑传统。蒂索政权将天主教民族主义作为国家意识形态。
culturalAchievements.en: Slovak national culture formed during 19th-century national awakening, with rich folk music and wooden architecture traditions. The Tiso regime elevated Catholic nationalism as state ideology.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系－斯拉夫语族（斯洛伐克语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Slavic (Slovak)

philosophy.zh: 天主教社会教义与民族主义
philosophy.en: Catholic social doctrine and nationalism

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以农业为主的经济体，工业基础相对薄弱（较捷克部分落后），但拥有一定的军工和木材加工能力。经济高度依赖与德国的贸易。
gdpDescription.en: Predominantly agricultural economy with a relatively weak industrial base (lagging behind the Czech lands), but possessing some armaments and timber-processing capacity. Economy was highly dependent on trade with Germany.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、木材加工、军工、纺织
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, timber processing, armaments, textiles

tradeGoods.zh: 木材、农产品、军工产品；进口工业设备、燃料
tradeGoods.en: Timber, agricultural products, armaments; imports of industrial equipment, fuel

householdWealth.zh: 农村家庭生活俭朴，城市工薪阶层收入中等偏低。
householdWealth.en: Rural households lived frugally; urban wage earners had modest incomes.

economicSystem.zh: 资本主义经济，受德国经济圈控制。
economicSystem.en: Capitalist economy, under the German economic sphere of control.

treasuryDescription.zh: 新独立国家财政基础薄弱，高度依赖德国经济支持。
treasuryDescription.en: The newly independent state had a weak fiscal base, heavily dependent on German economic support.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 扩张性财政政策，军费支出增长迅速。
fiscalPolicy.en: Expansionary fiscal policy with rapidly growing military expenditure.

description.zh: 继承了部分前捷克斯洛伐克军队装备，参与了入侵波兰。
description.en: Inherited some former Czechoslovak military equipment; participated in the invasion of Poland.

description.zh: 小规模空军，装备前捷克斯洛伐克飞机。
description.en: Small air force equipped with former Czechoslovak aircraft.

commanderInChief.zh: 费迪南德·恰特洛什
commanderInChief.en: Ferdinand Čatloš

technology.zh: 继承了捷克斯洛伐克的部分军事工业和装备，整体技术水平中等。
technology.en: Inherited some Czechoslovak military industry and equipment; overall technology level was moderate.

threats.zh: 作为德国卫星国参与了入侵波兰，面临未来可能被卷入更大规模战争的风险。匈牙利对南部领土有领土要求。
threats.en: As a German satellite participated in the invasion of Poland; faced risk of involvement in larger-scale war. Hungary had territorial claims on southern regions.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: U型潜艇/美军舰队潜艇，破交战利器
description.en: U-boat/Fleet submarine for commerce raiding

description.zh: 斯图卡/SBD俯冲轰炸机，精确打击地面目标
description.en: Stuka/SBD dive bomber for precise ground target strikes

description.zh: 舰载机母舰，太平洋战争主角
description.en: Carrier launching aircraft, star of the Pacific War

populationDescription.zh: 约265万人，斯洛伐克人占多数，另有匈牙利人（约13%）、德裔（约5%）、犹太人（约4%）和鲁塞尼亚人。
populationDescription.en: About 2.65 million, with Slovaks as majority; also Hungarians (~13%), Germans (~5%), Jews (~4%), and Ruthenians.

socialClasses.zh: 农民、工人、小商人、教士、行政官员
socialClasses.en: Peasants, workers, small merchants, clergy, administrative officials

allies.zh: 纳粹德国（保护国）、匈牙利（紧张关系）。参与了轴心国入侵波兰。
allies.en: Nazi Germany (protector); Hungary (tense relations). Participated in Axis invasion of Poland.

enemies.zh: 名义上与波兰处于战争状态（1939年9月）。
enemies.en: Nominally at war with Poland (September 1939).

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交完全受德国控制，奉行亲德政策。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy entirely controlled by Germany; pursued pro-German policies.

era.zh: 工业化早期

keyInnovations.zh: 继承了部分捷克军工产能（Dubnica兵工厂），基本交通和通信基础设施。
keyInnovations.en: Inherited some Czech armaments production capacity (Dubnica arsenal), basic transport and communications infrastructure.

strengths.zh: 拥有德国保护提供的安全保障，继承了一定的工业和军事基础。
strengths.en: Security guarantee through German protection; inherited some industrial and military base.

weaknesses.zh: 完全依赖德国，缺乏真正的主权；国内民族矛盾尖锐；经济基础薄弱。
weaknesses.en: Complete dependence on Germany with lack of genuine sovereignty; sharp ethnic tensions; weak economic base.

outlook.zh: 作为德国的傀儡国参与二战，最终在1944年爆发斯洛伐克民族起义，1945年被苏军解放后重新并入捷克斯洛伐克。
outlook.en: Participated in WWII as a German puppet state; the Slovak National Uprising erupted in 1944; liberated by Soviet forces in 1945 and reintegrated into Czechoslovakia.

description.zh: 1939年的斯洛伐克共和国是纳粹德国在中欧建立的傀儡国，由天主教神父蒂索领导的法西斯政权统治。
description.en: The Slovak Republic of 1939 was a Nazi German puppet state in Central Europe, ruled by the fascist regime of Catholic priest Tiso.

ruler.zh: 特里布万·比尔·比克拉姆·沙阿

dynasty.zh: 沙阿王朝（拉纳家族摄政）

governmentForm.zh: 名义上的君主制，实际由拉纳家族世袭首相独裁统治
governmentForm.en: Nominal monarchy, effectively under hereditary Rana prime ministerial dictatorship

socialStructure.zh: 严格的种姓等级制度，拉纳家族垄断政治和经济权力，婆罗门和切特里种姓占据社会上层，广大农民处于底层。廓尔喀兵传统深厚。
socialStructure.en: Rigid caste hierarchy with Rana family monopolizing political and economic power; Brahmin and Chhetri castes occupied upper social strata; vast peasantry at the bottom. Strong Gurkha military tradition.

rulingClass.zh: 拉纳家族及其姻亲网络
rulingClass.en: Rana family and their kinship networks

succession.zh: 国王为名义统治者，拉纳首相职位在拉纳家族内部世袭传递
succession.en: The King was nominal ruler; the Rana prime ministership passed hereditarily within the Rana family

structure.zh: 国王为名义元首，实权掌握在拉纳家族世袭首相手中。1939年首相为朱达·舒姆谢尔·拉纳。政府行政高度中央集权，无议会或代议制度。
structure.en: The King was nominal head of state; real power lay with the hereditary Rana prime minister. In 1939 the PM was Juddha Shumsher Rana. Government was highly centralized with no parliament or representative institutions.

function.zh: 一切行政决策中枢
function.en: Central hub for all administrative decision-making

function.zh: 管理尼泊尔军队和廓尔喀兵招募
function.en: Managed the Nepalese army and Gurkha recruitment

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为若干行政区，由拉纳家族成员或亲信担任地方长官。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into several administrative districts, governed by Rana family members or loyalists.

legalSystem.zh: 基于《穆鲁基·艾恩》法典的传统法律体系，融合印度教法和习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Traditional legal system based on the Muluki Ain legal code, blending Hindu law and customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 土地税为主要收入来源，辅以关税和贸易税。
taxationSystem.en: Land tax as primary revenue, supplemented by customs and trade levies.

culturalAchievements.zh: 加德满都谷地拥有世界级的纽瓦尔建筑、帕坦和巴克塔布尔的宫殿与庙宇群。廓尔喀军事传统享誉世界。
culturalAchievements.en: Kathmandu Valley possessed world-class Newar architecture, palaces, and temple complexes at Patan and Bhaktapur. The Gurkha military tradition was renowned worldwide.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（尼泊尔语）、汉藏语系（纽瓦尔语等）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Nepali), Sino-Tibetan (Newar, etc.)

philosophy.zh: 印度教和佛教哲学传统
philosophy.en: Hindu and Buddhist philosophical traditions

writingSystem.zh: 天城文
writingSystem.en: Devanagari script

gdpDescription.zh: 典型的自给自足农业经济，几乎没有现代工业。拉纳家族垄断对外贸易利润。主要出口梯田稻米、木材和廓尔喀兵兵役收入。
gdpDescription.en: Typical subsistence agricultural economy with virtually no modern industry. The Rana family monopolized foreign trade profits. Main exports included terraced rice, timber, and Gurkha military service income.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（水稻、玉米）、林业、手工业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (rice, corn), forestry, handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、木材、香料、麝香、药材；进口棉布、盐、金属制品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, timber, spices, musk, medicinal herbs; imports of cotton cloth, salt, metalware

householdWealth.zh: 拉纳家族极度富裕，广大农民赤贫。
householdWealth.en: The Rana family was enormously wealthy; the vast peasantry lived in poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 封建农业经济，拉纳家族垄断主要经济资源。
economicSystem.en: Feudal agricultural economy with Rana family monopoly over major economic resources.

treasuryDescription.zh: 拉纳家族积累了大量私人财富，国库与私人财产界限模糊。
treasuryDescription.en: The Rana family accumulated enormous personal wealth; the line between state treasury and private fortune was blurred.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守财政，拉纳家族优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative fiscal policy, Rana family first.

description.zh: 以廓尔喀兵传统闻名，装备落后但士兵战斗意志强悍。
description.en: Renowned for the Gurkha tradition; poorly equipped but soldiers were ferociously determined.

description.zh: 在英属印度军队服役的尼泊尔廓尔喀兵，由英国支付军饷。
description.en: Nepalese Gurkhas serving in the British Indian Army, paid by Britain.

commanderInChief.zh: 首相朱达·舒姆谢尔·拉纳
commanderInChief.en: Prime Minister Juddha Shumsher Rana

technology.zh: 军事装备落后于时代，以步枪和山地战术见长。
technology.en: Military equipment lagged behind the era; excelled in rifles and mountain warfare tactics.

threats.zh: 地理上相对隔离，主要威胁来自英属印度的政治压力。二战期间尼泊尔积极向英国提供廓尔喀兵。
threats.en: Geographically isolated; main threat was political pressure from British India. During WWII Nepal actively supplied Gurkha soldiers to Britain.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

populationDescription.zh: 约600万人，多民族国家，包括切特里、婆罗门、马嘉尔、纽瓦尔、塔芒、谢尔巴等族群。
populationDescription.en: About 6 million, multi-ethnic state including Chhetri, Brahmin, Magar, Newar, Tamang, Sherpa, and others.

description.zh: 尼泊尔首都，喜马拉雅文化中心
description.en: Nepali capital, Himalayan cultural center

socialClasses.zh: 拉纳贵族、高种姓地主、中间种姓手工业者和商人、低种姓农民和佣工
socialClasses.en: Rana aristocracy, high-caste landlords, middle-caste artisans and merchants, low-caste peasants and laborers

allies.zh: 英属印度（条约盟友，廓尔喀兵供应国）。二战中支持盟国。
allies.en: British India (treaty ally, Gurkha supplier). Supported the Allies in WWII.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国，但与西藏存在边界争议。
enemies.en: No direct enemies, but border disputes with Tibet existed.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在英国和中国之间维持缓冲国地位，以提供廓尔喀兵换取英国承认其独立。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained buffer state status between Britain and China; supplied Gurkha soldiers in exchange for British recognition of independence.

era.zh: 前工业化时代

keyInnovations.zh: 传统灌溉梯田系统、有限的公路建设、少量现代通讯设施（仅加德满都）。
keyInnovations.en: Traditional irrigated terrace systems, limited road construction, minimal modern communications (Kathmandu only).

strengths.zh: 地理屏障提供天然防御、强悍的廓尔喀兵传统、作为缓冲国的战略价值。
strengths.en: Geographic barriers providing natural defense, fierce Gurkha military tradition, strategic value as buffer state.

weaknesses.zh: 极度封闭和落后、拉纳独裁统治抑制发展、几乎没有现代基础设施。
weaknesses.en: Extreme isolation and backwardness, Rana dictatorship suppressing development, virtually no modern infrastructure.

outlook.zh: 二战期间提供超过20万廓尔喀兵为盟军作战，战后民主运动兴起，1951年拉纳政权被推翻。
outlook.en: Supplied over 200,000 Gurkhas to fight for the Allies during WWII; post-war democratic movements arose, and the Rana regime was overthrown in 1951.

description.zh: 1939年的尼泊尔王国是喜马拉雅山脉南麓的封建王国，由拉纳家族世袭首相实际统治，以廓尔喀兵传统闻名于世。
description.en: The Kingdom of Nepal in 1939 was a feudal Himalayan kingdom effectively ruled by the hereditary Rana prime ministers, renowned worldwide for the Gurkha military tradition.

governmentForm.zh: 英国皇家殖民地，依据1931年多诺莫尔宪法实行有限自治
governmentForm.en: British Crown Colony with limited self-governance under the 1931 Donoughmore Constitution

socialStructure.zh: 社会分为僧伽罗人和泰米尔人两大族群，英国殖民者、伯格人（荷兰裔混血）和穆斯林社区共存。种植园泰米尔劳工处于社会底层。
socialStructure.en: Society divided between Sinhalese and Tamil communities, with British colonials, Burghers (Dutch-mixed heritage), and Muslim communities coexisting. Plantation Tamil laborers were at the bottom.

rulingClass.zh: 英国总督和殖民官僚、本地精英政治家
rulingClass.en: British governor and colonial bureaucracy, local elite politicians

succession.zh: 总督由英国国王任命；国务委员由选举产生
succession.en: Governor appointed by the British Crown; State Councillors were elected

structure.zh: 依据1931年多诺莫尔宪法，设立国务委员会，实行普选制。总督保留最终否决权和防务、外交权力。国务委员会分为若干执行委员会管理不同政府部门。
structure.en: Under the 1931 Donoughmore Constitution, a State Council was established with universal suffrage. The Governor retained final veto and defense/foreign affairs powers. The State Council was divided into executive committees managing different government departments.

function.zh: 总督行政中枢
function.en: Administrative hub of the Governor

function.zh: 管理茶叶、橡胶和椰子种植园产业
function.en: Managed tea, rubber, and coconut plantation industries

localAdmin.zh: 全岛分为九个省，由政府代理人管理。
localAdmin.en: The island was divided into nine provinces, administered by government agents.

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法与罗马-荷兰法并行，辅以僧伽罗和泰米尔习惯法。
legalSystem.en: British common law and Roman-Dutch law in parallel, supplemented by Sinhalese and Tamil customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 出口关税（茶叶、橡胶）、所得税、营业税。
taxationSystem.en: Export duties (tea, rubber), income tax, business tax.

religion.zh: 上座部佛教（僧伽罗人）、印度教（泰米尔人）、伊斯兰教、基督教

culturalAchievements.zh: 锡兰是上座部佛教的中心，拥有锡吉里耶岩石堡垒、康提佛牙寺等世界级文化遗产。阿努拉德普勒和波隆纳鲁沃古都遗址壮观。
culturalAchievements.en: Ceylon was a center of Theravada Buddhism, possessing world-class cultural heritage including the Sigiriya rock fortress and the Temple of the Tooth in Kandy. The ancient capitals of Anuradhapura and Polonnaruwa were spectacular.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（僧伽罗语）、达罗毗荼语系（泰米尔语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Sinhalese), Dravidian (Tamil)

philosophy.zh: 上座部佛教哲学和印度教哲学传统
philosophy.en: Theravada Buddhist and Hindu philosophical traditions

writingSystem.zh: 僧伽罗文、泰米尔文
writingSystem.en: Sinhalese and Tamil scripts

gdpDescription.zh: 以种植园经济为支柱，茶叶、橡胶和椰子是三大出口产品。经济高度依赖国际市场价格波动。1930年代大萧条对锡兰打击严重。
gdpDescription.en: Plantation economy as the backbone, with tea, rubber, and coconut as the three major exports. Economy was highly dependent on international market price fluctuations. The 1930s Great Depression hit Ceylon severely.

mainIndustries.zh: 茶叶种植、橡胶种植、椰子加工、宝石开采
mainIndustries.en: Tea cultivation, rubber cultivation, coconut processing, gem mining

tradeGoods.zh: 茶叶、橡胶、椰子油、宝石、肉桂；进口大米、纺织品、机械
tradeGoods.en: Tea, rubber, coconut oil, gemstones, cinnamon; imports of rice, textiles, machinery

householdWealth.zh: 殖民精英和本地地主富裕，种植园工人极度贫困。
householdWealth.en: Colonial elites and local landowners were wealthy; plantation workers were extremely poor.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民种植园经济，高度依赖出口。
economicSystem.en: Colonial plantation economy, highly dependent on exports.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政基本平衡，但高度依赖茶叶和橡胶出口税收。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were roughly balanced but highly dependent on tea and rubber export revenues.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守财政，以出口税为基础。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative fiscal policy based on export taxes.

description.zh: 本地招募的小规模殖民地部队。
description.en: Small locally recruited colonial force.

description.zh: 英国正规军驻防部队。
description.en: British regular army garrison.

commanderInChief.zh: 英国总督
commanderInChief.en: British Governor

technology.zh: 依赖英国军事装备和指挥体系。
technology.en: Dependent on British military equipment and command structure.

threats.zh: 二战期间日本海军对印度洋构成威胁，1942年锡兰遭到日本空袭。
threats.en: Japanese naval threat to the Indian Ocean during WWII; Ceylon was bombed by Japan in 1942.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

populationDescription.zh: 约600万人，僧伽罗人约占70%，泰米尔人（锡兰泰米尔和印度泰米尔）约占25%，穆斯林和伯格人占其余。
populationDescription.en: About 6 million; Sinhalese ~70%, Tamils (Ceylon Tamil and Indian Tamil) ~25%, Muslims and Burghers the remainder.

socialClasses.zh: 英国殖民官员、本地地主和商业精英、种植园管理者、城市中产阶级、种植园劳工、农民
socialClasses.en: British colonial officials, local landlords and commercial elites, plantation managers, urban middle class, plantation laborers, peasants

allies.zh: 作为英国殖民地无独立外交，是英国在印度洋的重要战略据点。
allies.en: No independent foreign policy as a British colony; an important British strategic position in the Indian Ocean.

enemies.zh: 二战期间面临日本海军威胁。
enemies.en: Faced Japanese naval threats during WWII.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由英国控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by Britain.

era.zh: 殖民现代化阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路网络连接主要种植园区域、科伦坡港口现代化设施、电报通讯系统。
keyInnovations.en: Railway network connecting major plantation areas, modernized Colombo port facilities, telegraph communications system.

strengths.zh: 战略位置控制印度洋航路、高价值出口农产品、相对较高的识字率（在殖民地中）。
strengths.en: Strategic location controlling Indian Ocean sea lanes, high-value export agriculture, relatively high literacy rate (among colonies).

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖种植园出口、族群矛盾日益加深、缺乏工业基础。
weaknesses.en: Over-dependence on plantation exports, deepening ethnic tensions, lack of industrial base.

outlook.zh: 二战期间成为盟军在印度洋的重要基地，战后独立运动加速，1948年获得独立。
outlook.en: Became an important Allied base in the Indian Ocean during WWII; post-war independence movement accelerated, achieving independence in 1948.

description.zh: 1939年的英属锡兰是印度洋上的英国殖民地，以茶叶种植闻名，正在多诺莫尔宪法框架下逐步走向自治。
description.en: British Ceylon in 1939 was a British colony in the Indian Ocean, famous for tea cultivation, gradually moving toward self-governance under the Donoughmore Constitution.

dynasty.zh: 达赖喇嘛传承（第十四世达赖喇嘛年幼）
dynasty.en: Dalai Lama lineage (14th Dalai Lama was a young child)

governmentForm.zh: 藏传佛教神权政体，达赖喇嘛年幼期间由摄政代行权力
governmentForm.en: Tibetan Buddhist theocratic government, with regent ruling during the young Dalai Lama's minority

socialStructure.zh: 社会以寺院僧侣、世俗贵族和农牧民三大阶层构成。寺院拥有大量土地和劳动力，僧侣数量庞大（约占男性人口的20%）。农奴制度仍广泛存在。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised three main strata: monastic clergy, secular aristocracy, and peasant-herders. Monasteries held vast land and labor; monks were numerous (~20% of male population). Serfdom remained widespread.

rulingClass.zh: 达赖喇嘛（或摄政）、噶伦、大寺院住持、世俗贵族
rulingClass.en: Dalai Lama (or Regent), Kashag ministers, abbots of great monasteries, secular aristocrats

succession.zh: 达赖喇嘛通过转世灵童制度传承，摄政由高僧担任
succession.en: Dalai Lama succession through reincarnation system; regents were senior lamas

structure.zh: 噶厦政府为最高行政机构，由四位噶伦（三俗一僧）组成。全国寺院与政府平行运作。1939年第十四世达赖喇嘛丹增嘉措仅四岁，由热振活佛摄政。
structure.en: The Kashag was the highest administrative body, consisting of four Kalons (three secular, one monastic). Monasteries operated parallel to government. In 1939 the 14th Dalai Lama Tenzin Gyatso was only four; Reting Rinpoche served as regent.

function.zh: 处理一切世俗和宗教行政事务
function.en: Handled all secular and religious administrative matters

function.zh: 管理宗教事务和僧侣纪律
function.en: Managed religious affairs and monastic discipline

localAdmin.zh: 全藏分为若干宗（县），由宗本管理。
localAdmin.en: Tibet was divided into several dzong (districts), managed by dzongpon.

legalSystem.zh: 基于藏传佛教戒律和习惯法的传统法律体系。
legalSystem.en: Traditional legal system based on Tibetan Buddhist precepts and customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 实物税（谷物、酥油）、劳役制、寺院田租。
taxationSystem.en: Taxes in kind (grain, butter), corvée labor, monastery land rents.

culturalAchievements.zh: 布达拉宫、大昭寺等世界级建筑遗产。藏传佛教哲学和艺术体系高度发达，唐卡绘画、经书抄写和辩经传统独具特色。藏医药学自成体系。
culturalAchievements.en: World-class architectural heritage including the Potala Palace and Jokhang Temple. Highly developed Tibetan Buddhist philosophical and artistic systems; thangka painting, scripture copying, and debate traditions were distinctive. Tibetan medicine formed a complete system.

languageFamily.zh: 汉藏语系－藏缅语族（藏语）
languageFamily.en: Sino-Tibetan, Tibeto-Burman (Tibetan)

philosophy.zh: 藏传佛教哲学（中观、唯识等印度大乘传统的藏传发展）
philosophy.en: Tibetan Buddhist philosophy (Tibetan developments of Indian Mahayana traditions including Madhyamaka and Yogacara)

writingSystem.zh: 藏文
writingSystem.en: Tibetan script

gdpDescription.zh: 以游牧和农业为主的自给自足经济，牦牛和青稞是高原经济支柱。与印度和中国的贸易有限，主要通过拉萨进行。羊毛是最重要的出口商品。
gdpDescription.en: Subsistence economy based primarily on pastoralism and agriculture; yaks and highland barley were the plateau economic pillars. Trade with India and China was limited, mainly conducted through Lhasa. Wool was the most important export.

mainIndustries.zh: 游牧业、高原农业（青稞、豌豆）、手工业（羊毛纺织、金银器）
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, highland agriculture (barley, peas), handicrafts (wool weaving, gold and silverwork)

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、麝香、药材、马匹；进口茶叶、丝绸、棉布、金属制品
tradeGoods.en: Wool, musk, medicinal herbs, horses; imports of tea, silk, cotton cloth, metalware

householdWealth.zh: 寺院和贵族占有大量土地和牲畜，普通牧民和农奴生活贫困。
householdWealth.en: Monasteries and aristocrats held vast lands and livestock; ordinary herders and serfs lived in poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 封建农奴制经济，寺院经济占重要比例。
economicSystem.en: Feudal serf economy with monasteries holding a significant economic share.

source.en: Land tax and taxes in kind

treasuryDescription.zh: 布达拉宫存有大量金银财宝，但国库实际可动用资金有限。
treasuryDescription.en: The Potala Palace held vast gold and silver treasures, but actually disposable state funds were limited.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 极度保守的财政管理。
fiscalPolicy.en: Extremely conservative fiscal management.

description.zh: 小规模正规军，装备英制步枪，训练水平有限。
description.en: Small regular army equipped with British rifles; training level was limited.

description.zh: 各地方领主和寺院维持的武装力量。
description.en: Armed forces maintained by local lords and monasteries.

commanderInChief.zh: 噶厦（集体指挥）
commanderInChief.en: Kashag (collective command)

technology.zh: 军事装备极为落后，仅有少量英制步枪和旧式火炮。
technology.en: Military equipment was extremely outdated, with only a few British rifles and old artillery pieces.

threats.zh: 来自中国的潜在主权声索是最大威胁，但抗日战争期间中国无力西进。英国和苏联也对西藏有地缘政治利益。
threats.en: Potential Chinese sovereignty claims were the greatest threat, but China was unable to move westward during the Anti-Japanese War. Britain and the Soviet Union also had geopolitical interests in Tibet.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 约300万人，以藏族为绝对主体，另有少量回族、蒙古族和尼泊尔侨民。
populationDescription.en: About 3 million, overwhelmingly Tibetan, with small numbers of Hui, Mongols, and Nepalese residents.

description.zh: 藏传佛教圣城
description.en: Holy city of Tibetan Buddhism

socialClasses.zh: 活佛和高僧、世俗贵族、普通僧侣、自由农牧民、差巴（领主农奴）、朗生（家内奴隶）
socialClasses.en: Living Buddhas and senior lamas, secular aristocracy, ordinary monks, free farmers and herders, trepa (lord-bound serfs), nangzan (household slaves)

allies.zh: 与英属印度保持友好关系，接受英国的事实上承认。
allies.en: Maintained friendly relations with British India; accepted de facto British recognition.

enemies.zh: 中华民国声称对西藏拥有主权，但实际控制有限。
enemies.en: The Republic of China claimed sovereignty over Tibet, but actual control was minimal.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维持事实独立地位，在英、中、苏之间寻求平衡。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained de facto independence, seeking balance among Britain, China, and the Soviet Union.

era.zh: 前工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 传统藏医药、水力磨坊、有限的英制通讯设备（拉萨电报局）。
keyInnovations.en: Traditional Tibetan medicine, water-powered mills, limited British-supplied communications equipment (Lhasa telegraph office).

strengths.zh: 高原地理天险、强大的宗教凝聚力、与英国的友好关系。
strengths.en: Formidable highland geographic barriers, strong religious cohesion, friendly relations with Britain.

weaknesses.zh: 军事极度薄弱、经济封闭落后、内部政治斗争（摄政之间的矛盾）。
weaknesses.en: Extremely weak military, closed and backward economy, internal political struggles (tensions between regents).

outlook.zh: 二战期间维持中立和事实独立，但1950年中华人民共和国军队进藏，结束了西藏的独立地位。
outlook.en: Maintained neutrality and de facto independence during WWII, but PRC forces entered Tibet in 1950, ending its independent status.

description.zh: 1939年的西藏是一个事实上独立的藏传佛教神权政体，在第十四世达赖喇嘛年幼期间由摄政统治。
description.en: Tibet in 1939 was a de facto independent Tibetan Buddhist theocracy, ruled by a regent during the minority of the 14th Dalai Lama.

name.zh: 也门穆塔瓦基利亚王国
也门穆塔瓦基利亚王国

ruler.zh: 叶海亚·穆罕默德·哈米德丁

governmentForm.zh: 扎伊迪什叶派伊玛目制神权君主国
governmentForm.en: Zaydi Shia Imamate theocratic monarchy

socialStructure.zh: 以部族社会为基础，萨达（先知后裔）阶层居于顶端，各部落酋长享有广泛自治权，农民和手工业者处于底层。
socialStructure.en: Tribal society as foundation, with Sayyid (descendants of the Prophet) class at the top; tribal chiefs enjoyed broad autonomy; farmers and artisans at the bottom.

rulingClass.zh: 伊玛目叶海亚家族和扎伊迪萨达贵族
rulingClass.en: Imam Yahya's family and Zaydi Sayyid aristocracy

succession.zh: 伊玛目由扎伊迪教法传统选择，实际上在哈米德丁家族内传递
succession.en: Imam selected by Zaydi jurisprudential tradition, in practice passed within the Hamidaddin family

structure.zh: 伊玛目集宗教和世俗权力于一身。政府行政原始简陋，各部落享有高度自治。对外基本闭关锁国。
structure.en: The Imam concentrated religious and secular power. Government administration was primitive and rudimentary; tribes enjoyed high autonomy. The country was largely isolated from the outside world.

function.zh: 一切行政决策中心
function.en: Center for all administrative decisions

function.zh: 管理皇家卫队和部落武装
function.en: Managed royal guard and tribal armed forces

localAdmin.zh: 各地方由部落酋长和王室任命的官员共同管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas were co-administered by tribal chiefs and royally appointed officials.

legalSystem.zh: 扎伊迪伊斯兰法（沙里亚法）和部落习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Zaydi Islamic law (Sharia) and tribal customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 天课（伊斯兰什一税）、土地税、进口关税。
taxationSystem.en: Zakat (Islamic tithe), land tax, import customs.

religion.zh: 扎伊迪什叶派（统治阶层）、沙斐仪逊尼派（南部）
religion.en: Zaydi Shia (ruling class), Shafi'i Sunni (southern regions)

culturalAchievements.zh: 萨那老城拥有独特的多层塔楼建筑传统，是世界最古老的持续有人居住的城市之一。也门咖啡（摩卡）历史悠久。
culturalAchievements.en: Sana'a Old City possessed unique multi-story tower architecture, as one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world. Yemeni coffee (Mocha) had a long history.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系－闪米特语族（阿拉伯语）
languageFamily.en: Afroasiatic, Semitic (Arabic)

philosophy.zh: 扎伊迪什叶派神学和伊斯兰法学
philosophy.en: Zaydi Shia theology and Islamic jurisprudence

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

gdpDescription.zh: 极度封闭的自给自足农业经济，几乎没有现代基础设施。咖啡曾是重要出口品但已衰落。卡特（一种温和致幻植物）种植日益重要。
gdpDescription.en: Extremely closed subsistence agricultural economy with virtually no modern infrastructure. Coffee was once an important export but had declined. Qat cultivation was increasingly important.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（谷物、咖啡、卡特）、畜牧业、手工业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (grain, coffee, qat), animal husbandry, handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 咖啡、皮革、卡特；进口纺织品、武器、粮食
tradeGoods.en: Coffee, hides, qat; imports of textiles, weapons, grain

householdWealth.zh: 萨达贵族和部落酋长相对富裕，大多数人口赤贫。
householdWealth.en: Sayyid aristocracy and tribal chiefs were relatively wealthy; most of the population lived in poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 封闭的传统农业经济。
economicSystem.en: Closed traditional agricultural economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 伊玛目积累了一定的个人财富，国库与个人财产界限不清。
treasuryDescription.en: The Imam had accumulated some personal wealth; the line between treasury and personal property was unclear.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 极端保守的财政管理。
fiscalPolicy.en: Extremely conservative fiscal management.

description.zh: 伊玛目的直属武装力量。
description.en: The Imam's personal armed force.

description.zh: 各部落酋长控制的武装力量，应召时集结。
description.en: Armed forces controlled by tribal chiefs, mustered when called upon.

commanderInChief.zh: 伊玛目叶海亚
commanderInChief.en: Imam Yahya

technology.zh: 军事装备极为落后，以步枪和传统刀剑为主。
technology.en: Military equipment was extremely outdated, consisting mainly of rifles and traditional bladed weapons.

threats.zh: 英属亚丁保护地在南部构成持续压力。与沙特阿拉伯的边界争端（1934年战争后）。部落叛乱频发。
threats.en: British Aden Protectorate posed persistent pressure in the south. Border disputes with Saudi Arabia (after the 1934 war). Tribal rebellions were frequent.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 约350万人，北部以扎伊迪什叶派为主，南部以沙斐仪逊尼派为主，另有少量犹太社区。
populationDescription.en: About 3.5 million; predominantly Zaydi Shia in the north, Shafi'i Sunni in the south, with small Jewish communities.

socialClasses.zh: 萨达（先知后裔）贵族、部落酋长、城市商人、农民、手工业者、犹太工匠
socialClasses.en: Sayyid aristocracy, tribal chiefs, urban merchants, farmers, artisans, Jewish craftsmen

allies.zh: 与意大利和苏联建有外交关系（以平衡英国影响），但整体上极度孤立。
allies.en: Had diplomatic relations with Italy and the Soviet Union (to balance British influence), but was extremely isolated overall.

enemies.zh: 英属亚丁是最主要的对手。与沙特关系紧张。
enemies.en: British Aden was the primary adversary. Relations with Saudi Arabia were tense.

foreignPolicy.zh: 闭关锁国政策，拒绝外国渗透，同时试图收复南方失地。
foreignPolicy.en: Isolationist policy, rejecting foreign penetration, while attempting to recover lost southern territories.

era.zh: 前工业化时代

keyInnovations.zh: 传统灌溉系统、有限的进口武器。
keyInnovations.en: Traditional irrigation systems, limited imported weapons.

strengths.zh: 山地地形提供天然防御、强悍的部落战士传统、伊玛目的宗教权威。
strengths.en: Mountain terrain providing natural defense, fierce tribal warrior tradition, Imam's religious authority.

weaknesses.zh: 极度封闭落后、部落割据严重、缺乏现代国家治理能力。
weaknesses.en: Extreme isolation and backwardness, severe tribal fragmentation, lack of modern state governance capacity.

outlook.zh: 二战期间基本保持中立，1948年伊玛目叶海亚被暗杀。最终在1962年革命中被推翻。
outlook.en: Remained largely neutral during WWII; Imam Yahya was assassinated in 1948. The Imamate was ultimately overthrown in the 1962 revolution.

description.zh: 1939年的也门穆塔瓦基利亚王国是阿拉伯半岛上极度封闭的扎伊迪什叶派神权君主国。
description.en: The Mutawakkilite Kingdom of Yemen in 1939 was an extremely isolated Zaydi Shia theocratic monarchy on the Arabian Peninsula.

name.zh: 马斯喀特和阿曼苏丹国
马斯喀特和阿曼苏丹国

governmentForm.zh: 绝对君主制，英国保护下的苏丹国
governmentForm.en: Absolute monarchy, Sultanate under British protection

socialStructure.zh: 以部族和教派（伊巴迪派和逊尼派）为社会基本组织，苏丹统治沿海地区，内陆部落享有较大自治权。
socialStructure.en: Tribal and sectarian (Ibadi and Sunni) divisions as basic social organization; Sultan ruled coastal areas, inland tribes had considerable autonomy.

rulingClass.zh: 阿勒布赛义德王族和亲英商人阶层
rulingClass.en: Al Bu Sa'id royal family and pro-British merchant class

succession.zh: 王朝内部传承，需英国认可
succession.en: Dynastic succession within the family, requiring British approval

structure.zh: 苏丹拥有绝对权力但实际控制范围有限，主要集中在马斯喀特沿海地区。内陆由伊巴迪伊玛目和部落酋长实际管理。英国通过条约体系控制外交和防务。
structure.en: Sultan had absolute power but limited actual control, mainly over the Muscat coastal area. Interior was effectively managed by the Ibadi Imam and tribal chiefs. Britain controlled foreign affairs and defense through treaty systems.

function.zh: 一切行政中枢
function.en: Center of all administration

function.zh: 代表英国管理对外事务
function.en: Represented British interests in managing external affairs

localAdmin.zh: 沿海城市由苏丹任命的官员管理，内陆由部落酋长自治。
localAdmin.en: Coastal cities managed by Sultan-appointed officials; interior governed by tribal chiefs autonomously.

legalSystem.zh: 伊巴迪伊斯兰法和部落习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Ibadi Islamic law and tribal customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 关税（马斯喀特港）和部落贡赋。
taxationSystem.en: Customs (Muscat port) and tribal tributes.

religion.zh: 伊巴迪伊斯兰教（多数）、逊尼派

culturalAchievements.zh: 马斯喀特拥有悠久的海洋贸易传统和独特的阿拉伯-印度洋文化融合。历史上是东非沿岸和印度洋贸易网络的重要节点。
culturalAchievements.en: Muscat had a long maritime trade tradition and unique Arab-Indian Ocean cultural fusion. Historically a key node in the East African coast and Indian Ocean trade networks.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系－闪米特语族（阿拉伯语）
languageFamily.en: Afroasiatic, Semitic (Arabic)

philosophy.zh: 伊巴迪伊斯兰教法学
philosophy.en: Ibadi Islamic jurisprudence

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

gdpDescription.zh: 以传统渔业、游牧和转口贸易为主的极度贫困经济。石油尚未被发现开采。椰枣是重要的食物来源和出口品。
gdpDescription.en: Extremely impoverished economy based on traditional fishing, pastoralism, and entrepôt trade. Oil had not yet been discovered or extracted. Dates were an important food source and export.

mainIndustries.zh: 渔业、游牧、椰枣种植、转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Fishing, pastoralism, date cultivation, entrepôt trade

tradeGoods.zh: 椰枣、鱼干、乳香；进口粮食、纺织品、武器
tradeGoods.en: Dates, dried fish, frankincense; imports of grain, textiles, weapons

householdWealth.zh: 马斯喀特商人有一定财富，内陆部落和渔民极度贫困。
householdWealth.en: Muscat merchants had some wealth; interior tribes and fishermen were extremely poor.

economicSystem.zh: 传统商业和游牧经济。
economicSystem.en: Traditional commercial and pastoral economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国家财政极度贫乏，苏丹需要英国的财政支持。
treasuryDescription.en: State finances were extremely meager; the Sultan needed British financial support.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 极度紧缩。
fiscalPolicy.en: Extreme austerity.

name.zh: 马斯喀特和阿曼武装力量

description.zh: 小规模的苏丹卫队和英国训练的正规军。
description.en: Small Sultan's guard and British-trained regular forces.

description.zh: 各部落的武装力量。
description.en: Tribal armed forces.

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹赛义德·本·泰穆尔
commanderInChief.en: Sultan Said bin Taimur

technology.zh: 装备极为简陋，以步枪和刀剑为主。
technology.en: Equipment was extremely rudimentary, mainly rifles and bladed weapons.

threats.zh: 内陆伊巴迪伊玛目的分裂倾向是最大内部威胁。沙特对北部地区的领土野心。
threats.en: Separatist tendencies of the interior Ibadi Imam were the greatest internal threat. Saudi territorial ambitions in the north.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

populationDescription.zh: 约60万人，以阿拉伯部落为主，另有印度商人、非洲裔和俾路支人社区。
populationDescription.en: About 600,000, predominantly Arab tribespeople, with Indian merchants, African-descended, and Baluchi communities.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与贵族、商人（包括印度裔）、部落战士和牧民、渔民、非洲裔仆人
socialClasses.en: Royalty and nobility, merchants (including Indians), tribal warriors and pastoralists, fishermen, African-descended servants

allies.zh: 英国（保护国关系）。
allies.en: Britain (protectorate relationship).

enemies.zh: 与沙特和也门有领土争端。内陆伊玛目构成内部挑战。
enemies.en: Territorial disputes with Saudi Arabia and Yemen. Interior Imam posed internal challenge.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由英国控制，苏丹在英国指导下处理区域关系。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by Britain; Sultan handled regional relations under British guidance.

era.zh: 前工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 传统帆船造船术、有限的进口武器。
keyInnovations.en: Traditional dhow shipbuilding, limited imported weapons.

strengths.zh: 英国保护提供安全保障、马斯喀特港的贸易传统。
strengths.en: British protection providing security, Muscat port's trading tradition.

weaknesses.zh: 极度贫困和落后、苏丹对内陆控制有限、石油尚未发现。
weaknesses.en: Extreme poverty and backwardness, limited Sultan control over interior, oil not yet discovered.

outlook.zh: 石油勘探将在战后展开，1970年苏丹卡布斯政变后推动现代化。
outlook.en: Oil exploration would begin after the war; Sultan Qaboos's 1970 coup would drive modernization.

description.zh: 1939年的马斯喀特和阿曼苏丹国是阿拉伯半岛东南角的英国保护国，极度贫困且与外界隔绝。
description.en: The Sultanate of Muscat and Oman in 1939 was a British protectorate on the southeastern corner of the Arabian Peninsula, extremely poor and isolated from the outside world.

ruler.zh: 艾哈迈德·贾比尔·萨巴赫

governmentForm.zh: 世袭君主制酋长国，英国保护下
governmentForm.en: Hereditary monarchical sheikhdom, under British protection

socialStructure.zh: 以萨巴赫王族、珍珠商人和贝都因部落为三大支柱。1930年代珍珠产业崩溃对经济造成严重打击，石油发现（1938年）将改变一切。
socialStructure.en: Three pillars: Al Sabah royal family, pearl merchants, and Bedouin tribes. The 1930s pearl industry collapse caused severe economic damage; the oil discovery (1938) would change everything.

rulingClass.zh: 萨巴赫家族和大商人家族
rulingClass.en: Al Sabah family and major merchant families

succession.zh: 在萨巴赫家族内部传承
succession.en: Succession within the Al Sabah family

structure.zh: 酋长拥有最高权力，与商人阶层保持协商关系。1938年的短暂议会实验已被撤销。英国控制外交和防务。
structure.en: Sheikh held supreme power, maintaining consultative relationship with merchant class. The brief 1938 parliamentary experiment had been revoked. Britain controlled foreign affairs and defense.

function.zh: 一切政务决策中心
function.en: Center for all governmental decisions

function.zh: 管理英国保护事务
function.en: Managed British protection affairs

localAdmin.zh: 科威特城及周边由酋长直接管理。
localAdmin.en: Kuwait City and surroundings directly managed by the Sheikh.

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰沙里亚法和传统习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Islamic Sharia law and traditional customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 关税为主要收入来源。
taxationSystem.en: Customs duties as primary revenue source.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教逊尼派（马利基和罕百里学派）

culturalAchievements.zh: 独特的海湾珍珠采集传统和航海文化。达乌船建造和海洋贸易是文化标识。
culturalAchievements.en: Distinctive Gulf pearl diving tradition and maritime culture. Dhow building and maritime trade were cultural hallmarks.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系－闪米特语族（阿拉伯语）
languageFamily.en: Afroasiatic, Semitic (Arabic)

philosophy.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教法学
philosophy.en: Sunni Islamic jurisprudence

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

gdpDescription.zh: 传统珍珠采集产业已因日本养殖珍珠竞争而崩溃。1938年发现石油（布尔甘油田），但商业开采因二战推迟到1946年。经济处于珍珠时代结束和石油时代开始之间的困难过渡期。
gdpDescription.en: Traditional pearl diving industry had collapsed due to Japanese cultured pearl competition. Oil was discovered in 1938 (Burgan field), but commercial extraction was delayed until 1946 by WWII. Economy was in a difficult transition between the end of the pearl era and the beginning of the oil age.

mainIndustries.zh: 转口贸易、渔业、残余珍珠产业、船舶建造
mainIndustries.en: Entrepôt trade, fishing, residual pearl industry, shipbuilding

tradeGoods.zh: 珍珠（下降中）、鱼干、转口货物；进口粮食、木材、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Pearls (declining), dried fish, entrepôt goods; imports of grain, timber, textiles

householdWealth.zh: 大商人家族相对富裕，珍珠产业崩溃使许多家庭陷入贫困。
householdWealth.en: Major merchant families were relatively wealthy; pearl industry collapse impoverished many families.

economicSystem.zh: 传统商业经济，处于向石油经济转型前夜。
economicSystem.en: Traditional commercial economy, on the eve of transition to an oil economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 珍珠产业崩溃后财政紧张，但石油特许权费开始带来新收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances tight after pearl industry collapse, but oil concession fees were beginning to bring new revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 紧缩财政，等待石油收入。
fiscalPolicy.en: Austerity fiscal policy, awaiting oil revenues.

description.zh: 酋长的小规模卫队。
description.en: Sheikh's small guard force.

description.zh: 可召集的部落战士。
description.en: Tribal warriors available for mustering.

commanderInChief.zh: 酋长艾哈迈德
commanderInChief.en: Sheikh Ahmad

technology.zh: 仅有轻型步枪。
technology.en: Only light rifles.

threats.zh: 沙特和伊拉克的潜在领土野心（伊拉克声称科威特为其领土）。
threats.en: Potential territorial ambitions of Saudi Arabia and Iraq (Iraq claimed Kuwait as its territory).

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 约10万人，以阿拉伯人为主，另有波斯、印度和非洲裔少数族群。
populationDescription.en: About 100,000, predominantly Arab, with Persian, Indian, and African-descended minority groups.

socialClasses.zh: 王族、大商人、珍珠潜水员、渔民、贝都因牧民
socialClasses.en: Royalty, major merchants, pearl divers, fishermen, Bedouin pastoralists

allies.zh: 英国（保护国条约）。
allies.en: Britain (protectorate treaty).

enemies.zh: 伊拉克声称科威特为其领土。
enemies.en: Iraq claimed Kuwait as its territory.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在英国保护下维持独立，同时与邻国保持谨慎关系。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained independence under British protection while keeping cautious relations with neighbors.

era.zh: 前石油时代

keyInnovations.zh: 1938年布尔甘油田发现、传统帆船建造、基本港口设施。
keyInnovations.en: 1938 Burgan oil field discovery, traditional dhow construction, basic port facilities.

strengths.zh: 英国保护提供安全保障、石油发现带来未来希望、优越的港口位置。
strengths.en: British protection providing security, oil discovery bringing future hope, excellent port location.

weaknesses.zh: 人口稀少、珍珠产业崩溃、军事力量微弱。
weaknesses.en: Sparse population, pearl industry collapse, negligible military force.

outlook.zh: 石油商业开采将在战后开始（1946年），科威特将迅速成为世界最富有的国家之一。1961年独立。
outlook.en: Commercial oil extraction would begin after the war (1946); Kuwait would rapidly become one of the world's wealthiest nations. Independence in 1961.

description.zh: 1939年的科威特是波斯湾沿岸的英国保护下的小酋长国，珍珠产业崩溃后经济困难，但1938年发现的石油将改变其命运。
description.en: Kuwait in 1939 was a small sheikhdom on the Persian Gulf coast under British protection, economically distressed after the pearl industry collapse, but the 1938 oil discovery would transform its destiny.

ruler.zh: 胡安·德莫斯特内斯·阿罗塞梅纳

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，深受美国影响
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic, heavily influenced by the United States

socialStructure.zh: 社会以白人和混血精英主导，运河区由美国直接管理。巴拿马城和科隆的商业阶层、农村农民和运河区工人构成主要社会阶层。
socialStructure.en: Society dominated by white and mestizo elites; Canal Zone directly administered by the US. Panama City and Colón commercial classes, rural farmers, and Canal Zone workers formed the main social strata.

rulingClass.zh: 巴拿马商业精英和政治家族
rulingClass.en: Panamanian commercial elites and political families

succession.zh: 选举制共和制
succession.en: Electoral republican system

structure.zh: 总统制共和国。巴拿马运河区由美国管理，构成国中之国。巴拿马政治深受美国干预影响。
structure.en: Presidential republic. Panama Canal Zone was administered by the US, forming a state within a state. Panamanian politics were heavily influenced by US intervention.

function.zh: 国家行政中枢
function.en: National administrative center

function.zh: 管理巴拿马运河区
function.en: Administered the Panama Canal Zone

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为省和县。
localAdmin.en: Country divided into provinces and districts.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system.

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、运河使用费分成、所得税。
taxationSystem.en: Customs, Canal fee sharing, income tax.

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴拿马运河是20世纪工程奇迹。巴拿马草帽和传统波列拉服装是文化标志。
culturalAchievements.en: Panama Canal was a 20th-century engineering marvel. Panama hats and traditional Pollera dress were cultural icons.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（西班牙语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Spanish)

philosophy.zh: 天主教传统和拉美自由主义
philosophy.en: Catholic tradition and Latin American liberalism

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 经济高度依赖巴拿马运河及美国驻军消费。运河区是最大经济引擎。农业出口以香蕉为主。
gdpDescription.en: Economy heavily dependent on the Panama Canal and US garrison spending. Canal Zone was the biggest economic engine. Agricultural exports centered on bananas.

mainIndustries.zh: 运河服务、商业贸易、香蕉种植、渔业
mainIndustries.en: Canal services, commercial trade, banana cultivation, fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 香蕉、可可、椰子；进口工业品、消费品
tradeGoods.en: Bananas, cocoa, coconuts; imports of manufactured and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 运河区就业者生活较好，农村地区贫困。
householdWealth.en: Canal Zone employees lived relatively well; rural areas were poor.

economicSystem.zh: 依赖运河的开放商业经济。
economicSystem.en: Open commercial economy dependent on the Canal.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政依赖美国运河租金和商业收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances depended on US Canal rent and commercial revenues.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 依赖运河收入的稳健财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Sound fiscal policy relying on Canal revenues.

description.zh: 巴拿马没有正规军队，由国家警察承担内部安全。美国负责运河区和外部防务。
description.en: Panama had no regular army; National Police handled internal security. The US was responsible for Canal Zone and external defense.

commanderInChief.zh: 警察总监
commanderInChief.en: Chief of Police

technology.zh: 仅有轻型武器。美军驻扎运河区。
technology.en: Only light weapons. US military stationed in Canal Zone.

threats.zh: 运河的战略重要性使巴拿马在战时面临被攻击的风险。
threats.en: Canal's strategic importance put Panama at risk of attack in wartime.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 约62万人，混血人种为主，另有白人、黑人（加勒比裔运河工人后代）和原住民。
populationDescription.en: About 620,000, predominantly mestizo, with whites, blacks (descendants of Caribbean canal workers), and indigenous peoples.

socialClasses.zh: 白人和混血精英、运河区工人、农民、原住民
socialClasses.en: White and mestizo elites, Canal Zone workers, farmers, indigenous peoples

allies.zh: 美国（运河条约盟友）。
allies.en: United States (Canal treaty ally).

enemies.zh: 无直接敌国。
enemies.en: No direct enemies.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交深受美国影响，围绕运河利益展开。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy heavily influenced by the US, centered on Canal interests.

era.zh: 运河技术带动的部分现代化
era.en: Partial modernization driven by Canal technology

keyInnovations.zh: 巴拿马运河的工程设施、现代港口、铁路。
keyInnovations.en: Panama Canal engineering facilities, modern ports, railways.

strengths.zh: 巴拿马运河的战略价值、美国保护、过境贸易收入。
strengths.en: Strategic value of the Panama Canal, US protection, transit trade revenues.

weaknesses.zh: 主权受限（运河区由美国控制）、经济过度依赖运河、政治不稳定。
weaknesses.en: Limited sovereignty (Canal Zone controlled by US), over-dependence on Canal, political instability.

outlook.zh: 二战期间运河成为关键军事通道。巴拿马逐步争取收回运河主权，最终于1999年完成。
outlook.en: Canal became a critical military waterway during WWII. Panama gradually sought Canal sovereignty recovery, finally completed in 1999.

description.zh: 1939年的巴拿马共和国因巴拿马运河而具有全球战略重要性，但美国对运河区的控制限制了巴拿马的真正主权。
description.en: The Republic of Panama in 1939 held global strategic importance due to the Panama Canal, but US control of the Canal Zone limited Panama's true sovereignty.

ruler.zh: 莱昂·科尔特斯·卡斯特罗

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic

socialStructure.zh: 拉丁美洲典型的社会分层结构
socialStructure.en: Typical Latin American stratified social structure

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英和大地主
rulingClass.en: Political elites and large landowners

succession.zh: 选举制（实际上受独裁者控制）
succession.en: Electoral (effectively controlled by strongman)

structure.zh: 总统制共和国
structure.en: Presidential republic

function.zh: 国家行政管理
function.en: National administration

localAdmin.zh: 省县制行政管理。
localAdmin.en: Provincial and district administration.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系
legalSystem.en: Civil law system

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、出口税、消费税。
taxationSystem.en: Customs, export taxes, excise duties.

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的本地文化传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich local cultural traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（西班牙语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Spanish)

philosophy.zh: 基督教文化传统
philosophy.en: Christian cultural traditions

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以农产品出口为主的经济体。
gdpDescription.en: Economy primarily based on agricultural exports.

mainIndustries.zh: 咖啡种植、香蕉种植、畜牧业
mainIndustries.en: Coffee cultivation, banana cultivation, cattle ranching

tradeGoods.zh: 农产品出口，工业品进口
tradeGoods.en: Agricultural exports, manufactured imports

householdWealth.zh: 精英阶层富裕，大多数人口贫困。
householdWealth.en: Elites wealthy, most of the population in poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 依赖出口的农业经济。
economicSystem.en: Export-dependent agricultural economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政依赖农产品出口税收。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances depended on agricultural export tax revenues.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative fiscal policy.

description.zh: 小规模国防力量。
description.en: Small-scale defense force.

commanderInChief.zh: 莱昂·科尔特斯·卡斯特罗
commanderInChief.en: León Cortés Castro

technology.zh: 装备简陋，以轻型步枪为主。
technology.en: Poorly equipped, mainly light rifles.

threats.zh: 内部政治不稳定为主要威胁。
threats.en: Internal political instability as the main threat.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

populationDescription.zh: 约65万人。
populationDescription.en: About 0.7 million.

socialClasses.zh: 精英、中产阶级、农民和劳工
socialClasses.en: Elites, middle class, peasants and laborers

allies.zh: 美国（泛美体系）。
allies.en: United States (Pan-American system).

enemies.zh: 无直接外部威胁。
enemies.en: No direct external threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 追随美国外交路线。
foreignPolicy.en: Followed US foreign policy line.

era.zh: 早期现代化

keyInnovations.zh: 基本交通和通讯基础设施。
keyInnovations.en: Basic transport and communications infrastructure.

strengths.zh: 丰富的农业资源。
strengths.en: Rich agricultural resources.

weaknesses.zh: 经济单一化、政治不稳定、社会不平等严重。
weaknesses.en: Mono-crop economy, political instability, severe social inequality.

outlook.zh: 二战期间追随美国对轴心国宣战，战后面临政治和社会改革压力。
outlook.en: Declared war on Axis powers following the US during WWII; faced political and social reform pressure after the war.

description.zh: 1939年的哥斯达黎加是中美洲相对稳定和民主的小国，以咖啡和香蕉出口为经济支柱。
description.en: Costa Rica in 1939 was a relatively stable and democratic small nation in Central America, with coffee and banana exports as economic pillars.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic

socialStructure.zh: 拉丁美洲典型的社会分层结构
socialStructure.en: Typical Latin American stratified social structure

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英和大地主
rulingClass.en: Political elites and large landowners

succession.zh: 选举制（实际上受独裁者控制）
succession.en: Electoral (effectively controlled by strongman)

structure.zh: 总统制共和国
structure.en: Presidential republic

function.zh: 国家行政管理
function.en: National administration

localAdmin.zh: 省县制行政管理。
localAdmin.en: Provincial and district administration.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系
legalSystem.en: Civil law system

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、出口税、消费税。
taxationSystem.en: Customs, export taxes, excise duties.

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的本地文化传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich local cultural traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（西班牙语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Spanish)

philosophy.zh: 基督教文化传统
philosophy.en: Christian cultural traditions

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以农产品出口为主的经济体。
gdpDescription.en: Economy primarily based on agricultural exports.

mainIndustries.zh: 咖啡种植、香蕉种植（联合果品公司）、粮食农业
mainIndustries.en: Coffee cultivation, banana cultivation (United Fruit Company), subsistence agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 农产品出口，工业品进口
tradeGoods.en: Agricultural exports, manufactured imports

householdWealth.zh: 精英阶层富裕，大多数人口贫困。
householdWealth.en: Elites wealthy, most of the population in poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 依赖出口的农业经济。
economicSystem.en: Export-dependent agricultural economy.
