description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

populationDescription.zh: 约170万人。
populationDescription.en: About 1.7 million.

socialClasses.zh: 精英、中产阶级、农民和劳工
socialClasses.en: Elites, middle class, peasants and laborers

allies.zh: 美国（泛美体系）。
allies.en: United States (Pan-American system).

enemies.zh: 无直接外部威胁。
enemies.en: No direct external threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 追随美国外交路线。
foreignPolicy.en: Followed US foreign policy line.

era.zh: 早期现代化

keyInnovations.zh: 基本交通和通讯基础设施。
keyInnovations.en: Basic transport and communications infrastructure.

strengths.zh: 丰富的农业资源。
strengths.en: Rich agricultural resources.

weaknesses.zh: 经济单一化、政治不稳定、社会不平等严重。
weaknesses.en: Mono-crop economy, political instability, severe social inequality.

outlook.zh: 二战期间追随美国对轴心国宣战，战后面临政治和社会改革压力。
outlook.en: Declared war on Axis powers following the US during WWII; faced political and social reform pressure after the war.

description.zh: 1939年的多米尼加共和国处于特鲁希略的铁腕独裁统治下，经济以糖业为支柱。
description.en: The Dominican Republic in 1939 was under the iron-fisted dictatorship of Trujillo, with the sugar industry as economic pillar.

governmentForm.zh: 英国皇家殖民地
governmentForm.en: British Crown Colony

socialStructure.zh: 拉丁美洲典型的社会分层结构
socialStructure.en: Typical Latin American stratified social structure

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英和大地主
rulingClass.en: Political elites and large landowners

succession.zh: 总督由英国任命
succession.en: Governor appointed by Britain

structure.zh: 英国殖民地政府
structure.en: British colonial government

function.zh: 国家行政管理
function.en: National administration

localAdmin.zh: 省县制行政管理。
localAdmin.en: Provincial and district administration.

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法
legalSystem.en: British common law

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、出口税、消费税。
taxationSystem.en: Customs, export taxes, excise duties.

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的本地文化传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich local cultural traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（英语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (English)

philosophy.zh: 基督教文化传统
philosophy.en: Christian cultural traditions

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以农产品出口为主的经济体。
gdpDescription.en: Economy primarily based on agricultural exports.

mainIndustries.zh: 甘蔗种植、香蕉出口、铝土矿
mainIndustries.en: Sugarcane cultivation, banana exports, bauxite mining

tradeGoods.zh: 农产品出口，工业品进口
tradeGoods.en: Agricultural exports, manufactured imports

householdWealth.zh: 精英阶层富裕，大多数人口贫困。
householdWealth.en: Elites wealthy, most of the population in poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 依赖出口的农业经济。
economicSystem.en: Export-dependent agricultural economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政依赖农产品出口税收。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances depended on agricultural export tax revenues.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守财政政策。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative fiscal policy.

description.zh: 小规模国防力量。
description.en: Small-scale defense force.

commanderInChief.zh: 阿瑟·理查兹（总督）
commanderInChief.en: Arthur Richards (Governor)

technology.zh: 装备简陋，以轻型步枪为主。
technology.en: Poorly equipped, mainly light rifles.

threats.zh: 内部政治不稳定为主要威胁。
threats.en: Internal political instability as the main threat.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

populationDescription.zh: 约120万人。
populationDescription.en: About 1.2 million.

socialClasses.zh: 精英、中产阶级、农民和劳工
socialClasses.en: Elites, middle class, peasants and laborers

allies.zh: 英国（宗主国）。
allies.en: Britain (colonial power).

enemies.zh: 无直接外部威胁。
enemies.en: No direct external threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由英国控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by Britain.

era.zh: 早期现代化

keyInnovations.zh: 基本交通和通讯基础设施。
keyInnovations.en: Basic transport and communications infrastructure.

strengths.zh: 丰富的农业资源。
strengths.en: Rich agricultural resources.

weaknesses.zh: 经济单一化、政治不稳定、社会不平等严重。
weaknesses.en: Mono-crop economy, political instability, severe social inequality.

outlook.zh: 二战期间追随美国对轴心国宣战，战后面临政治和社会改革压力。
outlook.en: Declared war on Axis powers following the US during WWII; faced political and social reform pressure after the war.

description.zh: 1939年的牙买加是英国皇家殖民地，以蔗糖和香蕉出口为经济基础，1938年劳工骚乱后正走向自治。
description.en: Jamaica in 1939 was a British Crown Colony, with sugar and banana exports as its economic base, moving toward self-governance after the 1938 labor unrest.

governmentForm.zh: 英国保护领
governmentForm.en: British Protectorate

socialStructure.zh: 英国殖民官员居于顶端，少量欧洲种植园主，广大非洲农民为主体（切瓦族、尼昂加族等）。约翰·奇伦布韦1915年起义的记忆犹在。
socialStructure.en: British colonial officials at the top, small number of European planters, vast African peasant majority (Chewa, Nyanja, etc.). The memory of John Chilembwe's 1915 uprising lingered.

rulingClass.zh: 英国殖民官僚和欧洲种植园主
rulingClass.en: British colonial bureaucracy and European planters

succession.zh: 总督由英国任命
succession.en: Governor appointed by Britain

structure.zh: 英国总督治下的保护领政府，设有立法和行政委员会。
structure.en: Protectorate government under British Governor, with Legislative and Executive Councils.

function.zh: 行政管理中枢
function.en: Administrative center

localAdmin.zh: 通过土著当局体系的间接统治。
localAdmin.en: Indirect rule through Native Authority system.

legalSystem.zh: 英国法和非洲习惯法并行。
legalSystem.en: British and African customary law in parallel.

taxationSystem.zh: 人头税（强迫劳动力流入种植园）、出口税。
taxationSystem.en: Hut tax (forcing labor into plantations), export duties.

religion.zh: 基督教（传教活动广泛）、传统非洲信仰
religion.en: Christianity (widespread missionary activity), traditional African beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 马拉维湖（尼亚萨湖）是非洲第三大湖泊。班图语族文化传统丰富。
culturalAchievements.en: Lake Malawi (Lake Nyasa) was Africa's third-largest lake. Rich Bantu cultural traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系（切瓦语等）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo (Chewa, etc.)

philosophy.zh: 非洲传统信仰与基督教融合
philosophy.en: Blend of African traditional beliefs and Christianity

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（传教士引入）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (introduced by missionaries)

gdpDescription.zh: 以烟草和茶叶种植园经济为主，大量劳动力被迫流向南罗德西亚和南非矿山。
gdpDescription.en: Plantation economy based on tobacco and tea; large labor outflows forced into Southern Rhodesian and South African mines.

mainIndustries.zh: 烟草种植、茶叶种植、劳动力输出
mainIndustries.en: Tobacco cultivation, tea cultivation, labor export

tradeGoods.zh: 烟草、茶叶、棉花；进口工业品
tradeGoods.en: Tobacco, tea, cotton; imports of manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 非洲农民普遍贫困。
householdWealth.en: African farmers were generally impoverished.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民种植园经济。
economicSystem.en: Colonial plantation economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政规模小，高度依赖出口税。
treasuryDescription.en: Small colonial finances, highly dependent on export duties.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守殖民财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative colonial finances.

name.zh: 英王非洲步枪队尼亚萨兰营

description.zh: 英国殖民地部队，二战中将在东非和缅甸作战。
description.en: British colonial forces; would fight in East Africa and Burma during WWII.

commanderInChief.zh: 英国驻军指挥官
commanderInChief.en: British garrison commander

technology.zh: 基本步兵装备。
technology.en: Basic infantry equipment.

threats.zh: 无直接外部威胁。二战期间尼亚萨兰部队将参加东非和远东战役。
threats.en: No direct external threats. During WWII Nyasaland troops would serve in East African and Far Eastern campaigns.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 汤普森/MP40/PPSh-41冲锋枪，近战火力猛
description.en: Thompson/MP40/PPSh-41 SMGs with fierce close-quarters firepower

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 约180万人，以班图语系的切瓦族、尼昂加族、通布卡族为主。
populationDescription.en: About 1.8 million, predominantly Bantu-speaking Chewa, Nyanja, and Tumbuka peoples.

socialClasses.zh: 英国殖民官员、欧洲种植园主、非洲酋长、农民
socialClasses.en: British colonial officials, European planters, African chiefs, peasants

allies.zh: 英国（宗主国）。
allies.en: Britain (colonial power).

enemies.zh: 无。
enemies.en: None.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由英国控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by Britain.

era.zh: 殖民时期

keyInnovations.zh: 有限的铁路和公路、传教士引入的教育设施。
keyInnovations.en: Limited railways and roads, educational facilities introduced by missionaries.

strengths.zh: 丰富的劳动力和农业潜力。
strengths.en: Abundant labor force and agricultural potential.

weaknesses.zh: 极度贫困、缺乏工业基础、劳动力大量外流。
weaknesses.en: Extreme poverty, lack of industrial base, massive labor outflow.

outlook.zh: 二战后民族主义运动兴起，1964年独立为马拉维共和国。
outlook.en: Post-WWII rise of nationalist movements; independence as Republic of Malawi in 1964.

description.zh: 1939年的尼亚萨兰是英国在东南非洲的保护领，以烟草种植和劳动力输出为经济特征。
description.en: Nyasaland in 1939 was a British protectorate in southeastern Africa, characterized economically by tobacco cultivation and labor export.

name.zh: 卢旺达-乌隆迪比利时托管地

governmentForm.zh: 国际联盟B类委任统治领，由比利时管理
governmentForm.en: League of Nations Class B Mandate territory, administered by Belgium

socialStructure.zh: 比利时殖民者将图西族和胡图族的社会区分制度化，发放种族身份证。图西族王室和贵族被用作间接统治工具。
socialStructure.en: Belgian colonizers institutionalized Tutsi-Hutu social distinctions, issuing ethnic identity cards. Tutsi royalty and aristocracy were used as instruments of indirect rule.

rulingClass.zh: 比利时殖民官员、图西族传统王室
rulingClass.en: Belgian colonial officials, Tutsi traditional royalty

succession.zh: 比利时殖民任命
succession.en: Belgian colonial appointment

structure.zh: 比利时通过驻扎专员管理，保留了卢旺达和布隆迪两个传统王国的结构，由图西族国王（姆瓦米）名义上统治。
structure.en: Belgium administered through a Resident Commissioner, preserving the structures of two traditional kingdoms (Rwanda and Burundi), nominally ruled by Tutsi kings (Mwami).

function.zh: 殖民行政管理
function.en: Colonial administration

localAdmin.zh: 通过图西酋长的间接统治体系。
localAdmin.en: Indirect rule system through Tutsi chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 比利时法和传统习惯法并行。
legalSystem.en: Belgian and traditional customary law in parallel.

taxationSystem.zh: 人头税和强制劳役。
taxationSystem.en: Head tax and compulsory labor.

religion.zh: 天主教（传教活动深入）、传统信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 独特的因托尔舞蹈和鼓乐传统。卢旺达王室的宫廷文化高度发达。
culturalAchievements.en: Distinctive Intore dance and drumming traditions. Rwanda's royal court culture was highly developed.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系（基尼亚卢旺达语、基隆迪语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo (Kinyarwanda, Kirundi)

philosophy.zh: 传统非洲信仰与天主教融合
philosophy.en: Blend of traditional African beliefs and Catholicism

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 极度贫困的自给自足农业经济，人口密度高。咖啡开始成为出口作物。比利时殖民者实行强制种植制度。
gdpDescription.en: Extremely impoverished subsistence agricultural economy with high population density. Coffee was becoming an export crop. Belgian colonizers implemented forced cultivation systems.

mainIndustries.zh: 自给自足农业、咖啡种植、牲畜
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, coffee cultivation, livestock

tradeGoods.zh: 咖啡、皮革；进口工业品
tradeGoods.en: Coffee, hides; imports of manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 普遍赤贫。
householdWealth.en: Widespread destitution.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民强制种植经济。
economicSystem.en: Colonial forced cultivation economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政极度有限。
treasuryDescription.en: Extremely limited colonial finances.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 榨取式殖民财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Extractive colonial fiscal policy.

description.zh: 比属刚果公共武装力量的分支，驻扎在卢旺达-乌隆迪。
description.en: Branch of the Belgian Congo's Force Publique, stationed in Ruanda-Urundi.

commanderInChief.zh: 比利时军事指挥官
commanderInChief.en: Belgian military commander

technology.zh: 基本步兵装备。
technology.en: Basic infantry equipment.

threats.zh: 无直接外部威胁。
threats.en: No direct external threats.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: MG42/勃朗宁M2重机枪，火力压制核心
description.en: MG42/Browning M2 HMG, core fire suppression weapon

description.zh: M1加兰德/SVT-40等半自动步枪
description.en: M1 Garand/SVT-40 semi-automatic rifles

populationDescription.zh: 约380万人，胡图族约占85%，图西族约占14%，特瓦族约占1%。
populationDescription.en: About 3.8 million; Hutu ~85%, Tutsi ~14%, Twa ~1%.

socialClasses.zh: 比利时殖民官员、图西贵族和酋长、胡图农民、特瓦族
socialClasses.en: Belgian colonial officials, Tutsi aristocracy and chiefs, Hutu farmers, Twa people

allies.zh: 比利时（殖民宗主国）。
allies.en: Belgium (colonial power).

enemies.zh: 无。
enemies.en: None.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由比利时控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by Belgium.

era.zh: 殖民时期

keyInnovations.zh: 有限的教会学校和诊所。
keyInnovations.en: Limited church schools and clinics.

strengths.zh: 高人口密度提供劳动力。
strengths.en: High population density providing labor.

weaknesses.zh: 极度贫困、殖民种族政策制造的图西-胡图矛盾、缺乏一切现代基础设施。
weaknesses.en: Extreme poverty, Tutsi-Hutu tensions created by colonial ethnic policies, lack of any modern infrastructure.

outlook.zh: 比利时的种族身份证政策将为未来的种族冲突埋下祸根。1962年分别独立为卢旺达和布隆迪。
outlook.en: Belgium's ethnic identity card policy would sow seeds of future ethnic conflict. Independence as Rwanda and Burundi separately in 1962.

description.zh: 1939年的卢旺达-乌隆迪是比利时托管的非洲领地，比利时通过制度化的图西-胡图种族分类进行间接统治。
description.en: Ruanda-Urundi in 1939 was a Belgian-mandated African territory, administered through indirect rule via institutionalized Tutsi-Hutu racial classification.

name.zh: 桑给巴尔苏丹国（英国保护）

dynasty.zh: 阿勒布赛义德王朝（英国保护）

governmentForm.zh: 英国保护下的苏丹国
governmentForm.en: Sultanate under British protection

socialStructure.zh: 阿拉伯裔和印度裔商人精英统治，非洲人口占多数但处于社会底层。丁香种植园经济下存在严重的种族分层。
socialStructure.en: Arab and Indian merchant elites dominated; African majority at the bottom of social hierarchy. Severe racial stratification under the clove plantation economy.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹和阿拉伯裔精英，英国驻扎官
rulingClass.en: Sultan and Arab elites, British Resident

succession.zh: 王朝传承，需英国批准
succession.en: Dynastic succession, requiring British approval

structure.zh: 苏丹为名义统治者，英国驻扎官掌握实权。设有行政和立法委员会。
structure.en: Sultan as nominal ruler; British Resident held real power. Executive and Legislative Councils were established.

function.zh: 实际行政决策中枢
function.en: Actual administrative decision-making center

localAdmin.zh: 通过阿拉伯裔官员和英国殖民体系管理。
localAdmin.en: Administered through Arab officials and British colonial system.

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰法和英国法并行。
legalSystem.en: Islamic and British law in parallel.

taxationSystem.zh: 丁香出口税、关税。
taxationSystem.en: Clove export tax, customs duties.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（多数）、基督教、印度教

culturalAchievements.zh: 桑给巴尔石城是东非斯瓦希里文化的瑰宝，融合阿拉伯、印度和非洲元素。丁香种植传统和印度洋贸易文化历史悠久。
culturalAchievements.en: Zanzibar Stone Town was a jewel of East African Swahili culture, blending Arab, Indian, and African elements. Clove cultivation and Indian Ocean trade culture had deep roots.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系（斯瓦希里语）、亚非语系（阿拉伯语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo (Swahili), Afroasiatic (Arabic)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰教和斯瓦希里文化传统
philosophy.en: Islamic and Swahili cultural traditions

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文和拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Arabic and Latin scripts

gdpDescription.zh: 世界最大丁香生产地。丁香和丁香油出口占经济主导地位。阿拉伯和印度商人控制贸易网络。
gdpDescription.en: World's largest clove producer. Clove and clove oil exports dominated the economy. Arab and Indian merchants controlled trade networks.

mainIndustries.zh: 丁香种植和加工、椰子、渔业、转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Clove cultivation and processing, coconuts, fishing, entrepôt trade

tradeGoods.zh: 丁香、丁香油、椰子油；进口粮食、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Cloves, clove oil, coconut oil; imports of grain, textiles

householdWealth.zh: 阿拉伯和印度裔商人富裕，非洲劳工贫困。
householdWealth.en: Arab and Indian merchants wealthy; African laborers poor.

economicSystem.zh: 丁香种植园经济。
economicSystem.en: Clove plantation economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 丁香出口税提供稳定但有限的收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Clove export tax provided stable but limited revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守财政，依赖丁香收入。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative fiscal policy, reliant on clove revenues.

description.zh: 维持内部秩序的小规模武装力量。
description.en: Small armed force maintaining internal order.

commanderInChief.zh: 英国驻扎官
commanderInChief.en: British Resident

technology.zh: 仅有轻型步枪。
technology.en: Only light rifles.

threats.zh: 无直接外部威胁。
threats.en: No direct external threats.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 破片手榴弹，步兵必备
description.en: Fragmentation hand grenade, infantry essential

description.zh: 75-105mm榴弹炮，师级火力支援
description.en: 75-105mm howitzer, division-level fire support

populationDescription.zh: 约25万人，非洲裔占多数，另有阿拉伯裔、印度裔和混血人群。
populationDescription.en: About 250,000; African majority, with Arab, Indian, and mixed-heritage populations.

socialClasses.zh: 阿拉伯裔精英和苏丹、印度裔商人、非洲裔劳工和农民
socialClasses.en: Arab elites and Sultan, Indian merchants, African laborers and farmers

allies.zh: 英国（保护国）。
allies.en: Britain (protectorate).

enemies.zh: 无。
enemies.en: None.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由英国控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy controlled by Britain.

era.zh: 殖民时期

keyInnovations.zh: 丁香加工技术、港口设施。
keyInnovations.en: Clove processing technology, port facilities.

strengths.zh: 丁香贸易垄断地位、优越的印度洋贸易位置。
strengths.en: Monopoly position in clove trade, excellent Indian Ocean trading location.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖单一作物、种族矛盾深刻、规模极小。
weaknesses.en: Over-dependence on a single crop, deep racial tensions, extremely small size.

outlook.zh: 1963年独立，1964年革命推翻苏丹统治后与坦噶尼喀合并为坦桑尼亚。
outlook.en: Independence in 1963; the 1964 revolution overthrew Sultan rule, leading to merger with Tanganyika to form Tanzania.

description.zh: 1939年的桑给巴尔是英国保护下的苏丹国，以丁香种植闻名世界，多元种族社会存在深刻矛盾。
description.en: Zanzibar in 1939 was a British-protected sultanate, world-famous for clove cultivation, with deep tensions in its multi-racial society.

title.zh: 德国闪击波兰，二战欧洲战场爆发
title.en: Germany Invades Poland, WWII in Europe Begins

description.zh: 1939年9月1日，纳粹德国以闪电战术入侵波兰，英法随即对德宣战。第二次世界大战欧洲战场正式爆发，波兰在不到一个月内沦陷。
description.en: On September 1, 1939, Nazi Germany invaded Poland using blitzkrieg tactics, prompting Britain and France to declare war on Germany. The European theater of World War II officially began, and Poland fell in less than a month.

title.en: Winter War Between Soviet Union and Finland

description.zh: 苏联入侵芬兰，冬季战争爆发。芬兰军队在严寒中凭借出色的游击战术进行了顽强抵抗，虽最终被迫割让领土，但赢得了国际社会的广泛同情。
description.en: The Soviet Union invaded Finland, starting the Winter War. Finnish forces mounted a fierce resistance using guerrilla tactics in harsh winter conditions. Though Finland was eventually forced to cede territory, it won widespread international sympathy.

title.zh: 德国入侵法国和低地国家
title.en: Germany Invades France and the Low Countries

description.zh: 德军绕过马其诺防线，经阿登森林突入法国，同时入侵比利时、荷兰和卢森堡。法国在六周内战败投降，英国远征军从敦刻尔克撤退。
description.en: German forces bypassed the Maginot Line through the Ardennes Forest and invaded Belgium, the Netherlands, and Luxembourg simultaneously. France fell within six weeks, and the British Expeditionary Force evacuated from Dunkirk.

description.zh: 德国空军对英国发动大规模空袭，试图夺取制空权为入侵英伦三岛做准备。英国皇家空军在雷达技术帮助下顽强抵抗，成功阻止了德国的入侵计划。
description.en: The German Luftwaffe launched massive air raids against Britain, attempting to gain air superiority in preparation for invasion. The Royal Air Force, aided by radar technology, mounted a fierce defense and successfully thwarted Germany's invasion plans.

description.zh: 德国、意大利和日本在柏林签署三国同盟条约，正式确立了轴心国军事同盟。三国约定在欧洲和亚太各自建立「新秩序」，并相互提供军事援助。
description.en: Germany, Italy, and Japan signed the Tripartite Pact in Berlin, formally establishing the Axis military alliance. The three powers agreed to establish a 'new order' in Europe and the Asia-Pacific respectively and provide mutual military assistance.

title.zh: 德国入侵苏联（巴巴罗萨行动）
title.en: Germany Invades the Soviet Union (Operation Barbarossa)

description.zh: 纳粹德国动员三百余万兵力沿三条战线入侵苏联，这是人类历史上规模最大的军事行动。苏军初期遭受惨重损失，但纵深防御和严冬最终阻止了德军推进。
description.en: Nazi Germany mobilized over three million troops to invade the Soviet Union along three fronts in the largest military operation in human history. The Red Army suffered devastating initial losses, but defense in depth and the harsh winter eventually halted the German advance.

description.zh: 日本海军航空兵突袭美国夏威夷珍珠港海军基地，击沉多艘战列舰并造成重大伤亡。美国随即对日宣战，太平洋战争全面爆发。
description.en: The Japanese Navy Air Service launched a surprise attack on the U.S. naval base at Pearl Harbor, Hawaii, sinking several battleships and causing heavy casualties. The United States immediately declared war on Japan, and the Pacific War began in full.

description.zh: 日军从马来半岛南下攻克英属新加坡，约八万名英联邦军队投降。这是英国历史上最大规模的投降事件之一，标志着日本在东南亚的征服达到高潮。
description.en: Japanese forces advancing from the Malay Peninsula captured British Singapore, with approximately 80,000 Commonwealth troops surrendering. This was one of the largest surrenders in British history, marking the climax of Japan's Southeast Asian conquests.

description.zh: 美国海军在中途岛伏击日本联合舰队，击沉四艘日本航空母舰。这场决定性胜利扭转了太平洋战场的战略态势，日本海军此后转入守势。
description.en: The U.S. Navy ambushed the Japanese Combined Fleet at Midway, sinking four Japanese aircraft carriers. This decisive victory turned the strategic tide in the Pacific Theater, and the Japanese Navy went on the defensive thereafter.

description.zh: 德军进攻苏联南部重镇斯大林格勒，双方展开了持续数月的惨烈巷战。苏军的反攻最终包围并歼灭了德军第六集团军，这成为二战欧洲战场的重大转折点。
description.en: German forces attacked the strategic Soviet city of Stalingrad, and both sides engaged in months of brutal urban warfare. The Soviet counteroffensive eventually encircled and destroyed the German 6th Army, marking a major turning point in the European theater.

description.zh: 英国蒙哥马利将军指挥第八集团军在北非阿拉曼击败隆美尔的非洲军团。这场胜利标志着北非战场的转折，丘吉尔称之为「末日的开始」。
description.en: British General Montgomery led the Eighth Army to defeat Rommel's Afrika Korps at El Alamein in North Africa. This victory marked the turning point of the North African campaign; Churchill called it 'the end of the beginning.'

description.zh: 墨索里尼被推翻后，意大利新政府向盟军投降。但德军迅速占领意大利北部和中部，建立了萨罗共和国傀儡政权，意大利半岛随后成为激烈战场。
description.en: After Mussolini's overthrow, Italy's new government surrendered to the Allies. However, German forces quickly occupied northern and central Italy, establishing the puppet Republic of Salò. The Italian Peninsula then became a fierce battleground.

description.zh: 盟军在法国诺曼底海岸实施大规模两栖登陆，这是人类历史上规模最大的海上入侵行动。约十五万盟军士兵在首日上岸，开辟了欧洲西线第二战场。
description.en: Allied forces carried out a massive amphibious landing on the Normandy coast of France in the largest seaborne invasion in history. Approximately 150,000 Allied troops landed on the first day, opening a second front in Western Europe.

description.zh: 44个同盟国代表在美国新罕布什尔州布雷顿森林召开会议，建立了以美元为基础的国际货币体系，并创建了国际货币基金组织和世界银行。
description.en: Representatives from 44 Allied nations met at Bretton Woods, New Hampshire, establishing the U.S. dollar-based international monetary system and creating the International Monetary Fund and the World Bank.

description.zh: 罗斯福、丘吉尔和斯大林在克里米亚雅尔塔会面，商讨战后欧洲的政治安排和联合国的筹建。会议的决定深刻塑造了战后世界秩序和冷战格局。
description.en: Roosevelt, Churchill, and Stalin met at Yalta in Crimea to discuss the postwar political arrangement of Europe and the establishment of the United Nations. The conference's decisions profoundly shaped the postwar world order and the Cold War landscape.

title.zh: 柏林战役与纳粹德国覆灭
title.en: Battle of Berlin and Fall of Nazi Germany

description.zh: 苏联红军发起柏林战役，经过激烈的巷战攻入德国首都。希特勒在地堡中自杀，纳粹德国于5月8日无条件投降，欧洲战争结束。
description.en: The Soviet Red Army launched the Battle of Berlin, fighting fierce urban combat to capture the German capital. Hitler committed suicide in his bunker, and Nazi Germany unconditionally surrendered on May 8, ending the war in Europe.

title.zh: 原子弹轰炸广岛和长崎
title.en: Atomic Bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki

description.zh: 美国先后在日本广岛和长崎投下两枚原子弹，造成十数万人死亡。这是人类历史上首次在战争中使用核武器，直接促成了日本的投降和二战的全面结束。
description.en: The United States dropped atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki, Japan, killing over a hundred thousand people. This was the first use of nuclear weapons in warfare, directly leading to Japan's surrender and the end of World War II.

description.zh: 50个国家的代表在旧金山签署《联合国宪章》，联合国正式成立。该组织旨在维护国际和平与安全，取代了已失败的国际联盟。
description.en: Representatives from 50 nations signed the United Nations Charter in San Francisco, officially establishing the United Nations. The organization was designed to maintain international peace and security, replacing the failed League of Nations.

description.zh: 罗斯福与丘吉尔在纽芬兰海域会面，联合发表《大西洋宪章》，阐明了战后世界秩序的基本原则，包括民族自决、自由贸易和裁军。这成为联合国宪章的思想基础。
description.en: Roosevelt and Churchill met off the coast of Newfoundland and jointly issued the Atlantic Charter, articulating principles for the postwar world order including self-determination, free trade, and disarmament. It became the intellectual foundation for the UN Charter.

title.zh: 德军在斯大林格勒投降

description.zh: 被围困的德国第六集团军在弹尽粮绝后投降，约九万名德军士兵成为战俘。斯大林格勒战役的结局是二战东线最重要的转折点，德军此后再未恢复战略主动权。
description.en: The encircled German 6th Army, out of ammunition and supplies, surrendered, with approximately 90,000 German soldiers becoming prisoners of war. The outcome of the Battle of Stalingrad was the most important turning point on the Eastern Front; Germany never regained strategic initiative.

title.zh: 苏联吞并波罗的海三国
title.en: Soviet Annexation of the Baltic States

description.zh: 苏联以军事压力迫使爱沙尼亚、拉脱维亚和立陶宛接受驻军，随后通过操纵选举正式吞并三国。三国独立地位在此后近半个世纪内未能恢复。
description.en: The Soviet Union used military pressure to force Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania to accept Soviet garrisons, then formally annexed the three states through rigged elections. Their independence was not restored for nearly half a century.

description.zh: 美国国会通过《租借法案》，授权总统向任何被认为对美国防务至关重要的国家提供军事物资。英国和苏联成为最大受益国，这标志着美国从中立走向深度介入战争。
description.en: The U.S. Congress passed the Lend-Lease Act, authorizing the President to provide military materiel to any country deemed vital to American defense. Britain and the Soviet Union became the biggest beneficiaries, marking America's shift from neutrality to deep involvement in the war.

description.zh: 盟军在推进过程中相继解放了包括奥斯维辛、布痕瓦尔德、达豪在内的纳粹集中营，大屠杀的真相震惊世界。约六百万犹太人及数百万其他受害者在这些营地中遇难。
description.en: As Allied forces advanced, they liberated Nazi concentration camps including Auschwitz, Buchenwald, and Dachau, revealing the horrors of the Holocaust to the world. Approximately six million Jews and millions of other victims perished in these camps.
